All of the consequences that you have done are to be borne by you.” Before leaving, Old Man Nangong said, "The reason why the Da Xia Empire and Clans declared war is because you have greatly insulted the Yue clan’s third young master, the envoy who came to negotiate with them, and to bring back the dignity and honor that he deserves. You have rejected the goodwill of the Yue clan’s third young master. Please remember this serious lesson in history, never humiliate yourself as an envoy because he represents the dignity of a nation! “

“He’s the Yue clan’s third young master?” The golden wings almost fainted. Isn’t that boy called Yi Lake? This Yue clan’s third young master, who liked to lie everywhere, had made himself suffer a lot. The Guang Ming Continent was finished …

There in the Da Xia Palace, Jun Wuyou and other old foxes were laughing loudly.

The Ambassador of the Dark Continent, Ghost Hell and the Sea Clan Ambassadors of the Elder Xing Pan, smiled at each other.

In fact, they had purposely pretended that they didn’t recognize Yue Yang as soon as Yue Yang entered the hall. He hadn’t expected that the arrogant golden wing would actually misbelieve Yue Yang as a student.

Originally, Yue Yang’s appearance was a coincidence, but he didn’t expect to declare war on him. In the end, he forced the Golden Wing guy to find a reason for everyone to start a fight. If the other ambassadors were teased, they would at most apologize, but the Yue clan’s third young master was mocked in such a manner. It was a great insult in the world. Even if the people of the Guang Ming continent wanted to explain, they would not speak.

What would everyone else think if they let ordinary people know that the Yue clan’s third young master was served with a dish of pig food?

Would he be able to accept the other party’s apology if he sowed directly to the Guang Ming continent?

Of course not.

“I’m sorry, I really didn’t expect those fellows to be so unreasonable.” The old fox embraced Yue Yang’s shoulder with great pleasure.

"F * * k, I haven’t eaten yet. The shame indeed existed, but it’s just for words. If they dare to attack me, I will be in a rage on the spot.” In fact, Yue Yang really wanted Golden Wing to attack him first, as long as Golden Wing waved his fist, the reason for the war would be enough. Of course, if you counted carefully, the Ice Rain that was pouring through Yue Yang’s body could be viewed as an attack. This account would be quite scary. No wonder no one from the Innate Alliance was willing to stand up to stop the Holy Land, including the two of them, and silently cursing the people of the Guang Ming continent.

“It’s not up to you yet. You should go to the Water World to clean up that Yong Hui!” Of course, the old fox wouldn’t let Yue Yang be the first to leave. If he were to go to the Guang Ming Continent, there was no one else to do.

“Well!” Yue Yang really wanted to go to the water world, not to beat him up, but to find that clever little monster, and the Spirit of Radiance.

After that, Yue Yang also prepared to enter the seal space of the black hole and ask the empress of Fei Wenli about the various aspects of the heavenly world.

chapters.title: Chapter 662 – Targets Of Practice
chapters.body:
Chapter 662 – Targets Of Practice

How would Guang Ming Continent be injured? Yue Yang won’t care.

Such a Tong Tian Tower-crossing war was a long process of conquest, and those people of the continent weren’t easy-going. They would not definitely drop down their weapon. Even if all clans were to kill into the continent, they would still resist.

Yue Yang was not interested in conquering the Guang Ming Continent. His true goal was to wait for the outbreak of war and explore this space fissure in the mix.

Heaven Realm, was the goal to conquest for Yue Yang.

As for the low-level dungeons that were as easy as Guang Ming Continent, it would be a waste of time for him to clean up. Just left it to Fatty Hai and Ye Kong to practice. Of course, for the various clans of Tong Tian Tower, Guang Ming Continent in tenth floor that Yue Yang was not interested in was actually a good place to drool. If Yue Yang were not to take the lead in the battle of conquering this continent, otherwise, Underworld Emperor, Dragon Emperor and Demon Abyss would not be able to form an alliance together. Therefore, this matter still had to be done by the name of Yue Yang.

When the news spread out, all the other powers and merchants of Guang Ming Continent were all stunned.

The subordinate forces at the lower level quickly announced that they would leave the alliance of the continent. The chamber of commerce closed. Some allies who were more loyal planned to retreat to the continent and help the alliance master resist the enemy.

The mercenaries on the sixth floor were now getting excited.

They were so excited that they decided to form a mercenary to plunder Guang Ming Continent which was as rich as the Sea Clan.

The mercenaries marched toward the Continent for a good reason, such as their humiliation of Yue Yang.

Killing all of them, they’ve gone too far. How dare you humiliate Yue clan’s third young master? Why don’t we kill them, and what honor do we owe?" Many of the Company leaders didn’t know Yue Yang at all, but it didn’t stop them from sending their troops on this reason.

“We’re going to shove a lot of pig’s food into Golden Wing’s ass!” Some said they were willing to sacrifice their lives for the honor of Yue clan’s third young master.

“Combine the bounty on the Golden Wing and hope that everyone will make contributions. We’ll have to make up a hundred thousand gold to make Gold Wing lose his space in this world …” Everyone offered a small amount of silver for the joint offer of a reward. They gathered together to pay a reward for the mercenary association, who had killed Golden Wing the Special Envoy of Guang Ming Continent. Not to mention, the response from this slogan was like a tide, and it quickly gathered up a hundred thousand gold coins.

Beneath a reward, there must be valor.

Apart from the joint bounty, Demon Clan, Underworld Clan, Sea Clan and several other rich forces had a huge reward for all of the true forces of Guang Ming Continent. In truth, the bounty for Golden Wing had been raised from a hundred thousand gold to five hundred thousand gold coins …

Such a high bounty made the many mercenaries in Tong Tian Tower drool with excitement.

Could they really kill Golden Wing? With this huge reward of five hundred thousand gold, at least they would be able to march toward Guang Ming Continent for a good reason.

The Water World.

Yue Yang didn’t pay attention to the matter of Tong Tian Tower’s expedition to Guang Ming Continent.

Zhong Guan, Captain Bai Ma, and Hei Tu also surrounded and attacked Yong Hui.

“Have you done with it?” Yong Hui was very raged. If it was before, when Light Speed Fang, Sunny Sunflower and Spirit of Radiance were here, he would have made them settle these three. However, Yue Yang took his warbeasts but just left Black Smoke Horn Dragon, making him now was no match for the three. The most important thing was that in this Water World, he had the strength of peak level 4 in Heaven Realm, but he could only watch helplessly as he was surrounded and attacked.

The sorrow of life was nothing than that.

The three of them didn’t show any mercy to Yong Hui. Instead, like beating up dogs they were besieging this unlucky captain Yong Hui every day.

Once tired, they exchanged to take rest, maintaining their harassment. In any case, they didn’t allow him to live a good day.

Originally, Black Smoke Horn Dragon was also a powerful warbeast. However, when he fought with Yue Yang earlier, he had been badly injured by Ah Man, little Wenli, and even the Sunny Sunflower’s rays, and could not handle the fight day after day.

Fortunately, the Nine-headed Purgatory Monsters did not take the opportunity to attack, otherwise, Yong Hui would be even more pathetic.

Captain Yong Hui could not remember that how many times he had quietly asked for a truce. "Zhong Guang, Captain Bai Ma, and Hei Tu, we were a bit misunderstood. We were the warring parties earlier, and our attacks were quite normal. But we should be truant now, and together we’ll always be trapped in Water World? Yue clan’s third young master, who have surrendered, have already left you. He can’t possibly bring you away from here. Are you still willing to serve him? He doesn’t even know what you are doing, and even if he did, he would only use you. It’s impossible to give you any benefits.”

“That’s true.” Behind Yong Hui, Yue Yang suddenly appeared and clapped his hands in commendation.

“It’s you?” Yong Hui was shocked.

“There’s an old saying that it’s happy to have friends from afar. But you don’t seem happy to see me.” Yue Yang waved his hand, and Ye Kong, Fatty Hai, Xue Tan Lang, and Prince Tian Luo from Grimoire World all appeared.

“Your master.” Zhong Guan, Captain Bai Ma and Hei Tu were shocked. Luckily, they hadn’t been tempted by the words of Yong Hui earlier, otherwise they would have been dead person.

"Is this guy Captain Yong Hui from what Heaven Realm? So ugly! " With Fatty Hai’s appearance, how dare he look down on others.

“Nice Heaven Stage.” Xue Tan Lang nodded when he saw Yong Hui.

“Kill him!” The Li brothers were even more excited as they shouted.

“You fool, spread out a bit. There’s Rules of Forbidding Martial Arts and Rules of Forbidding Wars. No one can do anything. We need to use warbeast for attacks.” Ye Kong urged everyone to summon the warbeast and attack Yong Hui together. Facing a group of humans who were weaker than ants, dared to provoke a powerhouse of Heaven Stage level 4. He wanted to cry.

Even a shrimp dares to dupe the dragon when it is in the shallow water; a tiger may even be teased by a dog when it leaves the remote mountains and comes to the bright and flat are.

If there was no Rules of Forbidding Martial Arts and Rules of Forbidding Wars here, how could he be afraid of a group of small shrimps? Even if there was Rules of Forbidding Martial Arts, if he hadn’t let the Yue clan’s third young master snatch away a few warbeasts, with only Black Smoke Horn Dragon, how could he let the weak bully him?

Zhong Guan, Captain Bai Ma and Hei Tu were dumbfounded by the sight. No way, this Yue clan’s third young master wanted to practice with Yong Hui?

A powerhouse at the peak of the Heaven Stage level 4 was actually a target for humans?

Yue Yang instructed them, “I’ll leave them here, you guys watch it for me. If he lost a hair, you’ll take the whole responsibility.”

The meaning behind his words was that Zhong Guan in Heaven Step level 2 had to be a nanny to Ye Kong, Fatty Hai and others… Although Yong Hui was already a mess, he still had a Black Smoke Horn Dragon to help him. Even if fighting to death, he would not be able to kill Ye Kong, Fatty Hai, or Xue Tan Lang in a second. Yue Yang brought Ye Kong and the others here for a purpose of training their troops, allowing them to sense the pressure of a powerhouse in Heaven Stage and wanting them to increase their speed as soon as possible. Except Water World where else could they practice without dying? Here it was!

If it was elsewhere, the human-shaped BOSS would be able to kill Ye Kong and the rest in a split second.

Yong Hui almost cried.

This was totally bullying!

It was fine to let the weak beat them up, but even three Heaven Stages to become babysitters. Simply order yourself to stand still and get beaten!

“Yes.” The three of them were now without the consciousness of a powerhouse of the Heaven Stages, and they loudly replied.

They all looked at the situation very accurately, and it was clearly that the reputation of Heavenly Ranking expert could not be eaten. In the Yue clan’s third young master’s view, the dragon had to be tricked and a tiger had to lie down on the ground. There had no possibility that one could show off his Heaven Stage’s reputation in front of him. It would be good to be a training partner right now. If he did a good job with the Yue clan’s third young master, he would definitely have a good day in the future. As for Yong hui’s senses, was that matter?

Everyone else could sacrifice but himself. For the sake of their future, they had no choice but to sacrifice Yong Hui.

They pretended to be unable to see their warbeasts and only ordered their own warbeasts to wrap themselves around the Black Smoke Horn Dragon. The only thing left to do was watching the show.

In any case, as a peak of the fourth level of the Heaven Stage, Yong Hui wouldn’t die even if there were more people attacking him.

“Are you done?” Yong Hui was so angry that he almost blew his eyes out. With just a bit of attack power, how dared them to challenge him! The strength of the human warriors here was not one in ten thousand of the Yue clan’s third young master. God knew why they became the Yue clan’s third young master.

“A Heaven Stage’s powerhouse indeed has a lot of skin!” Fatty Hai ordered the Little Hippopotamus to execute the Hippo Meteor Punch Fist as he shamelessly commented.

“This is the surface of the water. My Iron Magic Ape and Herculean Rhinoceros Beetle can’t use their power.” Ye Kong was very gloomy.

"My golden mammoth cannot be released, otherwise I can only swim in water. This guy ran so fast, he couldn’t stop and let us beat him up properly. " Fatty Hai was a fellow who didn’t care about anything. He almost coughed up blood and was beaten up by someone. He didn’t even dodge. Who were they?

“Out of the way!” Xun Tan Lang’s battle power was the crown of everyone, and also the only human martial practitioner that Yong Hui had been looking at twice. His Storm Giant’s power had greatly increased in the Water World, and it was as if he was being swept up by the energy of the ocean.

“They really ran fast …” Prince Tian Luo’s Heavenly Flame Meteor and the Storm Giants formed an Ice and Fire Abort.

However, there was no way Yong Hui was a fourth level Heaven Stage expert, so he was completely unable to hit it.

Not only them, but even they, who were also Heaven stage people, rarely hit Guild Leader Yong Hui. Wasn’t he a simple character at the peak of the fourth stage?

After fighting for half a day, Ye Kong and Fatty Hai were so tired that they were like dead dogs. But Yong Hui were completely unharmed.

He stood still and looked at the crowd with a mocking look.

Who else could touch him besides Yue clan’s third young master?

“A Heaven stage powerhouse is indeed impressive.” A voice rang out from behind Guild Leader Yong Hui. This was not Yue Yang, but someone else. Yong Hui turned his head in shock. He discovered that a cool man was staring at him with a downcast gaze. His gaze was like he was about to devour himself, and he was slightly shocked. “Who are you?”

“He’s the boss of the Tong Tian Tower, the boss of the Demonic Palace.” Yue Yang waved his hand.

Not only was the first Sky Execution, but also Sky condemnation, Sky crime, Sky disaster, Sky Fury, Sky Killing, Sky Sword, and the other Demonic Palace were also appearing.

Yong Hui didn’t look at anyone else.

They only looked at the Sky Execution that were filled with killing intent and charged towards the Sky Execution.

Other than the Yue clan’s third young master, only this man was his opponent.

After all, he was a level four Heaven Stage expert. Even in front of a strong opponent, he had his own pride. “A level two Heaven-stage, a good young man. It’s a pity that you want to kill me, but you’re still far from being able to kill me!” If it wasn’t for Yue Yang to strip off a Capable of warbeasts, he wouldn’t have said that, but now, he no longer had the right to be arrogant, not to mention that they were in the Water World that follows Rules of Forbidding Martial Arts.

A special killing intent appeared in the eyes of the Sky Execution: “The conquest of the Heaven realm is indeed an interesting thing. A small mercenary has such strength. The king of the Heaven realm is truly a person’s expectation!"

A tiny mercenary?

Yong Hui was furious. If it wasn’t for this water world, I would have beaten you up. Who is a small mercenary?

“Sky Execution, why don’t you give me a try if you don’t want to do it?” In the sky, the Underworld Emperor and the other Dragon Emperor who had a powerful aura, appeared. He had broken through to the Innate Sovereign, but he had only been hiding the fact that he didn’t leak it to the Underworld Emperor. He flew in front of Guild Leader Yong Hui and sighed, "The Heaven realm experts are indeed powerful. We have always been watching the sky. The true realm of the Innate Sovereign is the beginning of the martial Dao! "

“To be honest, it’s fortunate that there’s Rules of Forbidding Martial Arts here. Otherwise, I really cannot resist a level four Heaven stage expert.” The Dragon Emperor, who also had the second level of the Innate Sovereign, had also exploded with the same battle intent and was extremely eager to challenge the strong and raise his strength.

He was the same as the Sky Execution. If Yue Yang hadn’t risen to prominence, he would still be at the first level of the Innate Sovereign.

However, Yue Yang had led out the Black Hell King, the Scarlet Emperor, and the Ancient Devil King. They also forced them to madly break through to the next level.

Yue Yang’s appearance not only caused Ye Kong and Fatty Hai’s strength to erupt, but even the Dragon Emperor, the Underworld Emperor, and the Sky Execution formed a huge pressure, forcing them to erupt …

"Slowly beat it up, master of the level four of the heaven-stage. It’s definitely not so easily defeated. I hope you can learn more from his experience. I still have things to do, I’m leaving. " Yue Yang would not accompany the Sky Execution to challenge the Guild Leader Yong Hui. In fact, the arrival of the Sky Execution, the Dragon Emperor and the Underworld Emperor was completely unexpected. He would have liked to bring Ye Kong and Fatty Hai to train, increase their morale, increase their pressure, and not expect that the Sky Execution would rise to their own accord with the Guild Leader Yong Hui.

“Brother-in-law, bring me!” The Sky Disaster followed.

“I’m not here to play … …” Yue Yang hurriedly declined. After he found the Spirit of Radiance and the clever little monster in the Water World, he prepared to go and call on Fei Wenli Queen.

When Guild Leader Yong Hui saw that Yue Yang was about to leave, he felt relieved.

If he wasn’t here, even if he was a level two heaven stage or a heaven stage Heavenly Tower Warrior, so what if he was? He was at the peak of the fourth level of the Heaven Stage! Let these heaven-defying beasts see how powerful the martial artists of the Heavenly Realm are. Don’t think that everyone can bully me. There’s only one Yue clan’s third young master in the Heavenly Tower!

“Come, let me see what the Warrior from Tong Tian Tower have.” He didn’t know that although he wasn’t as perverted as Yue Yang, he wasn’t an easy target for the Demonic Palace’s first class’s Demon. If he only thought that Sky Execution wasn’t as good as his, then he’d be in a very wrong way.

“When it’s the last one, kill you!” Sky Execution rejected the first challenge, and he was afraid that he would be unable to resist killing this good target practice.

The only thing left was the Black Smoke Horn Dragon, Sky Execution thinks nothing of Guild Leader Yong Hui.

The only one what could make worry was that the mercenary leader. He actually had the strength of a peak of the fourth level of the Heaven Stage. This made him the first day demon, and he felt a great pressure …

How many experts were there in the Heaven realm?

chapters.title: Chapter 663 – Apprehension Of Sovereign’S Heart
chapters.body:
Chapter 663 – Apprehension Of Sovereign’S Heart

How many experts were there in Heaven Realm? Along with this puzzle, Yue Yang came into the Black Hole Seal.

If it was before, Queen Fei Wenli would not tell Yue Yang too much about the Heaven Realm. There were three reasons. Firstly, he was not strong enough and could be unable to protect himself even if he knew about the Heaven Realm. Secondly, it was useless to know more if there was no change to get into Heaven Realm. Thirdly, the information she knew was from thousands of years ago, though some of which would be fit, but most of which must have been changed beyond recognition.

But not for now. Yue Yang had entered the Heaven Realm.

Although he had only been traveling for a few days, she had also worried about him.

"Heaven Realm is a place that completely focused on strength. All justice and evil are just in verbal terms. Justice belongs to the victor. That’s all! " The Queen nodded at Yue Yang, "I don’t know what the current situation is like in Heaven Realm. But one being able to become the ruler of power was definitely not the kind of true justice. There’s an old saying in Tong Tian Tower that all politics are dirty. This saying is quite suitable to describe the ruler in Heaven Realm. In the past in Tong Tian Tower, there may still be a few stubborn people who insist on justice. It can’t be that every martial artist is mercenary, but Heaven Realm is different. If you were powerful enough, the person who want to kill your enemies in last minute could become your friend immediately! "

“Ah, I understand that.” Yue Yang felt that it was quite normal. After all, the society he once lived in was a place like this.

“Little fellow, I can tell you very seriously that you can have trusted friends in Tong Tian Tower. But in Heaven Realm, you can only believe in yourself, especially when you aren’t strong enough.” Queen Fei Wenli reminded Yue Yang that he must be very careful in the Heaven Realm, and that he couldn’t afford to provoke a super expert in Heaven Stage like the Lionheart King.

The Lionheart King had released Mo Long because of Yue Yang.

Moreover, the Hornless Dragon lady had inherited the divine power from Dragon God Sovereign. If not for that, the Lionheart King would definitely have killed Yue Yang.

Yue Yang nodded and asked curiously, "Lionheart King, who was this guy? You know him? He seems to have something to do with the clown, and the clown is casting eyes at God’s Ruins in Tong Tian Tower. "

The Queen hesitated.

She seemed to be recalling the past, and she didn’t answer for a long time.

Finally, with a light sigh, “I don’t know Lionheart King. I have no memories of him, but I’ve killed a Golden Griffin King in Southern Heaven Realm. I wonder what relationship Golden Griffin King has with Lionheart King. Maybe a descendant, perhaps not …” Golden Griffin King is not a member of Southern Heaven Realm. He is a member of the Central Palace, and when he along with many people in Heaven Stage was besieging me, I killed him. That’s a long-ago story. I could not remember clearly.”

Yue Yang consoled the Queen, "It’s alright, I was just casually asking. However, even the Lionheart King isn’t the strongest. His bounty is worth four billion. Among the people I’ve offended, Sky Region Emperor is more powerful who worthy a hundred billion for bounty and just ranges behind Three Great Leaders and Boundary Master. "

“I should know the Sky Region Emperor.” Queen Fei Wenli was familiar with the name of Celestial.

'You know him? ’ Yue Yang purposely questioned Zhong Guan and got some information about Sky Region Emperor. He then told the Queen, who just sneered.

"This so-called Sky Region Emperor, back then, was just a pirate guild leader. When I recruited the Southern Heaven Realm, he used a ship to ride my army. Otherwise he would not become Emperor.” Queen Fei Wenli disdained this hundred-billion worthy Emperor. She felt that it would be highly unlikely for him to receive a hundred-million bounty without the name of Conquest Queen.

“Ah, your Majesty, Sky Region Emperor has made great progress in ten thousand years.” Yue Yang was speechless profusely. Ten thousand years had passed and there was too much that could happen.

"That’s different. Everything has one limit. It is to say that everyone except you a special little fellow has very limited potential. His promotion can’t exceed his potential. The progress you refer to might probably because of one’s obtaining a divine blood or a martial spirit. But even with both of which, your improvement is limited. " The Queen guessed that Sky Region Emperor, a pirate guild leader in old time, had probably obtained the blood. Otherwise, he wouldn’t have been so arrogant.

"Tell me about Great Leaders and Boundary Master in Heaven Realm. Why they all have three Great Leaders and a Boundary Master in East-South-West-North.?” said Yue Yang.

" Boundary Master is actually a demigod. Or rather, a low-level deity that is fixed in his realm to maintain somewhat order. They won’t start a war. They won’t fight with each other, and they won’t easily fight with outsiders. Once they died, the order of the entire realm might collapse. Being a Boundary Master is a very boring, and normally a true expert wouldn’t accept to become that Boundary Master " She seemed to be looking down upon the demigod level Boundary Master.

“What about Three Great Leaders?” Yue Yang asked once again.

“The speaker for Demigod, or rather, the candidate for his inheritance.” Queen Fei Wenli waved her hand, "Of Three Great Leaders, there will be a successor. Three Great Leaders were free and active, unlike Boundary Master living in the sector. They were very free to often run around to train. If all three Great Leaders died, then Boundary Master would select a new heavyweight from powerhouses in Emperor Stage, or raise one separately, or at times within the Central God’s Realm’s assignments. Those things are very complicated, and it’s a long story. Your current strength can’t even beat the Great Leader … "

“Of course, I am just casually asking.” Yue Yang was speechless again. Not to mention the Three Great Leaders or Sky Region Emperor, even the one-level lower Lionheart King was far inferior.

Four hundred billion bounty, comparing to his one hundred billion.

It’s four hundred times!

The Queen smiled and lightly kissed Yue Yang’s forehead, "With your training speed, you’ll be able to surpass the Lionheart King in a few years. What’s the hurry? About those in King Stage, Emperor Stage, Great Leaders and Boundary Master, we could just completely ignore. The real and far-above powerful one is Dragon God Sovereign.”

When Yue Yang heard this, he hurriedly asked, “Dragon God Sovereign, is he god or human?”

Queen Fei Wenli seemed to have known he would ask this, glancing at him, amused. "Little boy, it won’t benefit any for knowing too much things far beyond what you can imagine. Just keep your feet on the ground and continue to work hard. When you reach that level, I’ll tell you. Well, don’t look at me with that pleading look. Those old fellows told by Mo Long are all existed, just like the ones who sealed me. Some of them come from Tong Tian Tower, and some are experts from other spaces. I don’t know much about them. But one thing for sure, they live in higher space, neither in Tong Tian Tower nor Heaven Realm.”

Yue Yang thought for a moment, “The rules in Tong Tian Tower and Heaven Realm are all laid down by them?”

The Queen shook her head, “No, maybe some, but most of them are from ancient times, remote ages, and even immemorial times.”

“Above the Demigod, is it God?” Yue Yang asked this question in a roundabout way. Actually, he wanted to inquire about the existence of God and the old Taoist who had kicked him into the Soaring Dragon Continent. Was him the God Fei Wenli talked about? If yes, what stage was he? Why did he kick Yua Yang himself into this Continent? Did he want to play RPG in with real humans?

"Well, god is a very general term. To those lived in the bottom of Tong Tian Tower, it was already a god to the eight to ninety level post celestial. But for those lived in the Heaven Realm, the Three Great Leaders and Boundary Master were gods! It’s all relativity. In our views, the existence of God, that is to say, at least had to be those super lives born in the ancient era and held the power of independent laws and some kind of supreme will. Compared to these super lifeforms, even the Three Great Leaders and Boundary Master were like ants … You see, I swept through the Heaven realm and became invincible. But eventually, a God who was nearly a few hundred thousand years younger than me, born in the Soaring Continent, had successfully sealed me in this Black Hole.”

“Will God die?” Yue Yang wondered would such a super life be buried in the Gods’ Ruins after death?

"Nonsense, of course I’m going to die! In truth, God was a super Zhi Zun with unparalleled will. That kind of super Zhi Zun was called the Divine Zhi Zun, and the world shortened it to God. As long as a god has a greater power than the other god, he has the power of law that can suppress it, so he can kill or seal the opponent. " “Am I not?”

“Hmm?” When Yue Yang heard this, he was dumbfounded.

“Ah no, I mean, my situation is similar.” The empress of Fei Wenli quickly changed the topic, "Actually, to truly step onto the Innate Sovereign and possess the Sovereign’s Heart and have an unparalleled will that is independent of the world, it can be said that you have entered the realm of God. As long as you don’t comprehend the Sovereign’s Heart, you don’t have a Grimoire or have an unparalleled will. We don’t admit it, just like you don’t approve of the gorilla monster that the Ancient Slaughterer is. When you have the Sovereign’s Heart, you can gradually grasp the ruling power. Under your will, everything will be carried out according to your will and the laws you have set. "

"For example, this Black Hole Seal is a law will. If my will is stronger than it is, or if your will is stronger than it is, I will easily break it. Of course, if we don’t have enough strength, we can only temporarily comply with this law and break it forcefully, causing a terrible backlash. "

"People can’t enter the Gods’ Ruins. It’s very simple because it’s not a matter of power, but a matter of law. If there was a person who could ignore all the Laws within the Gods’ Ruins, then he could easily enter … There’s also the Devine Grimoire you speak of. The God’s Tome has its own laws of independence. It must possess laws that surpass it, or ignore its laws, and possess that power and will, to obtain the approval of the Devine Grimoire. "

Fei Wenli had taught Yue Yang a good lesson.

Yue Yang pondered for a moment, then asked, “Is the divine beast similar to the others?”

The empress nodded slightly, "That’s true, but the supreme will of the Divine Beast is still a bit more distant than the Divine Sovereign’s will, and it is more one-sided and limited to one aspect. The divine will that truly superpowers power is very frightening. It is said that all things in this world can be born with one thought, and the realm of annihilation is that the God of Creation only exists in the immemorial time.

Yue Yang pondered for a long time.

The old Taoist was not one of those Creator Gods who had been born with a single thought, One Thought, and One World.

He only gave himself a flying sword. The sword spirit inside was so strong that no one could compare to her.

Forget it, the one, who had high levels of cultivation, didn’t think too much. It was indeed quite faint, and it would be better to slowly cultivate.

In his heart, Yue Yang felt that he had become a bit more anxious. In fact, he had so many advantages. He shouldn’t have been too eager to make it, but he should proceed steadily forward. Even the two swords, Gui Cang and Shuang Hua, hadn’t been fully refined yet, and the Rainbow Sword hadn’t been trained. If they all succeeded, what would the Lionheart King be? The sky and the nine of the three great powerhouses of the Western Heaven Realm, why were they afraid?

Although he hadn’t fully comprehended the heart of the Zhi Zun, he had already begun to grasp the power of law because of the Laws of Fate.

In this case, he could use divine power or spiritual will.

Cards of Fate should belong to something very formidable. It might be a divine relic of the ancient times.

As for the Gods’ Ruins, why would the pitiful guy’s mother enter? Now, from the words of Lady Fei Wenli, she must have comprehended the Heart of Zhi Zun, even a higher level of mind. She had an extremely strong will, and could eliminate the effects of the various Laws and powers … Sure enough, cultivation wasn’t a path of force. For example, the Mental Force Field that Yi Nan and the others had learned after night was very like spiritual will exercise.

“So tell me, little one, don’t worry about anything right now. You just have to cultivate slowly. With your potential, everything will be done smoothly. You don’t need to obsess about it, but your willpower will influence your progress.” The words of Lady Fei Wenli had given Yue Yang a great deal of inspiration.

She was afraid that Yue Yang wouldn’t understand her, and she even communicated with him a little bit.

In the past, she would never have been completely connected to him.

Now, in order to make Yue Yang feel even more willpower, he would interact with his brain waves for a second, letting him feel his own realm!

Yue Yang’s eyes turned black.

His entire body was about to tear apart the physical pain. A pressure that was tens of millions of times higher than a mountain shrouded his mind. Yue Yang now understood why heaven-stage practitioners were as powerful as the Lionheart King. They couldn’t comprehend the heart of a Zhi Zun. The reason was simple. This kind of realm was not something that a person could achieve, but a kind of ‘divine sense’.

In front of the divine sense, he felt even smaller than an ant looking up at a mountain.

Fortunately, Yue Yang himself had an extremely strong will, and he only had a single second of total contact with the empress of Fei Wenli. Otherwise, he felt that he would be crushed into shreds under this divine sense.

This sort of divine sense was the law of Lady Fei Wenli’s own, and she was completely in control of her.

Yue Yang’s sense was an existence to it, an existence that ran counter to it, an object that the power of law would completely destroy.

“Pop!” Yue Yang spat out a mouthful of fresh blood.

However, the light in his eyes brightened up.

A will that he didn’t have before quietly appeared in his heart.

Although he hadn’t reached the level of reaching the Innate Sovereign, Yue Yang had discovered the true essence of the Sovereign’s Heart, and he understood what he was doing. If this wasn’t the black hole seal, if it weren’t for the fact that the empress Fei Wenli had controlled the power of his body to lose control, then the terrifying power that would lose control during comprehension could easily destroy the entire capital …

Yue Yang spat out a mouthful of blood as it transformed into energy.

Absorbed by the black hole.

However, the level of enlightenment he had gained in his life had been preserved for ever. A Zhi Zun, even though he was still at the ninth level of the Innate Sovereign realm, he had already obtained the heart of a true Zhi Zun.

“Little guy, this is just a small epiphany. It requires even more enlightenment in the higher realm!” This is the beginning!

Thank you! Yue Yang was incomparably excited as he held the empress’s hand and kissed her deeply.

chapters.title: Chapter 664 – War God Guard
chapters.body:
Chapter 664 – War God Guard

Returning from the Black Hole Seal where Queen Fei Wenli lived, Yue Yang sat motionlessly for three days.

Everyone almost suspected that something was wrong with him.

At first, they thought that he was studying runes.

Later, then everyone realized that something was wrong indeed and sent Yue Yu to figure out.

Yue Yu cupped a bowl of porridge for Yue Yang and asked politely, "Did you encounter any problems within your practice? I couldn’t figure it out for a while, but I found a way out after telling others about it. " Actually, Yue Yu still had a great knot in her heart. The mysteries of identity had not been solved yet. However, she dared not to think too much about it. She pretended to forget the contradictory conversation between her father Yue Shan and her fifth Grandfather. Now, she pretended to be oblivious and came to comfort Yue Yang because she was afraid that her brother wouldn’t be able to figure it out. She was afraid that he wouldn’t be able to leave through a bottleneck and cause everyone to worry. Of course, she believed that this clever younger brother had nothing in the world that could rarely get him baffled. This obstacle was tiny and surely temporary.

“I’m all right!” Yue Yang was stunned at first, then smiled and waved his hand, "I am only digesting the stuffs of my new realm. Ah! Did I sit for a long time? "

“Three days,” said Yue Yu. When she saw that Yue Yang had returned to normal, she was filled with joy, and relaxed.

“I’m too focused.” When Yue Yang returned, he couldn’t wait to immerse himself in Sovereign Realm. He thus forgot to give Master of Luo Hua City and the rest a few words, and he had been completely focused on digesting for three days which made everyone worried.

"It’s good that you’re alright…You can continue. I’m just here to take a look. " Yue Yu thought that she had interrupted Yue Yang practicing and felt a bit guilty.

“I’m not in a hurry to train, but I’ve only just comprehended the Sovereign’s Heart, so I’m too excited. That’s why I have been like this. I promise won’t happen again.” Before Yue Yang could finish speaking, Yue Yu cried out in excitement, "Sovereign’s Heart? You say you have comprehended the Sovereign’s Heart? Ah, that’s wonderful! " Yue Yu insensitively gave Yue Yang a big hug. Without waiting for Yue Yang’s reaction, she immediately ran out to announce the good news to Master of Luo Hua City and the rest.

Of course, it caused a sensation.

Xue Wuxia and Princess Qian Qian, the two girls who were pretending to practice but actually observing quietly, came rushing over.

Master of Luo Hua City, Hai Lan, Yue Bing, and Yi Nan had also heard the news and were joyous. Phoenix Fair Beauty who was currently taking a bath, even more so, had completely forgotten everything. She flew up from the water and couldn’t wait to kiss Yue Yang for the award. Her bold actions made Yue Yu wild-eyed as she secretly felt ashamed of her inescapable limits.

Sky Disaster had a bit more reserved manner. She wiped her body randomly, drenched the bathrobe, shouted ‘Long live brother-in-law’ and rushed to join the fun.

Drunken Cat Sister couldn’t help but feel agitated.

Her mouth curled.

To show that she didn’t care about it.

However, she didn’t stop the Little Panda Girl Niuniu to follow the little girl to rush to Yue Yang. She pretended to cultivate and eavesdropped on the distant cheers from the crowd.

About the fact that Yue Yang had comprehended Sovereign’s Heart, not to mention they felt joyful, it also delighted Night Empress and Zhi Zun.

They came one after the other. Night Empress talked a lot with Yue Yang.

Regardless of whether Yue Yang could memorize it, she would first imbue him with all sorts of knowledge.

Zhi Zun didn’t say too much, just few word, “This is just the beginning!” It was a great compliment from her. Unlike Night Empress, Zhi Zun brought him Dragon Ladies from Eastern Goblin Tribe as present, who were War God Guards. Yue Yang with his comprehension of Sovereign’s Heart had truly been approved.

Of course, Yue Yang had surely come up with something without guessing.

The crescent-shaped silver ornament that they had presented him before would definitely need Sovereign’s Heart while using or sealing.

The Dragon Ladies had never followed their master Yue Yang like the other Senior Combat Imperial Guards, which must because it can benefit nothing before Yue Yang reached Sovereign Realm. Yue Yang didn’t expect what kind of energy the crescent-shaped silver ornament would bring to him, but now he realized that Zhi Zun, Night Empress and Dragon Ladies all had been waiting for him to ascend to Sovereign Realm after all. They must don’t want to put him in of his anxiety back earlier and explained nothing to him.

"I’m Yao. You are our master, and we will protect you with our lives! " That serious elder Dragon Lady called herself Yao.

“We have strong ability!” The cute younger Dragon Lady named herself Yu.

Zhi Zun didn’t say anything, but when Yue Yang pulled out the crescent-shaped silver ornament, she nodded slightly.

And then she left.

What was the use of this white silver accessory?

Yue Yang was perplexed, but suddenly struck by a thought.

Could this thing be the same as the black jade necklace that sealed Queen Fei Wenli?

There are powerful enemies or experts sealed inside? Or treasure? Holy book? Or a Devine beast? Could it be the Devine blood and the Martial Soul?

Yue Yang’s heart flopped over. What Dragon Ladies had presented to him was more than a silver accessory!

"Our current strength is only equivalent to a human warrior’s power of Innate level 8. Without Holy Book, we can’t bring you much help. However, we as War God Guards of Eastern Goblin Tribe, as long as we signed Blood Drop Contract with our master and thus removed the ancestor’s expulsion, will be able to obtain forgiveness from our tribe. When we re-inherited the Immortal bloodline, our strength will greatly increase. I believe we can protect you better. " The elder Dragon Lady said that the Immortal bloodline was sealed within the little white silver accessory in Yue Yang’s hands.

“Mm, our War God Guard has inherited the Immortal Bloodline, and can also transform into a Divine Weapon of the Adults in battle!” The words of yonger Dragon Lady were stunned Yue Yang.

The Blood Winged Angel next to the Zhi Zun was her War God Guard!

However, how could the Blood Winged Angel be the Eastern Immortal Tribe? And how did he have two War God Guard?

The more Yue Yang thought about it, the more mysteries he had, and he simply didn’t want to, since there were many things that he could not find out now. Now, the only thing to do was to bind the Dragon Ladies’ Blood Drop Contract and remove their Remote ancestor’s curse.

The process of the Blood Drop Contract was very complicated. It was the first to draw a unique contract rune on the Summoning Grimoire, and the two women’s foreheads as well.

Then, Yue Yang used the Sovereign Realm to contract with them …

It was impossible to succeed without comprehending the Sovereign’s Heart. No wonder they hadn’t come looking for Yue Yang before, preferring to accompany Xue Wuxia and Princess Qian Qian to practice their cultivation. Xue Wuxia and the Princess Qian Qian knew all about the Blood Drop Contract, and they all backed out of the door, telling everyone to do what they needed to do.

Hearing their words, the ladies scattered.

They were busy.

Yue Yang, who was trying his best to remain in the Sovereign Realm, discovered that his energy flowed into the bodies of the Dragon Ladies one by one. His mind also merged with them, and his innate energy circulated in their bodies.

The Flames of Nirvana burned the body of the Dragon Ladies, allowing them to shed the old body and cleanse it.

The blood contract was very long.

However, this fusion would not fail one by one. With Yue Yang as the leader and two women as the backup, the three of them would be one.

Yue Yang had the illusion that the two women were a part of his body, a special extension, even more real than the guardian beast that Shadow had … His own thoughts, the two girls couldn’t understand, but the two women’s thoughts were clearly reflected in Yue Yang’s mind. It could be said that no matter what Yue Yang wanted to do, he didn’t need to speak. As long as he thought, they could accept and faithfully execute them. As long as this guard, who completely relied on the will of his master, could be called a warlord, he could only call it a War god guard!

The golden light was raising the Summoning Grimoire.

The Summoning Grimoire flipped through.

The content displayed was different from that of normal warbeasts, and it was also different from the guardian beast.

War god guard was a very special existence. They were as loyal as the guardian beasts of life and separated from life and death. They also had independent growth tendencies like ordinary martial artists. They didn’t need to participate in the master’s battle, and they could cultivate their own cultivation.

The most special thing was that because his mind was as calm as his master’s, the War God guard could turn into a Divine Weapon and assist his master in the fight.

This was an ability that neither ordinary warbeasts nor most of the guardian beasts of life could.

Because of the purification of the Flames of Nirvana, the Dragon Ladies were not shy. Instead, they tightly embraced each other. The dragon wings on their backs was gradually appeared when the Remote ancestor’s curse, melted into their souls. As they did, the dragon wings dissipated and became invisible. The three ancient runes that Yue Yang had drawn on them … Yue Yang didn’t understand why he would do that. In his heart, there was only that kind of inspiration, as if he had some power and intelligence.

When Yue Yang dripped blood on the crescent-shaped , it shattered.

An indescribable force assaulted her face.

It easily penetrated Yue Yang.

However, the strange thing was that Yue Yang didn’t suffer the slightest injury. On the contrary, his body seemed to have an inexplicable feeling of comfort, as if he had obtained some sort of conclusion, and it was as if his soul had been aroused by his understanding of the Sovereign’s Heart …

Yue Yang closed his eyes, but he could still clearly see that the inheritance power was actually two one, not one.

They were two perfect powers, one on two.

It was like a bird, but it only had one wing to the right and the left.

How beautiful.

As Yue Yang’s body flew back and forth, the Qilin girl, who had run out, cried out involuntarily, “It’s the lovebirds, how can there be the power of the lovebirds?” Had there been a big war before? "

The two of them merged into Yue Yang’s body.

Scattered around the left and right arms, it was transmitted to the Dragon Ladies.

The female Dragon Ladies all let out a scream when they obtained the inheritance of power of the lovebirds. Their voices were as beautiful as the heavenly sounds, and they directly shuddered at their souls.

Even Xue Wuxia outside of them had been stunned for a long time when they heard this, and their minds recovered. Qilin girl Bing Yin pouted her cute little mouth and helped Yue Yang. She extended her hand to his body and poured a large amount of pure energy into her, allowing him to quickly complete the contract. The Dragon Ladies turned into golden light as they bowed to the Qilin and returned to the Grimoire World to rest … Before completely grasping the power of the inheritance, they believed that they still had a long period of rest. Of course, compared to Jiang Ying that had inherited the power of the Dragon God Sovereign, they would be much better off as a war god guard.

“Thank you, girl, you’re still cute sometimes!” Yue Yang thought that he would die from exhaustion, but he didn’t expect that he would be able to complete the ceremony.

“Ah, you’re a madman…” The Qilin girl Bing Yin saw Yue Yang’s naked body and covered her face as she ran away.

She was shy!

chapters.title: Chapter 665 – Yue Yu, The Strongest Support
chapters.body:
Chapter 665 – Yue Yu, The Strongest Support

The fighting continued on in the Water World. Ye Kong and Fatty Hai were luck to observe a battle that other warriors would never be able to see in their entire lives.

They benefited greatly, far beyond their own comprehension.

Not to mention them, even Zhong Guan, Bai Ma and Hei Tu the three who often suggested to surrender, were deeply impressed with warriors of Tong Tian Tower and the number of their Holy Books, as well as their Dacred Beasts. Those people such as Underworld Emperor, Dragon Emperor, Sky Execution, Sky Condemnation, Sky Crime, owned one Dacred Beast averagely. Among them, Dragon Emperor and Sky Execution possessed not only two Dacred Beasts individually but also a strongest Guardian Warbeast which neared to be Divine Beast.

Once the Dacred Beasts came out and surrounded Yonghui, who was at the peak of Heaven Stage level 4, he fell into a terrible situation.

If it wasn’t for the fact that Sky Execution and the rest had purposely trained and they didn’t want to kill such rare and powerful enemies, Captain Yonghui who lost the Spirit of Radiance would have die for several times.

In the younger generation, Xue Tan Lang with his Storm Giant, Ye Kong with his Iron Magic Ape, and Fatty Hai with his Wind Breath Seabird were unable to directly harm him. But they have learned the skill of command and experienced the battle. That was a treasure that no one else could obtain in their entire lives.

Zhong Guan had reason to believe that when they had grown up, Xue Tan Lang and the others would be the next Sky Execution and Dragon Emperor!

And he felt that the most pitiful thing was that even human warriors like the Li brothers also held a Summoning Grimoire.

This was really unconscionable.

It must be known that in the Heaven Realm only the best qualified warriors could own the Summoning Grimoire. Moreover, it was very difficult to level up. Like the way that little girl, Liu Ye, practiced for a while and then took rest for a while, it was impossible to raise. She was practicing in order to raise the level of Holy Book, the level of Perforate Deer, even the level of Inherent skill. However, the speed of that ascent made them totally speechless.

No wonder that team members of Yue clan’s third young master were all abnormal!

When they were resenting about it, Yue Yang continued his experiment at Rainbow Castle.

“Girl, what do you think this loser pussy is?” Yue Yang called out the Qilin Girl Bing Yin and asked, holding the tail of the smart little monster while ignoring its tearful and pitiful look. His expression was as if he would grill and eat it if it wasn’t friendly.

“Water-Repellent Golden Eyes Beast, the cub one. It seems to be demonic. This loser pussy should be a goblin beast." Jilin Girl yawned a little and went back to sleep.

“Fried or roasted?" Yue Yang asked the Water-Repellent Golden Eyes Beast.

While listened.

The Water-Repellent Golden Eyes Beast was rolling on the ground.

It might try to attract attention in front of many girls with full of empathy.

If there was only Yue Yang there, it would stand still as firm as a stone lion. Without his permission, it didn’t dare to move a step.

Xue Wuxia knew that Yue Yang was just threatening but did’t mean it. However, she didn’t like this kind of goblin beast. She shook her head, indicating that she didn’t need it.

Master of Luo Hua City refused neither because she had obtained a Nirvana Sunflower in Heaven Stage level 5 which help her strength greatly increase. In this case, contracting this Water-Repellent Golden Eyes Beast would just show little help. The most important thing for her was to nurture fox girl, which made she couldn’t afford to adopt one more before fox girl increased to be Dacred Beast or even Devine Beast. The Master of Luo Hua City could also indentedly contract Light Speed Fang. When Yue Yang fuse Light Speed Fang with Aurora, she would benefit greatly. So, she didn’t want this cub although it was really adorable.

"Big brother, I’m only good at plant nurturing.” Yue Bing also waved to her brother. She wanted to increase Titan Ancient Tree the most. If there was Sunny Sunflower, she might even make one more contract in the future. But for this animal warbeast, it was helpless to her.

“Ugly puppy.” Little girl Yue Shuang turned and left.

“I’ll take a nap first, I shouldn’t have over-practiced at night.” Phoenix Fairy Beauty seductively stretched. What she said made Yi Nan blush.

Yi Nan understood what this Heavenly Punishment girl was talking about. For the first a few nights, she did’t interrupt their whispers of love. But later few night, she joined the battle a few directly. And that intense battle made Yi Nan realize she was not qualified wife yet. Yi Nan was stunned at first night Phoenix Fairy Beauty started fighting. She ran away immediately to find Yue Bing and stayed overnight with her. She had no courage to join in that kind of battle, a super battle that her young body could not withstand.

Yi Nan gradually discovered that she was satisfied with a ten-minute battle and could be unable to fight anymore. She was the weakest one among them.

When Hai Lan, the lady Ocean Emperor, began to fight.

It was quite awesome.

Of course, thought felt ashamed, Yi Nan was still preferred the way she got along with Yue Yang. Not stormy style, but gentle and nature. That was what she needed and expected for.

She liked his gentleness. Wildness? For others.

Yi Nan and Yue Bing had left. Thought Water-Repellent Golden Eyes Beast was good, but also was not what they needed … Inside the room, only left Yue Yu and Princess Qian Qian. When her younger brother looked at her, Yue Yu waved her hand with a smile. "I’ve got Stormy Waves. What’s more, you had planned to fuse your Spirit of Radiance with my Angel’s Blade, hadn’t you? If it’s not bad, you can contract by yourself!”

No matter how much Yue Yang increased his battle prowess, Yue Yu felt that it was not enough. She hoped that he would become the supreme expert in the world!

Only then would she feel at ease.

Water-Repellent Golden Eyes Beast was psychic. Upon hearing Yue Yang would contract itself, it quickly shook its head.

It was to indicate that it didn’t want Yue Yang’s contract because of the threaten before! It was so scared.

"Though I don’t want to contract other warbeasts, because I possess White Tiger and that is enough. But since everyone doesn’t want it, let me contract it! Un, I’ll treat it as if I have contracted a pet! "

She had considered the variety of tactics, and it seemed to her that as long as she had the power, everything would be okay.

But in the Water World, she could barely make it.

In the Black Tower.

Seeing the raven’s rich tactics and the special collocation of warbeasts, she had seen her weakness, and she had the idea of strengthening her own battle beast system. If it was an ordinary warbeast, she wouldn’t be able to see it, but this was a Qilin girl Bing Yin also hinting at a good Water-Repellent Golden Eyes Beast. The famous warbeast in the Eastern Goblin Tribe had decided to make a contract with her.

One is to strengthen one’s own strength; the other is to enrich the tactical situation.

If one had a Water-Repellent Golden Eyes Beast, they would at least have a certain advantage in water battles.

In the Black Tower or in the water world, there were many types of combat techniques that could be used in the special space possessing the Rules of Forbidding Martial Arts.

“Wuuuuu!” The little Water-Repellent Golden Eyes Beast pretended to be very obedient and ran to licking Princess Qian Qian’s fingers, then rubbed herself against her feet and pretended to look like a cute pink pet.

“Gray Wolf, come, help me train it. If you can catch it, you can eat it.” After signing the contract, Princess Qian Qian’s complexion turned merciless, revealing a killing intent that was a hundred times stronger than Yue Yang’s. She called Gray Wolf to train the little Water-Repellent Golden Eyes Beast. Of course Grey Wolf would be willing. Loser pussy,！you dare to compete with this dog to please your master. Aren’t you afraid of what the Eastern Demonic Beast is?

“WOO!” The little Water-Repellent Golden Eyes Beast found out that it was unlucky. The new owner of the contract, Princess Qian Qian was even more terrifying than the demonic student Yue Yang.

The tears were useless, and it immediately ran away.

What a joke! That bitch was a Divine Beast, so he couldn’t possibly win.

Princess Qian Qian saw the agony of the little Water-Repellent Golden Eyes Beast, and a smile crept into her tight face. "This loser pussy is quite intelligent, and knows how to hide its strength! If there were no Bing Yin, it would not contract with me … If you really want to subdue it, you should at least take some time! "

Yue Yang knew that Princess Qian Qian would definitely have a way, and smiled, “Let’s hang it for a few days first, then when it sees the various warbeast ascends, it will naturally move.”

Princess Qian Qian pounded Yue Yang’s fist and left.

Yue Yu pretended not to notice.

However, she knew the meaning of the code.

If she thought of Yue Yang, or if she wanted to cultivate a Body Fusion with him, she would mock him in the face when no one else was there.

When Yue Yu saw this two times, she understood the meaning behind this punch. In the future, she would pretend that she didn’t know what to say. She couldn’t help but be distracted when she thought of how her younger brother had used his own body to create Ika. He must have been able to explore his body when he was cultivating his Body Fusion, but now he was able to find out.

He was the only one who could give him a negative energy in the water system. If he lost himself, his progress would be slow.

Yue Yu would rather embarrass herself than become an obstacle to his training.

His ascension was more important than his life.

Moreover, this was the request of Xue Wuxia, Princess Qian Qian, and Master of Luo Hua City. They had hinted that they would work together with Yue Yang’s dual cultivation, not to mention silently supporting Si Niang.

Was she really not her father’s daughter? Or perhaps, she was the one who had misjudged the battlefield?

Had the real one already dead in the battlefield?

Why would Father and Fifth Grandfather have such a huge conflict?

If she was not… Doesn’t that mean … No, I must be the real one!

Yue Yu shook her head forcefully as if she wanted to shake off the thoughts that had secretly appeared in her heart. This thought was intolerable to her. She felt that no matter what, she must be his second sister. She absolutely had nothing to do with him. She absolutely could not be a stranger. Maybe it was something wrong, but she must be her father’s daughter!

“What’s up?” Yue Yang asked, seeing Yue Yu’s strange appearance.

“No, I’m okay!” Yue Yu was startled. She hastily waved her hand, afraid that Yue Yang would see through his own thoughts.

“You have a fever?” Yue Yang touched the flushed face of Yue Yu, and compared the temperature on his forehead with his hand, nodding his head in relief, “There’s no fever, you’re too weak. You don’t pay attention to your body normally, people like you can’t get sick.”

“I’m not that delicate …” Yue Yuye rolled his eyes at Yue Yang. She seemed to be disagreeing with his words, but her heart was sweet.

He was very concerned about himself, and he was even more anxious than he was of anything.

Although she rejected him on the outside, she was very fond of his caring.

It feels good to have such a silly brother!

Yue Yang released the Spirit of Radiance.

He had a crazy idea, ready to restore some of his sanity to the Spirit of Radiance and Yue Yu’s Silver Grade Angel’s Blade. They merged into one and created an unprecedented new warbeast.

If it was before, Yue Yu would definitely refuse him because this fusion would require cultivate a Body Fusion. If it wasn’t done well, the clothes would turn to dust. She knew that when he was cultivating, he could explore his body, but he could not bear to see his body exposed. Now, though, she acquiesced in his plans for integration, because she could not bear to refuse his tender concern.

He fused with the Spirit of Radiance, creating new warbeasts.

This was the crystallization of his blood and blood!

He gave the chance to her, why? To protect herself better. If she still wanted to reject him, he would be too disappointed!

She did’t know what the future would be.

But for now, she had to support him!

He was her proudest brother. As long as it was in his favor, it would be of use to him. Her own life could even sacrifice for him!

No matter what price she had to pay, she was willing to die with no fear.

As his sister, this would be her greatest support!

chapters.title: Chapter 666 – Extremely Highest Grade, Heaven Stage Martial Spirit Pill!
chapters.body:
Chapter 666 – Extremely Highest Grade, Heaven Stage Martial Spirit Pill!

The process of fusing the Spirit of Radiance with the Angel’s Blade is very difficult. It’s much more difficult than making a single Battle Angel.

However, Yue Yang had different rewards every day.

In the process of fusing, almost every day, he had gained new comprehension.

Yue Yang found that the knowledge that the pitiful guy’s mother had given him was only able to unleash true power with the support of Sovereign’s Heart. What he had previously mastered was simply a step into the doorway. He could barely imagine how the pitiful guy’s mother could know so much. If people could grasp one percent of her knowledge, or one in a thousand, she would be a wise and learned man!

Yue Yang had reached the Sovereign Realm so that he felt his brain was developed more. His memory became better and his reaction speed became faster as well.

It’s impossible for him to remember so much before.

Which absolutely had caused a mess.

Now, the tide-like memories were unsealed, spreading out in all directions. He felt that he could memorize them easily, and that most of them were connected to each other in the memory process. It was as simple as calculating the number of digits in the heart.

Only a small amount of profound knowledge needed careful pondering.

Of course, there was still a part of all knowledge, even in Sovereign Realm, that were mysteries and unsealed.

Perhaps those mysteries required Yue Yang to reach a higher realm before he could unseal it.

"Why are you so interested in refining Martial Spirit Pill today?” Yue Yu had spent the past few days practicing martial arts with Yue Yang. She was tacit permitted that the required dual-cultivation for fusing the Spirit of Radiance with his Angel’s Blade made his innate energy spread ing throughout their bodies. Even if Yue Yang failed fusing and caused the blow-up of their clothing, she would not flee as before, but stayed behind to give him encouragement and support. Because of her full cooperation, Yue Yang could focus all of his attention on researching and gained continuous improvement during failures.

“Luo Hua came back yesterday with the materials. Don’t waste it." There were two reasons why Yue Yang would convert to Martial Spirit Pill today.

One reason was because Yue Yu completely let go of the knot in her heart. With all her strength and coordination, her cultivation speed had made tremendous progressed. If she took the special Martial Spirit Pill from Yue Yang, she was believed to break thought the level of Innate.

Second, Yue Yang had received a new revelation from the pitiful guy’s mother. He was planning to use a better undercover method to raise a higher grade Martial Spirit Pill.

What Yue Yang had refined before was not an ordinary Martial Spirit Pill.

After the Qirin Maiden mentioned it, it could be said that the supreme martial pill refined from the Qilin was a top quality.

The old fox had been stuck at the threshold of the level of Innate, but immediately promoted his level after consuming Yue Yang’s Martial Spirit Pill!

However, neither he nor Qinlin girl Bing Yin was unsatisfied with it. They felt that if they were to use better materials and better methods, they would still be able to refine extremely highest grade Martial Spirit Pill. This was the reason why Yue Yang didn’t concoct extremely highest grade Martial Spirit Pill, which also because Qilin girl didn’t pay much attention to this low-level panacea like Martial Spirit Pill. She regarded it useless.

If Yue Yang refined a Martial God Pill that could increase the potential of a martial artist, she would probably be a lot more active … Unfortunately, the materials for the War God Panacea had always been insufficient.

Qilin girl spent most of her time in hibernation, recovering herself. She couldn’t come out to accompany him to study panacea every day.

Yue Yang had to place hope on the knowledge of the pitiful guy’s mother.

Until now, there hadn’t been any new insights, so he had temporarily stopped refining panacea for a while.

Now Yue Yang had reached Sovereign Realm and received a new revelation. Of course, he wanted to try and see what kinds of panacea he could refine.

In the laboratory, Yue Yu was his assistant. Usually, other than the sickly beauty and Yue Yang who were studying the Heaven Runes together here, the girls would not come and disturb her. This was because of the suggestions from Price Qian Qian and Xue Wuxia. They wanted Yue Yu could do something with strive for a goal but not lay around. Besides, Yue Yu was able to help Yue Yang. Her meticulous and careful approach, along with Yue Yang’s boldness and creativity, could show up to advantage. what’s more, her negative energy in the water system assisted Yue Yang profitably.

When Yue Yang felt tired with researching, she could recover his fatigue with her energy.

She could comfort him and calm him down when he failed too much times in his studies and got cranky.

In short, with his elder sister here, Yue Yang would avoid detours. Everyone saw that Yue Yu was so helpful to his research, so they didn’t disturb the two of them.

“Steady on!” Yue Yu prepared all the materials, and Yue Yang used the Flame of Nirvana to refine all of these materials to the best possible state.

His energy expenditure was enormous, and his hands and feet were feeling weak. But he didn’t want to stop and rest. He was deeply afraid that now he was not in Sovereign Realm and that he would not be able to maintain the status of being able to control everything. Yue Yu wiped off Yue Yang’s sweat over and over again, feeling distressed. Everyone in the world knew that Yue clan’s third young master was an unprecedented expert and that he could defeat the one in Heaven Stage at such a young age, but who knew that the efforts he had made were a hundred times more than others.

Who knew that his sweat was a thousand or a hundred times more than others’?

Yue Yu didn’t remember how many times she had tried to wring her handkerchief.

And how many time she had fed him with water.

All she knew was that for a day and a night, he didn’t take rest for a second. He didn’t even want to waste time for meal. Even the water, he hastily drunk a few when Yue Yu pushed the cup to his mouth.

Yue Yu believed it would be unconscionable if her younger brother couldn’t make it.

Her younger brother is not only a genius, but also a very hardworking man.

The latter was the key that he far surpassed others.

“Rumble!”

Because the materials weren’t good enough and there was a slight mistake during the progress, a small-scale explosion occurred in the energy refinement formation when Yue Yang was refining the materials.

Yue Yang hurriedly turned around to protect Yue Yu, but he was completely able to withstand the explosive power of the explosion. He could not use energy to resist, because once he increased his energy, his super power would destroy the entire laboratory and the materials inside. Yue Yang had to remain in the Zhi Zun realm, but he could not use the power of the Sovereign Realm.

Of course, the explosion was completely undamaged to his body.

But not the clothes on him.

All clothes he wore turned into dust just in a moment.

At first, Yue Yang would immediately switch to a few more sets. But as the explosion kept occurring, he gave up such futile effort.

Yue Yu also pretended not to see him. She ignored the awkward situation and only looked into his face. In addition to handing out the materials, she also wiped off the sweat, water, and negative energy in the water system. Her clothes had been destroyed long ago. Fortunately, the Angel’s Blade had transformed into a sword-gown, concealing her female features.

“Bastard, who sent these materials?” Yue Yang’s temper rose as soon as he blew up another piece of material.

“Don’t worry. There must be some high-grade materials. There are so many materials that can be made. It’s already been a good thing. Continue!” Yue Yu repeatedly consoled Yue Yang, who was in shock, to pick up the materials he threw on the ground. First, he changed the other type, waiting for his temper to fade and then handing it over to him. It was only because she had a gentle temperament that she had this patience. If it was anyone else, she couldn’t be her assistant.

“Bloody Barut, there’s actually no flowers on the Stone Magic Flower sent here. What’s the use of that!” Yue Yang had failed once more, cursing loudly.

“Stone Magic Flower, there’s more here, drink some water first …” Yue Yu knew that it wasn’t Barut’s fault.

One had to know that rare things like the Stone Magic Flower were rare to find.

Ordinary spirit medicine flowers and plants all had a long protection for magical beasts.

If someone from the outside world discovered, they would immediately destroy the treasure of the heavens and earth. They would rather destroy it than the enemy.

After Yue Yu comforted her and Yue Yang’s constant summary of experience, the refining process gradually came to an end. The mentally exhausted Yue Yang, who had been forcefully supporting himself, had gained countless experience and refined a large amount of top quality materials using Flames of Nirvana.

After all the preparation materials were completed, Yue Yang didn’t even have the time to lie down.

He sat down on the floor of the lab and leaned against the table and chair.

Fallen into dream quickly.

Looking at his tired, innocent face, overdrawn by overdrafts, Yue Yu felt particularly heartache. Other than lightly covering him with clothes, she hoped to help him even more, but unfortunately, she had insufficient strength.

Outside, Xue Wuxia and Princess Qian Qian flew in, working together to nourish Yue Yang’s tired body and help him recover.

Master of Luo Hua City put a garment on Yue Yu and gently embraced her.

For her body, for power.

Yue Yu, who had been cooperating for a long time, quickly got rest.

“Thank you,” said the man. Yue Yu closed her eyes and said in a dreamy voice.

“No, thank you, you’ve done more than we do.” Before Master of Luo Hua City finished speaking, Yue Yu was already asleep, but she was actually also exhausted.

What kind of reaction would the best materials, the innate energy, the Flames of Nirvana, the Ancient Secret Method, and Yue Yang’s own blood be? This question … After Yue Yang and Yue Yu woke up and continued working, they finally got the best answer after a day and a night of refining.

New pills, almost accumulating human, sea clan, Underworld Clan, Demon Clan, Golden Elves, Dwarves, and other races.

Yue Yang used his innate energy to add the Flames of Nirvana. He combined The Ancient Secret Method of the pitiful guy’s mama, and even added his own blood. Finally, he refined a Martial God Pill that was several times better than before. This wasn’t a Martial God Pill, but its medicinal strength and value could be equivalent to a Extremely highest grade Martial God Pill that surpassed the Martial God Pill. He heard the news after night and was shocked. After she personally appraised it, she came to a conclusion. This kind of Extremely highest grade Martial God Pill had a huge amount of energy. It was enough to break through the threshold of advancing to the Heaven Stage.

Of course, the heaven-step was different from that of a supreme existence. Without the heart of a supreme being, even if a martial artist possessed a treasure scripture, it was only a heavenly order.

However, this could break through to the level of Innate and reach the Heaven stage.

The birth of it also caused the heads of various clans to go crazy.

They had reached the tenth level of Innate for many years, and now that they had the Extremely highest grade Heaven Stage Martial Spirit Pill, they discovered that they were in front of them.

Yue Yang had never thought that he would prepare several top quality Martial God Pill to give Yue Yu. He wanted them to advance to the level of Innate, but he had only thought of refining them to break through the Heaven Stage.

Apart from the innate energy and the Nirvana Flame, apart from the Ancient Secret Method

, could it be that the real reason was to add their own blood?

This question flashed through her heart.

Of course, he would never be able to explain this secret art. As for Yue Yu, Xue Wuxia, Princess Qian Qian, and Master of Luo Hua City, they also didn’t ask about it and pretended not to know.

chapters.title: Chapter 667 – Necessary Trip To Heaven Realm
chapters.body:
Chapter 667 – Necessary Trip To Heaven Realm

“Too valuable!”

The Great Demon King Baruth, the Demon King Ha Xin, the Demon King Ou Gen, the Lich King Gu Lun, the Lich King Ma Fa and the rest in Demon Abyss all swallowed their saliva. They couldn’t help moving visibly when they saw this kind of extremely highest grade Heaven stage Martial Spirit Pill.

With it, the Heaven Stage was no longer a threshold that could never be passed over.

Not everyone was able to comprehend the Sovereign’s Heart, so they didn’t hold the greatest hope for it.

However, the Heaven Stage was their lifelong pursuits. If they were forever stuck under the Heaven Stage, then how would they talk about governing Demon Abyss?

Now that a casual group of mercenaries from Heaven Realm also had strength of Heaven Stage. As Kings of Demon Abyss, if they didn’t improve themselves, then they would become the laughingstock of Tong Tian Tower.

Apart from the Kings of Devil Abyss, there were also Kings of the various clans, such as the Golden Elf Queen, Dragon Emperor of Eastern Goblin Tribe, Underworld Emperor of the Darkness Continent … Many of the kings of Tong Tian Tower who couldn’t be together had all arrived at the Rainbow Castle in the little garden. In front of such extremely highest grade Heaven stage Martial Spirit Pill, none of them showed no yearning eyes.

“Thank you all for the materials. I’ve been fortunate enough to refine the Heaven stage Martial Spirit Pill. Today, I will hand over all fifty pills to Queen Night and let her properly distribute them.” Yue Yang was very crafty. He knew it was hard to distribute because the materials were supplied by everyone. Thus he threw this thorny question to Queen Night.

Actually, he had wanted to give it to Jun Wu You and Old Fox.

Which frightened them to death.

They quickly rejected it.

And highly recommended the Queen Night!

Later, Yue Yang thought about it and found that it was only Queen Night who could handle this problem, so he slyly pushed it to her. Besides, the number of Heaven stage Martial Spirit Pill he’d refined weren’t fifty. There were a hundred and fifteen of them in total, and he was naturally unwilling to lose so that he naturally kept more than half of them. If it were not for the reason which he needed everyone’s collecting materials for him, Yue Yang wouldn’t be so ‘generous’. Otherwise, he would just hand over about ten pills.

Queen Night advised him to be generous and leave everyone have good prospects. With pills, should still be afraid that everyone wouldn’t actively gather materials?

Therefore, fifty pills were handed out at one time.

“Fifty pills!”

Eyes of Great Demon King Baruth were widened. There shouldn’t be any problems with one pill per person.

But how to get the second one?

It was impossible for Queen Night to reward them with one more pill just because they supplied the materials. For this Heaven stage Martial Spirit Pill, the more, the better. One more pill could would also help to increase their strength. But what could them do to obtain the second or even the third Pill from Queen Night? This was a matter that all Kings of various clans had to think about.

Furthermore, although fifty seemed to be a large number, after one round of distributing, it would definite be tension for no enough pills to satisfy everyone.

“Everyone, I won’t say any words superfluous any more. You should firstly self-judge about yourself. When you feel right, come find me. I’ll keep waiting for everyone at Starflower Cliffside Valley, the tenth floor of Tong Tian.” Queen Night left with the white jade bottle containing fifty Heaven stage Martial Spirit Pills, negotiating nothing with them.

“…” Great Demon King Baruth and the others looked at each other and quickly chased after Queen Night along to the Starflower Cliffside Valley.

That was no joke. If there was any one listing the highest and best terms, then it was complete done for other to obtain one more pill.

Term?

was that a problem?

As long as Yue Yang needed it and it was practicable, he could ask for whatever he wanted.

Compared with the pills which would help them advancing to be powerhouses in Heaven Stage which everyone was thirsty for in hundreds of years, what else could be more impressive and more important?

When the rowdy Kings of various clans left, there left behind a group of old fellows who extremely worshipped Yue Yang, especially Jun Wu You and Old Fox, excited to death.

Although they knew that for themselves it was hopeless in their lives to reach Heaven Stage, it didn’t stop them from being proud of the new pills Yue Yang had refined. They absolutely refused when Yue Yang wanted to give them the Heaven stage Martial Spirit Pill. Even the Eastern Heavenly King, who had never courteously extended his hand to Yue Yang for extorting, seriously ‘criticized’ his son-in-law this time, "You silly boy, you think this is just beans? What could we, the old fellows that with one foot in the grave, do with this kind of good stuff? I gave my daughter my share. What regrets do I have for my whole life if she can ascend to Innate Sovereign? So what if I wasn’t in Heaven Stage level? Didn’t you see the Great Demon King Baruth and the others present to us? "

The Old Fox also didn’t accept the Heaven stage Martial Spirit Pill, but he accepted the ordinary Martial Spirit Pill that Yue Yang had refined with the leftover materials, and proudly continued to say “You brat, you have something on the ball to allow us waste a few pills. You just pretend you’re practicing!”

The old Yue Hai took an ordinary Martial Spirit Pill as well. He surely grudged to eat it but probably gave it to his fifth younger brother, Yue Ting.

That honest man Yue Ting was the candidate for the next clan’s master, who needed to be trained emphatically.

As for Yue Yang, his future would be in the Heaven Realm.

Even Higher.

Thus, the old Yue Hai didn’t expect him to become Yue clan’s master.

The second uncle Yue Ling also obtained an ordinary pill. He excitedly put it into his bosom and planned to leave it to his youngest son, Yue Feng. He now devoted himself fanatically to this ninth son.

“And where is our share? ” Fatty Hai’s words were completely despised by Ye Kong and the others. As a“ boss”, he not only gave no pill to other team members, but even extended his hand to everyone.
