Of course, this Boss Hai Fatty was a self-proclaimed one. No one but himself felt that he was the boss. If everyone agreed that he was the boss, then someone must stand up and take the blame.

“Why couldn’t we find you when we needed help?” Yue Yang’s temper was often bad.

"All of the Hard-shelled Dragon Fruit and Snow Lotus Herb needed for the Martial Spirit Pill are extremely rare. Many of them can’t even be refined as pills. Only can be used as liquids, whose effect may be a little weaker, but everyone has a small bottle. " Yue Yu handed the bottles to everyone. Although the white jade bottle was small, it could at least be equivalent to five ordinary Martial Spirit Pills.

“Thanks, Sister Yu!” Willowleaf and Bao`er were more polite, and they thanked them happily.

“Ha, ha!” Like Ye Kong and the Li brothers, they were all so stupefied that they were tempted to be silly.

“I feel like I have to chew the Martial Spirit Pill!” Fatty Hai mumbled to himself greedly.

"You pig head, do you think it’s easy to become a martial spirit pill! Don’t bring them back… " Yue Yang wanted to go berserk. Fatty Hai was so scared that he hastily ran out of the door. Just as he ran out of the room, he sent Yue Yang directly smashing a large piece of meteorite into the ground. Fatty Hai usually made Yue Yang and Ye Kong fight more than they did. He would never die if he trained, and he would be like Ye Kong, who had the“Stand Straight”Inherent Skill and the ‘Fortitude’ of the Guardian Beast.

“The taste of it seems okay.” Xue Tan Lang sucked in a mouthful of air and drank all of it. Everyone was dumbstruck by this. Was this ice man not afraid of exploding and dying?

“…” That’s too much! " The bald old man, Ning Hai, hadn’t been able to enjoy the experience of the liquid Martial Spirit Pills. He was a prisoner, and although he had changed his mind, his potential and contribution would not be able to be obtained unless he refined the Martial Spirit Pill with Yue Yang’s ton.

To be able to take some medicinal residue was beyond his expectations.

It had to be said that apart from Hui Tai Lang, all of them had an appetite that didn’t refuse. Now, there were also the Golden Tiger Shark and the Blood Python King’s family, becoming a waste terminator.

This old man of Ning Hai had to make a greater contribution in order to get some medicinal dregs. Now, there was almost nothing he could do about it, and he can’t help them here.

There was also the monster Angel similar to Ning Hai.

Angele was better.

Since Yue Yang had traveled in the Western Heaven realm, or if Ye Kong and the others had gone to the Heavenly Realm to practice, he still had a qualified guide. Therefore, Angel had barely made it.

Before Ye Kong and the others left, they gave Yue Yang a Supreme Azure Dragon Pearl and a peace medal.

This was the treasure that Guild Leader Yonghui had taken out as the initial ransom.

Apart from the Supreme Azure Dragon Pearl and the ‘Peace medal’, there were still several weapons, but they couldn’t be used in the water world and they were temporarily placed behind.

Of course, Yue Yang was very interested in the Supreme Azure Dragon Pearl, but he didn’t expect that he would quickly take it out. He guessed that the Sky Execution, Dragon Emperor, and the Underworld Emperor were afraid of him, so he quickly gave in to his own accord. He didn’t want to kill them with just one slash, because they still had a use.

Of course, the fate of training partners was necessary.

"Go back and tell him to release it after half a year. Student Yue Yang announced Yong Hui’s sentence as a judge.

“I guess Yong Hui will cry to death if he heard.” Ye Kong laughed out loud, and let the Sky Execution martial retard beat him up for half a year. He didn’t have any mental shadow!

“Captives, you must have the consciousness of a captive.” Old man Yue Yang’s words made old man Ning Hai most approve. In fact, he had always done this, but unfortunately, he didn’t have the chance to display it.

Ye Kong, Fatty Hai, and the others continued to cultivate.

The old fellows left early and didn’t disturb Yue Yang’s training. Their only thoughts were on the Dragon Shrine and the Divine Dragon Underground Palace.

With a million men, there were several hundred Heavenly Realm Dragons and nearly a thousand Celestial Realm Dwarfs, and their work was constantly rising.

The Dragon Shrine and the Divine Dragon Underground Palace would be completed in a year.

At that time, there was only one building and a diplomatic point that truly declared that they belonged to Yue Yang.

After he finished his work, Yue Yang rested for three days. When he began to cultivate nervously, he suddenly realized that his cultivation level had risen by another level. It wasn’t to raise the level of a Xiantian ninth stage, but a state of being a Sovereign Realm. It seemed that the control of everything in the Sovereign Realm was much more relaxed now. It seemed that after concocting pills, he had unconsciously achieved a breakthrough. Of course, it could also be because of his state of mind. He was incredibly confident that Yue Yang could successfully refine the Heaven stage Martial Spirit Pill, which would help his cultivation level increase.

“There’s no longer any materials on the Heaven stage Martial Spirit Pill. What do we need to refine next?” Yue Yu didn’t ask what Yue Yang had done to fuse the Spirit of Radiance into the Angel’s Blade. She knew that it would be best if she didn’t ask. He would not be embarrassed. He had to do everything he wanted to, and he would silently cooperate with his full strength.

“Martial God Pill!”

Yue Yang suddenly had a longing. What would happen if he refined the Martial Spirit Pill, which he had refined, had the effect of allowing someone to advance to the Heaven stage?

Unfortunately, the materials for the War God Pill were far from enough. Not to mention the War God Pill, the Heaven Ranked Martial Spirit Pill, it was also leaning towards the power of all races.

In order to refine more Heaven stage Martial Spirit Pills or Martial God Pill.

There’s only one way.

That is, collecting materials in the Heaven Realm …

chapters.title: Chapter 668 – Rob… Robbing…
chapters.body:
Chapter 668 – Rob… Robbing…

Heaven Realm.

In order to collect the materials for the pill, as well as to find a warbeast in Heaven Stage to enhance everyone’s strength, Yue Yang decided to return to the Heaven Realm.

If everyone could possess Nirvana Sunflower like Master of Luo Hua City did, then his strength would definitely improve greatly, and Yue Yang would no longer have to worry about everyone’s safety. Yue Yang had already refined the Heaven stage Martial Spirit Pill, but he didn’t have enough materials to refine Martial God Pill that could increase the potential of warriors. Therefore, Yue Yang had long since drawn up the schedule for his trip to the Heaven Realm.

Anything else could be put off for a while.

The exploration of Heaven Realm, should be placed first.

Xue Wuxia and Princess Qian Qian were taken away by Zhi Zun to continue cultivating.

The Master of Luo Hua City and Yi Nan also cultivated together, then along with Yue Bing and the Drunken Cat Sister.

Phoenix Fairy Beauty, the Heavenly Punishment Lady, decided to stay behind and guard the Soaring Dragon Continent in case the Ancient Devil King and the Heaven Realm Mercenaries caused any trouble. Furthermore, she was trying to comprehend the power of Heavenly Punishment and thus was unable to be distracted.

Yue Yu was unwilling to accompany Yue Yang alone to the Heaven Realm, so she returned to the Mirage to accompany Si Niang.

"Fortunately, I have an obedient half-elf maid girl.” Before Yue Yang left, sickly beauty worried that no one would be able to take care of his life, so she let the half-elf maid girl live in the Grimoire World to take care of him. She estimated that Yue Yang would not be back in a few days on this trip to the Heaven Realm. He would need some time to explore the Heaven Realm, unlike the last time he spent traveling with Yi Nan and falling in love…

“Although the Southern Heaven Realm and the Western Heaven Realm are very far apart, if the news that you’ve been at loggerheads with the Clown spread back to the Heaven Realm, he’ll definitely be suspicious.” The sickly beauty told Yue Yang to be careful. After all, the Heaven Realm was not his territory, and there were a large number of warriors in Heaven Stage level.

“Don’t worry, I’ll keep a low profile this time.” Yue Yang quickly comforted her.

What’s more, when re-entry into Heaven Realm, the half-elf maid girl would not come around and would only live in the Grimoire World to take care of his life.

If only Yue Yang acted alone, then things would be much better. Furthermore, last time it happened that the Clown had teamed up with the Wise demon marshal, Rachel, Long Xiang and the others to besiege the female giant Raging Flame, unseal the Ancient Seal, and release Mo Long. This was also because Hornless Dragon Jiang Ying had inherited the remnant power of Dragon God Sovereign, and due to fate, but it was impossible for him to encounter such an event again.

Using the Three Realms Compass, Yue Yang returned to the Southern Heaven Realm.

This time, he changed his identity.

He called himself ‘Jun Wu Ye’ when he was dealing with the new card. This name came from a joke that Yue Yang had made while chatting with Princess Qian Qian. She said that if Yue Yang became the emperor, he would probably be no better than that old man Jun Wu You. Then he would be a fatuous and self-indulgent ruler.

Yue Yang’s new name was nothing more than a small advantage over Princess Qian Qian.

According to his assumption, Yue Yang wanted to apply to be a small mercenary, then accept all kinds of super difficult missions, earn a lot of money, and buy materials for the pill.

This beautiful wish was quickly dealt a heavy blow by the Heaven Realm Mercenary Guild.

“Your strength is too weak, and you’re a newbie as well. You haven’t even joined any mercenary groups, so we don’t have any missions for you.” In a small town, the Shrimpman Receptionist of the Heaven realm Mercenary Guild refused to give Yue Yang a mission. In short, it looked down upon Yue Yang and felt that if he didn’t have the ability to complete the most rudimentary missions, then it would be a waste of time to send someone to collect his corpse, other than letting him commit suicide … In a word, no matter what Yue Yang said, it was unwilling to issue the mission.

“Can’t I make a bond?” Yue Yang had never been looked down upon so much before.

“No, unless you can find a team or join a mercenary group, I won’t give you a mission.” Yue Yang went to another city, Bacon City, and the Deerman Receptionist said the same thing.

“Then may I buy some information about the mission?” Of course Yue Yang would not easily admit defeat; he had thought of a better way.

That was robbing!

That’s right!

There was no more lucrative and rapid way to make money than robbing.

It was no wonder that in Heaven Realm there were so many mercenary groups and bandit groups. These two groups complemented each other. The mercenary group was in charge of protecting the target, and the bandit group was obviously trying to rob the target for money … The rigid rules and strict enforcement in Heaven Realm forced Yue Yang to go on the evil path of robbing… Of course, Yue Yang himself wasn’t much better off. If he saw a treasure, even if he was a mercenary, he probably wouldn’t let it go!

What caused Yue Yang sweat to death was that no matter what, from Mercenary Guild of Bacon City, he would not be able to obtain any task or news of a mission. But he could casually find a person on the street and ask them for anything, what’s more, buy one and get one free.

A man with severely deformed appearance said mysteriously, "Tomorrow afternoon, Master Barton’s caravan will set off for Green Leaf City. The total value of the goods will be five million. If you hide in the Howling Wolf Canyon, use smoke signals, and send people to cut off the head and tail of the troop, plunder the goods in the middle, and then quickly evacuate along the secret mountain path shown on this map, you will definite succeed. Be careful, you must prepare some strong ropes and pulleys, because there is a cliff in the middle of the Canyon. If you want to quickly withdraw, you must first emplace the rope over the cliff … There used to be a drawbridge here, but it had already been destroyed by officers. By the way, I have a good recommendation here. You could go to old cowheels pub to buy ropes, and the boss there will give you a 20% discount. Because I’m an old friend of his, I’ve recommended quite a few clients to him. "

“Oh, I want to ask you a question.” While placing the five golds in that guy’s hand as reward for the intelligence news, Yue Yang curiously asked: “How did you know I was going to rob Master Barton’s goods?”

“Seeing that your strength is low, it’s impossible for you to be in a high position, even in a bandit group. It’s not your place to fight, instead, it’s your job to find out more information.” I’ve seen more of a young man like you. " “However, as long as you work hard, it’s not impossible for you to become a captain in the future. In the past one thousand years, I have seen too many young people grow up, let alone a captain, there are even heaven-stage powerhouses who became a Heaven Stage leader!”

“One last question.” Yue Yang placed another gold coin on the other party’s palm. “How many people did you sell this information to before me?”

“There should at least be a hundred!” “Master Barton’s caravan suddenly set off in advance, otherwise, I would have been able to sell more.”

“What the heck…” Yue Yang was speechless.

Yue Yang naturally wouldn’t go to the old cowheels pub to buy ropes and pulleys. He estimated that there should be at least dozens of bandit groups ready in front of the cliff.

At least he could fly.

Thieves use ropes and pulleys to move their goods, but they have storage rings!

With the freakish guy buying a gifted map, Yue Yang set off for Howling Wolf Canyon.

He decided that if the goods of Master Barton’s caravan were not worth much, then he would rob the bandit group. Anyway, the bandit group had a lot of money. To rob anyone was a tribulation. It would be great if he could eat both black and white. There was another advantage to robbing and murdering a group of robbers, and that was killing off the leader of the robbers. They could use their heads to go into the city to exchange the bounty, and if they met a Thief Guild Leader with a bounty of 100 million, then the money problem that plagued Yue Yang could be solved.

The map was drawn very close, but even after a whole day of flying, Yue Yang still hadn’t arrived at Howling Wolf Canyon.

Even before Yue Yang entered the valley, he realized that there were already several thousand Thieves standing at the entrance of the valley… Aren’t these sorts of robberies a waste of their skills? At any rate, this was an ambush. It was very unprofessional of him to openly block the way and rob others, so he was destined to be looked down upon by others.

“Why did you go so long?” A big bearded man, upon seeing Yue Yang, came up to him and asked as if he was on fire, “Have you investigated everything clearly?”

“…” Yue Yang was sweating profusely. Even his spies would admit their mistake. What kind of bandit group was this?

“Don’t tell me that you didn’t even find out anything, I will pinch you to death!” That guy’s temper is like fire.

“Ah, Master Barton’s caravan will depart tomorrow.” Yue Yang was sure that the bearded man had mistaken him, but he would be wrong. Since the other party thought of him as his spy, then what was there to think about, he might as well just sneak in. He decided to take a look. If this group of bandits had a bit of money, then after they robbed the caravan, even the bandits would be wiped out.

“Are you sure?” The man with the beard stared at the bull and asked.

“One hundred percent sure!” In fact, Yue Yang didn’t even know who Barton was, but he seriously said, “I heard Master Barton’s butler say so himself!”

“Fine, then your mission will be completed. When we rob the caravan, I will give you a reward of gold and a reward of armor. Look, you are wearing cloth clothes, and you don’t even have a single piece of armor. If you want others to see, you will simply lose face for our group of gold thieves!” “Go to the side, the Guild Leader is about to arrive. You don’t have the qualifications to talk to him. Reporting to the Guild Leader is my business!” Big Beard reached out his hand and pushed Yue Yang away, afraid that he would report the news to the captain and ask Yue Yang to stay away from him.

“…” Yue Yang was speechless again. With your IQ, you still dare to steal the kung fu of your subordinates? That’s fine, but you don’t need to say it, right?

Hiding his strength, he felt that Yue Yang, who wasn’t even in the Upper Sky Realm, was a good student.

No one paid him any attention.

This kind of spy who didn’t even have the qualification to take part in battles could only be used to gather intelligence in the city.

Some of them were either drinking or gnawing on their bones, while some of them were lazily lying in the sun.

At the beginning, Yue Yang thought they were calm, but in less than ten minutes, he realized that the Golden Thief Group was too weak, and they let the other groups of bandits out of Wolf’s Howl Canyon. Other than the Earth Stage Level 7 Guild Leader negotiating and vying for a chance to participate in the battle, none of the remaining Thief members were above the Earth Stage Level 5.

The bearded leader with low intelligence, poor eyesight, and a short temper was only at Earth Stage Level 4.

With his strength, he probably didn’t even have the qualifications to become an ordinary member of the clown squad!

Of course, if they had the power, they wouldn’t have to stay in this poor group of Golden Thieves. This group of Golden Thieves was definitely worthy of its name. There wasn’t a single Gold rank item in the entire group.

Yue Yang saw that no one paid attention to him and found a remote place.

Returning to the Grimoire World.

After a day of rest.

When he came out again, Yue Yang discovered that the Howling Wolf Canyon was filled with billowing smoke, the sound of killing shook the sky. Countless elite troops surrounded and annihilated the bandit groups, whether it was the gold bandit group or the other members of the bandit group, they were all running around like ants on a hot pan. Several Thief Guild Leaders were beaten up by the three generals of the army, and they found their teeth to grind. Defeating was only a matter of time!

A fat man, even fatter than a pig, with thick lips and a cigar.

In his right hand he held a glass of wine.

He sat on the soft seat of an extravagant mammoth tent, triumphantly watching the battle unfold in front of him.

“The landlord is rich?” Yue Yang’s eyes lit up when he saw that fatty was wearing an emerald ring on his hand. Damn, just as he was about to rob, he ran into a big fish in water. Frightening his poverty in the Heaven Realm, Yue Yang flew over excitedly and raised the small dagger in his hand: “Rob, robbing …”

chapters.title: Chapter 669 – Throw The Door Open For The Robbers?
chapters.body:
Chapter 669 – Throw The Door Open For The Robbers?

“Ahahahaha!” The group of guards surrounding the fatty were all laughing so hard that tears started to splash out.

A small thief who didn’t even have the strength of Earth Stage, yet under the watchful eyes of a group of guards who were at level 6 to level 8 in Earth Stage, announced the robbery to Master Barton. Was there anything more ridiculous and absurd than this in the world? Was this little thief awake yet? Now it was the army that had roundly surrounded and exterminated the Group of Thief, not the group that had surrounded and attacked Barton’s caravan.

The big fatty was also laughing so hard that he could barely breathe.

Among the maids, there was a sexy and gorgeous one. When she looked at Yue Yang, her eyes flashed with a trace of surprise.

Yue Yang held his small dagger, ignoring the laughter of the surrounding guards, and announced very calmly: “Robbing, now I declare that everything here in the Howling Wolf Canyon belongs to me. Leaving behind all the valuables, everyone put your hands behind your heads. Man will stand on the left side, woman on the right side, and the androgynous in the middle!”

Hearing this, the guards were stunned.

And then there was an even louder roar of laughter.

Some people even laughed until they could not stand on mammoth’s back and fell down with laughing.

The maids who were trying their best to hold back their laughter could no longer hold it in. They did not dare to lose manners in front of their master, turning around faces and hiding their laughter.

“Hahahaha, I almost died from laughter.” The fat guy laughed until his mouth cracked to the root of his ears and until the fat all over his body was shaking.

“Is that funny?” Yue Yang was a little confused. Did he have to slaughter a few people to demonstrate his strength?

“Wait a minute.” That fatty tried his best to hold back his laughter. He took the maid’s handkerchief and wiped his tears. Several times he tried to calm down, but none of them succeeded. As soon as he saw Yue Yang, he couldn’t help but laugh. Only after a long time did the fatty stabilize his emotions, and with a teasing attitude, he asked Yue Yang: “You little human thief, do you know who you are trying to rob?”

“I don’t know…” Yue Yang indeed didn’t know who this fatty was, but that wasn’t important. As long as he had money, it didn’t matter who he was.

“Ahahahahaha!” When the guards heard this, they burst into laughter once more.

“Um, I should introduce myself!” The fat man was trying his best to hold back his laughter. He took a drag from his cigar-like cigarette, puffed out the smoke, and let his fat face curl up in the smoke. He added a sense of mystery: “My name is Barton, I am the golden slave trader in Emerald Territory.”

“Slave trader?” Yue Yang was a little clear now, but he pretended not to understand.

“You, don’t tell me that you don’t even know what a slave trader is? Which countryside exactly did you come from?” The fatty was speechless. He thought that the moment he mentioned the slave trader, he would frighten him to the point that his entire body would tremble. He didn’t expect the look of confusion on his face, as if he had never heard of the slave trader. For a little thief who didn’t even know about the slave trader, there was nothing else to say. All the boasts were all about playing the lute to a cow. Fatty feebly waved his hand, “Capture him. Be careful not to wound his face. For a human’s appearance like this, it is extremely rare and outstanding. He should be able to be sold for a good price!”

“Your Master Barton.”

As the guards were playing finger-guessing game to decide who would capture Yue Yang, in the distant sky, two generals with the strength of Heaven Stage level 1 and three of the vice generals with the strength of Earth Stage level 9 or 10 flew over with several captive Thief Guild Leaders in tow.

Including the leader of Golden Thief Group, they were all tied up like dumplings.

As for the bearded leader with low intelligence and strength whom Yue Yang had seen before, he was also captured by the elite knights of the army and escorted into the group.

He was only a small squad leader, having no qualifications to be guarded and escorted personally by the deputy general. Even the leader of the Golden Thief Group, that guy in Earth Stage level 7, was escorted along because he was a Guild Leader. It could be considered a bonus for capturing other thief group leaders. The two generals in Heaven Stage level 1 cupped their hands to greet towards the fatty.

Naturally, the big fatty did not dare to slight the greeting from the general in Heaven Stage.

He quickly stood up with his belly straight, bowed with great difficulty, and responded the greeting.

“If it wasn’t for Master Barton’s plan, the harvest this time would not have been so bountiful. Master Barton, when I go back, I will definitely report this to the Lord and ask for record for Master Barton.” A general stepped forward and handed a sealed document to the fatty, then with a wave of his hand, led his army to escort the thief group away.

“I got a million just like that. With the rewards and the feats, it’s so great to be a slave trader.” The fat man happily kissed the sealed document. Inside, there was a certificate for receiving bounty issued by the Emerald Lord.

When the army left, they did not take all the thieves.

He only took away the thieves above Earth Stage level 3, leaving the ones below level 3 to the fatty.

Among them, there was Yue Yang. The guards left behind the two strongest ones to protect Master Barton, and the rest flew down to chase away the thieves who were trembling in fear, ordering them to follow behind the team. The fate waiting for these people was to be sent to the Slave Exchange Market on black market and to be sold to some masters or sects as a laborer who worked until his death.

Of course, treatment was different for a very handsome young man like Yue Yang.

If there was a female master who liked handsome guys, he would definite be able to sell for a good price.

Yue Yang had wanted to stab the fatty to death with a dagger, then let blood like a pig being slaughtered, and then loot the fatty’s belongings.

Now it seemed that there was still a way to earn more money waiting for him. Yue Yang decided to wait for a while until he reached the Slave Exchange Market to rob the rich. How many rich people would there be? How could a rich fat man could compare to a group of people?

When the guards’ leader shouted an order to Yue Yang to join the group of captives.

He silently joined them.

Hiding within the crowd of captives.

Keeping a low profile.

It was as if the robbery had never happened! The fatty and the others did not care about a target like Yue Yang. He did not even have the strength of Earth Stage. In their eyes, he was nothing more than an ant. Only the extremely seductive and sexy maid gazed at Yue Yang for three more seconds when she pretended to glance at the captives.

In the depths of her eyes, there was a certain bewilderment, as if there was something that confused her.

However, everything quickly returned to normal. No one noticed the change in her eyes.

After passing through the Howling Wolf Canyon, a huge ship flew over from the distant sky. On the ship was the flag with unique emblem of the Master of Black Wind City.

Yue Yang understood immediately. The backer of Master Barton was the Master of Black Wind City. Black Wind City was not far from Green Leaf City. Both of them were under the jurisdiction of Emerald Territory . Because the master’s name was’ Black Wind ', the city he was in charge of was named Black Wind City. Yue Yang knew nothing about this master before the detailed confession of Zhong Guan and the rest two people who always suggested surrender. The name of Master of Black Wind City was mentioned by one of the secret allies of the clown. Thus Yue Yang knew the master.

The Master of Black Wind City was weaker than a clown, but he was not weak either.

His strength was at the peak of Heaven Stage level 3, very close to level 4, worthy a bounty of 220 million.

Compared with Wise demon marshall worthy a amount of 650 million, Skeleton Man Rachel worthy 550 million, and Long Xiang worthy 400 million, the bounty of Master of Black Wind City wasn’t considered high, but it wasn’t considered low either.

One had to know that when Yue Yang had beaten up Wise demon marshall, he had spent so much effort that he had almost used a secret skill to excel … As a master of a city, Black Wind being able to reach 220 million was doing quite well.

All the captives got on the boats and quickly headed towards Black Wind City.

Transporting goods worth of 5 million to Green Leaf City was just a bait thrown by Barton. His real target was black market in Black Wind City.

In the city, Yue Yang saw the legendary black market. He had never thought that the black market could be opened in such a righteous manner. In Tong Tian Tower, the black market was not completely absent, but it was definitely hidden. There was a secret underground palace or a secret chamber within a building that secretly sold all sorts of prohibited goods … The Heaven Realm was different. The black market here was openly located at the side of the city master’s mansion. It was the second largest building in the city, second only to the master’s mansion. Even an idiot wouldn’t believe that the black market had nothing to do with the master.

“Hey, where’s that good-looking little human thief?” After entering the black market, Fatty suddenly remembered that he had a pretty good captive.

“Master Barton, the thief is missing.” One of the guards broke out in a sweat and hurriedly reported.

“He doesn’t even have Earth Stage strength, how could he disappear in front of your eyes?” The fat man did not believe that Yue Yang would run away. He strongly suspected that some guards or thiefs ate the human thief who he planned to sell for a good price due to hunger or jealousy.

The fatty was quite angry.

He knew that his subordinates had a taste for cannibals and often ate prisoners stealthily.

As ordinary prisoners were very cheap, he also tacitly agreed to such an action. After all, it was fine if there were a few less labor-leveled captives.

However, that human thief was extremely handsome. If he was given a set of beautiful clothes and dressed up, he would definitely attract those female experts who were too lonely to fill in. At that time, he would definitely sell for a good price. Perhaps, the female experts would compete and spend a large amount of money to obtain this handsome young man.

But now, one of his subordinates actually ate it. He was so angry that his blood vessels almost exploded.

They ate, regardless who they were. Were the guards’ brains full of feces?

The fatty decided to fire all his subordinates when this transaction was completed. What he wanted was obedient cipher, not a cipher who stole!

As someone with a high position and standing at the entrance of the black market, the fatty tried his best to maintain his poise and did not curse out loud. Although in his heart he would use the whip to beat his stupid subordinates to death.

On the surface, he did not seem to pursue the matter, but secretly harbored resentment in his bottom heart.

A trace of a smile appeared on the extremely sexy and enchanting maid’s lips, as if she had gotten the answer to her question. At the same time, she seemed to be amused by something foolish.

However, that expression only flashed for a moment before it disappeared and returned to that of a regular maid.

Together with all the maids, she followed the fat man.

Entering the black market.

At this time, Yue Yang, who had changed his clothes, entered the black market at the other entrance. He registered as’ Jun Wu Ye '.

The advantage of the black market was that no matter who it was, no matter what kinds of goods, they could all go through without any hindrance … Just like that, the infamous and weak mercenary Jun Wu Ye obtained the qualifications to enter the black market. Moreover, after spending ten gold, Yue Yang also obtained a seat at the auction. If the registration staff had known that Yue Yang was here to rob them, they probably wouldn’t have been so enthusiastic…

“Welcome, customer, I hope that you will be satisfied with the results!” The registration staff welcomed Yue Yang with a smile.

“Thank you, I think we will have a good harvest today.” Yue Yang generously tipped the staff with one gold, which was also the last gold coin of Heaven Realm he had on him.

chapters.title: Chapter 670 – Insight To Identify Treasure
chapters.body:
Chapter 670 – Insight To Identify Treasure

The second largest architectural complex in Black Wind City, within the black market.

As Yue Yang walked in, he realized that this place was very spacious. The space was surrounded by high walls. There were three blocks east-west, where all kinds of goods were displayed in the shops, and it was even more crowded than the normal markets. People from all clans gathered here for the fair. Each Treading-Gold road from the north to the south, allowing ten carriages to pass, connected these three blocks. In the middle of the block, there was a gigantic building that reached into the clouds. It was the second largest building in the city, second only to the master’s mansion, called the Treading-Gold Building.

Accessing to the black market was free-charged and just needed to register names, either for shopping or sales.

However, to enter the Treading-Gold Building, someone would have to buy a ticket. Yue Yang had spent ten golds for a ticket into the building.

"Come and have a look at the best Inflame Tiger Bone! Wine with this infused in can expel severe pathogenic cold, as well as strengthen one’s health. Each bottle of wine with this bone only needs a gold coin. It’s better to act with your hearts. Come and have a look! This is regular Inflame Tiger Bone. Look at the tiger skin and testes and penis. Of course, this is worthy a hundred gold. I would definite not sale it with a coin missed.” On both sides of the block, there were stalls temporarily drawn out.

Some of the traveling merchants didn’t have the financial resources to stay in the black market for a long time, so they could only rent some street stalls and sell them with hawking loudly.

It was almost the same as the stall Yue Yang saw before he teleported. But it was convenient for merchants here because there were no city inspectors.

Unless there was a transaction that exceeded 100 gold coins, the black market would not collect taxes.

Management fees?

Prohibited the stall purchase that affects the appearance of the city?

People had never even heard of these things in the Heaven Realm. As long as the hawkers did not arrange their stalls in front of the master’s mansion, no one would care about them!

“Red dragonfly’s eggs, once contracted, could be hatched, which was ensured. The hatched cub could be almost in Earth Stage level 1, who grow up in expectant Heaven Stage level. Only sell for 50 gold! Buy one, get one free! Extra one hundred plague larvae as a basic cultivation for free. This handsome young man, why not buy one? When it grows up, it will become a red dragonfly flying warbeast and that’s a true tyrant in the air!” A round-headed packman that was trying his best to sell stopped Yue Yang as he passed by.

“It is indeed a tyrant in the air. But how long is the cultivation period?” Yue Yang asked with a smile.

“Ah, depends on the training skills … …” The round-headed packman was a bit embarrassed, without a thought that Yue Yang would ask him about the red dragonfly’s weakness.

Red dragonfly, if fully grown, is indeed not weak.

However, the growth period took too long. Hundreds of years were only a fraction of the time. It would take at least a few thousand years to complete all the changes.

More importantly, the larvae of the red dragonfly, called 'bugs’, must live in water for a long time, taking the other larvae or fish or shrimps as food and transforming several forms. Each form of the larva had different food habits, and it would take thousands of years for the larvae to fully mature and turn into the red dragonfly. To a human, training such a long-time-need and complex warbeast was meaningless and foolish. Besides, during the long process of cultivation, some accident might happen. If the weak larva of a red dragonfly died, then it would be in vain!

The round-headed packman dared not to boast more when he noticed Yue Yang might know the business.

He took out a bottle and quickly shook it. Whether Yue Yang saw it or not, the merchant mysteriously said: "Little brother, the larva of the Golden-Armored Beetle is known as the ‘Golden-Armored Water Tiger’. It is extremely ferocious, with short growth period, high mutation rate, low rate of premature death. It’s a warmest in Heaven Stage. 100 Gold coins, I will give you 10 black-backed tadpoles and 10 thin footed prawns for cultivation. What do you think?”

Yue Yang knew that what this guy said was true about the advantages, without mentioning any disadvantage.

The Golden-armored Beetle was indeed quite a good aquatic warbeast. If it was properly nurtured, it would become extremely formidable from the moment it was born.

However, its greatest weakness was gluttony… If all war beasts in Heaven Realm were to be ranked, the Golden-armored Beetle would definitely be able to enter the top ten gluttony.

According to "Heavenly Realm Mysterious Chronicle” presented from the old man Nan Gong, written by the Great Sage Dan Qing of the Prison Emperor’s era, the Golden-armored Beetle was one of the 3,600 commonly seen types of creatures recorded in Heaven Realm. Its characteristic was gluttony! It was said that someone had experimented to identify that a Golden-armored Beetle could eat more food than ten young dragons did. If an ordinary person wanted to cultivate a Golden-armored Beetle with an endless appetite, for a result they would die of poverty!

This was because cultivating the Golden-armored Beetle consumed more than cultivating a giant dragon. How could anyone endure this?

He ate more than the dragon, but his battle prowess was less than 1% of the dragon’s.

What kind of warbeast is this?

Of course, the greatest use of the Golden-armored Beetle wasn’t for fighting, but for eating!

It was a type of delicacy, especially the insect beast that had completely transformed into a Golden-armored Beetle. It was a delicacy of the highest quality in Heaven Realm, but it would probably only be enjoyed by a master in Heaven Stage level like the Lionheart King!

“Are there any adult beetles?” Yue Yang asked balefully. If the round-headed packman said yes, then Yue Yang’s first target would definitely be him. Fortunately, the round-headed packman had a bitter expression as he waved his hand. "If I had adults, would I still need to sell them here? I would have already been invited into the caution market long ago. You might have no idea that some time ago, the Emerald Lord bought one Golden-Armored Beetle in Earth Stage level 5, and prepared a banquet. It cost 500,000 gold! I dare to clap on my chest that if the Golden-armored Beetle were in higher level, maybe level 7 or above, then he would be impossible to get it with less than one million. You have to understand that its level increases by one level and its deliciousness increases by one fold.

“What a pity.” Hearing No as an answer, Yue Yang turned around and walked away.

“Oh!” When the round-headed packman noted that the business wasn’t working, he let out a long sigh. When met someone who understood the business he was doing, even if he were able to make lotus flower by words, he wouldn’t be able to do anything.

Yue Yang wandered around in the black market.

As for the valuables, whether it was the warbeast, the ore, or the treasure, he would secretly record it down.

Sooner or later, he would have to do it. Of course, he would have to get more good stuffs. As for stuffs like the larvae of Golden-armored Beetle and the larvae of Red Dragonfly, he would never want them. It was bad enough to have an insatiable gray wolf, and wouldn’t he be making trouble for himself if he had a larva that could eat more foods than a giant dragon?

There were a lot of good things in the street stalls, but they were still too little.

Except for a few store treasures, Yue Yang disdained the ordinary things.

You want to pick the loot?

It was extremely difficult, even if it was just a stalk of grass, the people here would repeatedly have confirmed it. It could be said that the value of anything that could be used here was extremely excavated by the merchants. As for the price, it was very reasonable. It was only slightly more expensive than other places, no more and no less, only ten times more expensive. Yue Yang, who had the gift of discernment, wandered around here for a long time before discovering that there was only one type of treasure, the parasitic vine, that the merchants here did not recognize.

When he suggested exchanging the parasitic vine with his magic crystals, the old shopkeeper, whose skin looked as wrinkled as an old tree bark and covered his eyes, immediately raised his drooping eyebrows and his veiled eyes shone with a terrifying light.

He proposed a condition that not only would he give Yue Yang this parasitic vine, but he would also give Yue Yang 100 gold coins.

In exchange, Yue Yang told him about the effect of the vine.

“Forget it.” Yue Yang turned around and left.

“Wait.” The old shopkeeper, who looked like he was about to die of old age, moved faster than a cheetah and stopped Yue Yang. He respectfully and sincerely saluted, inviting Yue Yang came into his shop for tea.

The old shopkeeper wasn’t questioning about the effect of the parasitic vine immediately, but rather enthusiastically laid out good wine and dishes to greet Yue Yang.

When Yue Yang had dined and wined to satiety, he presented three Ruby Diamonds worth ten thousand gold and a stick of Agarwood also worth ten thousand gold. These were all things that Yue Yang had observed when he entered the store. Even Yue Yang didn’t expect that just by taking a glance at them, this old shopkeeper would have noticed, whose wrinkles were so numerous that they covered his eyes. The businessman’s eyes were sharp.

Finally, a parasitic vine and a universal card worthy 10,000 gold coins.

After offering these, the old shopkeeper bowed to Yue Yang with utmost sincerity. “If your esteemed guest feels that the conditions are inadequate, feel free to mention it. This little old man will do his best.”

“Aren’t you afraid that this parasitic vine is actually trash? Is such a heavy investment worth it?” Instead of answering, Yue Yang asked with a smile.

"Actually, 500 years ago, an old senior walked past my shop and asked about the price of the parasitic vine. I wasn’t at present and my son was doing business in the shop, he felt that the parasitic vine wasn’t worth much, so he busied himself with greeting another group of regular customers. It wasn’t until after that I discovered that the old senior was the King of Medicine from Hidden Dragon Valley.” The old shopkeeper saluted Yue Yang once more and said, “For the past five hundred years, it was only you who were able to identify this item same with the King of Medicine. Merely ten thousand gold, I’d like to afford it, but afraid that it wouldn’t be enough. Thanks to you learned scholar.”

“You are overpraising me. I am just a junior from the younger generation. How could I possibly be an erudite and versatile person!” Yue Yang laughed and denied it with a wave of his hand.

“There are a few rare treasures in my shop, which aren’t very effective and only could deceive a martial artist with low intelligence. How could a true renowned person possibly take it valuable? What I found most useful were the Ruby Diamond and the Agarwood, and when you came in you took a quick look at them, disdaining other goods. If you were not a scholar, how could you be so wise! For the past five hundred years, our guests have been like crucian carp in the river. Who could tell that this parasitic vine is different from the others?” The old shopkeeper’s eyes were very vicious, causing Yue Yang to secretly be vigilant. Fortunately, this guy was a businessman, not very powerful. Otherwise, he would also be a formidable opponent.

“If you agreed with that in the future every ten stalks of parasitic vine you will present me one, and I have the first right to buy it, then I will tell you the true effect of the parasitic vine which also attracted the Kind of Medicine.” Yue Yang pondered for a moment and then proposed a condition.

“If your esteemed guest tells me how to cultivate, I will offer you two for every ten stalks.” The old shopkeeper’s eyes lit up, and he immediately offered his conditions.

“…” Yue Yang did not answer.

“Three stalks, if your esteemed customer can tell me the method, I would put in all my effort to cultivate the best parasitic vine for your esteemed guest.” The old shopkeeper added chips in a hurry.

“If the special parasitic vine that I have designated for cultivating never outflowed, then we can sign a contract.” Yue Yang wasn’t worrying about the outflowing because other than him, no one else could use such a method to refine the pill for no one possessed Flames of Nirvana. However, he would never lower the terms. In a negotiation, the more stringent the conditions were, the happier the other party would be.

When Yue Yang signed the contract with Jun Wu Ye’s name, he wrote down four methods to cultivate the vine on another piece of paper.

One can be dispensed with; in fact, three are secret.

This kind of contract was also an attempt.

If the old shopkeeper was dishonest, these secret parasites would be useless to others. Besides, Yue Yang could tell whether he was loyal to the contract. If the old shopkeeper went against the contract, he could immediately kill him and even confiscate his property.

“Holly, I’ve actually placed such a treasure in a store for several hundred years.” The old shopkeeper had been in a daze ever since Yue Yang left.

As soon as he woke up, he immediately closed the shop.

Yue yang took the parasitic vine. All he needed to do was quickly lock up the contract and the method to cultivate it in the vault, sealing it as the biggest secret of the family. Right here, with three Ruby Diamonds, a piece of Agarwood, a parasitic vine, and ten thousand gold coins, Yue Yang swaggered into the Trembling-Gold Building to see what good stuff the auction house had.

There were simply too few good items out there. His true goal was to obtain treasures that could be auctioned off.

chapters.title: Chapter 671 – Red Stone Of Swan Lake
chapters.body:
Chapter 671 – Red Stone Of Swan Lake

Before the auction, the black market would usually display all the treasures in the Treading-Gold Building so that everyone could familiarize the treasures so that they could compete during the bidding process.

Of course, treasures like the finale of the auction house wouldn’t be so easily displayed.

Unless the owner agreed to do so.

The biggest auction of the year would take place in one month.

It was said that the seats at the back of the auction had to be reserved and the ticket price was ten times higher than usual. Even the seats at the back like Yue Yang required a hundred gold coins.

Yue Yang was not interested in this kind of auction. He didn’t have much time.

Time was money. Who would have the time to wait for a month? If the old shopkeeper hadn’t gifted him 10,000 gold to solve Yue Yang’s shameful predicament, he would have been short of money today and would have had to start a massacre to loot the place. Of course, with ten thousand gold in hand, Yue Yang was no longer in a hurry. He first went to the auction house to have a look. Even if he wanted to loot something, he had to have a target.

Today’s black market only sold for 100 items.

In addition, many of the treasures on display didn’t enter the auction, because today wasn’t a big day.

As Yue Yang was planning to loot the exhibition hall, he suddenly heard a piece of news that made him secretly rejoice. Not far away from him, there were two business-like guys discussing about a treasure that Yue Yang had been yearning for recently, the Hard-shelled Dragon Fruit.

The Hard Hard-shelled Dragon Fruit was one of the most important main ingredients for the Martial Spirit Pill. Without it, it was impossible to refine a Martial Spirit Pill.

“It’s really three thousand years old?” Are you sure? ’

On the left, the pot-bellied merchant in brocade clothes asked his companion in a low voice as he passed by Yue Yang.

“Definitely top quality for three thousand years. I estimate it to be more than three thousand years, because both Hidden Dragon Valley and the Zhai Yue Sect have sent people to compete for it after hearing the news.” The merchant on the right made a 100,000 gold hand gesture with his hand and gestured to his companion, saying softly, “I estimate 50,000 from the start. This is probably the last number.”

“This is a bit too much. If it wasn’t the pinnacle of 3000 years, we’d be at a disadvantage.” The brocade merchant on the left shook his head in an ugly gesture of greed and cowardice.

“…” Yue Yang secretly laughed at these two guys for not recognizing the treasure.

The three-thousand-year old Hard-shelled Dragon Fruit, even if it was not his, would still be able to produce more Martial Spirit Pills than ordinary Martial Spirit Pills.

What did a hundred thousand gold count for?

How could the value of that kind of treasure be measured by money?

In addition, even three thousand years of Hard-shelled Dragon Fruits could be used as a side effect of the Martial God Pill. Although it was still far from being the primary ingredient, it was still one of the more important ingredients. If there were not enough side medicines, the three-thousand-year old Hard-shelled Dragon Fruit could be replaced temporarily. If it is over 5000 years of Hard-shelled Dragon Fruit, in the hands of Yue Yang, can even replace some of the main medicine. If there was a Hard-shelled Dragon Fruit with ten thousand years, Yue Yang could directly confirm that it was the main ingredient. From this, it could be seen how precious the Hard-shelled Dragon Fruit was!

The Hard-shelled Dragon Fruit could absorb the Spiritual Qi from heaven and earth and Earth for three thousand years. What kind of concept was that?

To Yue Yang, that was definitely a priceless treasure.

If someone asked Yue Yang to take out ten million gold in exchange for three thousand years’ worth of Hard-shelled Dragon Fruit.

He would not hesitate to trade. Within Tong Tian Tower, forget about 3000-year-old Hard-shelled Dragon Fruits, even 1000-year-old Hard-shelled Dragon Fruits could only be found by chance! Otherwise, even if all the clans in Tong Tian Tower used all their strength, they still wouldn’t be able to obtain more materials to refine Martial Spirit Pills? If Great Demon King Baruth still had the Hard-shelled Dragon Fruits, he would immediately send it to Yue Yang to refine. Unfortunately, the Hard-shelled Dragon Fruits were not sweet potatoes, and even after searching all over Tong Tian Tower, he would still be able to find very few.

Yue Yang’s heart skipped a beat when he heard the news about the three-thousand-year old Hard-shelled Dragon Fruits.

Putting everything aside, just robbing this alone would make this trip to the Heaven Realm worthwhile … No matter what, he would definitely take down this three-thousand-year old Hard-shelled Dragon Fruit!

Three hours later.

The auction for the Underground auction of Ta Jin edifice had officially begun.

When Yue Yang sat down and prepared to see the future of the fat sheep looted, there were those people. He was surprised to discover that the one who merged with him and had two seats was the round-headed packman he had met earlier in the day. When that guy saw Yue Yang, he immediately reacted and greeted Yue Yang cordially. What left Yue Yang speechless was that the small businessman sitting next to Yue Yang, seeing that the two knew each other, was extremely kind and took the initiative to exchange seats with the round-headed packman.

The round-headed packman didn’t expect this either.

He was a little stunned.

He sat beside Yue Yang and quickly introduced himself again, “I am Bao Gu, a first-rate street vendor from the Emerald Territory. I am one of the honorary outer disciples of the Shi Diao Sect.”

Yue Yang saw that his strength was only at the third level of the Earth Stage, so his potential was low. It was not bad for him to be an outer disciple now.

He replied casually, “Jun Wu Ye, from the Western Heaven realm.”

“Holy shit!”

The round head Bao Gu had the urge to faint. How far is the Western Heaven realm from here? With this boy’s strength, even if he used the portal, he would still need to travel for a month. With his strength, why would he run so far? Why did you have to run so far to get some goods? Not to mention making money, even the transportation fees would definitely not be enough!

Yue Yang smiled and ignored him.

The auction began very quickly.

A man in gray robes stood on the auction platform and welcomed the auction with a torrent of words.

A few reputable influential figures of influential clans as well as the Master of Black Wind City began to raise the matter several times to show their respect before starting the auction.

Every time an auction item came up, this gray-clothed man gave a brief explanation of its uses, then explained the base and each bid. Because of his excellent speech skills and strong motivation, the first ten items were all auctioned at a price several times higher than the original. Of course, there were also a few items that could be auctioned off. This was not uncommon in the black market because the price was too high. It was a common occurrence.

The round-headed packman Bao Gu, was a little curious about Yue Yang. This young human seemed to have good eyes.

Furthermore, he was so far away from the Western Heaven realm, so why wasn’t he bidding?

Could it be possible that he was waiting for the final treasure of today?

“The following auction item is a red stone obtained by adventurers in the most dangerous area of the Emerald Territory, the Evil Dragon River Beach. After testing, the quality of this item is at least level 6. It is filled with energy, and has a strong affinity for light and water energy …” The starting price of this product was one thousand gold, each bid being one hundred gold … Who wants this beautiful red stone? “Please raise the plate in your hands. It only has one thousand gold, and it will belong to you. One thousand gold, is there anyone willing to bid for one thousand gold?” The grey-clothed man spoke with extravagant words, but no one was interested in these kinds of ores. If it was a gem, then it was different. This kind of strange ore that was even bigger than a fist, its uses were unclear. No one was willing to pay a thousand gold coins for a beautiful red stone.

“A thousand gold, is there anyone willing to bid? A thousand gold, only a thousand gold, friends, just a thousand gold, and you can have this beautiful red stone!” The man in grey tried his best to stir things up, but no one asked.

“If it’s an ore with a certificate of origin, then that’s fine. Who would have such a thing?” The round-headed Baogu pursed his lips.

“That’s right. Even if it’s a gem, it still needs to be certified as a producer. It’s not a product from a scam, so the price can’t be too high.” The merchant sitting on the other side nodded in agreement.

After about half a minute of silence, the grey-clothed man, who had been nagging non-stop, realized that the item was about to be filmed.

Out of professional integrity, he asked one last time, "Does anyone want this red stone? “Only one thousand gold. Does anyone want to raise their hands?”

Just when the gray-clothed man was about to hammer the Red Stone Streams, Yue Yang raised his right hand.

His bid stunned the round head.

What was this kid trying to do?

Picking up flaws?

After the appraisal of many experts in the industry, there was no way that someone would be able to pick up items like ores that could be sold in the Auction House. That sort of extremely low-priced auction of a nameless stone and cutting it open only to discover that it was a rare treasure could only be a dream in the Heaven Realm!

Not to mention a famous appraisal, even an ordinary shop could use a special kind of warbeast, the keen sense of smell for gold dog, to judge the quality of mineral gems.

If he wanted to pick up the loot, he would have to trade with a mercenary in the wild who did not recognize the loot.

No one knew how many people had entered the auction hall, but it was impossible for them to take advantage of it!

“Thank you for your support. Thank you very much, but can you offer me a higher price than this gentleman?” If no one else called out a price, then after three calls, this red stone of the sixth rank would belong to this gentleman. My friends, are there any higher bids? " The gray-clothed man was also surprised by Yue Yang’s raise his hand. However, he reacted in a second and continued the auction.

No matter how glib his mouth was, no one would take part in the bidding.

In the end, Yue Yang paid a thousand gold for red stone.

The round-head Bao Gu, really wanted to advise him, but seeing that the boat was already completed, he didn’t know this Jun Wu Ye very well, so he shut his mouth and didn’t speak.

Red Stone was indeed not a good thing to others. However, it was a priceless treasure to Yue Yang.

Earlier in the auction item exhibition, Yue Yang had his eyes on this red rock.

To ordinary people, this red stone was a piece of ore, not a gem. However, to Yue Yang, it was more useful than a gem. In the knowledge inherited of the pitiful guy’s mother, there is a memory of this kind of red stone, known by its full name, Red Stone of Swan Lake, which is a special treasure, for it is so soft that it cannot be inlaid like any other precious stone, nor refined like the ore, but whose function is not to add to the energy of the weapon or armor, as a jewel; it is not ornament, nor is it the material of the tool.

It was a natural treasure that combined Humanoid Divine Soldier and Heavenly Divine Soldier to increase one’s combat power!

Of course, ordinary people couldn’t use this sort of red stone. They had to use some sort of profound Runic Circle to refine the red stone into Swan Lake red stone in order to improve it. And ordinary people didn’t have Humanoid Divine Soldier or a Heavenly Divine Soldier. Even if they obtained such a treasure, they wouldn’t be able to use it.

But it was very useful to Yue Yang.

Especially during the process of using the Spirit of Radiance to merge the Angel’s Blade, Yue Yang desperately needed something that could deal.

chapters.title: Chapter 672 – Heavy Taste? I Don’T Like It!
chapters.body:
Chapter 672 – Heavy Taste? I Don’T Like It!

Chapter 672 Heavy Taste? I Don’t Like It!

Yue Yang won the Red Stone of Swan Lake at the price of 1000 gold coins, and he was a little proud of himself.

Unfortunately, the three-thousand-year-old Hard-shelled Dragon Fruit that he valued the most was not auctioned off today. It seemed that it would be reserved for the annual auction a month later. Yue Yang wanted to get all crazy for several times, just looting this place and plundering everything. However, on second thought, there might be more good things. He couldn’t just kill the hen with the golden egg in one strike. Why not let the hen lay the golden eggs? There should be even more good stuffs in the annual auction, and it would not be too late to act.

Among the hundred items auctioned today, besides the Red Stone of Swan Lake, there were two other items that Yue Yang was interested in.

The first was Fairy Light Bamboos.

This was a very rare spiritual medicine material, and it was also food for warbeasts. It could even be used to refine special weapons.

Tong Tian Tower might no longer have any Fairy Light Bamboos left. Over cutting down had made them already disappeared.

Even here in the Southern Heaven Realm, it was a rarity.

This 1000-year-old product had an auction price of eighty-five thousand gold.

This price was due to the son of the Master of Paksong clan, who personally had come to bid. Many people were intimidated by his strength of Heaven Stage and the influence of Paksong clan in the Emerald Territory. They did not dare to compete with him, who had revealed his identity, otherwise the price would go up.

The other item that Yue Yang had his eyes on was a warbeast whose strength was equivalent to a Heaven Stage level 1, called Ancient Giant Ape.

This golden, fifty-meter-tall giant ape was still not fully mature. It was still in the growing phase. Even if there was no mutation, at the very least, he would be able to reach Heaven Stage level 3 if he continued to grow so normally. Yue Yang felt that it was worth cultivating such a warbeast in Heaven Stage. Of course, he did not need the Ancient Giant Ape at all. He had taken a liking to the potential of level 3. However, if this Ancient Giant Ape and Iron Magic Ape of Ye Kong could be fused together, it would be of great help to Ye Kong, causing his strength to immediately skyrocket …

With the Ancient Giant Ape, perhaps Ye Kong wouldn’t be able to survive in the Heaven Realm, but in Tong Tian Tower, he should be able to turn up his nose at everyone.

“Six million. Young master Song Tao of Paksong clan has offered six million. Is there anyone else who would offer a higher price than six million? If there’s no one bidding within these three voices, then this giant ape in its adolescence will belong to Young Master Song Tao!” As the gray-clothed man spoke, he secretly felt bitter in his heart. Young Master Song Tao had revealed his identity and used his power to intimidate the entire auction house. Everyone in the auction hall was fear about his power and the Paksong clan that held his back, and no one dared to take part in the bidding. At this rate, it would affect the auction very badly, but there was nothing they could do about it.

“…” The entire audience was silent. No one applied for a price.

"You want to compete with me? Disgusting.” The arrogant Young Master Song Tao stuck his head out of the window of the VIP seat and looked around.

In the auction hall that even bigger than a football field and could accommodate tens of thousands of businessmen or warriors, no one dared to compete with him.

Those warriors who had been bidding kept their mouths shut.

Although they were angry, they didn’t dare to resist.

Young Master Song Tao let out a triumphant laugh as he retracted his head with a triumphant look on his face.

For this guy’s arrogance, even the round head Bao Gu, who was sitting beside Yue Yang, was extremely discontented. He was angry but didn’t dare to say anything because he was afraid of Song Tao’s strength of Heaven Stage. After the Ancient Giant Ape was surely belonged to him, the auction resumed its usual state. He quietly discussed with Yue Yang in an unsatisfied manner, “This Young Master Song Tao is really a bad person. He abused his Heaven Stage strength and his father who possessed the peak strength of Heaven Stage level 5 and was rampant in the Emerald Territory. He even revealed his identity in the black market to rob the auction items. He even secretly killed people, robbed the business team, and made a ruckus out of grievances … I think that this fellow hasn’t gotten his retribution yet. Otherwise, he, who has a bounty of nearly 50 million, would be slaughtered sooner or later.”

The small businessman on the other side also replied with interest, "It’s hard to say. Young Master Song Tao himself is an expert of Heaven Stage, and his father was worrying that something would happen to him, thus he sent two guards of Heaven Stage to protect him. Nothing could stop three experts of Heaven Stage from doing what they want to do in Emerald Territory. Experts like the Master of Black Wind City, they are all familiar with each other. It’s impossible for normal mercenary groups to surround and kill them! "

Bao Gu wanted to argue with him but felt that his opponent’s words were reasonable. Moreover, the Paksong clan was a big sect in the Emerald Territory, which ordinary people really didn’t dare to provoke.

In the end, he could only sigh.

Yue Yang heard.

Smiling.

He didn’t say anything.

Fifty million in suspense? Not bad!

It seemed that robbing also needed to pick a good object. Robbing a poor man like Bao Gu, even 10 thousands Bao Gu, was not going to make much money. That pig Barton was a little fatter, but he wasn’t that fat either. To slaughter a potential customer like Young Master Song Tao was his best target. Because not only did he not possess sufficient strength, but he had also received a huge bounty on his head.

No not mention the fact that the bounty on Young Master Song Tao’s bounty was fifty million, just for fact that he had bidden the giant ape and Fairy Light Bamboos that Yue Yang had taken a fancy to, it was enough to turn him into a dead man.

After the auction was over, Yue Yang took out his card and paid a thousand gold coins to receive his Red Stone of Swan Lake.

After him, that Young Master Song Tao arrogantly led the crowd over.

Along the way, they drove away the merchants who were lining up to receive the auction items: “Scram, you poor bastards, don’t you know that you can make way for a true honored guest?”

Having bidden for the bun type cub but having no time to receive it, round head Bao Gu hurriedly pulled Yue Yang away.

He was afraid that Yue Yang, an outsider from the Western Heaven Realm, would not know how to dodge and provoke Song Tao.

It didn’t matter if Yue Yang died.

He was afraid that others would mistake Yue Yang as his friend.

After exiting the entrance, he farewelled to Yue Yang and once again applied for the queue… When Yue Yang walked out Treading-Gold Building, he glanced back, and a mysterious smile appeared on his lips.

Midnight.

After leaving the city master’s Mansion, Young Master Song Tao, whose face was flushed from drinking, boarded his luxurious carriage.

Pulled by four flying horses from the Heaven Realm, they flew straight to his villa in Black Wind City. In his arms was the beautiful woman gifted to him by the Master of Black Wind City, obscenely moving up and down. That ‘beauty’ who was a monster from a human’s point of view coquettishly feigned displeasure at him, rejecting yet attracting him. The two guards were also Heaven Stage level 1 experts, but they were close to the peak level 1. They flied their Silver Winged Flying Dragons, protecting their young master from two sides.

About 20km away from the city master’s mansion, a quiet and elegant villa appeared before the carriage.

At the speed of a galloping horse in the Heaven Realm, twenty kilometers was merely ten minutes of flying.

Moreover, this was a leisurely speed. If they were to fly at full speed, the four flying horses in Heaven Realm could probably fly for 50 kilometers or more within 10 minutes!

When the carriage came to a halt, Young Master Song Tao was ready to carry the enchanting lady back to his house and enjoy himself.

The two house guards suddenly stopped him.

“Please stay in the carriage. Do not come out for now. There’s a smell of blood in the manor, and it’s fresh blood!” The house guard, who had an extremely keen sense of smell, discovered that something was amiss. The servants who had stayed behind and the female servants of Young Master Song Tao should have impatiently welcomed the carriage when it returned. Now, not only was there no one present, but the entire manor smelled of fresh blood.

"Don’t be nervous, this isn’t one time or twice. A trifling bandit wants to assassinate me? Disgusting!” Relying on his strength of Heaven Stage and deliberately showing off in front of the beauty, Young Master Song Tao did not care about any assassination attempts. He wanted to take advantage of this situation and slaughter the bandit leader.

In Black Wind City, not to mention the fact that the three of them could run amuck, even if it was just him alone, he would be worry-free.

Even if he was surrounded by the invaders, the Master of Black Wind City would still hear the news and come immediately.

This place was less than twenty kilometers away from the Master of Black Wind City’s mansion. With the strength of a Heaven Stage expert, it could be said that they could reach here in just a few seconds.

A man wearing a golden mask and holding a Blood Drop Demon Scythe floated out of the manor.

He was, of course, Yue Yang, who had been waiting for a long time.

For second generation like Yue Yang who had just ransacked the manor, there was no need to waste any more words.

He walked up.

Kill!

Young Master Song Tao realized that Yue Yang was as powerful as the Earth Stage level 9, so he thought that he would be able to show off his skills.

“Let me do it!” He reached out to push aside the house guards and proudly raised his strength of Heaven Stage. He pointed at Yue Yang and shouted, “Kid, today is the day of your death! Earth Stage level 9, you want to kill me, too? I’ll let you know what it means to be seckilled!”

"What do you mean by seckill?” Yue Yang asked with a hint of amusement.

“I would kill you in one move and one second. That’s seckill!" Young Master Song Tao rushed forward like a bolt of lightning, wanting to smash Yue Yang’s head with a punch.

In the instant his fist arrived in front of Yue Yang’s forehead, the Gui Cang Sword shot out from Yue Yang’s hand.

Nail it into his forehead!

Young Master Song Tao’s eyes bulged out of their sockets. He had been killed in an instant and could not rest in peace. Yue Yang completely ignored the miserable state of death. He waved his hand, which was still dripping blood, and chopped off the head of Young Master Song Tao. In the eyes of the two house guards, they did not see the sword. They only felt that Young Master Song Tao’s body had trembled a little bit before stopping and letting his opponent use the demon sickle to decapitate him.

Seeing Young Master Song Tao beheaded, the two guards were stunned for a moment. They thought that they had been deceived.

How could a Heaven Stage powerhouse let an Earth Stage one seckill him?

Isn’t that the opposite?

When they reacted, they were furious. The enemy had actually killed their young master, Song Tao, whom he had been protecting closely. What should they do if the sect master were to find out?

Both of them were at the peak of Heaven Stage level 1, and any one of them was several times stronger than Young Master Song Tao.

Together, they attacked Yue Yang, who was putting Young Master Song Tao’s head into his storage ring.

The result was exactly the same as before … Before the guard on the left could hit Yue Yang, he discovered that a white light had appeared between his eyebrows. The Shuang Hua Sword pierced through his forehead and seckilled him instantly too.

The other guard a little slower, was terrified beyond measure.

He no longer cared about avenging for Young Master Song Tao and his companion, and immediately turned around to flee.

He flew far away before realizing how light his body was … Stunned, he looked down and saw that below the chest, something sharp had been cut off his body. At the same time that he screamed in terror, he noticed that the sharp weapon that had cut him in half had returned from the front and was cutting his face in a lightning fast manner … The Wheel of Destruction?

Before he died, such a thought flashed through his mind.

And then, forever.

Seeing that the escaping house guard was cut into two halves by a shining rune wheel crossing back and forth, the flying beauty immediately stopped in fright. Escaping was impossible, even an expert of Heaven Stage wouldn’t be able to escape more than 100 meters, if she wanted to escape, that was courting death. Perhaps, she could use her beauty to exchange for her life.

As long as it was a man, there would be no lecherous ones!

Making up her mind, this beauty immediately moved and tore off all the clothes on her body, revealing the so-called ‘beautiful body’ with four huge breasts.

“I will always serve your master. I belong to the Music Breast Clan. As long as your master massages my body, I will produce beautiful music. This music will enhance interest and also improve your master’s erotic capacities. If your master invited your friend to have fun together, the pleasure will double …” Initially, the beauty wanted to introduce her sexual capacities in bed as well. After all, she was extremely good at it as a master at serving men. Thus, it wasn’t a problem for her to do two against one.

“Sorry, I don’t like heavy tastes!” With his demon sickle, Yue Yang beheaded the beauty with a monster’s appearance.

It’s not impossible to seduce a man, but you have to see who you’re seducing

Other than those perverts who had a strong taste, who would like such a disgusting monster?

Being ugly is not your fault. But coming out to scare people is your fault! Even if he didn’t need to kill her, he wouldn’t be able to stand this kind of self-righteous ugliness! Yue Yang was so disgusted that he almost vomited when he saw her pretentious posture and uncomfortable words. It seemed that this kind of lustful race was the particular disgusting race in the Southern Heaven Realm, and that Young Master Song Tao with heavy tastes was the only one who liked it!

chapters.title: Chapter 673 – A Very Important Gossip
chapters.body:
Chapter 673 – A Very Important Gossip

Chapter 673 A Very Important Gossip

“What?” “Young master Song Tao is dead?” When the Master of Black Wind City Lord heard this news, his first reaction was to suspect that he had heard the wrong thing.

Young Master Song Tao, who was a heaven stage expert and had two heaven stage guards, had finished his meal here. When he returned to the manor, he had been beheaded without a sound. In Black Wind City, other than himself and a few heaven stage warriors who were on good terms with Young Master Song Tao, who else could kill Young Master Song Tao?

If you can’t beat him, won’t you run?

If the three of them returned to their city lord’s mansion, the distance between them would only be twenty kilometers. With their maximum speed, they would only need a minute to escape.

Could it be that the three of them couldn’t hold on for even a minute, and they were going to be slaughtered?

What was most inconceivable to the Master of Black Wind City Lord was that the killer who killed Young Master Song Tao did not escape. Instead, he leisurely entered the Mercenary Guild and used the heads of Young Master Song Tao and two guards to exchange for a bounty … If that wasn’t the case, he would have thought that Young Master Song Tao was enjoying the beautiful lady from the Music Breast Clan that he had sent him!

“The scene has been searched. There are no abnormal signs of a battle.” General Jin Feng, the Master of Black Wind City Lord’s most capable subordinate, reported with a gloomy face, “Including the pretty girl that the City Lord gifted to Young Master Song Tao, all four of them were killed in one move.”

“Killed in one shot?” The Master of Black Wind City Lord’s brows twitched. Even he found it difficult to accomplish such a feat.

"The heads of Young Master Song Tao and his two bodyguards couldn’t receive any damage due to exchanging bounties with the Mercenary Guild. However, I suspect that the other party has strong control abilities. All three of them were beheaded. Only the escaping right-wing Pang Ke was cut in half by the enemy’s sharp weapon, and his head was decapitated. As for the beautiful girl from the Music Breast Clan, she was the same … It is worth noting that although her clothes were torn, she did not suffer any rape. This subordinate guessed that the other party was either accompanied by a woman, or her views on beauty were different from ours. " General Jin Feng reported all the details.

“I just want to know who did it!” The Master of Black Wind City Lord felt like his head was about to burst out of his chest. After such a bloody incident had occurred in his own city, how could the Master of Paksong clan let this go?

“City lord, the Mercenary Guild has taken the name of protection and has refused to reveal the information of the recipient.” General Jin Feng said he couldn’t find out.

“Didn’t you use my City Lord privilege?” The Master of Black Wind City Lord was enraged.

“The Mercenary Guild refused to reveal it even use the privilege.” General Jin Feng replied.

“What?” The Master of Black Wind City Lord was stunned. Even his privileges as the City Lord couldn’t do anything? This was truly unfathomable!

“The Mercenary Guild has a privacy protection rule for the bounty recipient. That bounty recipient applied for personal information protection, so unless the Master of Paksong clan comes in person and asks for a bounty hunt, we will not be able to find the information of the bounty recipient even if we use our privileges.” General Jin Feng nodded slightly. He was sure that the progress of the investigation would be tricky.

“Then we can only wait for that old man, Bai Song, to slaughter our way over here?” The Master of Black Wind City Lord was enraged. He knew he needed to remain calm, but he could not calm himself down after what had happened.

“I had investigated and found a few suspects. In fact, a black clothed man dressed as a thief is the most suspicious because he is the only one who cannot confirm his identity. At that time, he brought two special female guards into the Mercenary Guild, and after him, a few people entered the Mercenary Guild, but none of them were the recipient.” General Jin Feng paused for a moment before coughing softly, “However, this human thief’s strength is rather low. He might only be at the third rank of the Earth Stage. Even though his two female guards are on high ground, they are far away from the Heaven Stage. It’s impossible for them to kill a Heaven Stage like Young Master Song Tao …”

“You mean, he picked up the head?” “Another Heaven Ranked expert killed Young Master Song Tao and left his corpse. This human thief with low strength just happened to discover him, so he came to the Mercenary Guild to claim his reward?” The Master of Black Wind City Lord was not a fool. Even though he was angry, he understood a lot of things.

“If that’s really the case, I feel that there is a high possibility that someone wants to frame us.” General Jin Feng stopped talking after he finished speaking.

“That’s right, we did take advantage of the distribution of the loot last time, plus the black market is booming …” “It’s normal for someone to be envious …”

A cold light flashed in the eyes of the Master of Black Wind City Lord.

With a wave of his hand, he ordered, “Report the situation to the Bai Song Sect. Describe in detail the situation and the analysis of the case.” That old man Bai Song is no fool. It’s not going to be easy for someone to get him to fight us! Of course, we also need to prepare with both hands. On the one hand, we need to investigate the real culprit quickly, and it would be best to start with that weak human thief and see who is generous enough to not buy treasures to protect themselves with, and on the other hand, we need to report it to the Emerald Lord.

Naturally, General Jin Feng accepted the order and went ahead to develop all his manpower. He was looking for a human thief who had two female guards with him.

At this time, Yue Yang had already changed back to be a single person.
