Taking the heads of Young Master Song Tao and the others to receive the bounty, he deliberately called out the War God Guard Ladies as companions to divert the enemy’s attention.

Moreover, he had used the identity of a human thief to show off his strength as a third rank Earth Realm master. He had been especially cautious when he had walked in front of the patrolling guards and tavern mercenaries, letting them ‘see’ his strength.

When he returned to his human form, he only had the strength of a human small businessman.

That would be very safe!

No one would doubt him. And no one would believe that a small human businessman who wasn’t even an Earth Stage cultivator could actually kill three Heaven Stage cultivators … Even madmen wouldn’t think so!

Take your time to find the heaven stage expert you thought!

Yue Yang whistled all the way back to his reserved hotel to rest.

He was satisfied with what he had gained tonight. The only thing that he felt slightly regretful about was that the heads of the two guards were not worth much. Perhaps it was because they had been guards for a long time, but their reward was only ten million gold. It was only a fifth of that Young Master Song Tao’s reward.

The Mercenary Guild placed a heavy tax on Yue Yang’s seventy million reward. Together with the application for information protection, the actual reward that Yue Yang received was only sixty million.

A total of ten million had been taken away by the Mercenary Guild.

If this was the case, if Yue Yang’s personal data could not be protected, then who would still dare to exchange his head for a bounty?

Of course, it didn’t matter even if the Mercenary Guild leaked their personal information, because Yue Yang’s registration was on the Quasi-Earth Class Jun Wu Ye, a travelling merchant from the Western Heaven Realm.

Who knew Jun Wu Ye?

Besides the round head Bao Gu, who had heard of this name, Yue Yang hadn’t had the chance to tell a third person his name… If he took another step back, even if the round head Bao Gu knew that Jun Wu Ye had committed the crime, he wouldn’t suspect Yue Yang. Who would believe that a human traveling businessman who didn’t even have Earth-ranked strength could kill three heaven-ranked warriors, including Young Master Song Tao?

After obtaining sixty million bounties, Yue Yang was very happy to rest in the Grimoire World and sleep until she woke up naturally.

The current him no longer had any pressure on money.

Sure enough, robbing money came quickly!

Under the half-elf maid girl, he had a beautiful breakfast, then changed into a more popular warrior suit in Black Wind City and swaggered out of the hotel.

“So, it’s Brother Jun, good afternoon.” Originally, he had been boasting to the people around him, but as soon as he saw Yue Yang leaving, he immediately came up to him and greeted him with a hand salute. He then asked in a mysterious manner, “Brother Jun, I presume you don’t know about the earth-shaking event that happened last night?”

“What?” Yue Yang pretended not to know, his manner was very cooperative.

“Young master Song Tao is dead! He was beheaded on the spot! He was killed in one blow!” It was as though he had seen it with his own eyes. He made a beheading gesture with his hand around his neck, then demonstrated his’ prophetic ability 'to Yue Yang and lowered his voice. “What did I say yesterday?” Yesterday in the auction house, he had acted so arrogantly, causing the Heaven Stage powerhouses to feel displeased. At noon last night, he began to chase and kill in the City Lord’s Mansion. Although Young Master Song Tao had the strength of a Heaven Stage, how could he be compared with a mysterious Sky Stage powerhouse! However, under the protection of the two guards, they only managed to escape for twenty kilometers. Before they could hide in the villa, they were killed by the mysterious heaven class … I’ve heard that the funniest thing is that the Heaven Stage is like an ant who kills an ant and dares to leave. The most amusing thing is that the Heaven Stage ant who kills an ant who dares to leave, dares to leave … Young master Song Tao’s head is discovered by a lucky thief and his two female companions. It’s a pity that I had a feast with Brother Ma last night. Otherwise, these tens of millions of gold coins would have been left in my pocket! "

“So that’s how it is!” Yue Yang revealed an expression of sudden enlightenment and expressed pity, “I missed the bounty of tens of millions just like that!”

“That’s right!” The round head Bao Gu was also a bit disappointed, but he quickly regained his composure and said, “This matter will definitely not be over. How could the Sect Leader Bai Song, just sit by and watch his beloved be killed? He will definitely come to Black Wind City to investigate. Perhaps there will be a Heaven Ranked War.”

“Since that’s the case, I’ll stay here and continue watching the show!” Yue Yang smiled and nodded.

“If Brother Jun doesn’t stay here and watch, then that would be a waste …” “Come, let’s go to the tavern and have a drink. I also have some news that came from an acquaintance who worked for the Master of City. It’s said that this matter …” He looked around, lowered his voice, and whispered into Yue Yang’s ears: “I’m afraid this matter is related to the mayor, but you have to be careful when you speak of it. I think Brother Jun is a trustworthy person, or else you will never dare to bring it up.”

“Brother Bao, please rest assured. However, I never thought that Brother Bao would be so resourceful. Even the Master of City’s residence is present. I’m really impressed!” Yue Yang flattered her and almost flew into the air.

In the distance, a giant mammoth riding in luxurious clothing came over. It was Master Barton, who looked like a pig.

Master Barton had no memory of Yue Yang.

He had forgotten about it.

As long as that eccentric and gorgeous female servant intentionally glanced at Yue Yang. To be able to find Yue Yang among tens of thousands of people on the streets, this eye of discernment was truly amazing. When Yue Yang lifted his gaze and looked at her, she had lowered her eyes and didn’t meet Yue Yang’s gaze. She seemed to know that if she looked at him, Yue Yang would have sensed his presence.

“This guy is Master Barton, nicknamed the White Pig. Although he is a jeweler on the surface, he is actually a slave trader and the City Lord’s number two henchman.”

The round head Bao Gu did not dare to say anything. It waited until the mammoth mount was far away before fiercely spitting towards the ground.

Yue Yang estimated that Bao Gu and Lord Barton also had a bit of a grudge.

It was just that he was too weak to resist.

Yue Yang changed the topic and asked, “Brother Bao, what good stuff does the auction house have today?”

This question was correct. The round head Bao Gu, who liked to brag and brag about himself, immediately went on and on. He introduced all the functions and prices of the various items, as well as his personal evaluation, to Yue Yang … Yue Yang’s left ear went in and out of his right ear. He was not interested in ordinary things, but the name Bao Gu mentioned made his heart tremble slightly.

“There aren’t many good things in the recent auction items. Generally, good things are stored in the annual auction.” You don’t know who this year’s finale slave is. You definitely won’t be able to think of it and probably never even heard of it. But her name is definitely not ordinary in our Southern Heaven Realm! She was Captain of the Ranging Flame Bandit Group, a female giant who had obtained the Dragon Bloodline Inheritance! Allegedly, in order to obtain the reward of 530 million gold, in order to catch her, ten Heaven Stage Level 4 teamed up, and finally succeeded. You said ordinary heaven stage? A Tier 1 Heavenly Grade like Young Master Song Tao was simply giving away food. As long as that female giant held out her hand, the egg yolk of Young Master Song Tao would explode out … Of course, it was impossible for Young Master Song Tao to surround and attack the flames right now. Even his brain was moving! “One billion, if I had one billion, I would definitely sell the female giant Raging Flame, what a pity …”

In the end, that silly female giant Raging Flame was captured by the clown?

Yue Yang’s face did not change, but he was warier of the clown. It seemed that he had underestimated the clown!

chapters.title: Chapter 674 – A Secret Kiss
chapters.body:
Chapter 674 – A Secret Kiss

Chapter 674 A Secret Kiss

Although Yue Yang was a little giddy about the female giant Raging Flame’s stubborn and temper, he still had to save her.

The first reason was that if they could become teammates, then their support would greatly increase.

Besides, Raging Flame wasn’t an incurable idiot. As long as she slightly changed her stubborn philosophy, she would realize that doing things with chivalry wasn’t going to work. Even if she did act with chivalry, she needed strength and a better method. In other words, as long as that female giant Raging Flame who liked to use brute force was willing to listen to Yue Yang’s arrangements, everything would become simple.

Yue Yang had already thought of a way to persuade the flame.

As a great villain, he would beat her with all his might, bully her, and then allow Xue Wuxia to rescue her. As for Yi Nan, he would be in charge of consoling and consoling her.

Just as Yue Yang was thinking about this question, the street outside was filled with the clamorous sounds of gongs and drums.

Yue Yang looked up and saw hundreds of warriors celebrating.

Some of them carried banners and slogans; some scattered flowers to celebrate; others distributed food, snacks, and various materials to the crowds in the street. As these people approached, Yue Yang realized with a start that this was not a festive parade, but a celebration of the murder of Young Master Song Tao. The round head Bao Gu wrapped himself around the valley and ran out happily. After receiving a few desserts, he began to eat with gusto.

Seeing that Yue Yang didn’t want it, he explained, "Don’t doubt it, these are all food that they wholeheartedly and gratefully distributed. You came from the Western Heaven realm. You don’t know what kind of trash Young Master Song Tao is here. It’s simply a disaster. You’re even more frightening than those man-eating demonic beasts. He persecuted an uncountable number of people. There were only a few hundred people who were celebrating today. If more people knew that he had been killed, there would be another grand celebration! Even I have been bullied and bullied by the Paksong clan several times. Now, eating these desserts is like eating the meat of Young Master Song Tao. It’s really a vent for hatred, ha-ha! "

The words of the round head Bao Gu and the vicious eating manner made Yue Yang blush for him.

To think that he had inadvertently done something good!

It was clearly a bad thing to do, how could it be like this?

Since that was the case, he might as well do it until the end!

Yue Yang skillfully asked about the round head Bao Gu, the city, and the nearby people like Young Master Song Tao, who had the wealth, power, and evil side to make people angry.

“That’s too much. I see that you can keep your secret, or else you won’t tell anyone else.” The round face of the valley began to boast again, to show how much he had seen and heard.

“Brother Bao, how about we find a tavern and have a chat while we eat?” Student Yue Yang discovered that the information that the Mercenary Guild could not buy at such a high price was here. Not a single gold was needed, and he could directly obtain it from Bao Gu’s mouth. Additionally, he was extremely clear on all sorts of information, including the Heaven Ranked War Beast’s skills, personality habits, behavior habits, and so on.

Yue Yang treated Bao Gu to a meal and then went to the auction together.

While paying attention to the auction item he was looking for, he listened to Bao Gu’s various introductions.

Gradually, as their relationship improved from strangers to friends, Yue Yang also gained a thorough understanding of the Southern Heaven Realm and at least the Emerald Territory. In the entire Emerald Territory, there were heaven stage experts, city lords, various sects, mercenary groups and bandit groups, various demon beasts, various specialties, and even some hidden cultivators. Yue Yang knows most of them. Other than some Heaven stage ultimate moves that were deliberately hidden, there was probably no other information that Baogu didn’t know about in the Emerald Territory.

This fellow was a big mouth, but his ability to gather intelligence was not bad.

He’s a good talker, but he likes to show off.

In the evening, when Yue Yang returned to the Grimoire World, he was in a very good mood. Seeing the half-elf maid girl in maid attire, he couldn’t help but hug her and kiss her.

The half-elf little servant was both embarrassed and happy. He was stunned for a while before he reacted.

She felt that her relationship with her master had made new progress after that kiss, and that it had increased her confidence.

“Master, let me massage your shoulders!” While Yue Yang was showering, the half-elf maid girl mustered up the courage and put on the swimsuit that he had designed for himself. He took the initiative to go into the water and massage his shoulders.

“Ah …” Yue Yang looked at this half-elf maid girl who had changed into a three-point swimsuit. The snowy mountain peak on her chest was towering, and the three-point swimsuit on the small piece of cloth was unable to conceal her richness. Instead, it seemed even more exaggerated. Yue Yang subconsciously covered his nose with his hand. Fortunately, he didn’t have a nosebleed. However, the visual impact could instantly kill all the carbon-based creatures in the world called otaku.

When the half-elf maid girl saw the expression of his master and saw the splendor in his eyes, he secretly rejoiced in his heart.

Master really liked his bold display. He didn’t say it, but he definitely did!

Yes, I need to work harder!

Come on!

The half-elf maid girl held her small fist to cheer for himself.

Her swimming was very good, her posture was as wonderful as a mermaid’s, gently sliding behind Yue Yang. First, she bravely hugged Yue Yang, feeling the hope and happiness in her heart. After a short hug, she immediately took out the gentlest massage technique and began to massage Yue Yang seriously.

It was her ultimate ideal to serve her master and make him the happiest person in the world.

Black wind city, City Lord’s Mansion.

“Bang!”

A jade cup worth thousands of gold coins, made the Master of Black Wind City ferociously smash onto the white ground paved with nebula stones, smashing it into pieces.

At this moment, the Master of Black Wind City, who was so angry that his face was twisted, roared at the reported General Jin Feng, “Dammit, can’t you let me have a peaceful sleep?” After the death of Young Master Song Tao last night, I was still having a headache how to explain it to Bai Song. But now, you said that the elder, ‘Hei Suo’, who was the Lan Jiang sect was killed by someone, could it be that all the bad luck in the Southern Heaven Realm had come to our Black Wind City? The fact that Young Master Song Tao had been killed meant that he had been arrogant and had countless enemies. However, the Lan Jiang sect, Hei Suo, what had happened to him? “Although he is a criminal from the Southern Heaven Realm, he has no enemies in the Emerald Territory. I just formed an alliance with the Lan Jiang sect and Hei Suo has yet to leave the territory, but he was already killed. This is undoubtedly telling the sect master of the Lan Jiang sect that I have maliciously destroyed the alliance. This is the exact opposite of my original intention.”

After General Jin Feng had finished venting his anger, he lowered his head and slowly raised it, “Mayor, what I said is the truth.”

After the Master of Black Wind City heard this, he took a deep breath.

That’s right, now that the truth had been established, it was useless to make a ruckus.

How to deal with it, how to remedy it, that was the most important… Even Black Wind didn’t need to guess to know what was going on. Someone was framing him!

His true target was neither Young Master Song Tao nor Elder Hei Suo, but him! Judging from the matter of the death of Young Master Song Tao and Elder Hei Suo, this was just the beginning. There would probably be more assaults later on.

“How did Elder Hei Suo die?” Elder Hei Suo was a famous expert of the Lan Jiang sect. He was different from the playboy Young Master Song Tao.

“The corpse is missing and the cause of death cannot be investigated. However, his head has been claimed by someone from Green Leaf City, three thousand miles away. This subordinate happens to have a spy guarding the Mercenary Guild in Green Leaf City.” When he obtained this information, he would immediately report it to his subordinate. " General Jin Feng replied.

“Who is the recipient?” The Master of Black Wind City is most interested in finding out who the recipient is. Perhaps, he can use this clue to track down the assailant.

“It is said that she is a half-elf girl who doesn’t even have Earth stage strength. It is impossible to see her face clearly, but her strength is low. This is certain.” “In addition, there is a very special body scent coming from this half-elf girl. That guard from the Hound Clan, and his sense of smell is very sensitive. If that half-elven girl were to appear again, even if he changed his attire, I believe he wouldn’t be able to hide from her.” General Jin Feng didn’t think that the half-elven girl was the one who killed Elder Hei Suo. Most likely, she was just passing by. Seeing the dead Heaven stage I, she couldn’t help but chop off the head to accept the reward.

As for why not go to Green Leaf City instead of Black Wind City?

One reason was probably because she came out of Black Wind City and found out that the death of Young Master Song Tao in Black Wind City was already causing a huge ruckus. She did not dare to return to Black Wind City to accept the bounty from the Mercenary Guild. Another reason was that she was probably a resident of Green Leaf City and had teleportation Stone from Green Leaf City. Thus, she teleported back to Green Leaf City to collect the bounty in a city that she was more familiar with.

This conjecture was not only based on General Jin Feng’s conjecture, but also on the logic of the Master of Black Wind City.

The assailants definitely had nothing to do with the Half-Elven girls or the previous human thieves. This was because the strength of these people was too weak.

The culprit must be someone else!

The reason why this murderer kept on killing was to blame Black Wind City. It seemed that he wanted to cause chaos and bloodshed here… The Master of Black Wind City thought for a moment and suddenly said to General Jin Feng, “Since the enemies are so rampant, then let’s play with them and see who has the better skills.” He is in the dark, I am in the light, must use a trick to lead him out in the dark. “I have a plan, you execute it immediately. As long as the plan succeeds, the killer will fall for it. Then, we will have a chance to assassinate the culprit. Yi Xue’s heart is filled with hatred!”

The Master of Black Wind City was indeed a crafty old schemer. Soon, he recalled the scheme like the luring a snake out of its lair.

He whispered to General Jinfeng.

After hearing this, General Jin Feng’s eyes lit up. He nodded again and again and happily left to carry out Black Wind’s plan.

“To be able to kill Hei Feng, who could this killer be?” Hei Suo was a second level heaven stage cultivator, ten times stronger than Young Master Song Tao. If the culprit was not instantly killed, but rather killed in a time-consuming manner, then his strength should be around the third level of the heaven stage. If the assailant’s strength is much higher than that of a third level Heaven stage master, then there is no need to be afraid of me. From what I see, he must be below me and above the black chain. “Just who in the Emerald Territory would go against me at the Heaven stage within this boundary of strength?” The Master of Black Wind City was constantly narrowing the scope of the imaginary enemies.

Unfortunately, when he thought of this, he was unable to imagine that the real culprit was from Tong Tian Tower.

Even more so, he couldn’t imagine that everything he guessed was an illusion created by Yue Yang.

After continuing with Young Master Song Tao, he had gained more treasures from Elder Hei Suo. However, due to the time being, he did not have the time to sort out all these things for the time being. The following assaults continued. As for the spoils of war, he might as well leave them in Tong Tian Tower for later on.

Under the gentle massage of the half-elf maid girl, Yue Yang comfortably entered into a deep sleep.

She bowed her head.

kiss him secretly.

chapters.title: Chapter 675 – Charming Eenchanting, Soul Seizing
chapters.body:
Chapter 675 – Charming Eenchanting, Soul Seizing

Chapter 675 Charming eEnchanting, Soul Seizing

The next day, Yue Yang stretched in high spirits and then opened the door.

A face appeared in front of his eyes. Originally, Yue Yang thought it was the talkative round head Bao Gu, but when he took a closer look and was shocked … He could never have imagined that she would be the gorgeous maid among the maids by Master Barton’s side. Today, she wasn’t wearing a maid costume. She wore the armor of a female martial artist, which could hardly enwrap her magnificent breasts.

Not only did her tight armor not affect the beauty of her curves.

On the contrary, in this contrast, add a special magical sexuality, captivating other’s soul and enchanting other’s mind.

Yue Yang recognized the gorgeous maid from Master Barton’s sides with just a glance. But he pretended to be a fool, revealing his wolf eyes. He sized her up and down: “Did this lady walk through the wrong door?” Initially, this kind of perverted wolf who couldn’t wait to strip a person of his clothes was the one who the most irritating to beauties. The reason why Yue Yang did this was to probe her.

“I don’t think I went wrong!” That hot, sexy, and seductive beauty walked in casually, as if she was walking into her own house.

“You are the Premiere Madame Sai Jinhua to serve me that I spent ten golds? You are certainly a Premiere. The tits are really big, and the skin is white. It’s really worth it!” Yue Yang began to take off clothes, while desperately closed the door: “Come on, I’ve been waiting for you for the whole night. You are not taking the time to soak yourself in bleach. Let’s have sex first! What kind of moves are you good at? Take it out and serve your master truly. If you make me feel good, your master will reward you with ten more gold!" His performance was even worse than that of the anxious mercenary. It would be strange if a normal beauty didn’t send a kick at him and then leave with angry!

“In Black Wind City, there even is no a Premiere Madame called Sai Jinhua." That enchanting beauty had a smile on her lips as she walked over to Yue Yang and helped him put on his clothes one by one. At the same time, she chuckled: “Don’t be suspicious, I’m not a bad person.”

“You may not be a bad person, but I can’t guarantee that I’m a good person …” Yue Yang also laughed.

"Actually, who you are doesn’t matter to me at all. All I need to know is that you’re a very capable man, and that’s enough. " The enchanting beauty suddenly said with a serious face, “I came this time to form an alliance with you. You have power that I cannot see through. I need a helper like this.”

“What alliance?” Yue Yang asked.

“If I want to take back something very, very important, with my strength as Heaven Stage level 3, it’s impossible. I need more help. At the beginning, I wanted to ally with the female captive, Raging Flames, in the annual auction. She had the strength to be my ideal assistant. On the way, though, I ran into you, and I suddenly felt that my target could be revised. If there is an expert who can instantly kill Gongzi Song Tao and elder Hei Suo and join my hands, I’m afraid my goal will be easier to achieve.” That sexy and enchanting beauty, whose eyes could easily captivate a person with just a slight movement, leaned her face close to Yue Yang, and her cherry lips almost touched his lips. Her breath even lightly breathed on his face, softly whispering in his ear in an enchanting voice.

"You’re Heaven Stage level 3?” Yue Yang asked, acting foolishly.

"On the surface, my strength is only Earth Stage level 8. However, through some sort of secret technique, I can recover my hidden strength in a short period of time. With the support of a warbeast, I should be able to reach the peak of Heaven Stage level 3.” The enchanting beauty replied.

“Since you are so powerful, why would you stay by Master Barton’s side as a maid?” Yue Yang had another question.

“Barton is a pervert. He is impotent, but he likes strong and robust man fuck his ass, and also likes to be whipped. However, with a special warbeast like the Skin-smoothing warbeast, any whip blows and injuries will immediately recover. No one knows his secret, apart from a loyal assistant of Heaven Stage. His large group of maids, although they appear to be extravagant and lustful on the surface, are actually women whom he has bought to blind other people’s eyes and ears.” The sexy and enchanting beautiful lady used her rosy fingers to gently slide Yue Yang’s lips. She smiled and said, “I am a general and an important customer of his. I came to Black Wind City in the name of bringing precious accessories to the auction pretending to be one of his maids. I am not his maid …” Besides, can’t a man like you, who has seen countless women, see that I’m a little flower that hasn’t budded, don’t pretend to be jealous to bully me, okay? I can’t let you doubt me, or I’ll be too disappointed!"

“I read countless women?” Yue Yang didn’t not know when he had become coxcomb.

“You didn’t? The clothes you’re wearing right now have a faint woman’s body scent, but it’s different from the woman’s body fragrance from the day I met you. It’s also different from the day I met you at the entrance of the Treading-Gold Building. My nose is very sensitive and I definitely can’t smell wrong!” The enchanting beauty giggled.

“Is that so?” Yue Yang was sweating profusely.

That was true.

Usually, Yue Yang’s clothes would be washed by the ladies.

The clothes he had changed were washed by Yue Yu, Luo Hua, and the sickly beauty, as well as Si Niang, Yue Bing, and Yi Nan. Sometimes Princess Qian Qian, that coquettish girl, would also help to wash when she was free to do so, although it was rare. As for Xue Wuxia, she would usually only make clothes for him and leave most of chances of washing his clothes to Yue Yu and the others.

Whether it was the new clothes made by Xue Wuxia, or the old clothes that Yue Yu and the others had washed.

Naturally, they would bring along the faint fragrance of their bodies.

Among all the girls, other than the little half-elf maid girl with the gift of smell, no one could completely distinguish the difference between the various female body odors left on Yue Yang’s clothes. Even Princess Qian Qian, who possessed the talent of six senses, couldn’t do so.

This was because Yue Yang’s masculine aura greatly concealed the remaining fragrance of the woman’s body.

She was able to blend in with each other and distinguish the differences in the clothing’s fragrance.

It seemed that this seductive and sexy beauty was not an ordinary person.

She could even tell the fragrance of his clothes was different. How could Yue Yang’s natural aura hide from her?

No wonder she was able to come to Yue Yang’s residence accurately. It seemed that this had a lot to do with her olfactory ability. What alerted Yue Yang the most was her ability to conceal her strength. With current Insight of Heaven, Yue Yang could only tell that she was an expert of Heaven Stage level 2. She herself had said that she was Heaven Stage level 2, which proved that there was still a portion of her hidden strength that hadn’t been seen through … Could it be that this girl also had the second Inherent Skill?

"If you are willing to form an alliance with me, I will definitely not let you miss anything. If you take back that thing, you can talk about any treasure you want. If you really don’t like treasures, and I have no way to repay you back, then just present that to you.” A few blushes suddenly appeared on that sexy and seductive beautiful woman’s jade-like face, adding even more charm to it. Seeing this, Yue Yang’s heart couldn’t help but beat faster, raising his heartbeat to three hundred times per minute. The beautiful girl seemed to be shamed and annoyed, and even gave him a stare when she wanted to speak. It was the flirtatious look of a daughter, allowing her to express herself vividly. Fortunately, it was Yue Yang. If it was another man with a weaker mental fortitude, he would have submitted to her and be willing to sacrifice everything for her, even to certain death for her with no hesitation.

“Which one?” Yue Yang pretended not to understand.

“Naughty man, that’s the one … You’re not allowed to bully me!” The sexy and seductive beauty pretended to stomp her feet. Even with the protection of her breastplate, her explosive upper body area created a wonderful vibration that could melt a person’s soul. It could even instantly kill any otaku.

“Since I could eat and take, surely the things you want me to do must not be simple?” Yue Yang secretly swallowed a mouthful of saliva.

“Just take back one thing.” Beautiful women claimed that it was simple.

“What is it?” Yue Yang expressed his doubt.

“The Emerald Territory, including a hundred cities.” The beauty spoke very easily.

“Such a simple matter …Unfortunately, I can’t do it!” Yue Yang pushed the enchanting beauty out of the way and closed the door. “See the guest out!”

“Don’t worry, you still have a month to think about it. After one month, the enemy will send the raging flames to Black Wind City, and we will save her and increase her strength. Then, you can take your time to reply to me. I can’t prove it, but I have a hunch you’re after her! Good man, I will always be waiting for you!” The sexy and seductive beauty giggled and floated away.

After the beautiful woman left, Yue Yang pondered for a long time.

He was a hundred percent sure.

There must be some sort of ability or treasure on that woman that could detect other people’s strength.

Even though he had the innate ability to disguise himself, he had revealed a part of his flaws with the opponent’s treasure or ability detection. If he hadn’t killed Young Master Song Tao and Elder Hei Suo, she wouldn’t have doubted him so easily.

She must have investigated the scene before. With her keen sense of smell, surely, she could smell a sliver of his remaining scent.

At the very least, she locked her suspect onto him.

Fortunately, she was not one of the Master of Black Wind City and white pig Barton’s men, but their enemy. According to Bao Gu, in the Emerald Territory, there had been a serious rebellion before. Even the Emerald Lord was severely injured, but with the help of a Sky Region Emperor from Southern Heaven Stage, the rebellion quickly subsided. Based on the woman’s words, the rebellion had been successful. The lord of the Emerald Territory had secretly changed, but the people below did not know about it.

The woman just now should be the daughter of the former Emerald Lord or his disciple.

With her own strength, she wanted to retake the Emerald Territory.

This was even harder than ascending to heaven!

Not to mention the strength of the Emerald Lord, she could not even beat the Master of Black Wind City. Black Wind City was merely one of the one hundred cities under the Emerald Territory’s command!

Yue Yang wouldn’t meddle in this kind of idle business. If he had the effort, he might as well kill a few more warriors of Heaven Stage, save up some money, and buy materials to refine the Martial Spirit Pill to enhance the potential of Yue Bing and the others… Compared with those fighting affairs of clan, it would be better for him to have romantic relationships with girls … Besides, the truly awesome people wouldn’t care about a small Emerald Territory. Just like Queen Fei Wenli, she would sweep across the entire Heaven Realm, making all the stronger of Heaven Realm turn ashen and become the conquerors of all living things. That would be awesome!

Of course, Yue Yang wouldn’t obstruct her dreams. After all, having an ideal was better than nothing!

“…huh?” Yue Yang discovered that there was suddenly a powerful aura of Heaven Stage descending from the sky. “All the warriors, merchants, and residents of Black Wind City must go to the stalls in front of the master’s mansion to register. Those who disobey must be considered as accomplices in the attack on Young Master Song Tao. Those who leave the city must be killed!”

chapters.title: Chapter 676 – Listen, I Usually Don’T Tell Others
chapters.body:
Chapter 676 – Listen, I Usually Don’T Tell Others

Chapter 676 Listen, I Usually Don’t Tell Others

In Black Wind City, not only did the entire city register again, they even obtained a testing crystal to test the strength of the target.

In addition, he also inquired about all sorts of secrets, such as warbeasts, skills, weapons, armors, money, profession, identity, friends, and other things that others had no right to investigate. Of course, it was impossible to find the real killer, Yue Yang, by using this kind of method. With his camouflage talent and the ability to freely control energy, the testing result of the crystal was, without any suspense, a quasi-earth stage.

Because his strength was extremely low, Yue Yang’s registration didn’t attract anyone’s attention.

With asked each one.

For example, Yue Yang casually reported the Seeking Golden Mice to the warbeast.

When the registered guy saw this extremely weak puppet, he had no desire to inquire any further. He hastily filled in a few details and then chased Yue Yang away. He felt that investigating this kind of trash was simply a waste of time.

There was one other thing that made Yue Yang extremely unhappy, and that was the Master of Black Wind City, who used the City Lord’s privilege to stop the black market’s business for three days.

The excuse is the uniform registration of information.

Since the black market was closed, the alchemy materials that Yue Yang wanted to buy had to be delayed. The original arrangement had a huge impact on the alchemy plan … On the surface, they would only delay the arrival of a Heaven stage expert if they were to register their investigation … Not to mention Yue Yang, even an eight-year-old could see through such a plan. However, the Master of Black Wind City clearly used his special powers to suppress others. He was a Heaven stage expert and had the ability. In this world, where the one with the bigger fist was the boss, there was nothing that could be done about him.

“These three days you’ve been resting in the black market and you can’t leave the city. Do you want me to accompany you around the city and relax your mind?” The enchanting beauty intentionally brushed past Yue Yang as she mischievously asked.

“You are?” Yue Yang pretended not to know her.

“Hehe, I think I’ve recognized the wrong person. I thought you were that kid Jun Wu Ye.” She gave Yue Yang an electric eye. Her waist was slender like a willow, her fragrant buttocks were swaying, and even her back was exuding a fatal enticement. She floated away, and it was unknown how many people’s souls she had taken with her.

“My God, how could you know such a pretty girl?” The round head Bao Gu opened his mouth wide, saliva flowing out for three feet.

“Didn’t she say she recognized the wrong person?” Yue Yang felt a headache.

“But she knows your name!” The round head Bao Gu suddenly noticed this important point.

“You heard wrong!” Yue Yang could only deny his words. In short, he firmly refused to admit it.

“That makes sense. A weakling like you, who doesn’t even have the strength of the first level of the Earth Stage, it’s impossible for her to know you!” You know what? She was simply as beautiful as a goddess. An Earth Stage Eight cultivator was just a hair away from Heaven Stage. She was so young, she would definitely become a heaven stage expert in the future! A beautiful heaven-step goddess. She was so beautiful, yet so powerful … Her eyes were as bright as the stars … If she would look at me, I would die immediately. If she is willing to take me as her slave, I will follow her in my life and forever be her loyal slave! “I’ve decided. I will be her slave for the rest of my life, and I will listen to her commands!” The round head Bao Gu was still intoxicated by the despicable YY. Yue Yang couldn’t stand him, so he quickly left.

When Yue Yang returned to the hotel, just as he entered, a Griffin elite team from the sky behind him.

They were the elites of the Thunder Griffin Squad under the Lionheart King.

Immediately after that, dozens of Hundred Songmen Sect disciples in mourning clothes flew across the sky towards the City Lord’s Mansion under the lead of several elders, carrying with them a sorrowful and angry atmosphere.

Ten disciples of Lan Jiang sect with silver belts tied around their waists also flew over from afar.

Although their numbers were inferior to the Bai Song Sect’s, they were all at or above the seventh level of the Earth Stage. They were not weak people.

This was especially true for the middle-aged man in front of them. His appearance was plain and ordinary, and his strength was only at the first rank of Heaven stage. However, only Yue Yang’s keen eyes could see through his disguise; his hidden strength was actually at the fourth rank of Heaven stage. This man was even stronger than Master of Black Wind City

, who was at the peak of heaven Stage Level 3.

Yue Yang’s heart trembled.

It looked like this middle-aged man named ‘Jue Hu’ and he is the leader of Lan Jiang sect

With Yue Yang’s strength and cultivation level, he did not fear experts of high rank. However, he found those with true strength difficult to deal with.

Even though Jue Hu was also at the fourth level of the Heaven stage, and even claimed to have the strength of a peak fourth level heaven-step, in Yue Yang’s eyes. Even if he had the Sunny Sunflower, Spirit of Radiance, Light Speed Fang, and the Black Smoke Horn Dragon

, coupled with his own strength, Guild leader Yong Hui was impossible for him to defeat this middle-aged man. On the other hand, Yue Yang felt that if they were to fight to the death and end up killing Guild leader Yong Hui, it was very possible!

What was a formidable opponent?

The answer is, someone like this middle-aged man, was Yue Yang’s true rival in the Heaven Realm!

In the Heaven Realm, aside from that clown, what gave Yue Yang a sense of strength was that the Lionheart King was going to end up in this hopeless situation! Even that overpowered bald man, the Wise demon marshal, would probably fall back a bit.

A dragon roar resounded in the sky.

Yue Yang quickly returned to his room. He knew that a person had arrived, Long Xiang.

Although he didn’t know if Long Xiang would be able to recognize him among the thousands of people, it was best not to meet him.

Based on the current situation, the Lionheart King, Clown, Black Wind and even the Emerald Lord behind them were all closely linked to each other. As long as the interests of either side were touched, they would unite and defend each other. Of course, their relationship is not really close. As long as the chain of interests was broken, their alliance would immediately vanish.

This was because these people only cared about benefits.

No profit no friendship!

On the other side of the city, rumbling like thunder.

An eagle-nosed elderly man was fighting with the Master of Black Wind City in the sky, and at any moment, he was like a bolt of lightning. Not only the City lord’s mansion, even the entire Black Wind City was trembling.

Most likely, this old man was Young Master Song Tao’s father, the Sect Leader of the Bai Song Sect, Old Man Bai Song!

Even though he knew that his beloved son was not killed by the Master of Black Wind City, he still chose to vent his anger on the Black Wind. Before anyone could console him, a fight was inevitable!

This was also a matter of face for the Sect Leader.

What would others think if they didn’t even kill their son? What would the sect think?

Yue Yang instructed the attendants that he needed to rest for three days and must not be disturbed. This action was not noticed because many honest businessmen decided to hide for three days in order to find peace. If he ran out to see the commotion and let the flames of war spread, bringing disaster to the fish in the pond, then he would truly be unlucky! Especially the fact that Young Master Song Tao of the Bai Song Sect had been killed, there was no place for him to vent his hatred. If someone were to fall into their hands, they would definitely be courting death.

Pretending to sleep, Yue Yang used the Three Realms Compass to return to Rainbow Castle.

The chaos in the South Heaven Realm had nothing to do with him.

On the other hand, the more chaotic it was, the better.

With ‘Red Stone of Swan Lake’, Yue Yang’s confidence in merging with the Angel Blade and the Spirit of Radiance greatly increased.

But Yue Yu shyly declined Yue Yang’s suggestion. Xue Wuxia and Princess Qian Qian were not present, and the sickly beauty was accompanying Si Niang at the mirage. Everyone else was not here, even Yue Bing and Yi Nan were cultivating after nightfall.

She was the only one left in this small garden, and she really didn’t dare to agree to Yue Yang’s request.

He was afraid that he might have done something wrong if he didn’t control himself properly.

Although she believed in his mental fortitude and felt that she wouldn’t do that, she was always worried in her heart. She didn’t want to create this kind of opportunity for her to cultivate together again.

“Next time!” She was afraid that her brother would be disappointed, so she didn’t completely reject his good intentions.

“Are you unwell?” “It’s fine, we’ll talk about it in a few days. Let’s plant some Fairy Light Bamboo first!” Yue Yang thought that Yue Yu’s good friend had arrived and her body wasn’t feeling good, so she refused to cooperate with him by using the Angel’s Blade to merge with his Spirit of Radiance. After all, Yue Yang wasn’t in a hurry because the Red Stone of Swan Lake. He planted the Fairy Light Bamboo in the side of Rainbow Castle. This kind of Fairy Light Bamboo naturally had a magical effect of attracting the spiritual Qi of Heaven and Earth. Now, although it didn’t seem like it had been planted for a long time, especially after the Fairy Light Bamboo had slowly expanded into a bamboo forest, the amount of spiritual Qi of Heaven and Earth that it gathered was quite impressive.

“So, this is the Fairy Light Bamboo?” It might already be extinct in Tong Tian tower. Yesterday, all sorts of materials that the various races had sent over, and there was no Fairy Light Bamboo like this … “This must be very expensive, right?” Yue Yu habitually took out her handkerchief and wiped Yue Yang’s sweat.

“Ah, it is indeed expensive!” Yue Yang of course didn’t say that this was obtained after killing Young Master Song Tao, so he offered a price to his sister: 85,000 gold!

“Where did you get so much money?” Yue Yu felt a little strange.

Didn’t little brother worry about money a few days ago?

He had the money to buy eighty-five thousand gold firefly bamboo all of a sudden? If one were to say that one thousand gold took the Red Stone of Swan Lake that no one knew of, then it was still fine. But the Fairy Light Bamboo was clearly a good item. Eighty-five thousand gold? Where did he get the money from?

Yue Yang was sweating profusely.

Fortunately, he had reacted quickly. He immediately mentioned that Young Master Song Tao was a heinous, lascivious man, a villain of the evil side. When the guy was preparing to commit a crime, Yue Yang was righteous enough to stand up and fight against this Young Master Song Tao, who had two heaven stage guards on him, in order to save a weak girl. After a terrifying battle, after great difficulty, he defeated the bad guy and saved the world. No, he saved a weak girl.

Yue Yang, who learned from Lei Feng and did good deeds without leaving a name, also received a reward.

The Mercenary Guild rewarded 50 million gold coins. This was because this 50 million gold coins was the reward of countless victims. It was the proof of the bloodshed of Young Master Song Tao!

“Ah, fifty million?” Yue Yu felt a little dizzy. Wasn’t this Young Master Song Tao too valuable? However, if it was a Heaven Stage powerhouse, 50 million wasn’t a lot. After all, her little brother had only gone to the Heaven Realm to fight once and the reward was 100 million. As for a Zhi Zun, that was 10 billion!

“That’s right. With this money, I have the money to buy Fairy Light Bamboo and Red Stone Swan Lake.” Yue Yang said that he is a good child, fair sale, absolutely do not do that killing treasure business.

“If you kill someone, their family will definitely take revenge. You must be careful.” Yue Yu did not care about money at all, she only cared about her brother’s safety.

“Don’t worry, I didn’t leave my name out for good deeds. No one knows that I did it!” Yue Yang laughed complacently.

“I knew you’d be like this…” Yue Yu was not a silly girl. She knew that most of what her brother said was true, but there was definitely something fishy about it.

With her understanding of Yue Yang, how could she not know who he was?

However, she wasn’t obsessed with right or wrong.

And he was right.

Yue Yu felt more at ease with her younger brother. Although he was a bit mischievous, he was definitely not a bad person. If he were to say that the young master Song Tao was a scoundrel, that fellow would definitely not be a good person. He would definitely kill him. In this regard, she definitely trusted him!

Three days passed quickly.

During this time, the sickly beauty came back to accompany Yue Yang for two days, letting him release his masculine anger with extreme gentleness.

Yue Yu quickly went into hibernation, pretending not to hear.

During the day, he would study alchemy formulas with Yue Yu and the sickly beauty, or practice battle skills with the Dragon Ladies. They were very familiar with each other, and time flew by quickly. Three days passed quickly. Yue Yang bade farewell to Yue Yu and the sickly beauty, and returned to Black Wind City of the Southern Heaven Realm. After returning to the hotel, Yue Yang discovered that his bed seemed to have an extremely light fragrance.

Had the seductive, seductive beauty sneaked in and slept?

Forget it, she was the enemy of the Master of Black Wind City. Furthermore, during the time she was trying to rope him in, she would never reveal her secret … Yue Yang cast aside all kinds of thoughts and decided to go out to find out more information.

The moment he opened the door, the round head Bao Gu appeared in front of him.

“What?” You slept in your room for three days? Don’t tell me you don’t know anything about all that’s happened in Black wind city. You really don’t know? “Alright, since you’re so sincere in your request, I’ll tell you. Listen, this is still you. I won’t tell anyone else!” In front of Yue Yang, he felt that he was capable, that he knew everything and knew everything. Talking to such a person was the most prestigious moment of his life.

Of course, he wasn’t surprised, because this kid came from the Western Heaven realm and didn’t know anything about here place.

chapters.title: Chapter 677 – Friend, What Is A True Friend?
chapters.body:
Chapter 677 – Friend, What Is A True Friend?

C677: [Friend, what is a true friend?]

According to the gossips in the round head Bao Gu, Yue Yang had a thorough understanding of Black Wind City’s current situation.

First of all, Bai Song, his son was killed, and he had reached an agreement with the Master of Black Wind City, and had teamed up with him. At the same time, as the mediator of both sides, Special Envoy Lionheart King, General Long Xiang, also joined the investigation team as a third party. And then, the Lan Jiang sect’s Jue Hu. They had to refuse the Black Wind City Lord’s reconciliation and ask him to hand over the culprit or fight in battle as soon as possible. If it wasn’t for the arrival of Lionheart King, he probably would have been at war with Black Wind.

Unlike Bai Song, the battle between Jue Hu and the Black Wind was genuine.

Not only that, the strength of a peerless clan was extremely terrifying.

Fortunately, the location of the battle was fifty kilometers outside the city, otherwise the entire Black Wind City would have been razed to the ground.

Even though they were separated by fifty kilometers, the shock of the battle still came from far away, almost touching them. According to Bao Gu’s internal information, Jue Hu had managed to defeat Black Wind, General Jin Feng, and Bai Song’s them three Heaven Ranked Warriors by himself. This Lan Jiang Sect Leader was so powerful that it was hard to believe.

In addition, the second piece of news stunned Yue Yang.

During the battle between Black Wind and Jue Hu, a mysterious Thief appeared within the city and snuck into the City Lord’s Mansion.

Due to the Lord of Black Wind City being out, no one in the mansion noticed the intrusion of the Thief. The treasures inside were emptied and the Lord of Black Wind City suffered heavy losses.

The third major event was the Griffin elite team under the command of General Long Xiang. When they searched for traces of killing Young Master Song Tao, they seemed to have discovered something. However, on their way back to report to General Long Xiang, they unexpectedly met a Heaven Ranked expert and were completely annihilated. When this news came out, the entire city was once again shaken. It was said that even the Lionheart King was alarmed and sent his’ Dragon Armored Knight 'out to assist General Long Xiang in his investigation.

“Why did you sleep for three days? You missed such a good opportunity …” “However, it’s fine. I believe it’ll be even more exciting later on.”

There was no doubt about Yue Yang’s absence.

This was because the ‘hibernation’ that lasted three days wasn’t unique to Yue Yang.

Many races that had the ability to hibernate regularly had this kind of ability. Not to mention sleeping for three days, even if it was three months or even three years, it wouldn’t be difficult!

Yue Yang secretly analyzed all sorts of major events that occurred. It seemed that the sexy beauty had already made her move. The second and third major matter was most likely something that she or her companion had done. Was she secretly helping him? Or was it creating trouble, attracting the attention of the Lionheart King, pulling himself into the water? How should he escape from this place?

If the female giant Raging Flame was in Black Wind City, Yue Yang could just directly save her.

But she wasn’t there, she was elsewhere.

Female giant Raging Flame still had no news at the moment. He still needed to wait … …

As for the Lion Prince’s attentions, he could only deal with them. At worst, he would just return to Tong Tian Tower for a break. It was impossible for that sexy and enchanting beauty to use him like a gun!

“Let’s go take a look and see what good items are for auction!” Yue Yang’s calm performance made the round head Bao Gu greatly admire him.

“Brother is indeed worthy of being a traveler from the Western Heavenly Realm. His mentality is excellent. I dare to say that the person who is still interested in buying and selling in Black Wind City right now is probably you.” The round-headed valley indicated that Black Wind City had entered the war zone and was on alert. The black market would be closed for the next ten days, and only after the war ended would the killers be apprehended and the various factions’ disputes be terminated would the black market continue to open.

“What about the annual big shoot?” Yue Yang asked about the most important annual blockbuster.

“If we can finish it before then, it won’t affect the annual big time. If we can’t, the big time will probably be held in Shao Zi fortress or Full Moon City.” The round-headed valley also felt a little regretful. “The Shao Zi fortress and the Full Moon City, the merchants and residents there are all extremely xenophobic people. Travellers like us who are travelling abroad are the people they despise …” Get back to your country, you stinking strangers. “They’ll definitely say that. If we were in those two places for the annual big shots, we wouldn’t even be able to get a seat, much less get a good shot!”

“Could that happen?” Yue Yang was shocked.

“Heh, the Shao Zi fortress is the first fortress of the Emerald Territory, and Full Moon City is the richest city in the Emerald Territory. In the eyes of the residents there, we are nothing more than beggars.” If they were to go there, the city guards would have a hundred reasons to hunt down the outsiders who had entered the city, and the humiliating privileges of the outsiders could be found everywhere. In many places in Full Moon City, the rules stated that the outsiders and the retards were not allowed to leave the city. The round head Bao Gu does not want the annual bazaar to change to Shao Zi fortress or Full Moon City.

Black Wind City may not be a good place to live, but it was better than freedom.

There are more taxes, but there are still ways to live here.

In the rich and luxurious Full Moon City, a peddler like the round head Bao Gu couldn’t even afford to buy the smallest house. He couldn’t even find a job.

“…” Yue Yang listened to the round head Bao Gu’s introduction and was speechless.

Sure enough, regional discrimination exists everywhere.

The world he once lived in before rebirth was in such a state. Who would have thought that the Emerald Territory of the Heaven would also be in such a state?

Although the black market was not open, under the introduction of the round head Bao Gu, Yue Yang still bought a lot of the materials he wanted. For the first time, Yue Yang had a sense of recognition towards this garrulous man who had an ugly appearance and a nagging mouth. Living forced people, in the Heaven Realm, without strength and without capital, living was not easy. People like Yuan Tou Bao Gu only did things because of the reality of life. If there was a better life, who would want to live it like this?

Under the round head Bao Gu’s guidance, Yue Yang went to a large Chamber of Commerce named ‘Chidoo’ in Black Wind City and got to know the vice president there.

He spent an extra three hundred thousand, but bought the three-thousand-year-old Fire Dragon Fruit that Yue Yang had always desired.

After the deal was concluded, Yue Yang and the bribed vice president were very satisfied.

Oral agreements for continued cooperation have also been established.

“It’s all thanks to Brother Bao today. Otherwise, this deal wouldn’t have worked.” Yue Yang flattered Bao Gu and rewarded him with ten thousand gold. This amount of money stunned the round head Bao Gu. Of course, he had consciously obtained a reward, but never in his wildest dreams could he have imagined that it would be so much!

“Brother, is this a mistake?” Baogu rubbed his hands together with some uneasiness. He noticed that Yue Yang had transferred 10,000 gold coins to him instead of 1000 gold coins. Actually, the reward of one thousand gold was already the highest estimate in his heart. In the entire transaction process, he didn’t make much of a contribution. Furthermore, the vice president was insatiably greedy, and seeing how the other party was so eager to purchase him, he forcefully bribed them three hundred thousand…

Bao Gu felt very sorry for this’ Jun Wu Ye ‘from the Western Heaven realm. He felt that the’ Jun Wu Ye 'who had made a loss in the transaction might only be able to reward him with a hundred gold coins.

He had wanted to deny his highest estimate. A thousand gold was too much, how could there be so much? Impossible!

He had even mentally prepared himself for harvesting the 10 gold!

Even if this Jun Wu Yi was rich, he wouldn’t give him so much money, would he? He must have been wrong! He looked at this huge sum of money with some eagerness. If this was true, how great would it be? However, he had never heard of the reward of ten thousand gold. Most importantly, he did not contribute much.

Bao Gu hated himself very much. How could he do this? Jun Wu Ye trusted him so much, and treated him so kindly, but now he was waiting to see him bribed for three hundred thousand dollars.

The other party treated him like a friend, while he himself …

Yue Yang looked at the round face of Bao Gu and faintly smiled: “This is what you deserve, Brother Bao, in fact, this Hard-shelled Dragon Fruit is very important to me.” Besides, the information you’ve told me in the past few days is also of value. You guys have become friends from a complete lack of knowledge, and then recommended me to enter the business circle and purchase the items I’ve been requesting. This money is the reward that you deserve. “Brother Bao, this isn’t the end. This is the beginning. In the future, if you succeed in recommending me, I will obtain an ideal item that will be rewarded no less than this commission!”

“Because you treat me like a friend, and even more so, I can’t take it.” The round head Bao Gu held back his tears and was moved. He handed the card back to Yue Yang with great difficulty: “No, I won’t take this money.”

“Brother, I still need a lot of things. The Hard-shelled Dragon Fruit is only the beginning. If you don’t help me, who in Black Wind City can help me?” “Could it be that Bao Gu thinks that my friend isn’t generous enough?” As Yue Yang said this, the round head Bao Gu hurriedly waved his hand and shook his head: “No, no, no, Brother Jun, it’s a misunderstanding. You misunderstood me, and I definitely didn’t mean that!” I… Alright, I will accept your commission. However, in the future, I will do my best in all of your transactions … “You treat me like a friend, I, Bao Gu, cannot lose this person. I will definitely gather all the items you need for you …”

At the end of his speech, the voice choked a little.

Friend, in Black Wind City, who would think that a peddler like him is a friend? Who cared about his information? Who cared about his recommendation?

He knew nothing about the Southern Heaven Realm, nor did he have any sense of security against others. What he had told him before was nothing more than bragging, not even treating him as a true friend. All he wanted to do was take advantage of him, ask him to treat him to a meal, and show off his knowledge.

However, he had not expected that the other party would treat him so sincerely, treating him as a friend.

If this had not happened to him, he might have laughed at him for being an idiot.

How could he have any friends in the Heaven Realm?

However, when it happened to him, he couldn’t help but feel an indescribable feeling of gratitude …. To have a friend that valued him so highly, he must be a young human that didn’t even have the strength of an Earth Stage. That kind of feeling was really good! This was a hundred times better than knowing that there were countless people who kowtowed to the other party and the other party didn’t even look at him! A Heaven Stage powerhouse, if he kowtowed, that person would not spare him another glance. However, this weak human was treating him as a friend and believed his words without the slightest hesitation!

The card in his hand became heavy.

He gripped it tightly.

Now, he felt that this was not only money, but also a kind of wealth that had never been replaced by anything else. Friendship!

Previously, he absolutely did not believe that friendship, which he had always ridiculed, was no longer an existence that mocked in his heart, but a kind of moving, an indescribable feeling.

At dusk, Yue Yang was instructing the waiter to prepare dinner.

He was like a berserk lion, knocking everything that was in his way to the ground. He is the round head Bao Gu. He rushed in front of Yue Yang and roared in a sincere tone that had never been seen before: “Wu Ye, listen, in the future, don’t trust anyone. In this Black Wind City, in the Emerald Territory, no, in the entire Heaven Realm, you will be able to escape from this place.” You can’t trust people, and you can’t easily expose money, okay? If you have any teleportation crystals, or if you have any ways to leave, then leave this place as soon as possible … “Black Wind City is a place to eat. Don’t come back again in the future. If you treat me as a friend, you must remember to not casually trust strangers!”

“What happened?” Yue Yang had actually guessed it.

“It’s very simple.” The vice president floated over from the distance. He had a fake smile on his face as he said, “Before you die, I will explain it to you!”

chapters.title: Chapter 678 – Before The Storm …
chapters.body:
Chapter 678 – Before The Storm …

When the surrounding people saw that a fight was taking place, they quickly dodged, but then continued to watch from afar.

Bao Gu, covered in blood, stood in front of Yue Yang.

The expression on his face was full of firm determination. At the same time, he turned around to face the Vice Chairman and whispered to Yue Yang, “When I say leave, you must leave as quickly as possible.”

“What about you?” Yue Yang purposely asked.

“I’m one of the honorary outer court disciples of the Carving Stone Sect, they don’t dare to make things difficult for me!” Round head Bao Gu replied.

"Hahahahahaha… An honorary outer court disciple of the Carving Stone Sect. Oh, my! I was so scared that my heart almost jumped out of my chest! Ahahahaha!” The Vice Chairman of Earth Stage level 5 let out a crazed laugh and almost lost his breath. The round head Bao Gu’s face turned scarlet red, but the resolution in his eyes grew stronger. He developed his battle stance. With the strength of an Earth Stage Level 3, he was ready to contend against the Vice Chairman of Heaven Stage Level 5!

“Go!” Bao Gu turned around and forcefully pushed Yue Yang.

After seeing Yue Yang break the window and fly out, he immediately stomped on the ground and rushed towards the Vice Chairman of the Chidoo Chamber of Commerce without a care for his own safety.

As long as Yue Yang could successfully escape, so what if he risked his life against his opponent?

The strength of the two was obviously different.

The Vice Chairman was at Earth Stage Level 5 and the round head Bao Gu was at Earth Stage Level 3. With just a few moves, the Vice Chairman could beat Bao Gu to be dizzy. It would be impossible for Bao Gu to fight to the death. In fact, if the Vice Chairman had not been fooling him around but had gone all out to kill him, he would have been beaten to death already!

Puff!

The round head fell heavily to the ground, blood spurting out of its mouth.

The Vice Chairman laughed crazily and placed a foot on his head, “You are simply unable to withstand a single blow. Foolish weaker, don’t think that courage can defeat everything. In front of me, no matter how much you struggle, you will only be striking a stone with an egg!” What I don’t understand is how you, who are selfish, stingy, and like a pug, who was removed from the Carving Stone Sect due to your lack of talent, suddenly have the courage to issue a challenge to me. Before I grant you death, tell me, why would you protect that human? What benefits did he give you to work so hard for him? "

“You want to know?” Bao Gu painfully squeezed out a smile. When the Vice Chairman bent down to listen, he spat out a mouthful of blood at the Vice Chairman, “Pah!”

“You’re courting death!” The Vice Chairman ferociously punched Bao Gu.

Bao Gu was badly injured, and he fainted and fell to the ground.

The Vice Chairman waved his hand and a subordinate immediately offered him a cup in a courteous manner, while the other subordinate respectfully poured wine for him.

While the Vice Chairman was tasting the wine gracefully, one of his subordinates had already brought a bucket of water and splashed the cold water onto the swollen face of the round head Bao Gu. Bao Gu woke up from his pain and discovered that there was a group of members of the Chamber of Commerce outside the door. They were holding sharp weapons in their hands, forming a circle to force ‘Jun Wu Ye’ back from his escape …

There were simply too many guards, and he couldn’t escape from their encirclement.

Round head Bao Gu closed his eyes in pain. If he was a little stronger, he wouldn’t be like this!

"Now, can you answer my question? Bao Gu, you know, my patience isn’t very good. Before I finish this cup of wine, if I don’t get the answer, I’m sorry, your friend, the head on his neck will fall to the ground. " The Vice Chairman of the Chidoo Chamber of Commerce was leisurely tasting fine wine.

“Cough, cough, cough!” Bao Gu suppressed the pain in his body and struggled to stand up from the ground.

“Hey, I don’t like people standing higher than me when they talk!” By the side of the Vice Chairman, a subordinate had already brought a chair over for him to sit on.

On the other hand, the round head Bao Gu had one of his subordinates kicked him in the back of the knee.

It made him drop to his knees.

The surrounding guards laughed out loud. Just as Bao Gu was struggling furiously, the two guard leaders immediately placed their sharp blades on Yue Yang’s neck. Simply mean that if Bao Gu stood up, then they would chop his friend to death.

Bao Gu knelt in hatred, worrying that Yue Yang’s head would be chopped off by these people.

In the end, he didn’t stand up.

The Vice Chairman extended his leg and kicked the round head Bao Gu, “Are you mute? If you don’t say anything, I’ll slit that brat’s mouth …”

Bao Gu forcefully endured the pain and wiped the blood from his mouth. “Didn’t you want to know the answer? I’ll tell you, not because he gave me money, or anything else, but because he was my friend! Maybe you don’t know what a friend is. A person like you will never know what a friend is!” Before he could finish his words, the Vice Chairman had already sent him flying several meters with a kick. One of his front teeth was kicked to fall. “Friend? You tell me about friends? Do you want to laugh me to death? Yes, I won’t have any friends in my life, but Bao Gu, how can a person like you have the nerve to talk about a friend? Haven’t you ever sold your friends for money? Through my hands, there have been many such betrayals. Do you think I don’t know who you are? Stop trying to cover it up with stupid jokes. What the hell did he give you to protect him like this? Hand it over, immediately hands over the treasure!”

“Ha-ha!” Bao Gu started laughing heartily and wilding with his air-leaking mouth. “Treasures, yes. The old me used to believe that treasures and money are the best things in this world, just like the present you. However, the real treasure was a selfless trust, a sincere treatment, an indescribable friendship that could not be described with words. Friends were the most precious thing in the world, especially in this self-serving world … Forget it, you will never understand. You will always be a pitiful person! Even if I die today, I’m still better than you alive!”

“Ah, ah, I didn’t expect you to become so great in such a short time!” The Vice Chairman threw his cup angrily and stood up. He punched and kicked Bao Gu until his skin in his entire body could no longer hold his bones. He did not stop until he himself was tired and panting.

“I’m not great, but I’m not pitiful!” Bao Gu spat out a mouthful of blood.

“Bao Gu, I’ll give you one last chance. Hand over the treasure he gave you, or else I’ll behead you immediately!” The Vice Chairman of the Chidoo Chamber of Commerce was trembling with rage.

“Even if I had a treasure, you wouldn’t take it away. You only have treasure and money in your eyes. Poor wretch, you don’t even have a friend.” Bao Gu glanced at Yue Yang and smiled apologetically: “Sorry, making a friend like me is of no use to you at all. When you came to Black Wind City, not only was I unable to protect you, I even introduced you to the wrong people, got to know that greedy jackal, and brought about a fatal disaster…”

“I don’t blame you.” Yue Yang nodded and then said to the Vice Chairman, “I am from Tong Tian Sect of Western Heaven Realm and come to the South Heaven to travel. If you are willing to release me and Bao Gu, I am willing to give you all the money I have.”

“How much money do you have?” The Vice Chairman asked.

“One, a cool million.” Yue Yang deliberately replied with some hesitation.

“Really? That’s a lot of money! But how can you use my money for ransom? Weaker, you know, as long as I kill you, everything on you will belong to me! In the Heaven Realm, for the law of the jungle, don’t tell me you still don’t understand! No one will pity your weakness, no one will pity your kindness, no one will pity your situation. Look, how many people are here, and who will stand up for you? No! Who would stand up against our Chidoo Chamber of Commerce? No! I don’t know why you came all the way from the Western Heaven Realm, but you must remember that, this is the Southern Heaven Realm, not your West Heaven Realm which has the influence of Tong Tian Sect. This is Black Wind City, this is the place where our Chidoo Chamber of Commerce has control over life and death, understand?”

The Vice Chairman was right. The influence behind the Chidoo Chamber of Commerce was the Master of Black Wind City.

However, in Black Wind City, other than a few famous chambers of commerce in the Emerald Territory, they were the biggest and had the most authority.

Not to mention killing a travelling merchant from the Western Heaven Realm, not to mention killing a lonely human and an abandoned disciple who had no help from Carving Stone Sect, even if he killed an even more powerful expert, as long as he had enough benefits, the Master of Black Wind City would not care.

The surrounding people sighed inwardly.

Some of the small merchants who knew Bao Gu shook their heads and flinched, afraid of being implicated by him.

The seductive beauty watched from another high-rise but did not appear to save the situation. If, with her being a martial artist of Earth Stage level 8, she stood out to break the encirclement, even if the Vice Chairman t wasn’t willing, he would at least be a little worried. The Vice Chairman knew this young man had no one to rely on, while Bao Gu was weak and useless, for whom it was impossible to fight him, thus he was so arrogant.

The beauty smiled at Yue Yang who remained calm, as if she was watching a good show.

When the subordinate of the Vice Chairman was about to make his move and kill Bao Gu.

A man appeared.

It could be said that this was another very important character. Without him, this extortion scene would not have been able to continue.

The Guard Captain who took responsibility of the safety of this city appeared.

He righteously stopped the assailant and stood in front of Bao Gu, who was covered in blood and wounds, "All of you, stop. With the orders of the Master of Black Wind City, all of you troublemakers will be trapped inside the Black Hole Dimension. Unless one of you can tell me what exactly happened!”

“Lord Fu, we request the master’s protection.” Bao Gu hurriedly rushed to the front of the Guard Captain and said, “We’re being pursued … …”

“No, that’s not right. Please don’t listen to the robber’s one-sided words.” The Vice Chairman also stood up, pointed at Bao Gu and Yue Yang, and with a heartbroken expression, berated them: “They are thieves, and with the excuse of discussing business with me, they took away the three thousand-year-old Hard-shelled Dragon Fruits that were the most important auction items in our chamber of commerce, and even stole them away. Now, the stolen goods are still in his bag. The Dragon Fruit, which was worth hundreds of thousands of gold coins, was stolen just like that. We rushed here just in time to catch up. My lord, please uphold justice for us.”

“We bought the Dragon Fruit.” Bao Gu quickly argued.

“Don’t say anything yet, all of you shut up. I can’t be sure who I’m going to listen to. When I can’t determine who’s wrong and who’s right, I’ll ask questions and you guys can answer.” Guard Captain pointed at Yue Yang and asked, “Do you have the three- thousand-year-old Hard-shelled Dragon Fruit in your bag?”

“Yes.” Yue Yang nodded.

“We bought it.” Bao Gu quickly added, while the Vice Chairman insisted that it was stolen.

“How much did you pay for it?” Guard Captain asked.

“One hundred thousand gold.” Yue Yang replied without hesitation.

“My lord, we gave him extra three hundred thousand gold …” Before Bao Gu could finish his words, the Vice Chairman had already kicked him to the ground. The Vice Chairman swore that he didn’t have one more coin, and even with a hundred thousand gold coins, the buyer was only making verbal promises. Without giving a single gold coin, they had already stolen the Dragon Fruit.

“May I ask if one hundred thousand gold can be used to purchase a three-thousand-year-old Dragon fruit?” The Guard Captain asked a senior pharmacist.

“I’m afraid that’s out of the question. The starting bid for this auction would be around one hundred thousand gold coins and the minimum price would be two hundred thousand gold coins. If the quality is not bad, it has never happened to be sold at an auction price of three hundred thousand gold coins. One hundred thousand gold coins for a three-thousand-year-old Dragon fruit? I want to buy one as well” The pharmacist was clearly a distraction.

“Did you have a bill?” Guard Captain asked Yue Yang.

“…” Yue Yang shook his head.

“My lord, he refused to open an official note, but he wrote a receipt in his own name.” Bao Gu struggled desperately under the escort of the city guards.

“I have never written a receipt. In Black Wind City, even idiots know that those things are useless because they can be forged by anyone. If you have a bill duly stamped with the Chidoo seal, then take it out, and if you don’t, then don’t insult my character. You thieves, robbers, you should all be hanged!” The Vice Chairman sneered.

“Things are pretty clear.” Guard Captain sneered at Yue Yang: “Without the bill, there is no basis for words. Since you are a travelling merchant from the Western Heaven Realm, I cannot make things too difficult for you, lest people talk about it that our Black Wind City bully outsiders. However, there are rules everywhere. West Heaven Realm has rules of the West Heaven Realm, and our Southern Heaven Realm also has our own rules. In Black Wind City, stealing was not allowed. There was a penalty of 10 for stealing! Since you said that you bought it with a hundred thousand gold and you didn’t have any note as proof, then, according to the price of one hundred thousand that you have agreed on, as well as based on the rule of steal a penalty of ten, you need to compensate Chidoo Chamber of Commerce with the price of one million gold. After that, immediately scram out of our Black Wind City, we will never welcome thieves here!”

The Guard Captain finally made a ‘difficult decision’.

The crowd applauded in unison.

Everyone knew that the Guard Captain and Vice Chairman were joining forces to bully outsiders, but what could they do? This was at Heaven Realm, where the big fish eat up the small ones!

If that young human was a powerhouse of Heaven Stage and not a quasi-Earth Stage one, would he still be bullied like this?

The answer, of course, was impossible!

From the eyes of round head Bao Gu, two streams of tears of blood flowed out. He used a hoarse voice to say, “Wu Ye, I was sorry, I’ve let you down!”

Yue Yang, however, revealed a smile: "It’s alright, you are my friend. Don’t say that you are not in the wrong, even if you are in the wrong, I will forgive you! If money can solve the problem, then it’s best. If one has no money, he can earn anyway. As long as we are still alive, that’s fine! "

When the Guard Captain heard this, his eyes flashed with a cold light.

The sexy beauty was a little surprised that Yue Yang didn’t get into crazy.

But then she nodded.

There would always be a strange silence before a storm …

After the city guards forcibly took away the card with one million gold in it from Yue Yang, the Guard Captain signaled two city guards to escort Bao Gu and Yue Yang out of the city.

The Guard Captain silently made a ‘kill’ gesture at the Vice Chairman, “Move fast. You have to do it cleanly and beautifully, don’t leave any traces behind!”

chapters.title: Chapter 679 – The Most Arrogant Declaration Of War
chapters.body:
Chapter 679 – The Most Arrogant Declaration Of War

Black Wind City.

Murdering a powerless outsider in Black Wind City was even more normal than when the master robbed another group of female maids. It happened almost every day.

The only thing worth discussing was round head Bao Gu.

Everyone in Black Wind City knew of this fellow. Normally, he was mortally afraid of death, but he liked to brag about himself. Whenever he had any dealing with anyone, he was like a pug. But today, things had changed. For an outsider, he had overestimated himself and had gone against the Vice Chairman of the Chidoo Chamber of Commerce. In the eyes of people, this was simply an unbelievable matter.

The most incredible thing was that round head Bao Gu also said it was for his friend’s sake.

For his friend sake?

Was there really such a thing in Black Wind City? In Black Wind City, anyone who trusted their friends would have died long ago.

At the end of the discussion, they drew a conclusion that either Bao Gu was crazy, or he was “playacting”, working with Vice Chairman and Guard Captain to extort the outsider for money. This wasn’t the first time. It was also very common in Black Wind City. Anyone who broke into the other party to gain their trust through blood or tears had a name, which was undercover!

Was Bao Gu an undercover agent?

For a moment, people could not make up their minds.

Because there’s a bit of “sincerity” in round head Bao Gu’s action, it didn’t seem much like a fake.

But the lesson also tells people that the truer it looked like, the more fake the fact was. Furthermore, for the sake of his friends, he would risk his life to fight against the unstoppable Vice Chairman. Just thinking about this matter made people realize that it was impossible!

“Let’s make a bet! If Bao Gu can come back, then it must be a lie!”

Someone set up a casual bet in the tavern.

Betting on whether Bao Gu can appear in Black Wind City within three days. If Bao Gu showed up three days later, then he must be a spy. He must be playacting together with the Guard Captain and Vice Chairman to cheat the outsider of his money! If Bao Gu never returned, then he would truly go crazy.
