He would definite have the Vice Chairman’s men chased him out of the city and slaughtered him.

Many people were betting that Bao Gu would return within three days.

Only a few people betted that they won’t be able to come back.

For example, a fellow whose son was serving as a guard in City Lord’s Mansion would bet a hundred gold coins that Bao Gu would never be able to come back!

Half a day later, Bao Gu still hadn’t returned.

However, there were a few strange humans showing up in Black Wind City. Their clothes were somewhat similar to that outsider. Especially the sharp-eyed people could discover that their chests all had badges of the same style. Among these human men, there was a fat man, a thin man, an ice cube guy with a cool face, a ‘prince’ with a handsome appearance and noble temperament, and two twin brothers who looked like guards. The appearance of these few people ignited the flames of gossip within the citizens of Black Wind City, who were to forget about the murder of the outsider.

What if a few of the strangers’ teammates came as soon as Vice Chairman had killed them?

As expected, those men first inquired in the tavern about the news of the outsider from earlier.

Although the people in the tavern were greedy for money, no one dared to tell the truth.

Perhaps the fatty saw the strange look in the people’s eyes, that he had made a promise for a large sum of money … It was a pity that no matter how much money he had, he couldn’t buy life. If the Vice Chairman and Guard Captain were informed, he wouldn’t be able to keep his life. What’s more, these humans had no strong strength, among whom the strongest one was the ice cube guy with Earth Stage level 3.

Such a weak team could be easily wiped out by the Vice Chairman, let alone the Guard Captain.

The ice cube guy led the way to the Mercenary Guild.

He had issued a mission that was worth 10,000 gold to look for someone, and all the clues that he could obtain were all capable of obtaining a high reward of 1,000 gold …

Thus, Black Wind City was in an uproar. According to this mission, the outsider who was killed was not a simple person. It seemed that he was a very important person.

Vice Chairman urgently found the Guard Captain and discussed the countermeasures.

“That outsider, are you sure you’ve killed him?” The captain frowned and asked.

“My men drove him and Bao Gu into the black hole. As usual, they pushed down a rock as big as a small mountain, so how could they not die? Furthermore, the leader of the guards also confirmed with the Skeleton Beast that two creatures had died at the bottom of the crater before he returned the report.” Vice Chairman felt a little regretful. If he had known earlier that he wouldn’t kill that outsider, it would have been a bit troublesome. After all, that outsider didn’t seem to be a businessman without power or influence.

“If so, there’s nothing to say.” Guard Captain sneered, “Since you’ve done what you’ve done, don’t regret it. You might get rid of that team as well!”

“There might even be teammates!” Vice Chairman had asked around and found out that these people had been sent here from Silver Leaf City.

There might even be a merchant caravan in Silver Leaf City.

If he killed these people, things would become irreparable.

The Guard Captain didn’t think so. Even if there was a caravan from the Western Heaven Realm, the scale couldn’t be too big because the transportation fees for each transmission array was a huge sum of money. He felt that these young people should be traveling around for study, not for business. Based on the strength of their guards, it didn’t seem like they had much power and influence. They were probably the disciples of a certain clan or a member of a certain city lord’s family.

The Western Heaven Realm was so far away from the Southern Heaven Realm. Even if the master’s son was killed, there was no way he could start a war.

Besides, Black Wind City has always been good at taking advantage of others.

His backer was extremely powerful, and he had always been fine.

“Get rid of them. We must be more agile and use a plan. Don’t let them see through it. About this matter, when the master returns, I will report it to him. If there is anything, the master will take charge of it for us. It’s fine!" The Guard Captain did not care much about this matter. How many outsiders did Black Wind City assassinate due to greed? He had always been fine!

An hour later.

The panicking Vice Chairman rushed into the Guard Captain’s room.

Guard Captain was holding down a maid and sprinting in bed. He was annoyed and shouted: “God dammit, do you have to ask me for permission for everything? What’s so special about this matter? If I kill him, I’ll kill him! Get out, get out!”

The Vice Chairman said with a bitter face, “Things have gone wrong…”

Guard Captain was first stunned, then he said angrily, "How could it be wrong? Are your men all pig heads? The highest strength among them is only at the third level of Earth Stage. If you can’t even kill them, what else can you do? Wasn’t there Golden Armour Guard Captain of Earth Stage level 8 in the Chidoo Chamber of Commerce? Don’t tell me you didn’t send them to escort!”

The Vice Chairman hurriedly shook his head, “No, no, it’s not like that. Actually, everything went very smoothly, we used a trap, baiting them into black hole, and were just preparing to kill them. Who knows that the ice cube guy and the man who’s like a prince both had Summoning Grimoire and summoned two Abyss Manatees of Heaven Stage level 2. The Golden Armour Guard Captain can’t bear them either!”

“What a joke, they are only at the third level of Earth Stage, even if they possess grimoire, how could they contract with Abyss Manatees of Heaven Stage level 2!” The captain didn’t believe it.

“They don’t have a contract, maybe the Abyss Manatees is their family’s guardian beast…” The Vice Chairman didn’t know what was going on either.

“You mean they escaped?” the captain asked.

“Yes.” The Vice Chairman really wanted to say that not only had the other party left, them had also beaten up the guards, including the Golden Armour Guard Captain, and threatened to send people to flatten Black Wind City. Of course, he didn’t dare to say such words to the Guard Captain. If he did, he would definitely rip him to shreds.

“Get out!” The Guard Captain was depressed. Even though he had plotted quite a bit of money, a million dollars, it was still quite a big problem.

He would report this matter to the Master of Black Wind City if he was here.

The master might send people to hunt them down and eliminate any potential dangers in the future.

However, the problem was that the master wasn’t here. It was impossible for him to kill two Abyssal Manatees of Heaven Stage level 2 with just his own strength!

Forget it, just asked him to make up his mind when the master returns! The Guard Captain had no choice but to hold back the depression in his heart. He was mentally prepared to let the master curse at him. He was not worried that the Master of Black Wind City would kill him because he was his loyal follower. Every year, he would bring over tens of thousands of beauties from various races to the master, as well as tens of millions in money. He was a great contributor, and he was also the master’s most beloved Ninth Wife’s cousin. In any case, the master would not kill him for the sake of an outsider.

At 9 PM.

An envoy from the Mercenary Guild in Silver Leaf City represented Tong Tian Sect, Long Teng Sect, and Demonic Palace in Western Heaven Realm to declare war against Black Wind City.

With this declaration of war, the entire city was in an uproar.

This kind of cross-border declaration of war was unbelievable even in a dream. Was there really such a thing?

However, the announcement was posted at the entrance of Mercenary Guild in Black Wind City, an iron-like fact. In the City Lord’s Mansion, even though the Master of Black Wind City was not present, his Ninth Wife bit her teeth and braced herself to accept the declaration of war from the Western Heaven Realm.

It turned out that during the day, her cousin had teamed up with the Vice Chairman of the Chidoo Chamber of Commerce to see how the money worked and to kill a weak outsider. As for this outsider, he was the most important alchemist master of the three forces — Tong Tian Sect, Long Teng Sect, and Demonic Palace. After the murder of this outsider called ‘Jun Wu Ye’, his companions had come looking for him, but her cousin and Vice Chairman had actually tried to get rid of them to hide their evil deeds.

Jun Wu Ye’s comrades had fled for his life under the protection of warbeast of Heaven Stage level.

Because of their rage for the vicious actions of the Black Wind City, the joint business group formed by the Tong Tian Sect, Long Teng Sect, and Demonic Palace immediately declared war on the Black Wind City.

There were a few points on the declaration of war of the Western Heaven Realm.

The first was to immediately hand over the culprit and compensate them with at least ten billion dollars. This was the loss caused by the death of an alchemist master.

Second, the Master of Black Wind City must kneel down and beg for forgiveness. In addition to worshipping the alchemist master Jun Wu Ye, he must also make a declaration to the Southern Heaven Realm and the Western Heaven Realm. In the end, he must resign his position as the City Lord and accept the joint trial of Tong Tian Sect, Long Teng Sect, and Demonic Palace. All of Black Wind City’s accomplices were killed. All of the clansmen, except for babies and pregnant women, were sentenced to exile or hard labor.

Thirdly, every member of the Black Wind City or its alliance, anyone who wished to interfere in the Black Wind City’s war, shall declare guilty same as the Master of Black Wind City. Within three days after the declaration of war, all the residents of Black Wind City must either stay away from the battle or stay in a designated safe zone. Otherwise, they will be treated as accomplices and beheaded.

Four, give up Black Wind City, build an Alchemy Tomb for the alchemist master, cast the ugly statue of the murderer with bronze, and making it kneel in front of the tomb for tens of millions of years to bear the curses.

…

“No way!” Those who had read the announcement felt that this was too crazy.

Black Wind City was not a soft persimmon, how could they agree to such conditions! With the arrogant character of the Master of Black Wind City, it would be strange if he did not start a war immediately.

chapters.title: Chapter 680 – Unacceptable? We Specialize In Dealing With All Kinds Of Unwillingness!
chapters.body:
Chapter 680 – Unacceptable? We Specialize In Dealing With All Kinds Of Unwillingness!

The Master of Black Wind City had a headache recently.

First, Jue Hu refused to listen to the explanation of the invincible family member. If not for the presence of General Long Xiang, who represented the Lionheart King, Jue Hu would have declared war.

That damnable Elder Hei Suo really wasn’t killed by Black Wind himself. Someone was obviously framing him, but Jue Hu wouldn’t believe it. Of course, Black Wind also knew that he had done too many evil deeds in the past. It was normal for Jue Hu to not believe him. Fortunately, the Bai Song Sect was relatively easy to deceive. Not only was they willing to stop the war, they were also willing to join hands to form an alliance.

Before the Black Wind City Lord could finish dealing with the troublesome matter of the Song Tao Young Master and Elder Hei Suo, he received another piece of news.

Declaration of war!

The Tong Tian Sect of western heaven realm, the Long Teng Sect, and the Demonic Palace had joined forces to declare war on him.

“Son of a b * tch …” When the Master of Black Wind City saw the declaration of war, he was so angry that he almost vomited blood. He cursed nonstop for an hour without even drinking a single mouthful of water. However, he was still unable to vent the anger in his heart. He wasn’t cursing the united forces of the Tong Tian Sect, the Long Teng Sect, or the Demonic Palace that he didn’t know, but rather his brainless subordinates. It was already too much to kill an Alchemist Master when the other party came looking for him, but to think that the other party would send someone to surround him. What kind of thoughts were these?

Did those guys think about things with their ass?

How could an ordinary person spend heavily to buy three-thousand-year-old Fire Hard-shelled Dragon Fruit? How could a normal person not care about a million-gold extortion?

The Master of Black Wind City was sad to discover that his subordinate’s vision was not as sharp as a peddler’s. At the very least, that peddler would risk his life to protect that important alchemist master, but his subordinate only had money in his eyes.

This bunch of retarded idiots, did they think that there were many pill Alchemist Master in the Heaven Realm?

Three thousand years of Hard-shelled Dragon Fruit, even if it was given to ordinary people, it wouldn’t be of any use.

If he wasn’t an Alchemist Master, who else would buy that kind of pill?

The Master of Black Wind City was not surprised by the anger of the Tong Tian Sect, Long Teng Sect, and Demonic Palace.

If he had a master apothecary under his command, he would surely be infuriated by the other party if the master were to be killed… Alchemy master, what does it mean in the Heaven Realm? It’s a hundred times harder to obtain than a Heaven realm master, it’s a priceless treasure! Any sect would have a master alchemist. With his pills, they would be able to produce a steady stream of heaven-step experts … Alchemy master, even the Lionheart King subordinate only has one … Now, his subordinate had easily killed an Alchemy Master. It had to be said that this was truly his own tragedy!

If someone killed the Hidden Dragon Valley’s Alchemist Master, what kind of war would that cause?

The answer was the same as the situation in Black Wind City right now.

An irreconcilable cross-border declaration of war, an irreparable declaration of war with money or property! The Master of Black Wind City had a headache. He felt that his head was three times bigger than before!

“This is not an easy task.” Even General Long Xiang, who had been resolutely supporting the Black Wind, expressed the need to immediately return and ask the Lionheart King.

“Look at the movement. Maybe the other party is just making a lot of noise…” Bai Song felt that he would have to wait and see. Of course, even he himself felt that the possibility of his opponent bluffing was very small. This was especially so since the Tong Tian Sect, the Long Teng Sect and the Demonic Palace had already announced a declaration of war. This proved that the matter was irrevocable. However, he did not know how many heaven stage warriors there were. If the other party had so many heaven stage warriors that they could pour out with all their might, Black Wind City would not be able to do it.

“Could it be a conspiracy?” General Jin Feng doubted.

“The possibility is very small.” The Master of Black Wind City shook his head. He also hoped that it would be a conspiracy, so it would be easy for him to expose the other party. He could find experts at a higher level like the Lionheart King and use some money to settle this matter.

However, the possibility of this being a conspiracy was very small, because the other party would not allow the Alchemist Master to die.

Moreover, this matter wasn’t caused by the other party on their own initiative. Rather, it was his own Guard Captain and Vice Chairman of Chidoo who were greedy for money.

It was true that the other party wanted to buy the Hard-shelled Dragon Fruit, but it was not a conspiracy. There was one more thing, if the other party was plotting something, then they wouldn’t send Jun Wu Ye’s teammates to find him but would send them to support him instead. This was to save this alchemist master. As for the outcome of the battle, the final victor would be the victor. He didn’t know yet that the other party would not risk his life as an Alchemy Master.

If the other party hadn’t lost such an important Alchemist Master, the Tong Tian sect, the Long Teng Sect, and the Demonic Palace, how would they have declared war in such an angry manner?

A human without even earth stage strength was simply an ant. If he died, it would be a waste of his life.

Unless, he was a true Alchemist Master!

“I’m afraid that Jue Hu will take the opportunity to add fuel to the fire. We should find a few more helpers!” Their father, Pang Man, suggested, “Bai Song brother, gather all the heaven stage from our sect, and I will invite Old Demon Wei and the others. Anyway, the annual great auction has been suspended, and they who escorted Raging Flames are free to come over to help. That’s not a bad idea!”

“General Long Xiang, please explain the truth in front of the Lionheart King and let him make his decision.” The Master of Black Wind City nodded in agreement and then asked Long Xiang to ask the Lion Prince to step forward.

“I will do his best.” Even though Long Xiang said this, he didn’t dare guarantee that if the Tong Tian Sect, the Long Teng Sect, and the Demonic Palace were powerful, the Lionheart King wouldn’t step in. Who would go to war with the forces of the Western Heaven realm for the small Black Wind City?

This kind of thing, just thinking about it was insane!

While they were still discussing, their subordinates suddenly rushed in to report.

The members of the Tong Tian Sect, the Long Teng Sect, and the Demonic Palace came and demanded Black Wind City to immediately hand over the imprisoned Alchemist Master Jun Wu Ye as well as all the murderers who had maliciously murdered Jun Wu Ye’s teammates.

This report caused the head of the Master of Black Wind City to hurt. The worst thing that could happen now wasn’t killing, but imprisoning. The other party suspected that he had imprisoned the Alchemist Master Jun Wu Ye, and wanted him to hand over the man. The problem was that Jun Wu Ye had already been killed in the mass graves by the bodyguards of the Chidoo Chamber of Commerce, so how could they hand it over to someone else? He couldn’t tell them that the alchemy master was already dead, and he couldn’t just admit that he had killed someone, could he?

However, even if he didn’t hand it over, he wouldn’t be able to say for sure. Not to mention that the other party suspected that he had imprisoned the Alchemist Master.

Even the allies that he invited back would probably have the same thought.

“Is that ‘Jun Wu Ye’ really dead?” Right now, the Master of Black Wind City suddenly had the grumble that his subordinate would not act properly and let that brat escape.

“…” General Jin Feng had questioned the Guard Captain and Vice Chairman of Chidoo a thousand times. After repeated confirmation, he was dead. What drove General Jin Feng mad the most was that he couldn’t immediately go to the mass graves to destroy the evidence, because once the people of the other party noticed that the Alchemist Master was being executed there, they would probably be even more furious after confirming the master alchemist’s death.

“Let’s go out and look first. General Long Xiang, please deliver a message to Old Demon Wei and have him bring his team here at high speed.” Pang Man gave the keepsake to Long Xiang, and let this important person, who could still convince the Lionheart King to send reinforcements, leave first.

Outside Black Wind City.

A natural disaster was descending.

Several volcanoes were created from the shaking earth, and blood-red magma gushed into the sky. Smoke practically covered the sky and covered the earth.

A woman holding the thunder god chain was summoning her meteorite to return. Nearly a thousand meteors fell from the sky like rain droplets, and an apocalyptic scene appeared outside the Black Wind City, causing Black Wind, Bai Song, Pang Man, and Jin Feng to gasp. It seemed that the other party was serious. The one whom the Guard captain and Vice Chairman of Chidoo killed was truly an Alchemist Master. Otherwise, the other party wouldn’t be so furious.

The black wind saw four people standing at the front of the group of Western Heaven Realm experts.

In the middle was a cool looking man, his body flashing with lightning. His strength was at the peak of the second level of the heaven stage, infinitely close to the third level of the Heaven Stage.

Beside him was a middle-aged man clad in Dragon Mark Sacred Armor. He was also a second level heaven stage expert. Regardless of his bearing or strength, he wouldn’t dare to be looked down upon by Hei Feng and the others. Next to the mighty Dragon Pattern Saint Armor was a strange person whose form was completely indistinct and dark. He was also at the first level of the Heaven stage and was extremely close to the second level of the Heaven stage.

What Black Wind paid the most attention to was not even the lightning-covered, super-cool man and the mighty man with an extraordinary bearing.

It was a man wearing a gold mask.

This person, he was the only one who was lying on the ground with his legs crossed and his hands behind his head, looking like he didn’t care about enjoying the scenery around him. On the surface, his strength was only at the Quasi-Heaven Stage. However, Black Wind had a premonition that this person’s strength was probably not comparable to the cool man leading the group.

The little girl who had released the Sky Disaster to this person’s side and lightly punched him with her fist.

Other than him, no one else had such good fortune.

“I am Sky Execution, from the Demonic Palace of the Western Heaven realm.” “As long as you hand over the Alchemist Master Jun Wu Ye immediately, the battle will settle down. Otherwise, we won’t rest until we die!”

“…” The Master of Black Wind City’s mouth was bitter. He even had the heart to die, so how could he hand over that Jun Wu Ye who had already been buried in the mass graves?

“There is no news about the Alchemist Master Jun Wu Ye in Black Wind City. You are mistaken!” Bai Song stood up and spoke up for Black wind.

“It’s fine if you don’t want to hand over the person, but we’ll beat him until you hand him over. We’ll deal with all sorts of disagreements!” The man with the golden mask was leisurely lying on the ground while being massaged by a beauty. Upon hearing this, he sat up, yawned, stretched his body, and casually said those words with his fist. With his Quasi-Heaven Stage strength, if it was anyone else, Black wind and Bai Song would have snorted disdainfully at him. However, the strange thing was that no matter how they looked at it, this brat did not seem to be someone to be trifled with, so no matter how arrogant he sounded, Black wind would not dare to talk back.

“I have long heard of the Master of Black Wind City. Sky Execution has come to receive his guidance.” He had done many wrong things in the past, but this really had nothing to do with him. This was the brain-dead action of his underlings, and it was not his doing. Now, the other party was insisting that it was his doing, it was truly an injustice. What was most tragic was that he could only accept this matter. He could not explain it yet, or it would only get darker and darker!

“Pang Man, on behalf of the mayor, please welcome this esteemed guest!” Pang Man had a cultivation base at the third level of the Heaven stage, which was slightly superior to the Sky Execution. He immediately stepped forward.

“Haa!”

The Sky Execution soared to the skies, and when he made his move, it had the power to destroy the heavens and earth, causing the heaven and earth to tremble.

Black Wind and Bai Song looked and screamed, “Danger!”

Pang Man’s pupils rapidly contracted. He never would have thought that Sky Execution would be so terrifying, and that it would rapidly increase its strength to the maximum, forcefully blocking the other party’s attack. Right now, the slight feeling of victory in his heart had long been tossed to the clouds, and he was able to retreat safely, becoming the greatest hope in his heart.

chapters.title: Chapter 681 – Not The Most Terrifying, But More So
chapters.body:
Chapter 681 – Not The Most Terrifying, But More So

On the walls of Black Wind City, although the patrolling guards were forbidden, there were too many curious onlookers.

The city walls were densely packed with human heads.

The patrolling guards did not think that there was anyone who could defeat his mayor. In addition, he was not one to blame for his crimes, so when he saw that the shouts were ineffective, he simply turned a blind eye and let the residents of Black Wind City watch. Moreover, a sky full of meteors fell from the sky. Dozens of houses were destroyed and a corner of the Mayor’s mansion was destroyed into a sea of fire. It was impossible to drive all the people back home to die.

It was likely that the battle would last for a long time, but the final victory would come from the third rank of the Heaven stage.

Everyone was thinking the same thing.

“Rumble!”

The shockwave created by Pang Man’s and Sky Execution’s Punishment Fists formed a terrifying hurricane that swept across the earth.

Even the meteors that had fallen from the sky and the lava that had erupted into the sky had changed their direction and were thrown out at an oblique angle. On the Black Wind City’s side, there was no force field created by a Heaven Stage powerhouse. Each and every one of them had been blown away by the shockwave, causing their weak bodies to fly out involuntarily. Even Earth Stage Level 5 and higher martial artists were left in a sorry state. This was still quite a distance away. If they were close to the battlefield, they would have probably been killed by the shockwave long ago. Seeing the two Heaven Ranked experts clashing against each other without holding back, everyone’s faces lost all color.

Standing behind the Dragon Emperor, Ye Kong, Fatty Hai, Xue Tan Lang, Prince Tian Luo, and the Li brothers were all extremely safe.

The shockwave didn’t harm them in the slightest, but by observing a battle between heaven stage warriors, they were able to benefit greatly.

Pang Man and Sky Execution’s Punishment collided with each other with full force.

Both of them flew backwards.

Pang Man, who was at the third rank of the Heaven stage, was pushed back a hundred meters before regaining his balance. As for Sky Execution’s Punishment, it was a full three hundred meters.

However, Black Wind and Bai Song’s faces changed. What they saw was definitely not the surface seen by the cheering patrolling guards in the distance by those Earth Level warriors. A third level heaven stage battle against a second level heaven stage battle would definitely not be a draw. Rather, it would be a one-sided fight. According to the truth, Pang Man should have retreated hundreds of meters without taking a single step back. In fact, Pang Man should have some spare energy to continue chasing after him, beating the heavens to the point that they couldn’t even breathe.

What was happening now was that Pang Man, who was famous for his strength, was not only forced to retreat backwards, but his arm was also trembling in a way that he hadn’t seen before.

Could it be that Pang Man’s arm had been injured after taking a Sky Execution attack?

Hei Feng and Bai Song widened their eyes in shock as they stared at Pang Man’s right fist, which had already shrunk behind him. The upper part of his fist was charred black, and it trembled uncontrollably …

“Again!” The Sky Execution gave a cold snort.

Being able to practice boxing with Yong Hui, he had already neglected the fact that his opponent’s cultivation level was suppressed to a great extent, and thus, he continued to improve explosively. A sky full of thunder and lightning gathered on his fists. The power was enough to instantly kill any life below the Heaven realm. The sizzling electric current caused Pang Man to shudder involuntarily. Only after exchanging a fist strike did he realize how terrifying this Sky Execution’s Punishment was.

There had never been a powerhouse of the second rank of the Heaven stage that could deal such a terrifying blow to him.

Only this Sky Execution!

Pang Man really wanted to retreat from the battlefield. He instinctively felt that he was in danger and didn’t want to fight to the end with this Sky Execution.

But, as a heaven stage character, was he really going to run away? Furthermore, under the Sky Execution’s locking down attack, escaping would only speed up the process of victory!

“I’m going all out!” Pang Man summoned a powerful, heaven stage battle beast, the Silver Back Ape, to support him. In an instant, his body swelled up and his muscles seemed to explode. Pang Man’s strength immediately increased tenfold, and his physical defenses were ten times stronger than before. With the aid of the Silver Back Ape, Pang Man hadn’t met an enemy that could directly break through the defenses of his own body.

It had a body that was a hundred times harder than steel, and it also had a domineering power that could shatter a mountain.

Pang Man’s confidence recovered a bit more.

After all, he was a heaven stage, third-level heaven stage expert. He couldn’t be easily defeated by just anyone. Even this freakishly strong Sky Execution couldn’t do it!

Black wind felt slightly better after seeing Pang Man using the strongest Silver-Back Ape’s support.

This battle might be difficult to win, but it would not be defeated either.

Bai Song’s face was as cold as water. He felt that even his opponent, the powerful man who easily repelled the shockwaves of a Heaven stage warrior, wasn’t an easy opponent. As for Black wind’s opponent, the masked guy who was disguised as a Quasi-Heaven Stage, he was even stronger than the Sky Execution. It would not be easy for master of Black Wind City to obtain victory. Jin Feng’s opponent was the dark-skinned man of the Underworld Clan. They were all first rank heaven stage experts. They should be evenly matched, and it would be difficult to determine who was stronger.

In other words, if he wanted to retreat today, the main focus would be on himself.

If he could defeat that mighty man with an extraordinary bearing, then he would have a chance of succeeding!

Even if they had to retreat today, who would have known that the other side didn’t have a Heaven stage? The Demonic Palace was only one Heavenly Demon Palace, and if the three forces were to go all out, Black Wind City would be in danger!

Rumble!

The second battle between Sky Execution and Pang Man began once more.

What shocked them the most was that Pang Man had retreated a second time, but that Sky Execution actually stood there unmoved.

Sky Execution actually had some energy left … Under the shocked gazes of Black Wind and Bai Song, Sky Execution raised his flashing fist, flashed behind Pang Man, and tore the sky and the earth apart. Pang Man struggled with all his might to defend against the blow. He was left in a sorry state from the Sky Execution. The more he fought, the more valiant he became. At the beginning, Pang Man was still able to take some time to counterattack. In the end, Pang Man could only defend against all of them … Third level of the Heaven Stage, it was the first time Black Wind had seen a fight between two peaks of the second level of the Heaven Stage.

Bai Song thought to himself.

If that mighty man with the special domain had the same strength, then he would absolutely not try to curry favor with him.

With his vision, he was naturally able to easily see the difference between this Sky Execution and Pang Man. Heaven’s Punishment should be extremely proficient in battle techniques. Furthermore, it had an ability to reflect the force of Pang Man’s fist. The more power Pang Man exerted when fighting him, the faster he would lose.

Because, Pang Man was currently fighting against two people. One was himself, and the other was Sky Execution that used his own strength to counter it.

At the same time, the power of the Sky Execution was extremely strange.

Even with Pang Man’s physical defense that was formed by the Silver Back Ape, he still couldn’t withstand it … From this, one could see how terrifying his killing power was.

“What do you think?” Hei Feng looked towards Bai Song. He was asking if Bai Song had the confidence to take down that man with extraordinary mightiness.

“Hard to say.” Bai Song shook his head. If that mighty looking man was similar to Sky Execution, then it would be hard to say. Pang Man, it’s already incredibly rare for him to be able to fight like this. If it were another Third Heaven Stage martial artist, they would have long been defeated by that Sky Execution. Although the other party was led by the Sky Execution, the truth was that the two were not to be underestimated. The masked guy and the masked man were both formidable opponents!

“Fall!” Sky Execution threw out one hundred and eight punches.

Compared to Sky Execution, Pang Man’s speed was on a completely different level.

Pang Man had wanted to use his force several times to send the Sky Execution flying, but the Sky Execution was extremely effective. Every time Pang Man exploded, he would withdraw his fist in the air, borrowing the recoil from his opponent to strike back at the moment the opponent’s defenses were the weakest.

With so many consecutive blows on Pang Man’s weakness, his defenses finally collapsed.

His entire body fell to the ground like a meteor.

Deep underground.

After a long time, he painfully crawled out, struggled back to the side of Bai Song and Black Wind, and spat out a mouthful of blood.

In this battle, Pang Man was defeated by the Sky Execution!

Black Wind and Bai Song were secretly afraid, because it seemed that Sky Execution hadn’t used its full strength yet, but Pang Man had already lost. This second battle was already crucial. If he lost again, then the battle would sink into the abyss. Black wind looked at Bai Song. Normally, he would only think that the other party cultivated longer than him and possessed a better warbeast and treasure than him… The Sect Leader, who was also at the peak of the third rank Heaven Stage, almost broke through to the fourth rank of Heaven Stage, and was slightly stronger than Black Wind. Would he be able to take down the number two individual in the second battle, the mighty man who looked more like a demon from the Eastern Goblin Tribe?

“Mayor, don’t worry. This old man will definitely defeat a powerful enemy and return victorious!” Bai Song decided to use the treasures he hadn’t used in nearly a hundred years to fight.

“I wish you good luck!” The Master of Black Wind City used the Spirit Protecting Bead in his hand to provide Bai Song with a Protective Spirit.

Bai Song was extremely strong. His weakness lay in his inferior spirit power.

The Protective Spirit could protect him from mental attacks for up to ten minutes.

It could be said that this was the strongest reinforcement.

On the other side, the Master of Black Wind City saw that the other party was not at a disadvantage. When the masked guy stepped forward, the masked man had actually added five shadow giants onto his body! He was so depressed that the Master of Black Wind City nearly vomited blood. If he knew that he wouldn’t do such an action, not only would he expose Bai Song’s mental weakness, he even allowed the other party to find a reason to reinforce him… The Giant Shadow would increase his strength by a hundred times with each addition.

With the addition of five people on the side, Bai Song, who could have slowly won, suddenly became dangerous.

Right now, he only hoped that he would be able to endure the time limit of the Giant Shadow.

“I am Long Xuan, please guide me!” The Dragon Emperor, who called himself ‘Long Xuan’, saw Bai Song take out a silver axe that shone with a myriad of colors. He did not show any signs of weakness and conjured the dragon shield, a top-grade saint artifact passed down from his ancestors. It was a pity that due to the chaos of the war, he lost his sword and helmet, leaving only his arms, legs, armor and shield. If all four were combined, their power would be no less than that of a divine artifact.

“Bai Song Clan’s Leader …” When Bai Song introduced himself, he tried to delay as much time as possible.

He guessed that the time limit of those giant shadows was very short. Although their actions of stalling for time were a little shameless, it was still better than losing.

After the battle began, because he was wielding a masterwork weapon, the power of the battle became even more terrifying.

Shock waves caused by the clash of saint artifacts, or cracks in space and time that had shattered, flew through the skies. Everywhere the power went, everything vanished into thin air.

The deafening sound of the battle had caused many of the Black Wind City’s martial artists to faint or throw up. They had no choice but to retreat to the city walls, not daring to continue watching the Heaven Ranked warriors fight … There were a few people who stayed behind. They were all at the seventh rank of the Earth Realm and above. They fought back the thunderbolts and stood on top of the city wall to watch the fierce battle.

Long Xuan from the Western Heaven Realm fought Bai Song from the South Heaven Realm.

Who would win and who would lose?

Black Wind was regretting his decision. He was certain that if he did not give Bai Song more spiritual protection, then the masked guy would have no reason to give Long Xuan more of a shadow of a giant. Without the shadows of the five giants, it was impossible for Long Xuan to use his dragon shield to suppress Hundred Pines.

“BOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOMMM!”

Bai Song and the Dragon Emperor were pushed back a thousand meters after a hundred continuous heavy blows.

Bai Song’s mouthful of blood gushed out like a spring.

At this moment, he was seriously injured and could no longer hold on. On the other side, the Dragon Emperor also coughed painfully. When the Giant Shadow disappeared, he suffered a violent counterattack from Heaven stage third stage Bai Song. Although he was unharmed on the surface, his internal organs were shaken. If not for his strong Dragon Shield, he might have been defeated in this battle. Right now, it could only be a draw. Bai Song was already severely injured. Even though his cultivation level was higher, and his strength was stronger, the Giant Shadow’s attack was too powerful, causing Bai Song to be unable to continue fighting.

If the Dragon Emperor was a little stronger, with the support of the five giant shadows, then Bai Song was dead for sure.

Or perhaps, the time limit of the giant shadow did not waste any of it due to Bai Song’s self-introductions. Bai Song could easily be crushed by the Dragon Emperor.

Bai Song secretly took a sigh of relief.

If the giant shadow was able to last for another minute, then it wouldn’t be able to hold on. Fortunately, the time limit for this super powerful giant shadow was very short…

In the second battle between the Dragon Emperor and Bai Song, both sides were powerless to continue fighting.

General Jin Feng stood up and was about to challenge the Dark Race elite who was completely black and couldn’t see his form clearly.

Suddenly, he noticed that the masked guy stood up. He was extremely frightened and quickly waved his hand to deny her words. “Wait a minute, the one I want to fight is not you!” Before he could finish, General Jin Feng discovered that the masked man was already standing behind him. His body stiffened, and he couldn’t help but want to escape a few times. However, due to the other party’s speed and the presence of the Master of Black Wind City, he could only grit his teeth and endure for the rest of his life.

This masked guy’s strength was on the surface a Quasi-Heaven Stage, but when he unleashed his true power, he was no weaker than Black Wind City Lord.

In General Jin Feng’s heart, there was a feeling that he would be instantly killed by his opponent.

He was just like an ant in front of her.

He’d thought that defeating Pang Man with ease was already terrifying enough, but he didn’t think that he’d lose to this masked guy. If that Sky Execution was like a terrifying cheetah, then this masked man, who had completely released his aura, was like a fierce tiger … Jin Feng felt that with just a single bite, the other party could devour him.

“I am Black wind, the local mayor. May I ask what your esteemed guest’s name is?” Hei Feng knew that it was time for him to step on the stage. The explanation was all for floating clouds. He had to defeat his opponent. If he lost, everything would be over. Therefore, he could only win this battle. He could not lose!

“I’m not going to tell a dying man my name.” The man wearing the gold mask replied, “Hand over Jun Wu Ye immediately, and we will let you off. Otherwise, at all costs, we will fight to the bitter end. If we don’t hand him over, we will flatten Black Wind City in one day, and if we don’t hand him over in one month, we will flatten the Emerald Territory …” No matter what power you have to protect, no matter how stubborn you are, we will fight to the bitter end! “Please do not doubt our strength and determination. Today, it is just a warning. A true war has yet to begin!”

Black Wind opened his mouth and was about to speak when he realized that the masked guy’s fist had already reached his face.

He almost fainted from the punch.

At the same time that Black Wind’s body was sent flying, a person flashed behind him.

Following that, another heavy blow landed on his back. Black Wind felt as if his internal organs were about to shatter. Blood shot out from his throat.

Without enough time to turn around to face the enemy, Black Wind noticed that the masked guy appeared again. He stretched out his hand to grab his throat and hung himself in the air… Black Wind did not dare to struggle, because he saw the terrifying killing intent in his opponent’s eyes. It was the kind of gaze that a tiger would give to a small bug. Normally, Black Wind would use this gaze to look down on its citizens … He had no doubt that if he dared to resist, the other party would instantly kill him.

“I’ll give you a day. Hand over the people, or else we’ll slaughter the city, destroy you, and give you support. Don’t try to provoke our patience.”

“…” What could the Master of Black Wind City say now?

He could only tremble, tremble, and tremble under the other’s ultimatum.

Not only him, even Bai Song, Pang Man, and Jin Feng, who had originally wanted to help, were scared to the point of freezing their limbs. God~, this masked guy was actually a hundred times scarier than that Sky Execution! The City Governor of Black Wind was as weak as a baby before him!

chapters.title: Chapter 682 – No Most Abnormal, Just Even More Abnormal
chapters.body:
Chapter 682 – No Most Abnormal, Just Even More Abnormal

“He took down Black Wind in one move? This is impossible!”

There was an old man with a bald head, long ears, and eyes that were bright like a ghost, who waved his hand in disbelief, “It must be because your minds were intimidated, or because the opponent used some sort of illusory technique to create such an exaggerated scene that affected your judgment. With my new breakthrough of Heaven Stage level 5, I still can’t defeat Black Wind in one move. Is that masked guy really that powerful?”

This old man was the reinforcements that Pang Man had invited, Old Demon Wei.

Old Demon Wei, a super villain of the Southern Heaven Stage. He, who was originally at the peak of Heaven Stage level 4, had successfully risen to the fifth level. His strength had increased greatly, and he had participated in capturing Captain Raging Flames and got achievements. His reward went from 570 million gold coins to 600 million.

Hoka and Savi, who were also involved in the capture of Captain Raging flames, came with him. Both of them were at the third level of Heaven Stage.

Because of their evil deeds, the bounties of the two were as high as 250 million and 280million. They were much higher than Paksong, who was slightly stronger than them. They were only below the Master of Black Wind City, who had a bounty of three hundred million. Apart from the reinforcements that Pang Man had sent over, two Elders of Heaven Stage from Paksong Clan, Elder Qing Song and Elder Hong Song, had also rushed over.

Although they were only experts of Heaven Stage level 2, they came as a godsend.

This was because each additional Heaven-Stage warrior gained more power.

“The clown has already left the Southern Heaven Stage. I can’t find him even if I wanted to. I wonder where he’s gone to! Rachel also has an important mission, which did not allow him to leave in a short period of time. As for that guy, the Wise Demon Marshall, because he has a close relationship with Jue Hu, he has already refused to assist. We could not count on him. As for Lionheart King, there’s no news about him right now. He probably won’t sit idly by. After all, we have a cooperative foundation. The destruction of Black Wind City won’t benefit him!” After Old Demon Wei’s strength had increased greatly, he started to make a ruckus. He slapped the table and made a decision for the Master of Black Wind City, “Masters of Green Leaf and Silver Leaf, regardless of their attitude, it’s a cross-border war anyway. The people from the Western Heaven Realm came to the Southern Heaven Realm and dragged them into the water. Don’t let them stay out of this! There’s also the Emerald Lord. When we fought for the Emerald Territory, we did our best. Now that we have something in trouble, if he doesn’t put in some effort and we won’t be able to survive in the future, we won’t let him live an easy life!”

“That’s right.” The Master of Black Wind City could tolerate it, so he casually agreed.

As long as Old Demon Wei could defeat the masked guy, then everything was fine.

He wanted money, he wanted treasures, he wanted women, he was able to get as much as he wanted!

If Old Demon Wei was less than the opponent’s match, then he probably wouldn’t have extended his hand to ask for it … The Master of Black Wind City had already made up his mind. Right now, he would first push Old Demon Wei, who was eager to become famous after advancing to the fifth level of Heaven Realm, out to use him as a shield.

The only thing that gave the Master of Black Wind City a headache was, could Old Demon Wei, who had just leveled up to Heaven Stage level 5, really take down that masked guy?

He felt that the masked guy was very terrifying. Although Old Demon Wei was powerful, he wasn’t at a terrifying level yet.

On the surface, the Master of Black Wind City obviously believed in Old Demon Wei, but he was still a little worried.

The shadow of his battle with the masked guy was too deep.

Deep into the marrow!

The Master of Black Wind City asked for an audience with the Emerald Lord. After making a big promise, he guaranteed that in the future, half of Black Wind City’s income would go to the Emerald Lord. This Lord who ruled one hundred cities decided to send his strongest commander, General Yu Qianjun in Heaven Stage level 4, to lead four generals of Heaven Stage to support Black Wind.

The next day, Yue Yang wearing Golden Twin Mask, Sky Execution, Dragon Emperor, and Underworld Emperor came back again.

They discovered that outside Black Wind City, there was already a large group of experts of Heaven Stage waiting.

On the left were the powerful reinforcements sent by the Emerald Lord, the Heaven Stage level 4, Yu Qianjun, and the four generals of Heaven Stage he commanded. On the right were the Master of Paksong clan, Elder Qing Song and Elder Hong Song. The only undefeated him yesterday had already been reduced to a supporting role. Standing in the middle was Old Demon Wei, who had the highest level and the strongest strength and whose face was full of arrogance. Surrounding him were his two friends, Hoka and Savi. On the other side were Pang Man and Jin Feng. As for the Master of Black Wind City, he was also a part of the supporting roles in front of Old Demon Wei, who was fighting over his position.

“Is this the answer?” Yue Yang asked.

“Masked guy, I wasn’t here yesterday, or you wouldn’t be able to lift your head!” Old Demon Wei saw that this brat’s level was not even as high as his, and his expression suddenly became even more arrogant: “I heard that you insulted my friend Black Wind, saying that he killed a master of yours, but in my opinion, that’s completely fake. What kind of master would be able to walk all over the ground? With the Black Wind’s desire for talent, it’s impossible for him to make such a move. One more thing, if you don’t think well of him, that’s your responsibility. It’s fine if you aren’t ashamed, but you still angrily attacked my friend. What kind of logic is that?”

“You mean you won’t hand him over?” Yue Yang looked at the Master of Black Wind City and asked, "Can your words represent the master?”

“I could completely represent Black Wind!" Old Demon Wei’s words caused the Master of Black Wind City to want to bang his head against the ground. Originally, he wanted to talk things out and see if he could negotiate. Who didn’t know that Old Demon Wei was eager to get famous? Old Demon Wei pointed at Yue Yang and sneered, “Your man got lost himself. Do you people from the Western Heaven Realm want to borrow this matter to behave atrociously in our Southern Heaven Realm? You have to ask whether the Heaven Stage people in the Southern Heaven Realm agree or not!”

"Then, let me ask you, whether you Heaven Stage people in the Southern Heaven Realm agree!” Yue Yang waved his hand, signaling Sky Execution and the others to retreat.

He stood up by himself.

This Old Demon Wei was just the first small fish Yue Yang had caught in Black Wind City. The Emerald Lord, the clown, Lionheart King and other big fish were still behind him. Yue Yang was well aware that if there were no battles, not to mention Ye Kong, Fatty Hai, and the others, even Sky Execution and Dragon Emperor would need a long time before they could improve.

If he wanted to continuously improve his strength, he had to go through a war, and the harder the better.

For example, Sky Execution, he had been stuck at the first level of Heaven Stage for a long time, and after killing the Black Hell King, he immediately received an increase in power.

Later on, he obtained the extremely highest grade Martial Spirit Pill and reached the peak of the second level of Heaven Stage.

In order to help him improve, Yue Yang had brought him to the Heaven Realm to fight against Pang Man who was in an even higher level. In the end, he made a breakthrough when he returned … Yue Yang estimated that, after this series of battles, Sky Execution, Dragon Emperor, and Underworld Emperor would all greatly improve in strength. Fatty Hai, Ye Kong, and Xue Tan Lang, who were of lower rank, would certainly improve by leaps and bounds!

The Emerald Lord and the clown had already ordered by Yue Yang to make a reservation.

It was likely that Yue Yang would not be able to beat the Lionheart King for the time being. However, there were other people like Zhi Zun and Queen Night could be able to do this.

When Zhi Zun faced adversaries like the Lionheart King, she would definitely be very happy. She was simply a maniac at training. Facing such a good sparring partner, it would be strange if she did not feel excited!

“With just you? Still a little green!” Old Demon Wei had nothing to fear. He was in Heaven Stage level 5. Even if he had just leveled up, taking down this masked guy wouldn’t be a problem.

"Old bastard, have you ever experienced a careless mistake? " Yue Yang sneered.

Old Demon Wei was enraged.

However, he wasn’t careless.

He first summoned the Azure Swallowing Python, which was equivalent to the third level of the Heaven Stage Martial Saint. It was precisely this Azure Swallowing Python that advanced from the second level of the Heaven Stage Martial Saint to the third level that allowed Old Demon Wei, who had been stuck in his bottleneck, to successfully break through. Otherwise, it would be extremely difficult for him to break through to the fifth level of Heaven Stage with his own talent. The second warbeast of Old Demon Wei was the Photoelectric Demon Crocodile, an extremely fast warbeast. It was also one of the few warbeasts of Heaven Stage among the crocodile warbeasts.

The adult Photoelectric Demon Crocodile’s auction price in the black market was as high as 50 million.

Of course, this crocodile wasn’t obtained from black market auction but from the hands of a City Lord three hundred years ago.

After three hundred years of painstaking cultivation, the Photoelectric Demon Crocodile had reached Heaven Stage level 2.

Its strength was only inferior to the Azure Swallowing Python.

When the thousand-meter-long Azure Swallowing Python appeared, the Master of Black Wind City and the others couldn’t help but retreat, giving the battlefield to Old Demon Wei.

In any case, Old Demon Wei was the strongest at the moment. If he failed, then the battle would definitely collapse … The Master of Black Wind City wasn’t worried about Old Demon Wei being defeated. He was more worried that more experts would arrive from the Western Heaven Realm after the battle. One had to know that it would take a few days for a true expert from the Western Heaven Realm to arrive here.

The masked guy, Sky Execution, Dragon Emperor and the others were all business owners who had come to the Southern Heaven Realm to shop.

Therefore, the even scarier Heaven Stage experts was still ahead.

This was also the reason why the Master of Black Wind City was willing to let the Old Demon Wei be the leader at front. He reckoned that the fight would not have anything to do with him until the end, and it would likely be the battle between the Emerald Lord and the experts of Western Heaven Realm, or perhaps the battle between the Lionheart King and the experts of Western Heaven Realm. Little fishes and prawns like him would not be able to change the outcome of the battle. By the time the fight was over and he had picked up some snacks, he would be at his wit’s end!

“It’s big, but it’s not that useful. It’s just a wineskin.” Yue Yang summoned out the Grimoire. With a flash of golden light, he first summoned Ah Man, Barbarian Cow Shadow, and then the Golden Crown Thorny Flower Queen Duo Duo, who was yelling to fight when she woke up. After adding Giant Shadow, Yue Yang summoned the third warbeast, the Spirit of Heaven Fire.

Black Wind and the other on the other side, were dumbfounded.

Good heavens, this masked guy is a freak. Not only does he have the Summoning Grimoire, he also has three life guard warbeasts.

What made them cough up blood the most was that his summon beast still possessed a summon beast.

The Spirit of Heaven Fire summoned Blazing Queen Bee.

Blazing Queen Bee, Platinum level 10. Its role was not to attack, but to lay eggs.

It flew to a volcano called yesterday by Sky Disaster. It absorbed the heat of the volcano and kept spawning.

As long as it was in the lava, its eggs would be endless.

Endless heat will transform the eggs, and every Blazing Bee Soldiers that hatches will possess the same strength as an Earth Stage level 1 warrior. Although this kind of Blazing Bee Soldiers’ offensive power wasn’t of much use to a powerhouse of the Heaven Stage, they managed to self-destruct. Even a Heaven Stage expert would have a headache if faced with such a dense and endless amount of flame self-destructing.

The role of Blazing Queen Bee lay in its endless harassment.

Although the Azure Swallowing Python was extremely powerful, its body was too huge. Naturally, it wouldn’t be able to detonate the flame wasps on its head, so it could only swallow them all in one gulp.

If the explosion was at the tail, it would have been different. The Giant Shadow on Ah Man was different from the one on the Dragon Emperor. The giant shadow on her body lasted for an extremely long period of time, even ignoring the enemy’s attacks until the battle ended.

“Howl!” Ah Man threw out her God Binding Chains towards the Azure Swallowing Python with a burst of great brute force.

The Azure Swallowing Python opened its mouth, wanting to swallow the God Binding Chains alive, which could bind Titan tightly. However, the Azure Swallowing Python were not affected in the slightest by its ability to ‘devour’, thought the chain tightly binding its head and neck.

The Azure Swallowing Python flew into a rage and swung its head, trying to throw Ah Man away.

A warbeast of Heaven Stage level 3 and its dignity, how could them be challenged by a little female Barbarian Cow?

Old Demon Wei, who had added Photoelectric Demon Crocodile, revealed a cruel and proud smile on his face. He had seen a lot of battles like this. Normally, the enemies’ warbeasts would be swallowed by the Azure Swallowing Python flying into the sky. Under its terrifying devouring ability, even a warbeast in Heaven Stage would not be able to survive when entered the crocodile’s stomach.

Le Le Le Le.

What made the eyes of Black Wind, Paksong, and the others bulge out was that the seemingly weak female Barbarian Cow did not let a monster like the Azure Swallowing Python carry it, but rather she holding the God Binding Chains, who unbelievably dragged the Python to the ground.

The God Binding Chains emitted a dazzling radiance within this sort of wrestling force.

Any power that intended to destroy the God Binding Chains would be punished by electrocution.

As the guard warbeast of the owner of the chain, Ah man was completely safe, but the Azure Swallowing Python cried out in pain … It gave up fighting and opened its huge mouth, crazily devouring towards Ah man.

Normally, its blood devouring would be the end of the battle.

However, this was an exception.

Ah Man dug out a rock mass that looked like a small mountain. It was as easy as lifting a brick and stuffing it into the Azure Swallowing Python’s mouth.

Old Demon Wei was dumbfounded. What kind of fighting method was this?

This female Barbarian Cow was way too abnormal, right?

However, when he looked at the seemingly harmless Golden Crown Thorny Flower Queen, he immediately understood what it meant by there was no most abnormal, just even more abnormal…

chapters.title: Chapter 683 – Old Demon Wei
chapters.body:
Chapter 683 – Old Demon Wei

The countless Thorny Flowers interweaved to form two flower pythons that were even larger than the Azure Swallowing Pythons.

Fast as a moving dragon.

It was tightly entwined with the Azure Swallowing Python.

If it was any other giant python, it would probably strangle it to death in less than a minute if it were entangled with the Python of Heaven Stage level 3. However, for the Thorny Flower, whose body was randomly transforming, strangulation was meaningless. As long as the Golden Crown Thorny Flower Queen is willing, the Thorny Flower can take on any shape. In addition to being tightly entwined with the Python, the ‘Flower Python’, which was weaved from the interweaving of the thorny flowers, also quickly spread out countless vines, wrapping the thousand-meter-long Azure Swallowing Python up slowly. Layer upon layer, it was encrypted and eventually formed an inner cavity to digest it.

Naturally, the Azure Swallowing Python wasn’t willing to wait helplessly for death; it struggled with all its strength.

The rock like a small mountain in his mouth was spit out.

It opens its huge mouth and uses its devouring power.

The Flower Python wrapped round its body, unable to resist, was swallowed… Old Demon Wei let out a sigh of relief. As long as he could consume it, the Azure Swallowing Python would be invincible.

The queen waved her hand gently.

The ‘Flower Python’ that had been swallowed became even larger and longer as more Thorny Flowers interweaved together.

The Azure Swallowing Python devoured it quickly, but the Flower Python grew even faster.

In the end, before the Azure Swallowing Python could digest it, that Flower Python that grew bigger and bigger directly squeezed into the Azure Swallowing Python’s mouth and burrowed into its esophagus … The head of the Azure Swallowing Python swayed left and right, wanting to spit out this enemy that it couldn’t swallow. At the same time, the Azure Swallowing Python twisted its body and released waves of intense electric currents.

“Hehe!” Old Demon Wei laughed complacently.

The Azure Swallowing Python from before was stuck at the second level of Heaven Stage, unable to advance any further.

After being guided by a super powerful expert of Heaven Stage level 6, Old Demon Wei spent a lot of effort to capture a Blizzard Electric Eel of Heaven Stage level 2.

After devouring, digesting and fusing together, the Azure Swallowing Python finally improved, and also gained the ability of the Blizzard Electric Eel to release electric currents.

Although it was slightly weaker than an electric eel, in such a close-combat situation, it could easily kill a warbeast of Heaven Stage level 1. When they first captured the electric eel, if it wasn’t for Old Demon Wei who possessed a Photoelectric Demon Crocodile with the same electric attribute, he probably wouldn’t have been able to accomplish anything.

The enormous Thorny Flower Python that was coiled around the Azure Swallowing python’s body was scorched black in color, and many of the Thorny Flowers were rapidly withering.

The Thorny Flowers that had squeezed into the Azure Swallowing Python’s esophagus also stopped moving.

Gradually, there was the trend to disintegrate.

“Hahaha!” Old Demon Wei laughed crazily, “Ignorant child, my Azure Swallowing Python is an invincible warbeast. How dare a small Thorny Flower fight against it?”

Actually, Old Demon Wei was a little worried earlier, afraid that the Azure Swallowing Python would not be able to defeat the Thorny Flower.

Although the opponent’s Thorny Flower was very abnormal, in the end, it was only a plant warbeast. Even if it could ignore the poison acid liquid, it was still unable to resist the damage caused by the ice, fire, and electricity elements. The Thorny Flower was no longer a threat. Now, as long as he devoured that female Barbarian Cow with boundless brute force, he would win this battle.

As for the Spirit of Heaven Fire, Old Demon Wei didn’t believe that it could cause him any damage.

Moreover, with the Photoelectric Demon Crocodile he was confident that he would be able to move a hundred times faster than the Spirit of Heaven Fire.

The spectators, Black Wind and Paksong, let out sighs of relief as well.

In the end, he was a powerhouse of Heaven Stage level 5. Although Old Demon Wei was too arrogant and noisy, his strength was still there and he had the ability to be arrogant!

Yue Yang watched quietly, temporarily not interfering with the battle of the Golden Crown Thorn Flower Queen.

The Queen grunted a little unhappily.

She pointed with her jade-like hand.

Countless Thorny Flowers emerged from the ground like a sea. Some formed towering trees, and some formed vines that weaved into a net.

Some of them had huge petals that spread open, revealing bizarre huge mouths.

“Fire!” Golden Crown Thorn Flower Queen issued her first order, just like the commander.

Lightning flashed in the thousands of Thorny Flower’s mouths, then it gushed forth bolts of silver serpent-like electricity. Its target was the Azure Swallowing Python, which was about to break free, and directly bombarded its body. All of a sudden, the silver snakes danced chaotically, causing the entire sky to ring with a sound that made it sky into a silver world where people were unable to see things clearly… After the lightning had passed, other than a slight injury caused by lightning, the Azure Swallowing Python was almost completely unharmed.

After devouring and fusing with the Blizzard Electric Eel, it was already immune to thunder and lightning.

Old Demon Wei laughed maniacally.

“Haha …” The laughter echoed outside Black Wind City.

Black Wind, Paksong and the rest, couldn’t laugh. Perhaps the Azure Swallowing Python could withstand the thunder, but what about the other warbeasts?

This little girl who commanded the Thorny Flower wasn’t someone to be trifled with. If the electric current just now hadn’t been aimed at the Azure Swallowing Python, but someone else, even a expert of Heaven Stage, wouldn’t have been so easy to deal with.

“Hang him up, lash him for me!” The Queen was angry.

Little Hands cutely crossed her thin waist, her face full of anger. She felt very displeased that she was unable to quickly take down her enemy in front of Yue Yang. Her orders caused the entire sea of Thorny Flowers to move. Countless Flower Python ropes as huge as the Azure Swallowing Python hung the Azure Swallowing Python on the tree, then nearly ten thousand of them opened their mouths, ready to spit out …

Old Demon Wei laughed coldly in disdain. Didn’t attacks just make the Python feel itchy?

However, what was unexpected was …

Even those Thorny Flower that had previously spat out electricity, what it spat out the second time was no longer electricity, but inferno flames … There were fireballs, fire bullets, fire pillars, fire snakes and fire dragons. Depending on the size of the thorns, the flames they spat out were also different in shape. There were nearly ten thousand thorns, but only one thing, the raging flames they spat out, was exactly the same. In an instant, the Azure Swallowing Python was shrouded in raging flames, enduring the extreme high temperature. The Golden Crown Thorny Flower Queen’s jade-like fingers flicked three times, and nearly ten thousand Thorny Flowers sprayed out three times in a row.

Black Wind and the others were shocked and terrified.

Even though they were far away, they could still feel the high temperature of those flames.

One by one, they hurried to see Old Demon Wei, but the expression on his face was calm.

But when the flames dissipated, the Azure Swallowing Python was still unharmed.

“Hahahaha! My Python’s skin can withstand temperatures three times higher than volcanic magma. Do you think its strength at the third level of Heaven Stage is useless? Such fire can no way harm my Python. What a joke!” Old Demon Wei threw his head back and laughed. Pang Man, Hoka, and Savi quickly flattered and complimented him as much as they could. Even the Master of Black Wind City gave him a thumbs up.

“Ah, this rotten snake is really amazing.” Fatty Hai and Ye Kong gasped.

“…” Sky Execution, Dragon Emperor and the others also frowned.

This Azure Swallowing Python was indeed a little difficult to deal with.

Fortunately, it was the female Barbarian Cow and the Golden Crown Thorny Flower Queen. If it was anyone else, they would have been defeated long ago.

On the distant city walls, the sexy and enchanting beauty that appeared yesterday had appeared again today. Her eyes were a little cunning. She had been looking at Yue Yang and didn’t care about the Azure Swallowing Python’s performance at all.

Against a woman’s innate intuition, the Sky Disaster standing beside Yue Yang sensed it.

She stepped forward and gently held Yue Yang’s arm.

This was my brother-in-law!

The Sky Disaster was somewhat of a demonstration. She made a provocative expression towards the distant city walls. How could Yue Yang not understand her thoughts? He told her to leave quickly: "Idiot, we’re starting a war now, do you think we should start to eat? Why close up!” The purpose of Sky Disaster had already been achieved. She stuck out her tongue, indicating that she was a good girl, and retreated.

Standing on the other side of Yue Yang, the Golden Crown Thorny Flower Queen raised her little fist. “Fix it, I hate smelly snakes!”

Following her coquettish pout.

More thorns emerged from the ground.

Tens of thousands of Thorny Flowers of different sizes opened their huge mouths and sprayed out waves in their fifth time towards the Azure Swallowing Python that was hanging on the giant thorny tree.

This time, what came out was not electricity or fire, but ice water!

The Azure Swallowing Python’s hot skin was sprayed by the extremely cool icy water. The scales on its skin immediately exploded, and a large amount of its skin fell off, revealing the muscles underneath the skin. Old Demon Wei’s expression immediately changed, while Pang Man, Hoka and Savi, who were still flattering him, felt as if their mouths were stuffed with cow dung. Their expressions were unspeakably ugly. The Master of Black Wind City quickly put down his thumb. As for Paksong and the others, who were just about to pay their respects, secretly cursed in their hearts. Fortunately, they almost flattered the wrong one.

“Ahahaha, Duo Duo is so smart. Kill this rotten snake and see how mighty it is now!” Fatty Hai was so happy that he danced. He understood why the Golden Crown Thorny Flower Queen spat out three times when she knew it was useless. The reason was because she used the high-temperature energy conversion.

First, she scalded the skin of the Azure Swallowing Python until it was hot, then used ice water to give it a comfortable cold bath.

The effects came out.

When Old Demon Wei saw the wailing Azure Swallowing Python, he no longer cared about ultimate disgrace and immediately flew out. He charged into the sea of flowers, preparing to rescue his beloved warbeast.

Yue Yang, who had been waiting for him for too long, instantly blocked his path.

Huh?

The speed of Yue Yang surprised Old Demon Wei.

With the help of Photoelectric Demon Crocodile, his speed was unparalleled among his peers. Other than the clown who was extremely fast, there was no one who could surpass him in terms of speed. Now, Old Demon Wei, who had risen to the fifth level of Heaven Stage, was even confident that he could surpass the clown. But did this human kid in front of him also good at speed?

Old Demon Wei was determined to use his speed to play tricks on his opponent.

Eat the dust!

Old Demon Wei, who was a hundred times faster than lightning, bypassed Yue Yang and towards his own Azure Swallowing Python. He was prepared to save his warbeast and then return to Yue Yang to ruthlessly ridicule his enemy’s snail-like speed.

“Bang!” Old Demon Wei, who had just flown out ten meters, was surprised to find that something crashed into his face.

Yue Yang raised his leg.

The soles of his shoes were imprinting on the proud face of Old Demon Wei.

Black Wind and the others could barely see it, but when Old Demon Wei smashed his face into Yue Yang’s shoes and was forced to stop, they were all stunned.

Old Demon Wei, who was known for his unparalleled speed, was actual being toyed with by his opponent’s speed? This world was simply too crazy. Black Wind discovered that he was a little dizzy. Could it be that he had been sitting on the well and observing the heavens in the past? Or could it be that the experts of the Western Heaven Realm were truly this powerful?

“Dammit!” Old Demon Wei was greatly humiliated in front of his friends, and his heart was burning with rage.

With his maximum speed, he flashed behind Yue Yang.

He ferociously punched out.

Only by instantly killing this hateful human guy could he save his dignity.

His fist hit nothing.

Not good!

As the punch came crashing down, Old Demon Wei discovered that what he had hit was only a shadow. Old Demon Wei, who had just missed his attack, pounced forward and quickly fled. He felt that his opponent was attacking him from behind, using the same move as he did … If he allowed his enemies to successfully use the same move, then he would have no position in the Southern Heaven Realm. He would definite become a laughingstock of the Southern Heaven Realm!

BOOM!

Old Demon Wei helplessly discovered that his highest speed was still slightly slower than his opponent’s.

As he fled, he turned his head and saw the opponent’s fist shooting towards him like a meteor.

It hit him hard on the bridge of the nose.

That kind of pain was not just physical pain, but rather due to the humiliation in his heart … The fame that had built up over the years vanished with this punch!

Old Demon Wei quickly adjusted his body as it fell. He pressed his hand on the ground and prepared to spring up and use the strength of Heaven Stage level 5 to kill his opponent with force that was impossible for the opponent. In order to win back his dignity, he had ignored everything else … Just as his left hand was pressing down on the ground, his right hand gathered strength, and before he could even bounce up, he was shocked to discover a foot were right in front of him, rushing directly towards his face at high speed.

Old Demon Wei anxiously used his right hand to parry, but sorrowfully discovered that he was still a bit too slow.

He watched helplessly as he was kicked flying by his opponent. Although his strength was not that strong and his injuries were not heavy, the enormous humiliation made him wish he were dead …

chapters.title: Chapter 684 – Considering Your Iq, It’S Hard To Explain
chapters.body:
Chapter 684 – Considering Your Iq, It’S Hard To Explain

Bai Song gave Black Wind a questioning look. What he meant was, everyone will come at once?

Bai Song no longer had any confidence about whether Old Demon Wei can defeat that masked guy alone. That’s right, Old Demon Wei was of a high level, and was undoubtedly the strongest powerhouse of the Heaven Stage. But the problem was that his opponent was even faster than Old Demon Wei, who specialized in speed. If this battle were to continue, even if Old Devil Wei won, it wouldn’t be very glorious.

Of course Black Wind knew that if everyone went up together, it would be much better than having Old Demon Wei fight him alone.

But he considered more.

If they all went at the same time, of course they would be able to defeat the other party.

But to wipe them all out, that was simply impossible!

If they killed the enemy’s Heaven stage, the Tong Tian Sect, the Long Teng Sect, and the Demonic Palace would most likely fight to the death. Even the allies of these three forces would be involved in this expedition. At that time, that kind of calamity wouldn’t be something that a small city lord like him could withstand. Regardless of whether he won or lost, he would be punished by all the upper class people in the Southern Heaven Realm. Hei Feng didn’t want to bear the blame for causing a war between the two realms, he couldn’t afford it either… What he wanted is to delay the time until the Emerald Lord and the Lionheart King went into this battle so that they should bear the blame for this cross-border war.

They were in the upper echelon. If the two sides fought until the end, it would naturally be them who stood out and presided over the overall situation.

As a small city lord, it was best for him to endure for a while.

As long as he survived through the appearance of the Emerald Lord, he would have nothing to do with it. If the Lionheart King showed himself, it would have nothing to do with him.

The battle was going smoothly, and he was picking up the loot himself. If the battle was in a quagmire, he could slip away early. At most, he would go to the East Heaven Realm or the North Heaven Realm to continue his development. In a word, he could fight a battle, but the leader himself could not. Once he did, then no matter what the outcome was, he would die.

“Let’s wait a bit longer!” The Master of Black Wind City shook his head.

“…” What kind of person was Bai Song? The sly man naturally understood Black Wind’s thoughts.

He didn’t want to be the boss either. He didn’t care about the outcome of this battle as long as he had a share of the profits.

Even a blind person could see that the three forces of the Tong Tian Sect, the Long Teng Sect, and the Demonic Palace were not easy to deal with. If they went up together, they would only beat the heaven stage away. The consequences would be severe, and the other party’s true experts would most likely go all out. Now that Old Demon Wei was supporting him, he couldn’t be bothered whether he wanted to fight or not.

Out of the 'I have no enmity with the Western Heaven realm, Bai Song was happy to stand aside and watch when he saw that the Black Wind didn’t want to cause any trouble.

General Yu Qianjun, who was sent by the Emerald Lord, kept his eyes on the battlefield, not moving at all.

Like a statue.

He didn’t say anything. He didn’t make it clear whether he would fight or not.

Pang Man, Hoka, and Savi would like to fight. If Old Demon Wei had the upper hand, they would have taken the chance to gush forth the encirclement. Yet the problem was, Old Demon Wei was covered in dust right now. If he really was defeated, then the masked guy would win. If they rushed out now, it would be as good as bringing food to the other party! Pang Man knew the difference between he and the masked guy. As long as the masked man was in his strongest state, he would be able to instantly kill the other man.

Pang Man wouldn’t move at all unless the Old Demon Wei took the upper hand.

Who would do anything that would send himself to his death?

While Old Demon Wei was fuming with rage and was at a loss as to how to beat his opponent black and blue, he did not notice that the Azure Swallowing Python was already in an extremely dangerous situation.

Once the fragrant python meat revealed, except for countless thorny flowers opening their big mouths full of sharp teeth as they frantically bit it, other two similarly lazy fellows were also attracted. The first was Hui Tai Lang. This guy was dozing off with his belly towards the sky, snoring. He opened his eyes when he smelled the fragrance of meat, and saliva began to flow out of his mouth uncontrollably. The other was little metal beast that was also dozing off lazily, this little guy was able to sleep even more than Hui Tai Lang, and his appetite was not small as well. Furthermore, the food he was eating was all good stuff … Looking at the flower python weaved from thorns, it squeezed itself into the Azure Swallowing Python’s mouth, preparing to devour it from the inside. Immediately, it opened its eyes and flew out, intending to snatch the Azure Swallowing Python’s magic crystal.

Hui Tai Lang was not willing to fall behind, so he immediately dashed out as well.

This was because Ah Man had held down the Azure Swallowing Python to give it a good beating. That kind of power was simply too terrifying.

Black wind and the others had not noticed anything unusual about the Hui Tai Lang and the small metal beasts until the two began to gobble down the Azure Swallowing Python, only to realize that the other side still had two abnormal warbeasts that had yet to take action.

“Woof!” The Hui Tai Lang occupied the position on the head of the Azure Swallowing Python, continuously chewing down, preparing to snatch out the magic crystal and present it to its master, making a great contribution.

“…” The little metal beast took another route. It took the Azure Swallowing Python’s mouth and bit up.

“You two bastards, this stinky snake’s magic crystal is mine!” The Golden Crown Thorny Flower Queen was furious.
