If it wasn’t for her crippling this Azure Swallowing Python, Hui Tai Lang and the little metallic beast, she wouldn’t have so easily tried to take the magic crystals. Just a moment ago, he had been sleeping soundly, but now, he came out to snatch his cultivation. This was too despicable! With a single breath, the Gold Crown Thorny Flower Queen immediately turned into a colorful light and returned to the Grimoire World. She then took out the Tao Tie Blade and joined in the battle for the magic crystal.

Tss tss!

The Azure Swallowing Python had no way to struggle. The only thing it could do was desperately release electricity.

What shocked the Master of Black Wind City was that aside from the Thorny Flower Vine, they did not care about Hui Tai Lang and the little metallic beast.

Hui Tai Lang could change the state of Silver Marrow. Despite the electric currents, the small metal beast did not care at all… Even Ah man, as long as she stepped on the ground, could easily transmit the electric currents into the earth. Her body wouldn’t be harmed by the electric currents.

As for the Golden Crown Thorny Flower Queen, her body had the ability to absorb the elemental particles. The Ice and Fire Lightning Poison was useless against her.

No matter how much elemental energy there was, it was only a tonic.

You want to hurt her?

Ordinary methods were impossible.

It had to be a divine artifact, or an extremely strong spiritual attack, or ruling power … The Golden Crown Thorny Flower Queen had absorbed energy since she was young. She possessed the most perfect body out of all the warbeasts. Even without the Hornless Dragon Jiang Ying before she obtained the Dragon God’s inheritance, she was still incomparable. Even Yue Yang couldn’t predict what kind of realm she, who had unlimited potential to consume, would reach in the end.

Other warbeasts had not been able to reach this level for thousands or tens of thousands of years. The God Beast realm, which she had dreamed of for her entire life, was already reaching her level in just three years of being born.

“Thunderbolt Dance!”

Old Demon Wei and Yue Yang chased after each other in the sky. They were always just a step away, but they couldn’t catch up to each other.

Infuriated, he exploded with a thunderous dance in the depths of his heart. "Pu pu pu pu pu … … … … … … … … … … … … … … … … … … … … … … … … … … … … … … … … … … … … … … … … … … … … … … … … … … … … … ….

Using the Photoelectric Demon Crocodile’s ability, the hundred-meter range of the electric net was scattered around the crocodile.

At the same time, Old Demon Wei had risen to the fifth level of Heaven stage. His roar was like thunder, and his aura exploded forth. The might of the fifth level of Heaven stage was enough to suppress everyone present. The silver electricity crackled all over his body, and spikes grew out of his crocodile-like skin, directing the electricity.

In the electric grid, he was convinced that the masked guy was paralyzed by electricity.

Now, he wanted to use his greatest momentum.

Give the enemy a fatal blow.

Only by doing so would he be able to save some face.

“Die!” Old Demon Wei saw Yue Yang, who had been enveloped by the electric net and turned into an electric cocoon. He felt extremely relieved. Even if you were faster, how could you be faster than my electric net? Just having speed and not having strength was already destined to be a tragedy for you! Old Demon Wei channeled his superhuman might, deliberately using his strength at the fifth rank of a heaven stage to stir up the air, creating a storm. Then, he released his momentum to swallow the world whole, throwing a punch towards his opponent.

“…” Naturally, Hei Feng and the others could tell that Old Demon Wei was showing off. However, he was also intimidated by the terrifying power of a fifth rank Heaven stage master.

The fifth rank of the Heaven stage was indeed powerful.

Although this Old Demon Wei was arrogant, he did have the ability to be arrogant!

The commander General Yu Qianjun sent by the Emerald Lord suddenly looked at the Sky Execution

, Dragon Emperor, and the others. He found their expressions were the same as usual and could not help but feel slightly shocked.

Under such circumstances, the other party still had enough confidence in the masked guy?

Was that masked guy really that strong?

At the top of the city, the sexy and seductive beauty began to feel a little nervous. When she saw that the Sky Disaster was not caring about her, a look of pleasant surprise appeared in her eyes, as if she had discovered some treasure. A smile returned to her lips.

Old Demon Wei’s fist suddenly came to a halt.

Yue Yang burst out of the electric cocoon.

A hand gently reached out and grabbed Old Demon Wei’s fist that had stopped. With an extremely dashing shoulder throw, Old Demon Wei was thrown out. Old Demon Wei couldn’t help but fly down to the ground; he was at least a hundred meters deep. All the power from his punch had allowed Yue Yang to cleverly transform into Falling Force, and instead had caused Old Demon Wei to suffer a disadvantage.

“Why?” Old Demon Wei, who had burst out from the ground, crazily yelled at Yue Yang. He didn’t understand how he had come to a standstill in the sky. What kind of power was binding him?

“Considering your IQ, it’s hard to explain to you!” Yue Yang spread out his hands, indicating that he was too lazy to waste his saliva.

“Haha!” Fatty Hai and his buddies were rolling on the floor with laughter.

“Huh?” Black Wind and Bai Song looked as if they had seen a ghost; their eyes bulged out of their sockets.

What was even more terrifying being still to come.

That temporarily forgotten Azure Swallowing Python actually caused thornier flowers to swell and burst its stomach. Before dying, its head caused the Hui Tai Lang, the small metal beast and the Golden Crown Thorny Flower Queen, to dig three big holes. Ah Man didn’t participate in this kind of competition. She took back the God Binding Chains and stared at Black Wind and the others with a serious expression, as if she was looking for her next opponent.

The Spirit of Heaven Fire was rather bored, because for the time being, it had nothing to do with her.

Yue Yang’s mission was to lead the fire wasps to kill the patrolling guards and the city lord’s personal guard when the enemy’s Heaven stage pounced on her.

The speed of the Hui Tai Lang and the little metal beast was almost the same. When the two of them bit their magic crystal and didn’t let go, they kicked them away one by one, threw away the Taotie’s Blade, grabbed the magic crystal of the Azure Swallowing Python, and then rushed towards Yue Yang’s side to ask for credit.

Hui Tai Lang and the little metallic beast could do nothing to deal with this Golden Crown Thorny Flower Queen.

He could only turn his grief into an appetite and gobble up the energy inside the Azure Swallowing Python’s brain. Although it couldn’t compare to a third level Heaven stage Magic Crystal, it was still much better than an ordinary Magic Crystal. Furthermore, if they don’t eat it, there is a Tao Tie Blade that can transform into a beast. This fellow who can transform into a Tao Tie, its appetite will never get tired, it is a strong competitor of the Hui Tai Lang’s appetite.

Until now, the Azure Swallowing Python had finally been released a final wail.

Then it fell to the ground and died.

Old Devil Wei looked at Yue Yang’s group of warbeasts that were crazily devouring the head of the Azure Swallowing Python. His face was full of disbelief. His heaven stage three level of Heaven-Devouring Green Python, which he had painstakingly cultivated for a thousand years, died just like that?

How? How could this happen?

Yue Yang did not explain.

chapters.title: Chapter 685 – Too Clever By Half
chapters.body:
Chapter 685 – Too Clever By Half

Chapter 685 Too Clever by Half

City Lord’s Mansion.

When Long Xiang returned, he found that everyone in the City Lord’s mansion was dejected.

Old Demon Wei, who had always been arrogant, also had a gloomy expression，drinking one cup after another emotionless as a widow lost her only son.

The atmosphere of a full house of Warriors in Heavenly Stage was truly strange. Long Xiang suspected that he had entered the wrong place. Was this really the Master of Black Wind City’s mansion? Why did it look like a memorial service?

“General Long Xiang!” When Black Wind saw that Long Xiang had returned, he immediately mustered his strength and spirit. Without mentioning the others, the support of the Lionheart King was undoubtedly the most important.

“City Lord, what exactly happened?” Long Xiang slightly bowed and asked.

“This is what happened…” The Master of Black Wind City’s narrated the whole process of the fight in the day in detail, trying his best to be tactful and not to put the Old Demon Wei’s dignity on the line. He repeatedly emphasized that Yue Yang was actually not a match for the Old Demon Wei, only his speed was a bit faster and his skill was better, and there were also many battle beasts around. They killed the Azure Swallowing Python, which was at the third level of the Heaven Stage, and thus forced the Old Demon Wei to retreat.

Long Xiang was stunned.

Old Demon Wei’s lightning-like speed was something he knew.

The enemy was even faster and more skilled than Old Demon Wei and possessed many warbeasts. Even Azure Swallowing Python of Heaven Stage level 3 could be killed?

Indeed, it wasn’t surprising for him to be in such a mess when facing such an opponent… At last, Long Xiang also frowned and thought for a long time. “I haven’t seen that masked guy before. I can’t be sure, but I feel that this person is a bit similar to the person I previously thought him to be. Of course, there was something different about that person. He had two Divine Beasts, and they were powerful enough to rival the teamwork of the clown, Rachel, and Wise Demon Marshall. Perhaps they were not the same person, but they were likely to be members of the same clan, disciples of the same sect, or even brothers. Because both of them are extremely proficient in battle skills, and have many intelligent warbeasts. More importantly, you said that the masked guy had been accompanied by Sky Execution, Long Xuan and other Warriors in Heaven Stage. They are also skilled, and all of them have the strength to fight at a super level. This has deepened my speculations.”

“The man from last time, he and his female companion, may not look powerful, but even that little girl cannot be underestimated. She was able to instantly kill several Earth Stage that were much higher than her level, and her battle techniques, the use of battle beasts, and her Mental Force Field were perfect.” As Long Xiang spoke, he recalled.

"From this, we can conclude that the one who came to seek revenge this time should be their race. This race, your Majesty Lionheart King, has discussed it repeatedly with me. Not only are humans of this race unique, they have excellent concealing abilities, and do not easily allow others to see through their true strength. Furthermore, they all possess high level Summoning Grimoire. It’s rare.” Before Long Xiang could finished his analysis, the Master of Black Wind City had already struck out with his palm.

The Master of Black Wind City nodded in agreement, "That’s right, not only does the Sky Execution, Long Xuan, and masked guy have their own Grimoires, even the several people in Earth Stage also have their own Grimoires!”

After Long Xiang heard this, he pondered for a bit, "Now, it can be determined that they both come from the same race. Your Master of Black Wind City, according to my personal observations and my investigations at the later stages, this race is very protective. They should be peaceful but they place great importance on honor, and once they are insulted, they will immediately erupt. Even if their enemies are as strong as mountains, they will fearlessly accept the battle. If the Alchemist Master Jun Wu Ye hadn’t died, it would’ve been easy for us to hand him over. But now … well!”

How could the Master of Black Wind City not know that his subordinate had caused a calamity?

But there was no way to defend it.

Was he going to confess to the opponent that the Alchemist Master Jun Wu Ye was really dead?

If that was the case, then most likely everyone else would be fine, and he would be killed immediately. Black Wind wasn’t a fool. He definitely wouldn’t take the blame for this. If he were to die, everyone would die together. In any case, everyone’s interests were tied together. If someone gave way to him, Black Wind would immediately run. No matter how good Black Wind City and Black Market were, how could they compare to his life?

No matter how much money he had, it would be useless without his life!

“They didn’t pursue us?” Long Xiang was a bit curious. Since the other side won, why didn’t they take advantage of the victory to pursue?

“After Old Demon Wei, they continued to send people out to fight a few rounds.” With a bitter face, the Master of Black Wind City shook his head and said, "Maybe they are waiting for the stronger clansmen to arrive. They did not attack with all their might. The only people from the three major powers that came were the people from the Demonic Palace.

“If that couple is really one of these clan’s people, then it’ll be dangerous.” Long Xiang felt a chill in his heart.

Although the Lionheart King wanted to get rid of him, he had no choice but to be wary of Mo Long and the forces behind him. If he really provoked the race that he belonged to, then this battle would not be as simple as conquering Black Wind City. Even the Emerald Territory would not be able to be saved, and even the greater region would fall.

Long Xiang wanted to immediately report back to the Lionheart King, as the situation had changed.

Such a decision would require the Lionheart King to reconsider his plans.

Of course, in order to comfort the Master of Black Wind City, Long Xiang didn’t immediately take action. Instead, he comforted him with a few words of consolation, expressing that his side would support him to the end.

General Jin Feng brought up the matter again, “General Long Xiang, this matter, you see, could it be an enemy conspiracy?”

Not to mention Long Xiang, even the Master of Black Wind City and Bai Song didn’t believe his assumption.

Bai Song shook his head and waved his hand. “My son Song Tao’s death couldn’t have been done by them. In fact, I don’t think they had any intention to kill us for the time being. They didn’t kill us either yesterday or today.” The General was right, these people were calm and wouldn’t slaughter other in normal case, unless they were truly enraged. With their abilities, not to mention my son Song Tao, if everyone present were to go all out, there would not be many people remaining. This Black Wind City will not be able to protect them for a long time. "

“That’s right, the ones who killed Young Master Song Tao and Elder Hei Suo should be those rebel soldiers who wanted to entrap us.” There were at least five Heaven Ranked martial artists among the rebel army. Three of them were even at Heaven stage third rank. If they joined forces and attacked from the shadows, they would be able to kill Young Master Song Tao and Elder Hei Suo in an instant. The Master of Black Wind City sighed, “What happened was just a coincidence.” “We were distracted by the rebel army’s actions. To think that something terrible happened right beside us.”

“Then how about we hand over the Guard Captain and vice president Chidoo, then we can negotiate again?” General Jin Feng hated the Guard Captain and Vice Chairman of his personal guard for his trouble.

“Not for now. This will only make the other party even more angry.” Old Demon Wei quickly stopped them, “Not only can we not hand them over, we have to hide their secrets first.”

“It’s not good to bet in Black Wind City. Then where should we hold them?” General Jin Feng felt a headache coming on.

“Let’s put it in the Shao Zi fortress, the dungeon there is the most secret, the safest …” “Wait!” Old Demon Wei suddenly cried out in alarm, “Raging Flames! She’s currently in the Shao Zi fortress. If the rebel army finds out, they will definitely inform the masked guy outside of the city. If the masked guy rescues Raging Flames, they will gain another heaven stage rank!”

When he said this, everyone felt fear in their hearts.

Without any hesitation.

Hoka and Savi, the two Heaven stage warriors, immediately rushed to the portal in the City Lord’s Mansion.

They needed to get to the Shao Zi fortress at once and move the felon. She had been planning on using her to attract the rebel army, but now, the rebel army could use her to their advantage. Once the masked guy outside the city found out about the raging flames and saved her, the consequences would be dire.

It took a lot of effort to catch Captain Raging Flames.

Her power was at the fifth level of the Heaven stage.

If not for her brute force, as well as the lack of special techniques and warbeasts to coordinate with her, capturing her would have been an arduous task.

If the Captain Raging Flames got out of this trap, with her terrifying strength and the masked guy’s speed and skill, it wouldn’t be as simple as just one plus one equals two. It would probably sweep across the entire Black Wind City, killing Old Demon Wei of the Azure Swallowing Python. No matter what, he couldn’t let the masked guy release the flames …

Old Demon Wei led the team and escorted the others back to the sentry fort at high speed.

Transferring the flames is a super-felon.

Long Xiang, on the other hand, was frowning as he thought about something.

He felt that he had some sort of inspiration that he could not grasp, that he was thinking hard.

The Master of Black Wind City quickly urged Long Xiang to drink, not allowing him to think too much about the gains and losses in the battle. If Long Xiang told the Lionheart King to give up Black Wind City, that would be terrible. Black Wind and Bai Song were faking that Zhang and Long Xiang would discuss tactics while testing his mouth to see when the Lionheart King would intervene.

Half an hour later.

Old Demon Wei returned with a bit of satisfaction, while Hoka and Savi both had joyous looks on their faces.

“We arrived first. The rebel army did not inform the masked guy in time. We had already moved the flames out of the Shao Zi fortress and moved Full Moon City.” “Haha, luckily, Jin Feng mentioned this matter. Otherwise, things would be really bad.” Old Demon Wei’s expression recovered a little as he felt that he had a foresight.

“That’s right, Elder Wei, you’re wise and astute. Everything is within your grasp.” General Jin Feng was flattering him. There was nothing he could do about Old Devil Wei. This was what he liked about Old Devil Wei.

“Oh, no!” Long Xiang exclaimed and stood up.

He finally understood what he had been so busy thinking about before. It was about the transfer of flames.

Long Xiang angrily threw his cup and loudly cursed: “Dammit, we shouldn’t have moved!”

Old Demon Wei and the others were stunned.

The Master of Black Wind City, who was a smart person, reacted immediately and shouted, “Quick, let’s go to Full Moon City. We need to go there immediately. There might not have been any news of the rebel army taking down Flame. This shift is just enough for the rebel army to find out.” “No, we have to go look at the Full Moon City!”

From within the portal, a bloody heaven stage emerged.

It was the captain of the squadron, Lei Kai, who was in charge of watching the flames. He cried out sorrowfully, “There is a masked guy leading the army. He is an insider in the rebel army.”

“AHH!”

Lei Kai’s sorrowful cry instantly shocked the entire audience.

Old Demon Wei slumped to the ground. Even after a long time, he didn’t know how to react.

chapters.title: Chapter 686 – This Is A Dream?
chapters.body:
Chapter 686 – This Is A Dream?

Chapter 686 This Is a Dream?

Full Moon Dungeon.

When Long Xiang and the Master of Black Wind City arrived, the place was already a sea of fire.

In just ten short minutes, the Dungeon that was said to hold powerhouses below Heaven Stage level 6 forever was completely destroyed.

“Tell me the process.” Long Xiang knew that there was nothing he could do about it, but he wanted to know more about his opponent. Now that Raging Flames had been saved, the only thing to be considered was how strong the masked guy was, as well as the actions of the rebel army. Only by knowing one’s own self and knowing the other would one be victorious!

"There are rebel spies in the Dungeon. When the masked guy led the way in, an attendant opened the door for him. I used the Braking Dragon Brake to seal the dungeon completely, but the other side had a little girl with a strange warbeast in the form of a silver deer who could easily pass through the Brake. As soon as the girl rode in on the deer, the masked guy teleported in. I can’t even withstand a single move. He is unstoppable.” The group leader Lei Kai was covered in blood. When he saw the raging flames in the Dungeon, he trembled with fear.

“Where are the Deng brothers?” Old Demon Wei snapped.

Inside the Full Moon Dongeon, not only Lei Kai, the leader of the squad, was in charge of watching the Raging Flames, but also the Deng brothers who specialized in water attacks.

These two brothers both had powerful water-type warbeasts, guarding the water prison. Almost no one could defeat them.

Even if they couldn’t stop the masked guy, they wouldn’t lose so quickly, right?

Lei Kai shook his head, “the Deng brothers, they are already dead. That masked guy had an extremely terrifying water-type warbeast. The Deng brothers didn’t even have the chance to escape before they were killed on the spot. In the entire Dungeon, I am the only one who can escape alive!"

When Long Xiang heard this, he fell into deep thought again.

Old Demon Wei let out an angry snort, “Isn’t there the violent Strange Demon Beast? At this critical moment, why didn’t you release it from the cell?"

Lei Kai did not reply for a long time.

Only when Old Demon Wei grabbed him by the collar and shook him vigorously did he reply with a slightly trembling voice, “Strange Demon Beast… A little girl use a huge divine sword and chop it off with a single slash … Not to mention the Strange Demon Beast, I had even released all of the prisoners in the Dungeon. However, in less than a minute, those bandits, who had committed many evils in the Emerald Territory, had been completely wiped out by the masked man and his teammates… If it wasn’t that he let me report this on purpose, I don’t think I’ll be able to escape."

The Strange Demon Beast was beheaded with a single slash?

When Old Demon Wei heard this, he secretly shuddered.

A divine artifact … a divine artifact … what did this mean? The other side had come with great support. Most likely, the experts of Heaven Stage from the Western Heaven Realm had arrived.

Although that Strange Demon Beast was only at the second level of the Heaven Stage, it was even more difficult to deal with than the Azure Swallowing Python. It was an indestructible creature, and even if it was chopped into minced meat, it could immediately turn into smoke and recover. Only divine artifacts or divine beasts could kill it!

Long Xiang and Black Wind looked at the ground.

There was a huge iron ball on the burning ground.

This thing was absolutely not in the Full Moon Dongeon … Long Xiang could see that it was the original form of the Dungeon’s iron gate.

The dungeon’s iron gate, which was thirty meters wide and fifteen meters thick, had now become a huge iron ball. Just what kind of power was this?

"the Raging Flames made it?” Black Wind asked tentatively.

“No.” Long Xiang shook his head.

He felt that although the Raging Flames had this kind of power to knead the iron gate of the Full Moon Dongeon into such a large iron ball, it would take at least ten minutes, and he believed that the time it took to knead the iron ball wouldn’t exceed a minute.

In other words, this iron gate was not made from the Raging Flames of the Southern Heaven Realm.

But someone else.

Who?

To possess a power greater than that of Captain Raging Flames?

Unless it was the Titan Giant from the legends, only this race had such a possibility!

Long Xiang struggled to turn the iron ball over and found three huge marks at the bottom. Looking closer, he discovered that it was a giant’s fingerprint. He couldn’t help but shiver. That’s for sure, Titan Giant, who was at least two hundred meters tall … If this Titan Giant was also a warbeast, then not to mention the rebel army acting as an insider, even if there was none, they would still be able to easily invade the Full Moon Dongeon within ten minutes.

“Is this?” Black Wind also saw the marks and felt his legs go weak from fear. He felt as if he was about to lose his urge to urinate and was about to burst out of his body.

“Things are serious. We have to be prepared for the worst. Evacuate the population, we may need a war!” Long Xiang let out a light sigh. Right now, he probably wouldn’t just hand over the culprit and settle the matter peacefully.

That night, the Master of Black Wind City issued an order for the city to evacuate.

Due to the war, Black Wind City was no longer safe, and the residents had to leave as soon as possible. Otherwise, Black Wind City’s army would no longer be able to protect their safety.

While the residents, merchants and mercenaries were evacuating from the teleportation circle, the Master of Black Wind City sent a big cart full of items into the secret teleportation circle of the City Lord’s Mansion. His secret henchman, Barton, led the entire caravan and retreated to the Silver Storm Stronghold controlled by the Lionheart King.

Although the most valuable treasures, as well as golds, Black Wind himself stored in the Storage Ring.

However, there were still a lot of items that could not be discarded.

For example, there were all kinds of rare antiques and ores, all kinds of precious herbs and fur, all kinds of armor and luxury items … These items were all priceless. If he were to abandon a carriage of these, he would lose tens of millions. Until the last moment, Black Wind was unwilling to abandon them. All sorts of magic crystals, pets and maids were sent away by Black Wind. Even his most beloved woman was entrusted to Barton.

He believed in Barton.

因为巴顿不喜欢女人，只喜欢男人，是他手下最忠诚的狗。

Because Barton didn’t like women. He only likes man. That made him a loyal flunky of the lord.

As long as the lord still alive, Barton wouldn’t betray him… After Barton left, Black Wind handed over the documents to General Jin Feng. As a balance, he gave General Jin Feng these items with long-term resources that were tied to the benefits of the Emerald Lord, Lionheart King, and the others to keep so that General Jin Feng could have a balance in his heart. As for the black market, he had already discussed it with Bai Song and the others a day ago. No matter how the battle went, when the black market reopened in the future, the benefits would spread equally with everyone.

“I need to repay the Emerald Lord.” General Yu Qianjun, who had been silent all this time, suddenly bid farewell to Black Wind.

“…” Long Xiang also patted Blackwind’s shoulder. Without saying anything, he walked into the portal.

He did not know what attitude the Lionheart King would have, but he was sure.

Emerald Territory, the sky will definitely change here.

There were some people in the world that could not be provoked, and the Black Wind City Lord’s underling had maliciously offended this kind of person who could not be offended. The most tragic thing was that when the other party gave the conditions, the Master of Black Wind City chose to face them head on instead of negotiating.

That made them trapped deeper and deeper.

The more he did the worse for wear.

To use a single word to describe it, it would be to bear the consequences of his actions!

While the Master of Black Wind City was frowning in worry, Captain Raging Flames was sleeping soundly.

In fact, she’d been asleep for a long time, ever since she’d been captured. Although he had nailed her shoulders and legs with plague dragon nails and bound her body with layers upon layers of dragon-strapped ropes, even putting her into the ‘Dragon-imprisoned carriage’ which even the Giant Dragon could not escape from, Old Devil Wei and the others were still worried and used medicine to keep her unconscious for a long time. At the beginning, in order to take revenge for her companion who was torn to shreds by the flames during the capture, Hoka and Savi, who once had special soldering iron, wantonly burned her body with flames through the Dragon-imprisoned carriage’s fence, resulting in her anger and nearly breaking out of the car. Fortunately, the Emerald Lord, who had the talent for sleeping, personally intervened, allowing her to fall back into sleep.

Long Xiang specifically warned him that torturing a Heaven Stage Level 5 expert wasn’t wise at all, in case the Raging Flame woke up.

Successfully completed self-destruction.

Within ten kilometers, everything would be in ruins.

It was precisely because of this that Old Demon Wei and the others had thought of all sorts of ways to keep the Raging Flame in a comatose state.

Raging Flame felt like he had been dreaming for a long time. In his dream, he met a man and a woman. That woman was especially gentle, and her body was so beautiful that petals could fill the sky. The man, on the other hand, was very vicious. He stared at her with his eyes wide open. He was very frightening, even more imposing than his own father.

In his dream, many things happened.

For example, someone had used the dragon nails to maliciously pierce his body. Under their siege, he was left without help.

That extremely fierce man suddenly moved to beat back those people. He even used a special flame to remove the poison from the Blast dragon nails. In fact, that fellow even released a terrifying, ancient fiend … Later on, when the fierce man disappeared, he met his enemies in his dreams. This time, the number of people increased and he fell once again … When he was unable to defeat his opponent, his thoughts were fear, not fear of anything else, but fear that the very fierce man would criticize him because he made him listen to his commands, but he didn’t listen and was caught …

The dream was long and endless.

In the end, she dreamed that she was in a dungeon, and that the fierce guy came to her over the flames and stared at her with those fierce eyes, while the corners of his mouth were full of mockery, as if he were laughing at her for not being able to do anything without him.

If he could move, he would definitely give him a vicious punch.

No, this was a dream.

Normally, she would also be very fierce to him. She would glare at him, but in her dreams, there was no need for that. Perhaps, she could treat him better.

If she listened to him in her dream, it wouldn’t matter. In any case, it was just a dream, so he wouldn’t know …

"This guy still hasn’t woken up? It was like a pig sleeping for two days and two nights!” She suddenly heard his voice, something was wrong. In her dreams, he didn’t even have a voice, so how could there be a voice?

“Emmm, don’t water her face, let her sleep for a while!” She heard another voice. It was the very gentle girl. Then she felt a chill spread across her face to the body. Suddenly, she opened her eyes. At first glance, she saw a pair of vicious and frightening eyes looking down at her. The Raging Flame jumped in fright. Oh, it was actually him!

“Where, where is this?” Before the Raging Flame fully woke up, they were still a little flustered. Was he dreaming, or was he already awake?

If this wasn’t a dream, why would he appear?

But if he wasn’t dreaming, how could he feel so real? The Raging Flame were confused!

Yue Yang immediately gave her a punch and scolded: “Idiot, this is my house. If I hadn’t saved you, you would have turned into a dead pig. I’ve seen idiots like you, but I’ve never seen one like you!”

Raging Flame was stunned. He had saved her, and everything in her dream was real?

In her heart, there was a feeling of wanting to cry.

His body’s reaction was different from this. Instead, he jumped up in a rage, “What?” “Kid, you actually dare to attack me?” When the surrounding people heard her self-address, they all laughed and laid down. Only then did Raging Flame realize that there were many people around. She quickly changed her words and greeted, “Hi everyone, please accept my regards.”

chapters.title: Chapter 687 – Silent, Night Fragrance
chapters.body:
Chapter 687 – Silent, Night Fragrance

Chapter 687 Silent, Night Fragrance

After being confused for a long time, Captain Raging Flames finally realized that she was no longer in the Southern Heaven Realm, but in the Western Heaven Realm, at the bottom of Tong Tian Tower, in the place of a small garden outside the Heaven Stairway ground level.

She couldn’t understand why she would come here as soon as she woke up. She was still in the Dungeon of Emerald Territory in Southern Heaven Realm.

Yue Yang did not explain.

His expression indicated that he did not want to waste his saliva.

That poker face made Raging Flames very depressed. She could only ask the little girl who had skillfully used mental force to condense petals about the questions in her mind. With learning some information, she finally found out the little girl’s real name. She was called Yi Nan, and that fierce guy was called Yue Yang. Other than the little girl, there were a few other ladies. They were his wives or fiancées. For example, a beauty in embroidered robes with a Nirvana Sunflower of Heaven Stage level 5, called Luo Hua; a hot beauty with a Guardian Beast of Charm Demon Queen in Heaven Stage level 3, called Sky Law.

Although this Sky Law Beauty’s level was inferior, Raging Flames felt an indescribable sense of danger from her.

She seemed terrible.

The sense of danger that came from the bottom of her heart was the same as when she met that great villain.

What made Raging Flames felt especially strange was that although the Sky Law was the strongest, its position was not the highest. Other than the valiant swordsman carrying the godly sword on her back, among the group of people the one holding the power to make decision were the young lady who was silently reading an ancient book.

Especially that little girl who loved reading books. There was a sense of danger similar to that of Sky Law Beauty.

She was the decision maker in the group, and even the villain sometimes had to listen to her.

Among the girls, there was an especially gentle girl. Raging Flames felt that it was impossible that there to be such a gentle girl in the entire Southern Heaven Realm. Compared to her, Raging Flames felt extremely ashamed. It was said that this little girl who could laugh extremely fresh like a bright and breezy moon was the older cousin of that great villain, named Yue Yu. It was hard to imagine how such a ferocious fellow could have such a gentle sister.

There must be something wrong!

That fierce guy, in addition to having an especially gentle older sister, he also had an especially obedient younger sister called Yue Bing.

In addition, there was a cute little guy, very naughty and very smart, who always liked to come up with a difficult riddle that people would guess, deliberately tease people, and then joke around with them. Then, she would show off a little guy with candy everywhere. she seemed to be called Yue Shuang and was also his little sister, the youngest sister.

Normally, outside the house, there would often be a group of people practicing martial arts.

All of them were in Earth Stage level, extremely weak.

Of course, these people wouldn’t admit it. They said that they were in the level of Innate, not Earth Stage level … Raging Flames did not understand the difference between Earth Stage and Innate, but she did have an impression of a noisy fatty and a thin one who often beat him up.

The fat one was called Fatty Hai, the thin one was called Ye Kong, and the one who didn’t like to talk was called Xue Tan Lang. The very polite one was called Prince Tian Luo.

The brothers that were training hard without making a sound were called Li Qie and Li Ge. The little girl riding the Perforate Deer was called Liu Ye. She was the disciple of that great villain. And there was Baoer who called herself Lucky Star. She was a Golden Elf. If it was in Southern Heaven Realm, a weak and beautiful life like Baoer or Liu Ye would simply be a tragedy, because once they appeared, they would be captured and sent to the slave auction … Here, in the Heaven Stairway, they lived well. Raging Flames had only been here for three days, but she found out it was just like the legendary heaven. It was a beautiful and happy place.

Yue Yang, that great villain, left every morning.

Sometimes, he would bring Fatty Hai and the others, and at other times, he would bring a bunch of girls instead. It was said that he would take them to train in the Southern Heaven Realm.

He had the magical ability to travel between the two realms … Raging Flames was no longer curious about his magical abilities, because she found that there was nothing impossible about him.

“Today’s harvest is not bad. Rest well and continue working hard tomorrow!” Yue Yang came back again. Fatty Hai, Ye Kong and the others also came out from his Grimoire World. Each of them was overall wounded, but they were in good spirits. They must have won a battle. Almost every night, whenever Yue Yang came back, he would bring Fatty Hai and the others back to the small garden.

With Fatty Hai and the others’ strength, it was extremely dangerous to stay in the Southern Heaven Realm.

Sky Execution and the others were different; they had the strength of Heaven Stage.

At the beginning, Raging Flames didn’t understand, but now, she finally understood that this evil man, Yue Yang, was simply a soldier trainer… Fatty Hai, Ye Kong, and the rest would progress with each battle each passing day.

Their starting point was very low.

However, with the Summoning Grimoire, their growth rate was extremely fast. It was a speed that Raging Flames could not even imagine.

“Bring me there as well. I can take them all on my own.” Raging Flames felt a little itchy. If she were to fight alongside him, wouldn’t it be easy for them to deal with however powerful enemy? Moreover, the injuries on her body had already healed. The Dragon Plague had been expelled, and her strength had increased instead of decreased. Now that she met the clown, Rachel, Old Demon Wei, and the others, she could definitely take them down.

“Go away, it’s none of your business right now.” Yue Yang ignored Raging Flames’s invitation.

“What? You …” Raging Flames were so angry that she almost exploded her lungs.

“Want to know why he listened to me?” A single sentence entered Raging Flame’ ears. Raging Flame turned his head to look and discovered that, in the shade of the tree, there was a woman reading a book. She immediately remembered that this little girl who loved to read books was called Xue Wuxia. Almost everyone listened to her, including the great evil man. But why did she talk to me? Usually, the girl never looks at me. What’s the matter today? Raging Flame was a little surprised. She looked at Xue Wuxia and asked with a little curiosity, “Why would he listen to you?”

“Because what I said made a lot of sense. He listened to reason, so he listened to me.” Xue Wuxia closed the book and replied casually.

“Don’t I make sense?” Raging Flame were about to faint. Was she an idiot that she couldn’t even say something reasonable?

“Your logic did not match his logic …” If you want him to listen to you, you’ll have to use what he agreed with. For instance, if you adopt a human baby and you feed him with a magic crystal, how could that be all right? It’s just like you know you can’t do somthing, yet you insist on using brute force to carry them out. He looked firece, not because he’s angry with you, but he’s afraid that you would regret oneday if you choke the baby to death with the magic crystal. Do you know what I mean? You never think of the consequences, and insist on carrying your ideals out with brute force. Captain Raging Flames, although you are older than me, your mental state is rather similar to my little sisters. You might be slightly better than Shuang’er, but about as the same stubborn as Bing’er. When handling affairs, here are so many choices, why don’t you use the best way? If you have no idea about which one is the best, then just listen to us!" After finished speaking, Xue Wuxia just walked away without hesitation.

“…” Raging Flame gaped at her, and for the first time, she found herself cannot make a patch on Xue Wuxia.

Xue Wuxia’s level was inferior to hers, and nor did her strength.

But she was more like an older sister.

In front of her, Raging Flame suddenly became small and immature …

The Southern Heaven Realm…

Yue Yang led Fatty Hai and the rest to encircle and kill an Earth Stage Eight level Magical Beast. With Fatty Hai and Ye Kong watching over them, they could use as much of their power as they liked without worrying about death. Each and every one of them had achieved a breakthrough in their cultivation, both in terms of level and strength, and they advanced by leaps and bounds.

Sky Execution, Dragon Emperor, and Underworld Emperor didn’t need Yue Yang to take care of them.

They were fighting with the enemies almost every day, with one town after another taking over the territories of Black Wind City.

According to the Master of Black Wind City’s message, the Emerald Lord and the Lionheart King had decided to intervene. About a month later, they would negotiate with the representatives of the Tong Tian Sect, Long Teng Sect, and Demonic Palace. Yue Yang believed that this was a plan to slow down their fighting. They must have sent people to find the clown, or to head to the Southern Heaven Realm to search for information on everyone. The second was to gather more heaven stage warriors and come to Black Wind City, preparing to fight off the Southern Heaven Realm.

The Emerald Lord were doing this for the peace of the territory, for the benefit of the people.

As for the Lionheart King, he was for the sake of fame.

If such a cross-border war were to subside in his hands, or even to win under his lead, then the Lionheart King’s reputation would undoubtedly rise greatly.

To the Lionheart King who thirsted to become the Region Emperor, this was an extremely good opportunity.

In order to become a Region Emperor, the Lion Prince’s strength, fame, and reputation were all far apart.

It was precisely because of this that he needed more opportunities.

Yue Yang had already thought of this point long before he decided to attack Black Wind City. Moreover, he had discussed it repeatedly with Xue Wuxia and the others. He even consulted the opinions of Zhi Zun and Midnight Empress and felt that this battle was an opportunity to open up the situation in the Heaven Realm. The plan had been executed perfectly. The only accident was that sexy and beautiful lady, the former Emerald Lord’s daughter. She had unconditionally provided the information on the location of the flames, allowing Yue Yang to rescue Raging flame in advance … These days, that beauty hadn’t come looking for Yue Yang, but Yue Yang guessed that this girl must be preparing. When she came again, she would definitely have a condition that was difficult for him to refuse.

Magic crystal? Saint artifact?

Everything was possible. She would definitely want to cooperate, and she would definitely come up with generous conditions.

The only thing Yue Yang had to be wary of was who exactly was this girl. If she was a subordinate of a Region Emperor, even the Lionheart King didn’t know that she was a beauty scout for information on the Southern Heaven Realm, then he would be finished.

Therefore, before Yue Yang found out the other party’s identity and could not fully trust her, he absolutely would not cooperate with her.

Even if they worked together, they wouldn’t reveal their true strength or their own secrets.

Empress Fei Wenli was right. There was no one trustworthy in this Heaven Realm. If she trusted others, she would be courting death … Of course, the round head Bao Gu was an exception. There was no exception to the rule of the ten million people in the Heaven Realm. That sexy and seductive beauty, he hoped that she was a special case. Otherwise, Yue Yang wouldn’t mind ravaging the flowers.

In the middle of the night, a fragrant scent drifted over.

Yue Yang opened his eyes and discovered that the sexy and seductive beauty had already snuck into his tent. He giggled while looking at himself: “I was already very careful and tried to tiptoe as much as possible, but I didn’t expect you to find out. Are you really that scared of me?”

“Just state your conditions.” Yue Yang gently stroked Yi Nan, who was sleeping soundly beside him, so that she wouldn’t wake up.

"It wasn’t easy for me to find such a good thing, a soul of the Light Dragon, which is perfectly suitable for you human beings and the Eastern Goblin Tribe. “With it, I’m sure you’ll be able to multiply your fighting capabilities.” The beautiful lady tossed Yue Yang a small crystal ball that flashed with a faint light. She sweetly smiled and waved her hand: “This, is just the beginning!” “Next time, don’t be so wary of me, I will be very sad!”

“…” Yue Yang was speechless. That sexy and seductive beauty had already turned into a green light and disappeared from under the moon.

There was only the faint fragrance of a virgin left in the tent.

chapters.title: Chapter 688 – New Comprehension
chapters.body:
Chapter 688 – New Comprehension

Chapter 688 New Comprehension

As the Sky Execution, Dragon Emperor, and Underworld Emperor opening a bigger and bigger battle in the Black Wind City of Emerald Territory, more and more experts of Tong Tian Tower joined in.

To be honest, they were greedy.

Successive breakthroughs of Sky Execution and Dragon Emperor and the others made the Great Demon King Baruth and the other experts who were far behind felt the sense of crisis. This was because Baruth, who had absorbed extremely highest-grade Martial Spirit Pill and broken through the Heaven Stage, became the first expert of Heaven Stage level in the Demon Abyss in a thousand years. He came with several Demon Kings and Lich kings to express his willingness to join this war to expand the Heaven Realm. In order to obtain this opportunity, Baruth and the other experts of the Demon Abyss even decided to hand over all the treasures they had obtained in the previous decade to Yue Yang. They would not conceal anything, even if it was a Saint Artifact or a Dacred Beast.

In order to reassure Yue Yang, the Great Demon King Baruth invited Old Man Nangong to act as his covenant for justice.

Of course, Yue Yang, who held the teleportation authority of the Southern Heaven Realm and Tong Tian Tower, wasn’t worried that the experts of the Demon Abyss would play any tricks on him.

Without Yue Yang’s Three Realm Compass, even if Baruth and the other warriors of Demon Abyss in the Southern Heaven Realm tore up their alliances, they would still not be able to return to Tong Tian Tower. They would not have the foundations nor the strength to do so.

This was the Heaven Realm, and with the strength of an experts of Demon Abyss, it was impossible to break the situation here.

From the point of view of Black Wind, Bai Song, Long Xiang and the others, the number of powerhouses in the Western Heaven Realm was constantly increasing. After all, the distance between the Western Heaven Realm and the Southern Heaven Realm was too far. They couldn’t come immediately. Moreover, the super powerful experts of Heaven Stage also needed to agree on all conditions.

It was impossible for a cross-border war like this to start within one day.

They were glad that they had the local advantage and had plenty of time to prepare.

The Emerald Lord had ordered General Yu Qianjun to come as well, indicating that he would definitely fight against the external enemies. He would also invite the warriors in Heaven Stage level of the Southern Heaven Realm to win this cross-border battle.

Lionheart King was not that optimistic.

However, the cunning and resourceful Lionheart King made a deal with the neighboring King Tuo Ye. He exchanged the 100 cities in the Emerald Territory, as well as the 500 cities around it, for such a vast area, as well as countless resources, reportedly for a Sun Gem of Saint level. He was trying to use this to enhance the strength of his Guardian Beast Golden Griffin King. On the surface, it looked very reasonable. To raise his Guardian Beast, the Lionheart King did not hesitate to barter with it.

In fact, only those like the Master of Black Wind City, who were currently facing the attack of experts in Heaven Stage level from Western Heaven Realm, knew how smart the Lionheart King was.

Of course, the Lionheart King supported cross-border battles.

If they won, he would be well-known as a backer behind the scenes.

If this cross-border battle were to fail, the greatest loss would not be his, but the King Tuo Ye.

Furthermore, even if the experts of the Western Heaven Realm wanted to settle the score, Lionheart King was not responsible for anything. This was because Emerald Territory no longer belonged to him!

In this month, Sky Execution and the others would engage in the frenzied battle and increase their combat prowess. Other than attacking a certain town from time to time, they would also join forces to kill powerful demon beasts occupying a certain mountain … Practically all of the Demon Beast of Heaven Stage level occupied their own territories and were divided among the towns and cities.

Right now, they had become the best targets for cultivation for Sky Execution and the others.

Ye Kong and Fatty Hai were not able to fight against Demon Beast of Heaven Stage level. If the Sky Demon in Demonic Palace, under the lead of their leader Sky Execution, could barely kill Demon Beast of Heaven Stage level, then Ye Kong, Fatty Hai and Xue Tan Lang and the others, even with Yue Yang’s escort, would not be able to fight against Demon Beast. No matter how hard they tried, for the time being, they would only be able to hit a Demon Beast that below Earth Stage level 8. This was their limit … Of course, compared to the younger generation who had just stepped into the level of Innate, it was already amazing that they could achieve this level of power.

It was impossible for everyone to be as perverted as Yue Yang!

Half a month later, Old Man Nangong, who had already successfully advanced to the Heaven Stage, took the initiative to replace Yue Yang and provide backup for Xue Tan Lang and the others. Only then did Yue Yang free himself.

The matters in the Heaven Realm could be put it aside for the time being. Yue Yang returned to Rainbow Castle and decided to rest for a few days.

“Let’s fight!” Captain Raging Flames was very bored these days and his hands were itching.

“No.” Yue Yang refused.

“You’re too lazy!” Raging Flames was very angry with Yue Yang’s attitude. She didn’t know how active Yue Yang was in the Heaven Realm. She thought that he was the real Yue Yang because he often found excuses to slack off.

“Please don’t talk to the sleepers!” Yue Yang made a sign at the end of the bed, then turned around and slept soundly.

Rest was like slacking off for Raging Flames, but for Yue Yang, it was also a part of his training.

As soon as he slept, he would automatically enter the space of consciousness.

In the recent period, because Yue Yang showed signs of breaking through to the Innate Level 10, it was rare for the Heavenly Sword Goddess to come out and watch him cultivate for a while. Under her notice, Yue Yang became a hundred times more serious than usual. Yue Yang had already grasped both Black Gui Cang and White Shuang Hua. However, the big girl, who always outdid him, had begun to practice the third sword when he hasn’t been happy for long.

The third sword was the Scarlet Sword, Chi Xiaolian.

Yue Yang estimated that he would need to break through to the Innate Level 10 before he could begin to condense and fully grasp it. At the very least, he would have to break through to the Innate Sovereign … He had reached the Sovereign’s Heart and Innate Sovereign, but his level had not yet reached. With his cumulative, pyramid-style foundation training, the foundation he had to lay with every layer he leveled up was a vast and boundless project.

If it was anyone else, even the Sky Execution would not be able to cultivate in such a manner.

He also had the basics of Sky Execution, but compared to Yue Yang’s pyramid-shaped basics, which could only be compared with a column rising upwards, there was no comparison at all. Therefore, the power of their attacks was like the difference between heaven and earth.

To say that the Sky Execution was the most special of all the heaven stage warrior, if it were an ordinary heaven stage warrior, they would rise up in a straight line.

The reason why Yue Yang was able to fight super experts was because his cultivation theory was different from the others.

It was an unprecedented cultivation method that could not be duplicated. Other than him, no one else could do it. Even if they did both cultivate at the same time, they would not be able to replicate it. Of course, Yue Yang’s cultivation was mainly due to the direct descendants of the Heavenly Sword Goddess, along with the enlightenment of Queen Fei Wenli and the knowledge of the pitiful guy mothers… In any case, it was an unimaginable existence.

Therefore, for the time being, Yue Yang was not able to successfully condense the Chi Xiaolian.

However, his progress was obvious.

He believed that he would make a breakthrough soon. Even Heavenly Sword Goddess came out to supervise him, hoping that he would make a breakthrough soon and ascend to a higher level.

With her by his side, Yue Yang naturally didn’t dare to be lazy in the slightest and was especially focused on cultivating.

The Heavenly Sword Goddess demonstrated the formation of a hundred-meter-long Scarlet Sword, silently stating that this was the direction he would work hard towards in the future. Then, under Yue Yang’s dumbstruck expression, she quietly went into hiding.

As soon as Yue Yang woke up, he immediately ran to find Yue Yu.

“What new insights do you have?” Yue Yu was already used to seeing Yue Yang like this. Whenever he rushed over to find her, there must be something good going on. Even in the middle of the night, he would sometimes rush over crazily to tell her what new discoveries he had made. Therefore, even if it was a bedside, Yue Yu would prepare a pen and paper to record Yue Yang’s wonderful thoughts at any time.

“That’s right, the method I thought of to use the Spirit of Radiance to merge with the Angel’s Blade is too sharp. I should have thought of it a long time ago.” Even if we don’t have Red Stone of Swan Lake, we can still succeed. " Yue Yang grabbed Yue Yu’s hand and happily dragged her to the lab.

“Hey, slow down…” Seeing him so close to her, Yue Yu even thought about this matter in her dreams. Her heart softened, and she immediately could not bear to refuse him.

Sooner or later, they would have to merge, so there was no need to caress his good intentions.

Besides, he didn’t have any bad thoughts. Instead, he was overthinking things.

Yue Yu tried her best to comfort herself. Although she was embarrassed, she pretended nothing was wrong and didn’t show it.

In the yard, Drunken Cat Sister was diligently cultivating. She pretended not to see it, but instead the little panda Niu Niu was cheering and waving at Yue Yang.

The laboratory was a small space for Yue Yang and Yue Yu. Normally, other than the sickly beauty, no one else would come. The beauty had been delayed a month ago, mistakenly thinking that she had a baby, afraid that Yue Yang’s bad behavior would affect her, so she moved back to Tianluo Palace to stay with Si Niang in the mirage. Later on, she discovered that it was a misunderstanding, but her desire to be a mother suddenly aroused, and she followed Si Niang to learn how to take care of the baby, in case she didn’t know how to take care of the baby after she had one.

Indeed, the Master of Luo Hua City and the Phoenix Fairy Beauty didn’t want to give birth to a baby so quickly, and even more so for Yi Nan.

Hai Lan, the new lady Ocean Emperor, helped Yue Yang with all sorts of affairs every day, so she had no time to spare even if she wanted to live.

Only a sickly beauty could have such a possibility.

If it wasn’t for the fact that she was worried that studying the Heaven Rune would affect the baby, she would have been more willing to give him a baby.

The sickly beauty was on Si Niang’s side. Xue Wuxia, Princess Qian, and the Master of Luo Hua City were also cultivating with the Zhi Zun and Midnight Empress.

Ye Kong and the others were in the Heaven Realm, but there was no one in Rainbow Castle.

Other than the Drunken Cat Sister who was practicing martial arts and the flame that was so bored that it grew flowers in the little garden with the half-elf slave … When the door of the lab closed, Yue Yu felt her heartbeat quicken.

Even though he clearly knew that when training together with him, his understanding of his body was not the least bit inferior.

However, when she merged the Angel’s Blade with her Spirit of Radiance, the embarrassing scene in front of her still made her feel bashful and uneasy. In the past, when she was concocting pills, due to explosions or accidents, she could find excuses to say that this was the cause of the accident. Now, she could no longer use such excuses to fuse with the Angel Blade.

“Your heart is beating a little fast, calm your breathing first.” Yue Yang gently held Yue Yu’s hand and, as usual, fed her a strand of pure masculine energy.

“No, it’s just that I was in a hurry to run. I’ll just drink some water!” Yue Yu’s face reddened. She was unwilling to admit it, so she randomly found an excuse.

chapters.title: Chapter 689 – Dawn Angel
chapters.body:
Chapter 689 – Dawn Angel

C689 - Dawn Angel

Yue Yu drank a few mouthful of water to stabilize her mind.

As for the rune lights in the lab, she didn’t put down the magic crystal as usual to make it shine.

Inside the room, aside from a few lights coming from magic crystal, there was no other light. However, Yue Yu knew that he could see clearly, even she herself who didn’t have night vision can see clearly. Not turning on the light was just a psychological hint to make herself more comfortable. Yue Yu gently bit her lips, and quickly got rid of the wild thoughts floating in her head … His father and Fifth Grandpa’s words were different, maybe Fifth Grandpa remembered wrongly. I’m from the Yue Family, I’m absolutely his older sister … Don’t think about it!

She carefully removed the Runic Gold Lock from her neck and put it into the storage ring.

This is the most important memorial, and it cannot be destroyed.

Taking a deep breath, she tried her best to suppress heartbeat to calm breathing.

Don’t think too much about it. This was just a normal merging experiment, the same as the Titan Ancient Tree he had refined for Bing, there was nothing bad about it.

Moreover, the merging experiment would be helpful to him. He needed more comprehension and experiments. She had to cooperate with his research. The Family and everyone are pinning their hopes on him. She could not drag him down because of herself.

Yue Yu finally found an excuse in her heart and secretly let out a sigh of relief. Her eyes then became firm and she swept away all the distracting thoughts that flashed across her mind. She closed her eyes and entered the Soul Realm that he normally cultivated. Yue Bing had unintentionally achieved the initial Soul Realm once, but the one who was truly successful was Yi Nan. Later on, after Queen Night and Si Niang’s guidance, everyone was able to maintain the state in Soul Realm while cultivating with Yue Yang.

The only difference was that it was a matter of time and method.

Yue Bing couldn’t do this when she was awake. The way she maintained the state in Soul Realm was to sleep, as if she was waking up from a dream. Even she couldn’t tell if she fell asleep or not.

Xue Wuxia can maintain this state anytime, anywhere, when reading a book, cultivating, or sleeping. She is the only one that can remain the state all day long. Princess Qian Qian could not. She could only maintain it when she was practicing swordsmanship or dual-cultivating with Yue Yang. Yi Nan was better off. Besides practicing with Yue Yang, as soon as she left him and started thinking about him, she could enter the state in Soul Realm. The Master of Luo Hua City can enter the state when she plants flowers or smells them. Similarly, Sickly beauty can also remain the state when she was studying runes.

Phoenix Fairy Beauty were rather exaggerated, and her way of doing things were out of the ordinary. She could even maintain this sort of Soul Realm when she was on good terms with him.

She was able to perfectly combine cultivation and happiness.

Yue Yu’s method to enter the Soul Realm was rather special. Firstly, she must not look at his face, but hold his hand, close her eyes, and quietly sense the flow of his Zhen Qi in his body… She was more passive, but it was easy for him to bring her into the open.

As Yue Yang began to inject more and more Zhen Qi, Yue Yu’s body gradually started to glow.

Her skin was glowing.

Her negative energy in water system continuously fused with his positive energy, turning into a purer energy that flowed back into their bodies.

The Spirit of Radiance, which had been tried to merge with Yue Yu many times but failed, appeared again. She had long accepted a master like Yue Yu, but without her corporeal body, she could not merge with Yue Yu’s Angel Blade. The broken memories made Spirit of Radiance not dare to accept the purifying power of Yue Yang’s Nirvana Flames. Though Yue Yang didn’t have any malicious intent, she instinctively dodged.

This time, Yue Yang did not take out the Red Stone of Swan Lake that had been refined with the Nirvana Flames, as he had done before.

Allowing the Spirit of Radiance to enter the Red Stone of Swan Lake filled with energy meant that there wasn’t the slightest bit of resistance from the Spirit of Radiance. She happily merged with the Red Stone of Swan Lake …

The Nirvana Flames ignited, further purifying the Red Stone of Swan Lake that had merged with Spirit of Radiance.

At first, Spirit of Radiance was a little afraid.

However, she quickly discovered that the Nirvana Flames did not bring about destruction, but ascension.

The fear of Spirit of Radiance had vanished. Her soul was singing joyfully, constantly ascending from the Nirvana Flames. Amidst the raging flames, Spirit of Radiance was like a phoenix that had just been reborn, flying in the sky. The wings of light extended out, and the entire soul instinctively sang in jubilation. Even though the lost memories would never be found again, the remnants of the broken memories were perfectly fused together. In that instant, Spirit of Radiance found herself … Under the nourishment of Yue Yang’s innate Zhen Qi and when she completed the final refining of the Nirvana Flames, she chose to forget about the negative things from the past and used her broken memories and instincts to recreate herself.

The soul was excited.

Her image was that of a weeping shining angel.

Following Yue Yang’s gesture, she opened her arms to Yue Yu and tightly hugged her future master. At the same time, she unhesitatingly merged with her body.

Yue Yu’s body slightly trembled, as if she wanted to break free at the most important moment.

But very quickly, she recovered her calm and peaceful soul realm.

The Angel Blade on her body slowly disintegrated after Yue Yu’s unobstructed state of mind relaxed. It transformed back into pieces of silver swords and circled around her master. Yue Yang slightly shouted, and quickly rose to the Sovereign Realm, displaying the ruling power that he couldn’t easily use before. The Card of Fate bestowed the unparalleled and inestimable ruling power on Yue Yang. Even Yue Yang himself had no way of knowing how many secrets this special ruling power contained … Now, Yue Yang realized that he could control a little bit under his consciousness.

This was the first time since he had comprehended the Sovereign Realm that he was able to fully control the ruling power.

Although the ruling power that Yue Yang could control was only a thousandth of a normal power, he was still moved by the success of his control.

As soon as the ruling power came out, all of the objects around Yue Yang’s body vanished into nothingness. This was the reason why he had so little control over them. The Red Stone of Swan Lake, the Angel’s Blade, and the Spirit of Radiance, protected by the Law, were unharmed.

Yue Yu’s clothes instantly vanished into nothingness, revealing her snow-white jade body. Her long hair fluttered in the wind, and under the absorption of Yue Yang’s positive power, the negative energy of her body automatically formed a marvelous vortex, surrounding her and the two of them. Yue Yang held the Red Stone of Swan Lake in one hand and the Angel’s Blade, which interweaved with each other to transform into a giant sword, in the other hand, he was preparing to merge the two into one.

The Red Stone of Swan Lake was embedded into the Angel’s Blade, and the energy between the two completely merged together.

A strange light lit up the entire laboratory.

Yue Yang activated his innate energy and refined it with Flames of Nirvana. He was preparing to turn the silver level Angel‘s Blade into a new War Angel.

Even though it was impossible to achieve a battle angel like Ika, who had flesh and blood, thought and soul, and who naturally possessed a Summoning Grimoire that was even more perfect than a Divine Beast, Yue Yang was still confident in being able to forge a saint level battle angel like the one developed by the prehistoric warriors.

From silver level to Saint level … Despite the power of Red Stone of Swan Lake and Spirit of Radiance, the difficulty was indescribable.

One minute, ten minutes.

Then, an hour, two hours.

Even in the ethereal realm, Yue Yu could clearly feel Yue Yang’s exhaustion.

Every time the Angel Blade’s quality increased by a level, it would be ten times more difficult than when Yue Yang killed a powerful enemy. Yue Yu bit her lips. She understood his intentions and also knew his determination, so she didn’t stop him. When the silver level was upgraded to gold level, he used the magic crystals that he had prepared earlier. When the Gold rank was upgraded to Platinum rank, Yue Yang had no choice but to be distracted and use the Flames of Nirvanato purify the new magic crystals… Yue Yu didn’t know how many Demon Crystals he had refined. All she knew was that it was an uncountable amount of energy.

Her heart ached, but she did not stop him. She chose to support him, to give him her full support.

It was just a little help.

Better than doing nothing!

Shame and distracting thoughts had long been cast aside by Yue Yu. She only hoped that she could help him more. No matter what she did, it didn’t matter … Yue Yu dripped the Spirit Dew into his mouth over and over again. If he could only rely on her recovery, he would have been dead a long time ago.

The amount of energy consumed during the process of controlling the ruling power had far exceeded his expectations, but Yue Yang couldn’t bear to stop.

In addition to enhancing the quality of the Angel Blade, Yue Yang’s own realm was also increasing by leaps and bounds under the control of this extreme law.

After three hours, the platinum level Angel Blade was upgraded to the diamond level.

The quality could no longer be improved. The only thing that could be improved was the soul of this weapon … In his limit, Yue Yang, whose consciousness was beginning to blur, suddenly remembered that his blood might be useful. Before he fainted, he called out, “Blood Drop Contract!” He vaguely saw the Spirit of Radiance floating over. He immediately raised the sparkling Angel’s Blade and slashed it towards his arm, hoping to borrow the blood to complete the final blood contract between her and the Angel’s Blade.

Yue Yang couldn’t complete the last step in time. He lost control of his spirit and his body collapsed.

Yue Yu passionately hugged him, and her silver teeth gently bit his lips. Her tears flowed down and fused with the blood on his lips.

Blood and tears dropped.

The Spirit of Radiance used its hands to gently support her, but the blood droplets passed through her body which was formed from energy and dripped down unhindered.

The red stone mysteriously absorbed the blood and tears of the Angel’s Blade onto the Red Stone of Swan Lake. It emitted a bright and resplendent glow, and the tearful Spirit of Radiance made a gesture of embracing Yue Yu and Yue Yang. Finally, it turned into a flash of light and burrowed into the Red Stone of Swan Lake …

The Angel’s Blade quickly transformed and disintegrated.

Within the dazzling brilliance, a new form was born.

After transforming into the shape of a War angel, in less than a second, it transformed back into the shape of an Angel’s Blade and returned to Yue Yu’s body. It skillfully adhered to her delicate body, forming a set of armor from the top of her head to the bottom of her feet, and it was even more beautiful and perfect than the Angel Blade from before. Its level had already exceeded Yue Yang’s expectations, surpassing the refining goal of the Saint stage’ War Angel ', and was born with a weapon similar to a God Equipment. It was a new kind of battle angel that was different from Ika but also had a soul of consciousness, but without a physical body and a summoning grimoire.

Yue Yu’s summoning grimoire manual automatically floated out and flipped through the pages. The names on the pages were: Dawn Angel, Soul Contract, SemiGod Equipment …

Yue Yu was not excited about having a Dawn Angel.

She only quietly hugged Yue Yang, who had fallen into hibernation due to extreme fatigue. Sparkling tears dripped down onto his body bit by bit. She let him lie in her arms, holding him quietly, never sending him back to his bedroom as she had done before, and then quietly leaving.

Yue Yu didn’t say anything, but in her heart, she had already made up her mind.

In the future, no matter what, she would be like the Dawn Angel, protecting her foolish little brother, who always broke her heart!

chapters.title: Chapter 690 – Yue Yu, As Soft As Water
chapters.body:
Chapter 690 – Yue Yu, As Soft As Water

C690 - Yue Yu, As Soft As Water

When Yue Yang woke up, he discovered that Yue Yu had fallen asleep in front of his bed.

Her silky hair was scattered in front of her forehead.

Even though she was sleeping soundly, she still exuded an especially gentle and demure aura. Other than Si Niang, Yue Yang had never seen anyone like Yue Yu. She looked very delicate, but she was able to take care of him. Especially in spirit, she was a sister who took care of him everywhere, as if he were a little brother who was so weak that a gust of wind could blow him away. On the contrary, the valiant Princess Qian Qian showed no this potential. In front of him, Princess Qian Qian was definite someone who needed to be taken care of.

Yue Yang smiled and carried Yue Yu onto the bed.

He carefully covered the quilt and then tucked the quilt into the corner.

He gently closed the door on his way out. Outside the door, little panda Niu Niu was happily chasing after the butterfly. Yue Yang quickly shushed her and signaled her to keep quiet.

“So sweet, so sweet!” Niu Niu beamed as she and Shuang’er received the special lollipop Yue Yang had made for them. She tugged on the corner of his clothes and obediently waited for him to finish washing up. After taking a look at left and right, she discovered that there was no one around, so she pulled Yue Yang down and whispered a secret into his ear: “Big brother, Niu Niu will only tell you!”

“Alright.” Yue Yang was a grandmaster at coaxing children, and he even reached out with his finger to hook her.

“Mom cried. When I saw it, she said I wasn’t allowed to tell anyone.” Niu Niu would not tell anyone her secret, but Yue Yang was an exception.

“Then I’ll go comfort her when I have time, so that she won’t cry!” Yue Yang reached out his hand to stroke Niu Niu’s head and affectionately kissed her: “Has mom been practicing hard lately, leaving Niu Niu alone to play?”

“No, I was there when Mom was training!” The panda girl is always the best for her mother, and she says she will never be angry with her mother.

“That’s good, go play then. Mom won’t cry anymore, don’t worry!” Yue Yang smiled at her.

“Ah!” Niu Niu nodded in satisfaction.

Her smile was even brighter than the sunlight from the sky.

Yue Yang reached out his hand and gently ruffled the soft hair on top of her head. He patted her butt, indicating that she should go play by herself.

He was well-aware of how hard Drunken Cat Sister worked in her training, but her situation was very special. She was one of those types of people who had to accumulate a lot of experience before it can reflect on her level. This was related to the cultivation technique and method, as well as her mentality. Because he had been busy with all sorts of things for a long time, Yue Yang realized that he had been a bit negligent towards her.

And this Drunken Cat Sister was an extremely strong person, she would never ask for help, only grit her teeth and train hard.

If he hadn’t heard Niu Niu saying that she hid and cried, she would probably have continued like this.

Yue Yang couldn’t bear to see such a tough person cry.

His appearance was too much of a shock to Tong Tian Tower’s martial artists, of which the previous endless practice of a master changed into a blowout. It was not a pleasant feeling for those who were on top of the pyramid, such as Drunken Cat Sister, to see that other masters constantly overtook her.

Yue Yang thought for a moment.

He clenched his fist and made his decision.

When he lightly knocked on the door of the Drunken Cat Sister’s room, she opened the door, revealing a look of disbelief and astonishment.

Her eyes seemed to be asking, why would he come here?

“Is it related to the materials of the various races? Yesterday, it had been delivered to the Tian Luo Palace. I forgot to hand it to Yue Yu. Wait a minute, I’ll go back and get it.” Drunken Cat Sister could only think of the reason why he came, it was because Yue Yang did not have enough ingredients to concoct the pill, and thus came to ask her. Normally, he would never knock on her door. At most, he would casually criticize her while she was cultivating.

“Ah, no. Today, I came here to drink a cup with you.” Yue Yang’s words almost made Drunken Cat Sister think that he was having a fever.

“Didn’t you say you wouldn’t let me drink?” She cried out in alarm.

“…Let’s just treat this as breaking rule a little bit.” Yue Yang produced a bottle of Qi Lan Wine and handed it to her. Drunken Cat Sister was a little surprised by Yue Yang’s actions. Why was this guy so kind suddenly? Could it be that he had found out about the secret? Her Majesty had suggested Si Niang before, but she had already rejected it. Besides, how did he know?

“I won’t drink it!” Drunken Cat Sister was secretly alarmed. If she were to get drunk, it would be very dangerous.

This guy is a big pervert. I’d better be careful.

Drunken Cat Sister waved her hand, refusing to accept the invitation.

Her reaction made Yue Yang sweat profusely inside heart.

He forced the bottle of Qi Lan Wine into her hand and angrily said, “This bottle of Chillan Beer is not poisonous. Even if it’s poisonous, you have to drink it!”

Yue Yang said this, and Drunken Cat Sister was relieved. With a bit of surprise and a bit of happiness, she asked: “Really for me? What day is it?”

“This is a reward for your diligent training… Just like children in kindergarten, if they show good behavior, they will be rewarded with a small red flower. " Yue Yang gave an example. Drunken Cat Sister rolled her eyes at him. She was close to the wine, but she didn’t want to drink it. She first kept it and then looked at him with her eyes. “The Qi Lan Wine has already been accepted. What else do you want?”

“Can’t I come if I have nothing to do?” Yue Yang felt very awkward talking to this girl today, so he decided not to say anything more, stood up and left.

"…"Drunken Cat Sister thought he would turn around when he reached the door and pretended to have just remembered something and asked for it. She didn’t expect him to leave in big strides without saying anything. That’s not right, he didn’t play according to the rules, why would he give her a bottle of wine for no reason?

Drunken Cat Sister had the urge to chase after him and ask.

In the end, she constrained this thought.

Maybe he did it on purpose.

It’s okay. In any case, if he had something important to say, he would definitely say it out.

Although she didn’t understand Yue Yang’s intentions, but after Yue Yang gave her a bottle of wine, the Drunken Cat Sister’s mood inexplicably became better. Previously, she had been bitterly training and felt a lot of discomfort. But now she found herself do the training with high proficiency

Did this have something to do with him? But he didn’t do anything except for giving her a bottle of wine!

If it had nothing to do with him, obviously there were many things that went wrong in the morning.

But now, she felt as if everything had suddenly become clear.

She can’t figure it out. What kind of logic was this?

Yue Yang was also focusing on training, hoping to break through to the Innate Level Tenth Order. Although he had comprehended the Sovereign’s Heart before and could also advance to the Sovereign Realm, but his actual strength was not at the Innate Sovereign and was still at the level of Innate level ninth order. Not only was the Chixiaolian unable to successfully condense, even the ruling power he grasped was only able to control a minuscule amount of it.

Advancing to the Innate Level Tenth had become Yue Yang’s most pressing desire in the recent days.

He had an idea.

If he could truly become an Innate Sovereign, would he be able to summon that was most likely the ‘Divine Grimoire’?

What was the innate talent in that Divine Grimoire? What was a Guardian Beast? After reaching the Innate Sovereign Realm, could he use his Inherent skill and summon that unknown Guardian Beast? Could the guardian warbeast be the Phoenix sisters?

In addition, the Summoning Grimoire that was being summoned here was already a high-grade Platinum Grimoires, and it was about to become a Diamond Grimoires.

When he ascended to the Innate Sovereign, could the Summoning Grimoire also be upgraded to the Diamond Grimoires or the Holy Grimoire?
