“Whoa whoa…!” Yue Yang stopped cultivating. He discovered that he was just a step away from breaking through, but just a little bit, so what exactly was the difference? An opportunity to break through or a state of mind? In Yue Yang’s mind, there was a sense of foreboding, but that kind of inspiration could not be grasped. He stopped cultivating and thought while resting, what exactly am I lacking?

“Drink some water!” At some point, Yue Yu woke up and handed Yue Yang a glass of water.

“Huh?” Yue Yang looked at the cup in his hand and was stunned for a long time. In his mind flashed the same inspiration he had a few days ago, but he still couldn’t catch it.

“Is this about breaking through?” Yue Yu saw the radiant splendor on Yue Yang’s face. It was as if he had a chance to break through but was unable to break out. She saw him blankly staring at his cup, even forgetting to drink water. In her heart, suddenly felt that she could help him out with a woman’s intuition. Blessed to the soul, she pulled Yue Yang’s hand: “Do you remember when you helped me raise the fountainhead to a waterfall, and when it exploded, it turned into a tidal wave of cultivation?” “I feel like maybe I can use the negative energy in the water system to transform Gold Rank Tsunami into a Platinum Rank Tsunami!”

She didn’t say that she would aid Yue Yang in her breakthrough, but instead, she asked Yue Yang to help her improve her warbeast.

In other words, she didn’t want to do it.

As long as she could give him some help in silence, that was her biggest wish.

After Yue Yang heard this, his eyes immediately lit up. The negative energy in the water system, that’s right. If he could use the negative energy in the water system to cultivate the complementary powers, he would definitely be able to break through. His own power of the anode was so strong that even the Flames of Twilight couldn’t improve it. If Flames of Twilight could also be like the Heaven’s Fury Lotus and the Pure Blue Fire Form, then he would definitely be able to successfully break through to the Innate Level Tenth.

Yue Yu smiled at the pleasantly surprised Yue Yang. “Let’s go back to the lake to cultivate. Perhaps, in the depths of the lake, we can borrow the energy of the lake and the negative energy in the water system to transform the ocean wave into the Tsunami Transformation!”

Yue Yang jumped up, excitedly hugging Yue Yu: “You are my lucky star, it’s this, I’ve come to think of it, Void Break needs the negative energy in the water system!”

“Put me down!” Yue Yu was embarrassed and quickly shouted to stop him, but Yue Yang was overjoyed and forgot about everything.

He held her.

Like a shooting star, they streaked across the sky.

He returned to the lake where he and Yue Yu had cultivated together to enhance the Shocking Wave Battle Beast.

At this time, the darkness fell. The crescent moon in the sky was like a hook and the stars twinkled. Like meteors, Yue Yang and Yue Yu descended from the sky and arrived at the lake’s surface so quietly with no wave on the lake surface. Yue Yu looked at him with slight embarrassment before opening the wings of the Angel of Dawn. She gently pulled herself out of his embrace. Her feet were as soft as a willow twig, and she stepped on the surface of the lake like a fairy welcoming the wind.

The surface of the lake was slightly concave, but it did not produce a ripple.

Yue Yu secretly channeled the negative energy in the water system and forcefully pressed down her heartbeat that was like a deer hitting its prey. Holding his hand, she closed her eyes and began to meditate. When his energy flowed from her fingers, she instantly entered the ethereal realm … His body silently slipped into the water. Together with him, he merged into this beautiful lake.

She believed that when she came out of the lake with him again, he would definitely have a new breakthrough!

This was perhaps the only thing she could bring him!

It was all the meaning of her life.

To be able to give him a tiny bit of help, it was probably a gentle water that could slightly assist him in his growth. This was already more than enough!

chapters.title: Chapter 691 – Broke Through, Innate Level 10
chapters.body:
Chapter 691 – Broke Through, Innate Level 10

Chapter 691 Broke Through, Innate Level 10

Tens of millions of stars appeared at the bottom of the lake.

It was like the starry sky.

At the beginning, there were gentle ripples spreading out, as if it was caused by a gentle breeze. However, if someone were to stand on the shore, they would discover that the entire lake had a wondrous energy field. The seclusion of the world was like this, with the rocky shores as the boundary and the lake as its own space. Even the air outside couldn’t enter, and inside, countless energies condensed in the lake. At the bottom of the lake, around Yue Yang and Yue Yu, they formed thousands of slightly shining stars.

As more and more gentle water energy entered Yue Yang’s body, the Yang Ability immediately multiplied to gainst it.

Under Yue Yu’s guidance, the two gradually blended.

There was no sign of explosion, only a perfect fusion, turning into a pure energy of Yin and Yang, circulating within their bodies.

When enough gentle water power was stored up, Yue Yang decided to break through in one go.

The strong Yang Ability kept leaking out from his left-hand side. If it wasn’t for Yue Yu’s gentle water energy earlier, if it wasn’t the bottom of the lake, the entire world would have exploded. Yue Yu summoned the beast, absorbing the energy from the lake, controlling the lake, neutralizing the violent Yang Ability … If Xue Wuxia was here, she would have used the extreme freezing ice to seal the ice, but Yue Yu’s method was different. She did not stop the force of Yang Ability but directed it to the lake.

At this moment, an enormous vortex appeared in the entire lake.

At the center of the swirl, on top of Yue Yang’s head, a stream of fire, which was formed by the Heaven’s Fury Lotus, Extreme Fire and Flames of Twilight, flew straight up into the sky.

However, in Yue Yang’s feet, Yue Yu used the tidal wave to guide all the water energy into his body.

At the same time, she tightly held onto his big hand, circulating the gentlest water energy in his body over and over, allowing him to remain clear-headed and rational even at the critical moment of his breakthrough.

Yue Yang raised his hand. A bolt of purple lightning flashed in the sky and circled around the pillar of fire.

A chopping sound that could tear apart the heavens and the earth could be heard.

It was as if it could destroy everything … However, when the purple lightning struck Yue Yang’s left hand, it was as obedient as a cat. It meekly formed a sizzling electric ball, constantly condensing. At the same time, it quickly converted electricity and injected it into Yue Yang’s left hand.

Raging flames, soft water, and thunder combined into one. Yue Yang suddenly felt that he had a new understanding of the Sovereign Realm. It was as if he could see far with his eyes and could see even more clearly. In this world, all sorts of things appeared before his eyes. He felt that he had grown huge, incomparably huge. It seemed that with just a stretch of his hand, he could touch the stars in the sky. He felt that with just a little bit of effort, he could topple a distant mountain peak … Different from before, this was a fully awake state of control over the ruling power. He felt it very clearly.

The ruling power was truly in his hands.

Although this was only a tiny bit, and this was only the beginning of his control.

Yue Yang slowly extended his hand towards that frightened and cowering Stormy Waves. In the Sovereign Realm, under the ruling power, he felt that this warbeast was very small.

A raise of the hand would destroy it completely; a raise of the hand would, of course, lift it up. Could it be that this was the power of a god? Such a strange thought suddenly flashed across Yue Yang’s mind.

From pitiful guy’s mother knowledge inheritances, in a newly comprehended Runic Circle, Yue Yang comprehended a usage he had never tried before. He used his left hand, which controlled the ruling power, to draw the runic circle on Yue Yu’s forehead. Then, he picked up Stormy Waves, pinched it into a ball of water, and gently dropped it on her forehead.

“What?” Yue Yu was a little confused by his actions, but she absolutely trusted him. Even if she saw him pinch and kill Stormy Waves, she didn’t stop him.

“Rune Contract!” Yue Yang put the ball of water on Yue Yu’s forehead and drew an ancient rune on her forehead.

A strange bright light shone on Yue Yu’s forehead, so bright that it was hard to look at.

Even the Dawn Angel happily spread out their wings.

Her soul sang!

After doing all this, Yue Yang took out the Twin Mask that the Scarlet Emperor had used several times to repair his wounds but still hadn’t fully recovered. The Twin Mask was originally only in gold level, but it had seven layers of seals. Yue Yang used his innate energy to unseal the first seal which is the easiest, then he used the Nirvana Flames to unravel the second seal.

Now, he needed to use his new control of the ruling power.

To unravel the third seal.

It wasn’t that he couldn’t unseal the Twin Mask before, it was just that he didn’t know how to use it.

Before he had the ruling power under his control, it was as if he knew there was money in the safe but didn’t have the key to open it.

Yue Yang’s left hand gently drew across Dawn Angel’s wings, causing blood to drip out. He drew countless runes on the Twin Mask, and before he unraveled them all, the Twin Mask had to be restored to its original state.

Brilliant golden light burst out from the Twin Mask, making the cracks that were broken by the Scarlet Emperor be repaired by the Runic Circle and Yue Yang’s blood.

It swiftly faded away.

And, back to the way it was used to be.

The third seal was as simple as opening the vault with a key under Yue Yang’s new control of ruling power. At the same time, because of Yue Yang’s blood and the rune circle, the Twin Mask gradually returned to its original state. Its quality rapidly increased from gold level to platinum level, and it was continuing to upgrade …

What kind of treasure was it?

Now that Yue Yang used his vision to look at it, he realized that it was at least comparable to a holy item. But even now, his vision didn’t see the final truth.

This was related to the fact that the seal of the Twin Mask had yet to be undone, and because Yue Yang’s Insight of Heaven had yet to be upgraded to the highest level, he could only see through a limited amount of the truth. Of course, since he can’t use the Insight of Heaven to see through the final truth, the Twin Mask did give Yue Yang a huge surprise.

“Let’s continue…” Yue Yang prepared to use the ruling power to undo the fourth seal.

However, due to his excited mind, he lost his focus and the ruling power he grasped rapidly weakened.

Because he had successfully broken through, Yue Yang, who had not been in the state of cultivation for a long time, was startled. A column of light rose from the top of his head and flew straight towards the top of the sky.

The Summoning Grimoire appeared on its own.

The Insight of Heaven he used the most didn’t improve, but the camouflage gift, the one that he rarely used, magically increased. Yue Yang had entered the peak state of cultivation. For a moment, he was unable to think, and could only wholeheartedly immerse himself in the wonderful state of enlightenment. The Twin Mask fell from his hands. Just as Yue Yu was about to extend her hand to take it, it seemed to have a spirit of its own as it gently dodged and slowly circled around Yue Yang.

Yue Yu noticed that even under the influence of the Summoning Grimoire ‘World’, this Twin Mask could absorb Yue Yang’s energy very slightly.

Could it evolve itself?

Is it spiritual?

A spiritual treasure was at least a Saint rank, but this Twin Mask, even now, was only a platinum level!

“Strange!” Yue Yu was secretly surprised, but this was a good thing. Moreover, this was her brother’s favorite treasure, and the more intelligent it was, the better it was for it to be a divine weapon!

"Eh …" "I succeeded?" When Yue Yang came to his senses, he found himself trapped in the center of the whirlpool of the lake, accompanied by Yue Yu. He found it hard to believe. Had he really broken through so easily? The Innate Level tenth that he had been unable to make progress until now actually succeeded?

Not only would his strength rise to the next level, he would also be able to condense Chixiaolian.

Now, if he fought that Old Demon Wei again, he would probably cry from fright, right?

Yue Yang carried Yue Yu and let out a child-like cheer, soaring into the sky. High up in the sky, he flew down at high speeds, scaring Yue Yu into crying out in alarm. Only then did he slow down and float back down to the surface of the lake. However, he could not suppress his excitement. He flipped a dozen somersaults on the surface of the lake, laughing heartily.

Seeing him so childish, Yue Yu could not help but cover her mouth and secretly laugh.

No matter how strong he was, he was still his little brother.

He also needed her caress!

“The Twin Mask turned out to be like this. Gosh, even I can’t believe I made it.” Yue Yang knew that he was the one who did it, but the state of being in the Sovereign Realm when he was controlling the ruling power was completely different from before. He even felt a bit eager to maintain that state more. Under that state, everything in the world was under his control. That feeling was too pleasant!

"Not only that, you even changed my Stormy Waves WarBeast!" Yue Yu summoned the Grimoire, only then did she realize that her warbeast looked completely new.

The gold level Stormy Waves had already disappeared.

Instead, it was replaced by the platinum level raging tides!

Its original skills hadn’t changed, and there were three more skills like ‘Wave Wheel’, ‘Water Stop’ and ‘Spirit Fusion’.

Yue Yu lightly tapped on it with her bare hand, and summoned out the raging tides. It was no longer a water dragon like it was before. The current it was similar to the Angel of Radiance in the original form of the Spirit of Radiance, but it was purely composed of liquid. The Angel of Dawn’s consciousness was in complete control of its ability to control water together with it. This was the effect of Yue Yang’s rune array drawn on Yue Yu’s forehead. Not only that, but it was only an ordinary contract, and it also formed a special spiritual contract. Although the spiritual contract couldn’t match the Soul Contract, it was still much better than an ordinary Soul Contract.

With the Spiritual contract, Yue Yu could control the raging tides even more easily.

Now, she was one with the tide.

Of course, because Dawn Angel and Yue Yu were soul-bound and had the same thoughts, when Yue Yu didn’t give any orders, Dawn Angel could represent her master and control the tide to do anything …

"I never thought that I would be able to do so many things after advancing to the Innate Level tenth!" "So what if he ascends another level and breaks through to the Innate Sovereign?" Yue Yang suddenly began to daydream. At the very least, he would be able to unseal more seals on the Twin Mask, allowing it to return to its true form. Maybe the Twin Mask might even be a saint weapon or even a divine weapon!

“A night has passed, let’s go back first, or else little servant will be worried again.” When Yue Yu saw that the eastern sky was slightly pale, it seemed as if dawn was about to arrive, she hurriedly reminded Yue Yang. She wasn’t afraid of the little servant worrying, but she was embarrassed.

Moreover, she didn’t want others to know that she was the one who assisted Yue Yang.

When she returned, Yue Yu would not let Yue Yang carry her no matter what, even if it was ten times faster.

She unfurled the wings of the Angel of Dawn and followed him, flying in the sky. Looking at his heroic silhouette, Yue Yu suddenly felt a sense of happiness in her heart.

If he stayed by his side like this all his life … No, he’s just a brother. But even now, it was a pleasure to follow him, to fly with him in the sky. I don’t want to think about the future anymore.

Yue Yu revealed a smile.

It was extremely quiet.

That smile was like the dawn in the eastern sky, a gentle radiance.

chapters.title: Chapter 692 – Enemy? Just Right For Trying Out!
chapters.body:
Chapter 692 – Enemy? Just Right For Trying Out!

Chapter 692 Enemy? Just Right For Trying Out!

When round head Bao Gu woke up, he found that he had not been crushed to death by the boulder, but was in a special construction site.

Even in the Heaven Realm, it was rare for such a huge project to occur.

He did not know what these people were doing, but he was certain that these close-to-a-million people were doing something unprecedented. He was very good at observing people’s expressions. Just by taking a glance at the laborers around him, he could tell how important this huge project was to them from the pride they had on their faces. Even if only became one of the million participants, they would still appear to be unparalleled in glory!

There are different races here.

But almost all the work they did was the same.

Warriors with different levels of strength didn’t have a distinct class. The round head Bao Gu could see a Dragon Lady of Earth Stage level 6 holding a huge rock and carrying it out.

In terms of strength, she should stand at the top and supervise the work of the weak, because compared to her, many of the workers were as weak as ants.

It was one thing for the Dragon Lady. In the Heaven Realm, their status wasn’t very high.

Especially in front of men, they were like slaves.

However, when he saw the two Abyss Manatees of Heaven Stage level 2 leading a group of Amphibious Fish Demons and Hybrids to dig a pool for water, his mouth gaped wide open and he could fit a bull toad inside. What a joke. Even the Abyss Manatee in Heaven Stage was a laborer? Who had the authority to command them?

“You’re not dead? When I first saw you, your appearance was almost the same as a salted fish. I didn’t expect you to come back alive!” The round head Bao Gu discovered that there was a talkative Hybrid beside him, who had a very strange appearance. Of course, according to the popular aesthetic view of round head Bao Gu in Black Wind City, this strange Hybrid could still be considered a character, especially if his mouth was not full of nonsense. Just like the other super cool Swordfish Man with a stern face, he could probably score a lot more points.

“May I ask who you are?” He discovered that the two Hybrids were not weak, especially the cool Swordfish Man, who had reached the eighth level of the Earth Stage.

“Ji Feng!” The cool-looking Swordfish Man took only one look at Bao Gu before turning around and leaving.

The talkative Hybrid also introduced himself nonstop, “I am a fisherman named Sui Zui. I will explain everything to you. If there is anything you don’t understand, you can ask me. If there is nothing you don’t know, you can ask me. I know everything Ah, well, your ability to fake your death is pretty good. I didn’t quite believe it when they said it, so I tried to use a huge rock to press you down for 3 days, and your intestines almost came out. I didn’t expect that once you moved the huge rock away, you would be able to fully recover within a day … What race are you? A sea cucumber or a hydra? Neither? Hump, I’ve never heard of this before, but if it’s possum, I’ve heard of it! Of course, this is not the Southern Realm Region. Don’t you feel that the surrounding environment and gravity are completely different? This was the lowest level of Tong Tian Tower, the Soaring Dragon Continent. That distant castle was the Yue clan’s castle … If you don’t understand, forget it. This matter is extremely complicated, I’ll explain it to you slowly in the future!”

The round head Bao Gu was completely confused when he heard the explanation from the guy who called himself Sui Zui. Suddenly, he saw him scurrying away.

He ran over to pay his respects to the other Dragon Lady of Heaven Stage.

Call her Queen Qi Ge.

As for the servant lady who even Queen Qi Ge respectfully accompanied, he called her the Highness Xia Yi.

Under the crown?

Hearing this title, the round head Bao Gu was shocked.

When Queen Qi Ge escorting Highness Xia Yi coming along, he hurriedly bowed deeply and sincerely greeted her. In the Heaven Realm, if a low level being were to see a high level being not paying their respects, it would be equivalent to looking down on the authority of a high level being.

"He said that you are pretty good and are very good at gathering intelligence, so I will leave the information of the Heaven Realm to you in the future. Of course, since the war is still ongoing, the overall situation is uncertain. You should stay here for a period of time! " The words of Highness Xia Yi made Bao Gu even more confused. He didn’t know anyone here, could it be that these people had made a mistake?

“Ah, where is my friend Jun Wu Ye?” He wanted to find out if the two of them had been saved, or only him who possessed the ability to fake his own death.

“He’s fine, but he’s very busy. He’ll come here when he’s free.” Highness Xia Yi did not say anything further and quickly left.

He did not dare to look up, or he would have seen her trying to hold back a laugh.

When Xia Yi and the others had gone far away, Sui Zui forcefully patted Bao Gu’s shoulder, “This place is actually a very good place. Originally, I stayed at the sixth floor, but I discovered that there was no better place to stay than this, so I decided to move here.”

For its words, the round head is sweaty.

It has nothing to do with me where you like to live!

However, he didn’t say these words out loud. Furthermore, since Jun Wu Ye wasn’t dead, he was finally able to relax. Jun Wu Ye was still alive and working here, so he didn’t have any time to spare. There was no better result than this. Although he couldn’t figure out how the boulder could have pressed down and how he could have been fine, he originally thought that even if he had the ability to fake his death, he would still be unable to escape from such a huge rock … Both of them were fine. How fortunate!

“Do you have to work?” The round head Bao Gu felt that if he was brought here, he would redeem himself with labor.

"Of course, how boring it would be if you don’t work, I’ve tried to sit here and watch them working, but those days are unbearable. Besides, you would find out how great you are when you lift a boulder in front of the civilians who would cheer for you and stare at you with that kind of worshipful look. “Ah, the vice president is here. I have to talk to him!” With a whoosh, Sui Zui flew off again, saluted an old man, and then, rather happily, began to talk with him. Not to mention this Sui Zui, even the two Abyss Manatees, seeing this old man who was only at the Earth Stage, also saluted, making even the round head Bao Gu stare blankly, unable to react at all.

“…” “Ah, here, what exactly is this place?” The round head Bao Gu was even more confused now.

The Small garden, Rainbow Castle.

For the past two days, Yue Yang had been constantly trying to condense his Chixiaolian Sword.

The Chixiaolian Sword was different from the Black Guizang and White Shuanghua Swords. It was much more powerful and had an extremely strong Yang Ability. Yue Yang’s current Heaven’s Fury Lotus and Pure Fire could not be compared to it at all. If one likened the Heaven’s Fury Lotus that could burn the Heaven’s Fury Lotus to a torch, then Chixiaolian sword was like a volcano.

Of course, this was still the power that Yue Yang can steer.

If Heavenly Sword Goddess were to use it, then the power of the Chixiaolian Sword would be like the sun.

Chixiaolian sword has no flame. It owns a brand new kind of energy generated from the extremity of the Yang ability. Unlike the black Guizang Sword and the white Shuanghua sword, for now, even if Yue Yang used all his strength, he could only condense an Chixiaolian sword at the size of a chopstick.

“Whoa whoa!” When Yue Yang’s innate energy was almost exhausted, he finally stopped condensing the Chixiaolian sword. His body was drenched in sweat and was completely soaked in heavy clothes.

“Let’s take a break!” Yue Yu summoned a healing water ball to help Yue Yang recover from his tiredness. Then, she used a handkerchief to gently wipe away the sweat on his forehead. Her movements were as gentle as the wind.

“What kind of battle skill is this?” “It looks strange …” “It looks strange …” Raging Flame threw an apple into her mouth, and immediately started chewing on the apple with a straightforward manner that no ordinary woman would have. By her side, the Drunken Cat Sister was dumbfounded, and the cute girl Niu who used a knife to peel an apple for her mother blinked her big eyes—Can we eat apple in such a boorish manner?

“Could I trouble you to change the word ‘strange’ to ‘magical’?” Yue Yang extended his hand to Niu Niu. The Panda Girl looked at her mother and saw that mom had no objection. She thus handed him the peeled apple, then quickly took another apple and cut peel it for her mother.

“How old are you? You’re still stealing food from a child.” Drunken Cat Sister didn’t mind, but she insisted on fighting Yue Yang.

“Niu Niu, go wash another plate of grapes for us later. Oh right, we need to cool the grapes off before eating!” Yue Yang students often use Niu Niu work, but the panda is also very happy.

“Aha.” Yue Yu saw this funny scene and felt very warm.

During the break, the Midnight Empress came later.

As usual, Yue Yang’s senses were greatly increased due to his invisibility, but he had already sensed her presence when she was still very far away.

When Midnight Empress saw Yue Yang standing up and waiting for her, she was slightly surprised. “So your level has been upgraded? I was about to bring you along to take a look, now it seems that I could leave you alone to solve this matter!”

Yue Yang was surprised. What was going on?

Upon hearing the words of the Midnight Empress, even Yue Yu and the Drunken Cat Sister became nervous.

Midnight Empress’ voice was still graceful and calm as she explained to Yue Yang, “The mercenary group that the Ancient Devil King got in the Heaven Realm, perhaps they have come to Tongtian Tower before. They also have some intelligence that secretly sneaked to the periphery of the Gods’ Ruins without the Ancient Devil King knowing.” These guys are very unscrupulous. After a few days, they have been circling around the Gods’ Ruins. Although they can’t get anything, this kind of arrogant behavior is irritating, so I decided to teach them a lesson. "

“What?” Yue Yang was also furious. To him, the Gods’ Ruins was the equivalent of his family’s treasure trove. How dare these guys think about the Gods’ Ruins?

“Two days ago, Zhi Zun and I were in closed-door training. I didn’t expect these fellows to be so arrogant.” The Midnight Empress’ melodious voice turned serious, “So I wanted to go with you, but now that you’ve broken through, I’ll let you try the sabre. I’ll leave those guys in your hands.” “It’s possible that the ones on the outside will escape, but those two inside, don’t let them out. The Gods’ Ruins are not something any random dog or cat can covet. We have to teach them a lesson.”

“Understood!” Yue Yang’s hands were itching to try out the power of the Chixiaolian sword. These guys could be considered to have bumped into some good days.

“I’ll go as well…” When the female giant Raging Flame heard that there was a fight, she quickly jumped up and volunteered to fight.

chapters.title: Chapter 693 – Pick It Up, Pauper
chapters.body:
Chapter 693 – Pick It Up, Pauper

Chapter 693 Pick it up, Pauper

Out of the Gods’ Ruins, the periphery.

Ever since they entered the Canyon of Death, Ye Xiao, Zi Guang, Yue Su and Bei all felt that something wasn’t right.

Particularly after opening the secret door and venturing into the ‘guiding temple’ which was said to be inspired by the legendary ‘God of Wisdom’, his two extraordinary companions, Wo Gua and Gu Deng, had left for good. Four days later, when there was no news of them, they felt even more uneasy. With their strength, unless it was some sort of special terrain, no one would be able to kill them in the entire Tong Tian Tower unless he was Zhi Zun. However, Zhi Zun had been in closed-door seclusion for nearly a month. It was impossible for her to know that someone had sneak into the Gods’ Ruins, and this operation was very secret, so no one knew about it.

Wo Gua and Gu Deng, they worked together. Even if they met an ancient demon beast, they were believed that they would be able to escape unscathed even if they weren’t its match.

The two of them also knew that it was impossible for them to obtain the benefits of Gods’ Ruins.

Without any external interference, not only would they not die in battle, they didn’t even show any selfishness, but the two of them had strangely disappeared.

What did this mean?

Could it be that they had been imprisoned by some mechanism, or had violated some sort of law and been killed by the ruling power? If not, why were they three days late when they agreed to come out in one day? Should the people outside continue to enter or leave? The longer one stayed outside of the Gods’ Ruins, the more dangerous it was!

Except Zhi Zun who had been in secluded meditation for an unknown period of times, the remnants of the destructive power that remained after the war between the Gods continued to interact with each other, transforming into an unfathomable sight.

Staying in this area for too long was a very unwise act.

“There are no more demon beasts today. Even the chirping of insects has disappeared.” Zi Guang let out a slight sigh. "Looks like danger is nigh. Captain, make your decision! Shall we go in or leave? "

“We’ve waited for three days, and we’ve done our best.” Yue Su was also aware that the surroundings were completely silent. It was deathly silent, and her heart was in a mess.

“Agreed.” A quiet voice came from Bei, expressing its stance.

“If it’s not a powerful enemy, then it’s a force of destruction that has swept through this place. If not for my sensing error, the time needed to arrive at the danger would have been less than ten minutes.” Zi Guang pointed towards the horizon. In the sky, there were several beams of light that shot out from the clouds like a whale absorbing water. Along with the change in the sky, hundreds of tornadoes appeared everywhere for no reason. Thunder exploded in the distance, and from time to time, a spatial rift would appear, devouring any objects it touched.

“Even if I had to face difficulties and abandon my teammates, I am not willing. Their lives？just leave it to God!”

Ye Xiao took out a tortoise shell.

His fingers tapped gently on it.

He knocked three times.

He then slowly took out an ancient coin and let it rotate on the tortoise shell.

When the ancient coin stopped moving, he picked up the fallen coin and carefully examined the patterns of the coin and the turtle shell. A thin, diagonal cross was a sign of this.

After Ye Xiao and Zi Guang looked at each other, their expressions changed and they shook their heads.

This was the sign of great danger.

“Retreat quickly.” Ye Xiao no longer persisted in his decision. Although his divination talent could only be used once every three months, it was very accurate. Although he could not determine the consequences of this ominous omen, staying here to wait for Wo Gua and Gu Deng would be extremely stupid. It was very likely that the Zhi Zun had already received the news and had ended his seclusion and was in the midst of coming over.

When they left, Yue Yang came out of a tornado and looked at the sky where the four of them had left with pity.

If he had the strength, he believed that these four fellows wouldn’t be able to escape.

It was not difficult to kill one of them, but it would be tricky to kill all. After all, these guys were all frightened birds, and once they appeared, they would immediately split up and escape.

Yue Yang thought about it again and again and decided to endure it for the time being.

He pretended that he didn’t know that they had been here, and that he was looking for the next opportunity to kill them.

Right now, he was going to enter the guiding temple and kill those trapped in there, Wo Gua and Gu Deng. With the road map that Queen Night had indicated, the machine-operated guiding temple was not that danger. For the two mercenaries of Heaven Realm who were trapped in the cave, Wo Gua and Gu Deng, he would use them to test his sword and test the might of his red sword!

Inside the guiding temple.

To be exact, Wo Gua and Gu Deng had yet to truly reach the main hall of the guiding temple.

They had wasted too much of their time in the endless secret passages, traps and the Ancient Evil Spirits that appeared from time to time.

One secret passage after another that would never end, Evil Spirit Tombs that would never end, rune and crystal columns that one would never be able to understand … Strange and unfathomable things, since entering the secret door, not uncommon, Wo Gua and Go Deng, have become numb. Sometimes, when they went down a secret passage, they found themselves in front of a vast ocean; sometimes, when they passed through a tomb, they found a hot volcano behind it. Sometimes, as they walked, they would suddenly disappear and the road would block them. Other traps would activate and bring the intruder into the endless abyss. Below the abyss, there were endless Evil Spirits of ancient times waiting for the intruder.

These ancient Evil Spirits could never truly be killed.

If they were smashed to smithereens, they would immediately recover completely.

An evil soul without any rational consciousness, perpetually bearing the curse, that, apart from crying and repenting, instinctively shreds the intruder into pieces and becomes its companion.

“What the hell! No wonder the martial artists of Tong Tian Tower didn’t try to enter! This isn’t a place that can be conquered by force!” Wo Gua like a giant had suffered a lot in the secret passageway. He was an offensive warrior. Whether it was warbeasts or battle skills, his focus was on strength and attacks. He was not the only one who would fight in such a special environment. If he did not possess the strength of a peak fourth level Heaven stage master, he would have long since turned into food for the countless Ancient Era’s Evil Spirits that could never be killed.

“Calm down, you’ve never heard of it. The greater the difficulty, the greater the reward?” “If it was easy, would the guiding shrine still have treasures left for us?” Instead of Wo Gua, Gu Den is better at fighting in the special environment, and I believe he would have been more relaxed if he hadn’t been dragged down by Wo Gua.

“Perhaps there is no guiding shrine at all. That is a lie. Even if we roamed around here for a lifetime, we wouldn’t be able to find it!”

Wo Gua was complaining.

However, it was impossible for him to give up now.

It was not easy for him to make it here. If he didn’t get anything out of it, he definitely wouldn’t go out.

Did the time already exceed the agreement with Captain Ye Xiao? That was no problem at all. Besides, they were already late for their return. Besides, they might not even make it back the same way they came …

After passing by a rune crystal pillar that no one could understand, Wuden and Gu Den, at the end of the secret passage, saw a huge tomb.

Endless corpse-worms and skeletons were inside the tomb, as well as the Stone Ghost Bat and the ancient cacodemon.

Even though they knew it was all in there, they still didn’t want to give up searching.

Perhaps there was a secret passage leading to the guiding shrine.

So many tombs had been ransacked. If they missed this, they would go crazy if they missed the real secret pathway that led to the guiding shrine! Wo Gua and Gu Deng suppressed the urge to vomit. They summoned their warbeasts and slaughtered all the monsters here. Even those ancient cacodemon that could never be killed were driven away by the wild grass dance song of the plant warbeast.

Search carefully, the result is depressing.

The tomb was completely empty. Other than the sarcophagus, there was also the sarcophagus …

The other exit of the teleportation circle was the endless desert, filled with yellow sand and filled with raging winds. It was another unit world.

“Roar! I swear that once I find a treasure, it will be a small piece of magic crystal. I will leave in satisfaction and never find anything to guide me to the guiding shrine.” The Wo Gua roared in anger. He couldn’t take it anymore and wanted to leave, but he couldn’t bear to leave the mountain of treasures empty-handed.

“Let’s continue!” Gu Deng’s face was gloomy. He held in his breath, determined to find the guiding shrine.

When they returned to the secret path, a small piece of extremely pure magic crystal appeared in front of them, giving off a faint blue glow.

Wo Gua happily picked it up and cheered, “Sure enough, there’s a treasure. Heavens, although this magic crystal doesn’t have much energy, it’s very pure. It’s simply the most pure magic crystal I’ve ever seen in my life.” “The guiding shrine really does exist. Quickly, let’s set off. We have to loot the guiding shrine and take down all the treasures. The Gods’ Ruins, all the treasures, god blood and martial souls, all belong to us!”

Gu Deng not showing any sign of excitement, however, Gu Deng revealed a cold look. “Wo Gua, there were no magic crystals just now.”

Wo Gua was confused. Wasn’t this clearly showing off the magic crystal?

Gu Deng snorted coldly and said, “Someone is following us …” “Just now, he heard everything we said. That’s why he threw down the magic crystals and told us to retreat.”

“In your dreams, no matter who it is, you must not leave to guiding shrine. No one can let me leave.”

Wo Gua looked around, searching for hidden enemies.

Who was following him?

Was it an enemy, a friend?

At the corner of the secret passageway, a female giant with a head full of flames like a raging inferno strode over.

Her strength was enough to cause the corners of Wo Gua and Gu Deng’s eyes to twitch. She was a heaven stage level fifth.

Wo Gua and Gu Deng do almost the same thing, and that’s fast.

He retreated back into the enormous tomb like an arrow. It was a foolish act to fight this female giant, who was at the fifth level of Heaven stage, in a relatively narrow secret passageway. Even those who were known for their brute force felt a chill in their hearts when they saw the explosive power of the other party. This female giant was very similar to him. She was most likely an attack-type heaven stage expert. Fighting her head on was exactly what her opponent was good at!

“If you hadn’t said it earlier, you guys wouldn’t have requested so much and casually picked up a magic crystal and left. That would have allowed me to throw a few more magic crystals so that you can return satisfied. You don’t have to fight so hard.” When Wo Gua and Gu Deng returned to the huge tomb, they found a man wearing a platinum level strange mask. It was unknown when he had been waiting for them.

Ding.

Another pure crystal flew out from his hand.

It bounced to the feet of Wo Gua.

The masked guy’s eyes shone with a taunting glint, as if he was saying: Pick it up, beggar!

Wo Gua’s face darkened, full of anger.

Gu Deng sucked in a breath of cold air. So the magic crystal was thrown by this masked guy, what did that mean? After he heard the trembling of Wo Gua, he first threw a magic crystal outside, played with the Wo Gua and then sneakily returned, waiting for him and the Wo Gua inside the tomb. There was only one secret passage, and he could freely come and go in front of her, making her completely unaware of him … Ignoring all else, just with this ability to conceal himself, he could not be underestimated!

chapters.title: Chapter 694 – Maha Elephant And Six-Armed Giant Demon
chapters.body:
Chapter 694 – Maha Elephant And Six-Armed Giant Demon

Chapter 694 Maha Elephant and Six-Armed Giant Demon

“Pretentious. Do you think wearing a stupid mask can scare people off?” Wo Gua discovered that the masked man wasn’t very strong, just that his movement technique was a bit strange, causing no pressure on his level or cultivation realm. From this, it could be determined that the opponent’s level was lower than his. It was likely either a Heaven Stage level 2 or 3. Those people in lower level or even a Heaven Stage with a special warbeast wouldn’t scare him at all.

Amongst the members of the first battle team formed by Ye Xiao, the strongest warbeast was not the one named Yong Hui who was known to never die.

Neither Yue Su, an expert in aerial combat.

It wasn’t even the resourceful Zi Guang and Captain Ye Xiao, but himself!

In comparison to powerful warbeasts, although there were many special warbeasts own by Gu Deng, but their strength was actually inferior to his… If there weren’t so many powerful warbeasts, why would Ye Xiao and Zi Guang agree to let him join?

As long as there was enough space, there was no need to even mention a masked guy under Heaven Stage level 3.

Even that female giant of Heaven Stage level 5 was no match for him. Especially before coming to Tong Tian Tower, in order to ensure success, his master had gifted him Maha elephant of Heaven Stage level 5 to protect him. With this Maha, let alone Tong Tian Tower, he could even dominate the Western Heaven Realm for a time! Although there were many warbeasts in the Heaven Realm, how many of them were at the fifth level or above?

“Be careful.” Gu Deng didn’t dare to underestimate Yue Yang. He urgently reminded Wo Gua, " A long delay means many hitches. Hurry up and finish this fight!"

What he meant was to have the Wo Gua immediately summon the Maha Elephant, and then go all out with all his might!

The masked guy and the female giant were not experts in the intelligence reports.

And yet, his strength was extraordinary.

If Zhi Zun and Queen Night were to catch up, the consequences would be unimaginable … Gu Deng did not know if the Zhi Zun and Queen Nightl already knew the secret of this operation, but he knew that if they came, Ye Xiao and his companions would definitely not clash head-on with Zhi Zun.

He immediately summoned his strongest warbeast. Even if he couldn’t kill this masked guy, he still had to quickly get rid of him.

In the underground tomb of the guiding temple, he was completely unfamiliar with the terrain and was at a disadvantage when compared to his opponent.

In other words, their side had already lost all interest!

This was extremely dangerous. He had to get out of this predicament as soon as possible …

“No matter who you are, whether you are a guardian of the divine palace or someone from Tong Tian Tower, in the end you will die!” Wo Gua didn’t summon out the Maha Elephant. Instead, he summoned its own Six-Armed Giant Demon of Heaven Stage level 6. This was his former strongest warbeast. In a frontal battle, it was almost invincible. It was only when the Maha Elephant of Heaven Stage level 5 appeared that the Six Armed Giant Demon had no choice but to rank second.

Six-Armed Giant Demon: gold level 10 (equivalent to third level of the Heaven Stage), enhanced giant warbeast. Fifty meters tall, it has two different forms of combat. Three heads and six arms, copper skin and iron bones, copper head and iron arms. Special Technique: Stun Hammer, continuously burst Seismic Wave.

When the fifty-meter-long Six-Armed Giant Demon was summoned, even the female giant Raging Flame, frowned for a moment.

She had encountered this kind of warbeast before, and it was extremely difficult to fight against.

Possessing a copper skin and an iron bone, it was unafraid of violent blows. Furthermore, its recovery rate was extremely high. Even if it was severely injured, it would be able to recover in a short period of time. According to that brat Yue Yang, the Six-Armed Giant Demon was one of the strongest warbeasts in the Heaven Realm that could not be killed. Their reputations were inferior to the Ancient Slaughterers. The main culprit was that the Ancient Slaughterer had an Ancient Slayer King of Heaven Stage level 5. Furthermore, the Ancient Slaughter Clan was mostly known as the central temple’s fighters.

Or rather, infamous.

The discovery of the Six-Armed Giant Demon made Raging Flames a bit wary.

It seemed these two Heaven Realm mercenaries who dared to barge into the temple were not kind people.

“Let me do it!” Raging Flames was afraid that Yue Yang wouldn’t know how powerful the Six-Armed Giant Demon was, so she stepped forward and decided to change her original plan and fight against it.

“I’m not afraid of you …” Wo Gua felt a bit of boldness for himself. After all, Raging Flames was an expert of Heaven Stage level 5. She could suppress an expert at his peak fourth level of Heaven Stage like him. If he fought Yue Yang, Wo Gua wouldn’t have such a psychological burden, and he would be able to sweep away him easily.

On the surface, he looked like a fool. In fact, even Wo Gua was a very rough person.

Otherwise, his lord wouldn’t have sent such a foolish person to Tong Tian Tower to search for treasures.

As Raging Flame approached step by step, he desperately summoned the warbeast, as if he didn’t need money. He first summoned the Demon Bear of Heaven Stage level 1 to support him, then he summoned the rock giant of the same level to double the defense of his body. Because flying was the last thing he was good at and in order to prevent the opponent from taking advantage of this weakness, Wo Gua summoned a Manticore of Heaven Stage to enhance his body’s agility and flying ability. Before Raging Flame arrived, he even summoned a Flying Stone Demon of Heaven Stage and a Thunder Toad of Earth Stage level 8 to support him.

Now, Wo Gua’s body had become very strange.

There was the skin of a magical bear, the arms of a rock giant, the wings of a manticore, the body of a stone demon, and the face of a toad.

“Haa!”

No matter how many warbeasts you had, the way Raging Flame fought was the same. It was a heavy punch.

A punch that carried the power of an ancient dragon landed heavily on the Wo Gua’s bulging belly. The fist and the belly collided. The shockwave caused the entire tomb to shake. However, what made the flame burn was that even after receiving a full force punch from him, this coward didn’t even take a single step back.

Even an extremely large heavenly mammoth would immediately topple to the ground upon taking such a punch.

Even a small mountain would also collapse under such a heavy punch.

Wo Gua was actually forcefully received it with just its body?

Raging flame was stunned. Her face was filled with disbelief. Her punch was useless?

“Heh, it seems like the fifth level of the heaven stage is only mediocre!” “Six Armed Giant Demon, second strengthening fusion.” Squash was at a loss for words. The punch just now had nearly caused him to vomit out his internal organs. He tried his best to swallow the blood back down his throat. Thankfully, the other party did not have any warbeast support, otherwise he would not have been able to hold on. In order to prevent the other party from seeing that he was strong enough to support himself, Wo Gua hurriedly ordered the Six Armed Giant Demon to fuse with him and strengthen himself.

The 50 meters long six-armed Giant Demon turned into a thick black light that rapidly fused with the Wo Gua.

The huge body of Wo Gua’s immediately grew in size.

It was only when he reached 10 meters did he finally stop. Under his arms, four more Giant Demon arms grew out, forming six arms. However, they did not grow any heads. After a third level heaven stage Six-Armed Giant Demon’s maximum support and rising to a 10 meters high Wo Gua, whether it was strength or defense, it had increased by tenfold.

Now, his confidence had greatly increased.

The heavy punch tore through the air like a roaring thunder, attacking towards the face of the Raging flames.

The Raging flames were fearless as they punched out with all their might …

Terrifying fists collided and erupted in an instant. That power spread outwards from the center of the two’s fists. Ten meters away, all the rocks and soil vanished into nothingness. Even the pillars of the tomb behind them shattered on the spot, collapsing with a loud bang. The heavy stone coffins, which had been used to store the bones, were sent flying hundreds of meters into the air.

For the first time, flame sent the enemy flying with pure force.

She was sent flying twenty meters away, trying to stand up, but she couldn’t help it. She staggered back a few steps before finally stopping.

On the opposite side, the ten-meters-tall Wo Gua didn’t even take a single step back.

Just his big feet sinking into the ground.

When the two were compared, the victor was decided.

Although flame still couldn’t believe it, the truth told her that the her, who had been dominating the Southern Heaven Realm with her brute force, had been defeated for the first time!

“Again!” Captain Raging Flame was enraged. She definitely wouldn’t allow others to use their strength to suppress her.

“Hey, didn’t you say you would listen to me? Step down!” How could Yue Yang let her act recklessly? He immediately shouted to stop her recklessness. Raging Flame stared angrily at Yue Yang. She was extremely displeased. Right now, she was the one who had reversed the situation, so how could he stop her? However, when she saw Yue Yang’s pair of cold eyes, she suddenly woke up. Under his gaze, she even retreated a little in protest. “Alright, I only heard you say that one time. I could have done it alone, this fellow only has the brute force of a warbeast. There’s nothing special about him!”

Yue Yang watched her as she retreated and summoned the Bull Shadow from the Book World.

As soon as Ah Man appeared, she immediately strode towards the ten-metesr tall Wo Gua.

Wo Gua let out a maniacal laugh.

While laughing, Ah Man waved her hand and easily blocked the incoming fist attack. With a shake of her power, Ah Man was pushed back dozens of meters like an arrow, even further away than Captain Raging Flame.

But Ah Man was even more skillful than Captain Raging Flame. He somersaulted three times in the air to eliminate the shock and landed gracefully beside Yue Yang.

Yue Yang had successively added three giant shadows to her.

Gu Deng’s eyes twitched.

This, isn’t this guy’s warbeast way too abnormal? If this continued, wouldn’t that be terrible?

Ah Man rushed towards Wo Gua again, punching each other. The result was still better than before … This time, Ah Man, who had only retreated fifteen meters, returned to Yue Yang’s side. Yue Yang gave her two giant shadows.

“Haa!”

He did not use any special moves, but only threw out a punch with all his might.

Wo Gua hurriedly welcomed him with all her might.

Compared to the full power of flame just now, the momentum was even sharper. The entire tomb chamber shook crazily, several pillars snapped, and the ground seemed to shatter.

As the ear-splitting collision occurred, what caused Gu Deng’s back to be covered in cold sweat was the fact that the two of them had both taken a step back.

It was actually a draw. The two’s strength was already at a stalemate.

No.

Gu Deng found that Wo Gua was a little different.

At this moment, Wo Gua’s expression was extremely ugly, it was a bluish-purple colour … Wa, Wo Gua couldn’t help but throw up with his mouth wide open.

Countless stomach fluids and food scraps gushed out of his mouth.

He had actually let his opponent throw up in one punch!

Even though it missed his chest, the boxing aura passed through the defense and seeped into his abdomen. With the protection of the thunder toad, Earth Demonic Bear and other warbeasts, even Wo Gua couldn’t hold on much longer, causing Ah Man to vomit on the spot. After spitting out all the acid in his stomach, he painfully straightened his back, wiped his mouth and said with a snort, “I just ate too much. Spitting less now is much more comfortable.”

However, he didn’t die until the end. He immediately summoned the heaven stage fifth level Maha Elephant.

He had used his final trump card!

chapters.title: Chapter 695 – Big Guy Has Great Intelligence?
chapters.body:
Chapter 695 – Big Guy Has Great Intelligence?

C695 - Big guy has great intelligence?

The blue light flashed.

In an instant, the entire tomb chamber became a sea of blue, causing the skin of the people present to turn deep blue.

A sapphire blue cloud rose into the air and quickly condensed.

Following that, a special chirping sound rang out. It was like the screech of a mammoth or the roar of a giant dragon. It had a different kind of majesty to it. Before the Maha Elephant appeared, its fierce aura had already filled the entire tomb. Female giant Raging Flame was afraid that Yue Yang would be attacked, so she quickly came to his side, pulling back her stance and secretly taking precautions in case the Maha Elephant launched a sneak attack.

At this moment, Gu Deng’s face was filled with joy.

Although the enemy had a expert of Heaven Stage level 5 and another powerful warbeast, he still had a Six-Armed Giant Demon and a Maha Elephant supporting him. Three against two should be enough for him to win.

The only problem was the masked guy who was fast and skilled at concealment.

Even if he won, he probably wouldn’t keep the masked guy.

In the center of the tomb, there was a huge sapphire blue elephant that was as big as a castle. It appeared in front of Yue Yang.

The two tusks were the most terrifying weapons in the world. As for the four indescribably thick legs, it would make people understand one thing. No matter what kind of warbeast it was, if it stepped on it, it would most likely die miserably. Compared to the pillar that supported the tomb, the elephant leg was like a tree trunk compared with chopsticks. It was so thick that it made one sigh.

Maha Elephant: Platinum level 10 (Heaven Stage level 5), super huge ancient warbeast. It has special physique, boundless strength, medium intelligence. After enrage, it can emit a second battle form with special abilities: Capture, Whip, Strangle, Charge, and Repeat.

After seeing the Maha Elephant with Insight of Heaven, this time, Yue Yang also frowned.

Anything else was fine.

This elephant actually possessed middle intelligence.

The most terrifying thing about warbeasts wasn’t their high level, nor was it their huge size, but their intelligence.

Fortunately, the Maha Elephant wasn’t a Dacred Beast. Otherwise, it would have been even harder to gnaw on. Its height of eighty meters was even larger than an ordinary castle. It would be a bit difficult to shake such a big guy. However, for Yue Yang, the greater the challenge, the greater the reward. Just in time for the lack of such a beast trainer, Yue Yang looked at the eager Captain Raging Flames beside him and shook his head: “No, you don’t deserve it!”

“You want to fight?” The female giant was sweating profusely. She sized up Yue Yang’s body, and then looked at the castle-like Maha Elephant. She couldn’t help but swallow a mouthful of saliva. “Cough!”

Ah Man first on behalf of Yue Yang as a pioneer probe.

Unlike when she was fighting against Wo Gua, she leaped up like lightning. Using her palm as a blade, she slashed down with a profound battle skill.

Mountain and river were shaken with one chop.

A normal warbeast couldn’t resist her attack. With Ah Man’s current intelligence, if she used a battle skill, it wouldn’t be something an ordinary warbeast could withstand. Even a warbeast of Heaven Stage level could only choose to take the blows head on, or use its speed to dodge. Ah Man rarely used battle skills and had always maintained her ambushes. Few people thought that she could use such a profound battle skill.

Whoosh!

The long nose of the Maha Elephant swung out with incomparable agility.

Slash Ah Man’s body into the mid-air, at the moment her palm landed on its long nose.

It swung its nose and threw her far away. In the eyes of the Raging Flame, not even a second had passed. She flew away like an arrow and heavily fell into the wall of the tomb.

Rumble!

The walls had collapsed into a mass of bricks and stones, and the tomb was shaking and the ceiling was cracked and the cracks in the ground were spreading like spiderwebs.

Raging Flame’ eyes bulged out in surprise.

She felt that she couldn’t do such a straightforward counterattack that was as beautiful as the Maha Elephant … Could it be that she was inferior to it? As Raging Flame saw the light in the Maha Elephant’s eyes, she felt as if it was mocking her. She was even angrier. It was fine if this brat Yue Yang bullied her, but how could a mere elephant dare to look down on her? She ignored Yue Yang’s attempts to stop her. The dragon power of her entire body erupted, and her fiery flames danced in the air, as if she were carrying a raging inferno. She punched out at the Maha Elephant.

Pah!

As Raging Flame continued to soar through the air, she discovered the Maha Elephant swinging its long nose.

A huge force hit her, and Raging Flame found that she was flying backwards involuntarily, instantly overtaking Yue Yang’s body. Following the trajectory of Ah Man, she broke several pillars that supported the tomb, also heavily hitting the wall, sinking…

“Hahaha!”

Wo Gua was laughing so hard that his tears were gushing forth.

He shouted at Yue Yang, “Idiot, the Maha Elephant is invincible in land battle. Do you think there are any other warbeasts in the world that can fight against it? You know how smart it is? Besides not being able to speak, it was even smarter than a human being! Do you know how flexible his nose is? You can do it with your hands, it can make it done with its nose and even better!”

At this moment, a hint of a smile returned to Gu Deng’s face.

However, he was different from Wo Gua.

He would not relax until the final victory.

After the Mahe Elephant had sent Ah Man and Raging Flame flying, Gu Deng still maintained his vigilance. Moreover, he wouldn’t stop there either. On the contrary, he wanted to take advantage of this opportunity to wipe out his enemies!

Gu Deng quietly summoned his various warbeasts. This was a plant warbeast that could attack rival’s mentality. It had been weak at beginning, but once it reached the Heaven Stage, it would become the enemy’s nightmare. Its spiritual attack was an unstoppable killing machine. As soon as it began to dance, the enemy would have a splitting headache, until finally he could bear it no longer and died with his head blown off.

Apart from the madly dancing grass at the first level of the Heaven Stage, Gu Deng also summoned the second level heaven stage Black Demon.

In addition to having a powerful battle strength, this Black Demon also possessed an extremely powerful mental force field. It could search for enemies and torture them within its mental force field.

Gu Deng was afraid that the mask guy would flee, so he chose the Quasi-Heaven-stage Nighthawk as his third warbeast.

The Quasi-Heaven stage Nighthawk had an extremely strong tracking ability …

Of course, Gu Deng did not fully expect it to work. After all, he felt that the pressure exerted by the mask guy was greater than that of the female giant.

As for the fourth warbeast, Gu Deng chose a third level heaven-stage Earthquake Dragon. Although it wasn’t of the dragon race, the Earthquake Dragon was still an extremely massive war beast, similar to the six-armed Giant Demon and the Mahe Treasure Elephant. Although its body was nearly the same size as the Mahe Treasure Elephant, its combat strength was far inferior to even the six-armed Giant Demon. The only good thing about it was that it had the special ability of devouring and chewing enemies. If it could activate the special ability and swallow that female giant into its mouth for a while, then the battle would definitely be won.

There was another point. The Earthquake Dragon and the Mahe Treasure Elephant’s bodies were both extremely massive.

In this small tomb, it was very advantageous.

Wherever the countless enemies went, they would be easily attacked. As for himself and the Wo Gua, as long as they were in charge of sealing the exit, it would be fine.

“Come on, you, the guy in the mask, use your dirty tricks!” “Haha, no matter how hard you struggle, it’s useless. You will die here!” With the Maha Treasure Elephant, Gu Deng had already summoned the Black Demon and Earthquake Dragon. With the addition of his own strength that combined with the six-armed Giant Demon, no matter how the enemy fought, they wouldn’t have a chance of winning.

“Just these few moves?” Yue Yang’s lips curved up in a mysterious smile: “It seems powerful on the surface, but it’s nothing more than an insignificant skill!”

“Nonsense!” Wo Gua flew towards Yue Yang, ready to beat him down.

What was waiting for him was a black muzzle.

The muzzle began to accumulate energy.

Noticing that the situation was bad, he braced himself. Holding onto his body which had steel skin and bones, he swung his fist towards Yue Yang and Ika, determined not to retreat.

Gu Deng, however, did not want his companion to suffer this loss. His body was like a bolt of lightning as he crashed into the Wo Gua’s waist.

Bam him violently out of the firing trajectory of the muzzle…

A terrifying energy pillar swept across the sky. Everywhere it passed by, all matter turned into nothingness.

His scalp was lightly rubbed by the beam of energy. His head was full of black hair, almost turning into a bald man. Some of his remaining hair was smoking miserably. Wo Gua’s jaw dropped to the ground. His eyes looked as if he had seen a ghost. His skin had been strengthened by many warbeasts, but he couldn’t even resist the outer perimeter of the energy beam? He reached out to touch the side of his head where the bloody hole had disappeared and stared blankly at the blood on his hand. After a long while, he muttered, “That’s impossible. I have the strengthening of the six-armed Giant Demon, how could I possibly be injured?”

What shocked him the most was that his wound did not immediately recover.

Normally, the wound would have disappeared in less than a second, but now there was no sign of healing.

BOOOOOMMM! BOOOOAA!

The Mahe Treasure Elephant and the Earthquake Dragon rushed forward.

If their master was in trouble, they would naturally not sit idly by.

After fighting the red dragonfly, Ika’s movements were now a hundred times faster than before, faster than lightning. Even the nose wielded by the Maha Elephant was unable to capture her body. In fact, she could even play with her opponents and intentionally fly around in front of the Maha Treasure Elephant.

This was all because of the movement technique he had comprehended during the battle. It was impossible for Ika to do such a thing before the terrifying speed of the red dragonfly.

Although the Mahe Treasure Elephant also has the special ability to capture, but compared with the red dragonfly?

Too far!

Now, deep reflection, and Ika learned to use the Super speed and mysterious three recruit form Yue Yang, he could fight to red dragonfly again. It was still a bit difficult to fight against a heaven-stage, fifth-level heaven-stage treasure like the Maha Elephant, but he could still use his movement to play with his opponent. Previously, the red dragonfly was not very powerful, but it made it impossible for her to make a move. This was the advantage of speed.

“Don’t worry about that girl. Just kill that masked guy!” Wo Gua found that it wasn’t wise for the Mahe Treasure Elephant to compete with a flying war beast. No matter what, the best way to do battle was to attack the master of the battle beast.

“Pfft, don’t think that you’re the only one who owns a giant, mine is even smarter!” Yue Yang called out the giant loli from the Grimoire World.

Pu pu … Upon seeing that it was an ancient Titan, Gu Deng immediately sprayed water in fright. This, this brat was too arrogant, right? He actually had the help of an ancient Titan?

chapters.title: Chapter 696 – Bow Of The Wings
chapters.body:
Chapter 696 – Bow Of The Wings

C696 - Bow of the Wings

The moment the giant Loli appeared, she immediately flipped the Earthquake Dragon onto the ground.

Maha Elephant and Earthquake Dragon, though massive in size, paled in comparison to her more than two hundred meters.

The only advantage of their body size was that they were overweight. Even if their height wasn’t high enough, they could still barely be classified as super huge warbeasts. Of course, it was impossible for them to compete with the giant ancient warbeasts like the luxurious space cruise ships — the Ancient Demon Sharks, the Cuttlefish King and the Dragon Electric Eel. The Earthquake Dragon belonged to the sub-dragon race. Perhaps in the time of the Progenitor, it had continued to possess a bit of dragon blood. However, its physique and strength was vastly inferior to a true ancient dragon! The Maha Elephant was the same. In Yue Yang’s Insight of Heaven, he could see that this Maha Elephant didn’t have such a massive body. Rather, it had obtained the blood of some sort of Divine Beast, and after fusing it, it had increased its size and strength.

The Maha Elephant used its nose to wrap around the giant Loli’s calves. It wanted to flip her over and stomp on her four feet.

“Haa!”

The giant Loli angrily rebuked.

She leaned over and grabbed the fangs of the Maha Elephant.

The power of both arms exploded out, directly tilting the Maha Elephant’s huge body to the side. Even when the opponent was overturned, the Earthquake Dragon charged over and crashed into the giant Loli’s other side, knocking her out of balance.

After the giant Loli was attacked, she staggered back a few steps before regaining her balance.

This time, she was even more enraged. She grabbed onto the Earthquake Dragon’s neck, flipped over, and then rode on top of it, swinging her fist and violently punching it, until the Earthquake Dragon screamed again and again. The Elephant waved its trunk and nimbly wrapped its arms around her wrist, pulling her down from the dragon’s back to rescue its plight. The giant little Loli leaped up, taking advantage of the momentum and tumbling down the Earthquake Dragon’s back. With a flying kick, she crazily kicked the Elephant’s head …

The fight between the three of them was even more terrifying than the collapse of heaven and earth.

The tomb chamber quickly collapsed, it was impossible for it to support this kind of battle. Everywhere the three big guys passed, nothing could stop them.

“God, this is terrible!” Captain Raging Flame, who had jumped out from the rubble, was also stunned when she saw this scene. Although she was confident in her own strength, compared to the three big guys in front of her, it was incomparable.

Either body size or strength, they were all existences on different levels.

Giant Loli as an ancient Titan Royal, although she was currently fighting alone, she was not at a disadvantage when facing two opponents.

She was over 200 meters tall, and she had a great advantage in height over the Maha Elephant and Earthquake Dragon. However, the Maha Elephant and Earthquake Dragon’s bodies were simply too massive, and their tonnage was too heavy. In addition, the two of them had the advantage of numbers and ranks. In a stalemate, victory and defeat were difficult to determine.

“Go to hell!” Wo Gua discovered that Maha elephant of Heaven Stage level 5 was even stronger than he had imagined. With the assistance of an Earthquake Dragon, even if the other party had an ancient Titan, they would still be able to fight to the end.

He rushed toward the Raging Flame, which were still standing, with six huge arms struck out like raindrops.

He rushed towards the face of the Raging Flame.

Wo Gua’s appearance was simple and honest, but in fact he was thick and thin, very thoughtful.

There was a reason why he chose Raging Flame who was in higher level. Now he could see that the female giant had strength but no warbeast to assist her. When he fought with her, he held the advantage. The masked guy was different. His warbeasts were endless, and he was at a disadvantage in a battle against such a perverted fellow. He decided to let his companion Gu Deng fight the masked guy, and he would be responsible for suppressing this giant female.

“I would be afraid of you?” When it came to head-on clashing, Raging Flame were always unafraid.

Raging flame punched out, clashing head on with Wo Gua.

While she was using her movement technique, she was still spinning around Wo Gua that was below her at this speed.

Her temper was stubborn, but she was definitely not a fool. In a situation where her strength was similar, she did not fight to the bitter end with warbeasts, but used her agility and speed to deal with them.

On the other side, Black Demon and Ah Man also started fighting.

Not only did the Black Demon possess powerful strength, it was also adept at attacking with its mind. Within the mental force field with its body as the center, all the opponents would constantly be impacted by its spirit. If it was before the battle against the Wry Face Mushroom, Ah Man would find it difficult to resist this kind of spiritual attack, which was anywhere at any time. Right now, her spiritual defense had increased by a lot … Even though it still affected her, her battle prowess was at least 90%, and she did not reduce it too much … The Black Demon fought painfully. Although it was twenty meters tall, its strength was far inferior to Ah Man. Once it was hit by Ah Man, it would definite be blown away. Fortunately, it still had a special ability that could turn into smoke to eliminate the enemies’ attacks, otherwise, it would have been beaten to death.

Under the attacks of Nighthawk of Heaven Stage level and Crazy Dancing Grass of Heaven Stage level 1, Ika flew up and down freely.

She practiced mysterious Three Postures in actual combat.

The Crazy Dancing Grass had no effect on her mental attack, and the grass spikes it fired were easily cut away with Angel’s Blade. As for the Nighthawk, it had the ability to fly. In front of Ika, it looked like a drunk with clumsy movements.

Their flying abilities were on completely different levels. Whether it was speed or flying skill, the Nighthawk was overshadowed by Ika.

The secret pathway collapsed.

Because of the battle between the giant Loli and the Maha and the Earthquake Dragon, the tombs and secret passages were constantly being destroyed.

Gu Deng consciously forced Yue Yang to retreat to the exit teleportation circle of the tomb.

Yue Yang pretended to fall for his trap.

When the tomb collapsed, they retreated into the transfer array and entered the unit world filled with yellow sand. As soon as he retreated, Gu Deng was overjoyed and immediately gave chase.Raging Flame gave up her fight with Wo Gua. In her mind, no matter how powerful Yue Yang was, she felt that she had to protect him. Of course, Wo Gua also didn’t want to stay in this tomb that could be buried alive at any time, and at the same time, he rushed into unit world, chasing after Raging flame.

Ika, Nighthawk, Dancing Grass, Ah Man and Black Demon also entered.

Only the three big guys, who were completely unafraid of being buried alive, continued to stay here.

There was no end to the battle.

“Steel Tooth Sand Spider!” When Gu Deng stepped onto the yellow sand, he immediately summoned a level 1 heaven stage Steel Toothed Sand Spider to help the struggling Black Demon create a trap for Ah Man.

“Bovine bats.” Wo Gua also summoned an Earth Stage level Eight bison to help Nighthawk contain Ika.

In terms of the battle situation, the Nighthawk and the Crazy dancing grass were even more dangerous. Unfortunately, Gu Deng no longer had any flying warbeast, and there weren’t many flying warbeasts that Wo Gua had. They weren’t good at aerial battles, and the flying warbeast was their weakness. Wo Gua hesitated for a long time. Then, it called out the Star Scorpion that had just entered Tong Tian Tower and had a low degree of loyalty, letting it join the battle.

Star Scorpion: Gold level 10 (equivalent to first level of the Heaven stage), Warbeast, Gold Blood, Star Shell, Low Class Intelligence, Special Skills: Scorpion poison, Star Gauze.

What made Wo Gua happy was that after summoning this Star Scorpion, it did not betray him.

It did not immediately attack, but moved back and forth, as if searching for a suitable opponent. For the time being, it was uncertain whether to attack Ah Man or Ika, who was flying beautifully in the sky.

“Fleas.” Squash summoned the last warbeast.

Although it was only equivalent to Earth Stage Level 5 Gold level 5, Wo Gua did not expect fleas to be able to hurt the enemy, as long as it could disturb War Angel in the sky. As expected, the moment the flea appeared, it jump wildly. Ika was not worried at all. The mysterious Three Postures that she had maintained all this while also came to an end. Annoyed, Ika fired 8 or 9 cannons, but the flea’s body was not big and its speed was astounding. With a bit of luck, it fired 9 cannons in a row but was unable to shoot it.

Ika, wielding the Angel Blade, lunged forward, ready to slay the accursed flea.

It realized that the situation was bad and quickly hid into the quicksand cave made by the Steel Tooth Sand Spider, not daring to come out.

The Nighthawk, Dancing Grass, and Bovine bat all surrounded her. Ika could only fly up in hatred and transform into Yue Bing in her second form, continuing to practice her mysterious Three Postures …

Gu Deng waved a long and narrow curved blade and fought with Yue Yang.

Yue Yang’s left hand waved the crescent moon as he quickly exchanged blows with Gu Deng with his battle skill. His right hand held the Tao Tie Blade, holding it without making a move, containing the power of a fatal strike.

Because of this, Gu Deng didn’t dare to attack with all his might, for fear of Yue Yang’s counterattack.

When the two blades met, sparks flew out like fireworks.

Like fireworks, the entire sky was filled with them!

After half an hour, the battle was as stalemate as ever, and both sides were locked in a stalemate.

After exchanging hundreds of blows with Raging flame, his body and strength had gradually declined from their peak state. He shouted at Gu Deng, “What are you waiting for?” “If you can’t take the mask guy, then exchange opponents.” He discovered that although this female giant did not have the support of a warbeast, she was not easy to deal with. First of all, his opponent’s rank was higher. If it weren’t for the sheer amount of assistance from these warbeasts, he would have been defeated long ago.

The most terrifying thing was, this female giant had managed to shake hundreds of thousands of fists, but she didn’t show any signs of tiredness.

Her endurance was just as terrifying as her brute force.

Of course, this wasn’t only because Wo Gua felt that something was amiss. Even Raging Flame himself felt that his endurance was much better than before.

Could it be that when that brat used the Flames of Nirvana to purify his body, he had reconstituted his physique?

However, wasn’t it too exaggerated to recreate his physique?

In the past, Flame would have been able to last for a long time, but it was impossible for it to reach the level it was today … Right now, not only was she not tired, she was even more excited, as if she had just warmed up.

“Hey, hey, stop messing around!” When Gu Deng saw Wo Gua throw away flame and charge towards him, determined to exchange opponents, he couldn’t help but feel a wave of fear. He had never fought with this mask guy before, so he didn’t know how powerful he was. This brat had a backup plan in every move, and he could even use the enemy’s power to fight back. Fighting against him using a Heaven Stage Technique was simply asking for a beating.

Gu Deng felt that fighting Yue Yang with all his might was the most foolish act.

This brat’s battle skill was simply superb. Any attack would be restrained, especially the worst part was his pure strength attack, which he could completely reverse.

“The warm-up is over…” Yue Yang’s figure soared up into the sky. With him as the center, the Heaven’s Fury Lotus and the Extreme Frost split the yellow sand desert into two completely different worlds. He put away the crescent moon and the Tao Tie Blade, Yao Heyu and the War God Guard Ladies appeared on both sides of him. This was the first time they had formally joined hands with him in battle.

In the Heaven Realm, because Yue Yang was worried that his true strength would be exposed, he never had the chance to fight the War God Guard Ladies together.

Now, in this uninhabited world, there was finally a chance to show it off.

“The Bow of the Wings …” After cultivating with the War God Guard Ladies, Yue Yang had already grasped a portion of their techniques to transform into a Humanoid Divine Soldier

. Although it was still far from fully utilizing its power, it still had a good start. He stretched out his hand and grasped the slender waist of the War God’s Attendant’s little sister. The yonger Dragon Lady, ‘Yu’, stretched out her entire body. Her hands and legs were folded together, and her entire body bent backwards like a bow.

chapters.title: Chapter 697 – Shock! The Power Of War God Guard!
chapters.body:
Chapter 697 – Shock! The Power Of War God Guard!

C697 - Shock! The power of War God Guard!

The Extreme Fire was the string, the Extreme Frost was the arrow, and the Purple Lightning was the power.

When Yue Yang shot out this arrow with younger dragon lady as his bow, not to mention the enemies, Gu Deng and Wo Gua, even Raging Flames on the ground were shocked.

Man-made bow?

What kind of strategy was this? Although Raging Flames had seen many strange ways to fight in the Heaven Realm, she had never seen anyone who fought with a bow like Yue Yang! Wo Gua and Gu Deng’s eyes twitched when they saw this. They could not imagine the damage this arrow would do to their bodies. Before Yue Yang could shoot with his bow, Wo Gua had already run away, ignoring the sense of loyalty and abandoned Gu Deng.

Swish!

An arrow that tore through the sky and split the earth.

Even space was split open by this terrifying arrow. It was even faster than light and unstoppable as it shot out.

It easily shot through Wo Gua who had combined several powerful warbeasts and his Six-Armed Giant Demon!

An arrow pierced through the chest from behind.

Wo Gua’s body slightly trembled, he still couldn’t believe that he was hit by the arrow. He could not feel any pain. He could only feel his body turning lighter, as if he had lost something. He looked down at his chest and discovered that there was a huge, transparent hole in his heart. The beating heart and the other internal organs had completely vanished after one arrow.
