“Impossible!” Wo Gua’s thick lips trembled as it clumsily shivered. “I have the protection of the Six-Armed Giant Demon. It’s impossible for an arrow to pierce through my body!”

“AHHHHHH!”

Gu Deng roared madly.

He exploded forth with the strongest power in his life. He overdrawn himself to the limit, and even his life potential, which he had never lightly used before, was completely burnt.

In an instant, he had risen to the peak of the fourth level of the Heaven Stage. At the highest speed, his strongest psychic power was infused into the Cyan Moon Blade in his hand, chopping towards Yue Yang like a lightning bolt.

He knew very well that if he kept his distance, he and Wo Gua would be able to easily shoot by a human bow. The only hope for survival lay in close combat. He had to fight in close combat so that his opponent could not pull away and use human to draw the bow. Gu Deng used all his energy, hoping to inflict severe damage on his opponent, and then escape from this unit world. Judging from the endless attacks from his opponent, this time he and Wo Gua had met a tough opponent. Not to mention victory, it would be extremely difficult for them to escape!

“Sword of the Wings!”

When Yue Yang raised his right hand, the War God Guard ‘Yao’, the elder Dragon Lady with a solemn expression.

Her entire body was attached to Yue Yang’s right arm, her arms tightly wrapped around him. Her legs were taut, and her entire body formed a straight line. In the blink of an eye, although she was in human form, she had successfully transformed into a human-shaped sword.

The Innate Invisible Sword Qi Yue Yang had infused into her body increased a hundredfold.

Even if Yue Yang couldn’t fully utilize her augmented strength, the Innate Invisible Sword Qi that shot out from her legs was still at least a hundred meters long.

Gu Deng, who was chopping down with all his might, seeing this terrifying scene, couldn’t help but be scared out of his wits. Yue Yang confidentially brandished his sword and slashed forward. It was not even a battle skill, unlike his previous technique of slashing mountains and rivers. It was just an ordinary casual slash. The entire sky was cut in half by this sword strike. The space cracked, forming a hundred-meter-long fissure that rumbled like thunder.

The platinum level Cyan Moon Blade was infused with Gu Deng’s full strength and spiritual force.

It glows.

Under the attack of War God Guard with sword, it was even more fragile than wood bark, easily breaking into two halves …

“AHHHHHHHHHHH!” Upon seeing the sword slashing down on his head, Gu Deng dodged it with his greatest reaction the moment he was hit. Because his body had changed direction too quickly, his waist had almost been broken when he had turned. He, who was attacking with all his might, suffered a huge backlash. His internal organs were severely damaged, and fresh blood spurted out of his mouth. However, Gu Deng didn’t care about any of this. What he was afraid of was that his opponent had almost instant-killed him with a single sword strike.

He tried to lift his right hand and found it oddly detached from his arm.

It fell to the ground with a thud.

It turned out that at the same time the Cyan Moon Blade had been severed, his arm had also been severed!

Gu Deng’s eyes bulged as he stared at the severed arm, which was slowly oozing out blood. His expression was as terrifying as if he had seen a ghost … He hadn’t felt any pain. He didn’t even know he was hurt.

The might of a single sword strike was actually this terrifying!

Looking at Yue Yang in the sky, Gu Deng felt completely powerless.

How could he be match for such an enemy? No matter how many powerful warbeasts he had, how could he compare to the twin sisters who could transform into humanoid weapons?

Even Yue Yang himself found it hard to believe, not to mention Gu Deng and Wu Gua and the other people. Now, he hadn’t even used 100% of their power, and it can reach this level of force. If he used 100% of their power, or with their bodies, condensing Black Guizang, White Shuanghua Sword and Chixiaolian Sword, then, what kind of force would it reach? It was just the beginning, but he hadn’t even officially unleashed his power yet. He’d already been defeated Wo Gua and Gu Deng who were at the peak of Heaven Stage level. If he went all out, one wouldn’t even be able to escape death even at the fifth or sixth level of the Heaven Stage!

With the War God Guard ladies and the comprehension of Chixiaolian Sword, Yue Yang suddenly had an impulse to challenge the Lionheart King.

Or perhaps, he could challenge a powerhouse of the Lionheart King level.

With such a powerful divine weapon in his hands, could he fight against the Lionheart King?

Yue Yang was not sure, but he was a little excited. He felt that he could at least give it a try. Before this, he did not have the confidence to do so!

The War God Guard ladies flew up and wrapped their arms around Yue Yang’s waist. Their bodies stretched backwards and their four wings spread out, as if Yue Yang had four dragon wings. At this moment, his flying speed was ten times faster than Yue Yang’s fastest speed. It wasn’t a teleportation, but can also ignore the distance between them. Just as the thought of chasing arose in Yue Yang’s mind, he was astounded to realize that himself was already flying behind Wo Gua.

What he was doing was stretching his legs.

The war god guard ‘Yao’, the elder Dragon Lady, tacitly slid down and wrapped her arms around his right leg, turning herself into a part of his body. Her power increased a hundred times from her body, and with the kicking intention of Yue Yang, her legs bombarded the shell of Wo Gua’s head.

BOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOAA!

Wo Gua flew a thousand meters away, creating a deep sand hole that was a few meters deep. Like a meteor, it smashed a huge hole that was a hundred meters in radius.

Wo Gua, whose chest had already been penetrated, was immediately severely injured.

Wo Gua struggled a few times, but could not immediately stand up.

“…” When Yue Yang saw this, he felt a bit embarrassed. In fact, the force of the kick was not very strong, but with the help of elder Dragon Lady, who was a Humanoid Divine Soldier

, it actually caused severe damage to Wo Gua. Two deep footprints appeared on his huge head, and the skull also showed fragmented state. If Yue Yang struck with his full strength, this peak fourth level heaven stage Wo Gua’s entire head would explode.

Gu Deng sank to the ground.

His spirit could no longer support his body. Facing such an enemy, he couldn’t defeat it, nor could he be able to escape. He truly didn’t know what to do!

Raging Flame opened her mouth, but she could not close it for a long time. She knew that Yue Yang’s warbeast was a monster, but she never thought that even these two normally rare and powerful female Dragon Ladies would be this terrifying.

Yue Yang knocked down Wo Gua and no longer used the War God Guard Ladies to attack Gu Deng.

Instead, he summoned the Bloody Queen Red, the Spirit of Heaven Fire, and the Reaping Mantis to join in the battle.

He suppressed the excitement in his heart as he continuously tried to use the two Divine Weapons of the War God Guard Ladies to form the three moves: Black Gui Zang, White Shuang Hua and Chixiaolian.

He felt that there was a lot of inspiration in this battle.

He hoped to grasp it and further study it.

Raging flame rushed to the side of Gu Deng. Seeing his dejected look, he hesitated for a moment, but didn’t launch an attack. Instead, she cautiously watched him, occasionally sneaking a glance towards Yue Yang, who was constantly meditating on new realms.

The defeat of the master seriously affected the will of the warbeast. Black Demon, Crazy dancing grass, Nighthawk and other warbeasts’ morale fell. The Bovine Bat and the Steel Tooth Sand Spider had the urge to escape. As to the Star Scorpion, it simply betrayed. With its low level of intelligence, it definitely would not follow a weakling that was on the verge of death. Moreover, Wo Gua contracted it by brute force, which was not what it wanted. Actually, the moment the Star Scorpion summoned by him, it had the urge to immediately defect and attack the momentary owner. However, due to the tense battle situation, it did not take any action.

The weakest flea jumped out of the sand hole.

The sand hole was no longer safe. The Spirit of Heaven Fire threw themselves into it, almost burning it to death.

In Capricorn Palace, the Bloody Queen Red received a special skill called ‘Sheep Transformation’, which is the reward of Capricorn Guardians in the zodiac sign.

It was a pity that this Demonic Technique had extremely strict restrictions. Initially, it could only transform a warbeast gold level 6 into Sheep Transformation, but its actual effect was not even comparable to the Bloody Queen Red’s Banshee scream and the lash of pain. As the Bloody Queen Red became Dacred Beast and will be Divine Beast this special ability was also improving, but it was very slow.

Right now, as long as a warbeast below Level 8 Gold is not a heaven stage warbeast, the Bloody Queen Red can be used to transform into a sheep.

She rarely used this highly restrictive stunt.

As soon as the banshee screamed, she immediately made the enemy faint. It was more appropriate to coordinate with Yue Yang’s attack.

Now that Yue Yang didn’t participate in the battle, the other side had another flea that bounced around, which made people sick of it. The Bloody Queen Red became angry and spent a lot of spiritual energy to activate her special ability.

The flea hopped through the air, turning into a black goat.

The Reaping Mantis, who had been chasing for a long time, swooped down at high speed. Before the black goat could react, it immediately used its sickle claws to lock it in.

He opened his big mouth and began to eat.

The black goat cried out incessantly, but this was unable to reverse the fate of its death … Even if it was only a flea, it would still die if the Death God Mantis were to catch it, let alone become a goat. The second unlucky one was the Quasi-Heaven Nighthawk. On top of its head, the Bloody Queen let out a shrill screech. The Nighthawk fainted on the spot and directly fell from the sky.

The Bloody Queen Red, who was holding the Gold Dragon Slaughtering Dagger, struck with all her might.

The Dragon Slaughtering Dagger pierced deeply into the Nighthawk’s eye, piercing through its skull. Even the hard magic crystal was stabbed through in a second … Its death sobered Gu Deng up with his body shuddering. Seeing the situation deteriorating, he felt that he had no hope of surviving. With a loud shout, he pounced towards Yue Yang who was studying how to condense the Gui Zang and Shuang Hua Swords on the body of the War God Servant ladies.

Self explosion!

He would rather die than let this powerful enemy to leave the unit world.

With such a young man in Tong Tian Tower, his master was impossible to obtain any treasure from the Gods’ Ruins!

“He’s simply courting death!” Raging flame had long been wary of Gu Deng’s attack. After several heavy punches, she knocked him to the ground and grabbed him by the legs, throwing him far away like a giant throwing a chicken.

“Don’t kill him for now…” Yue Yang was forced to stop studying. After a moment of thought, he decided to return to the tomb chamber and see how the Giant big loli was faring. Aren’t the Mahe Precious Elephant and the Earthquake Dragon very arrogant? Now let’s test the power of theWar God Guard ladies’s Humanoid Divine Soldier and see if they can still be pulled up! Yue Yang kicked Wo Gua that was struggling to stand up and threw him a hundred meters away, making him fall back to the ground.

The War God Servant ladies, one on the left and one on the right.

Accompanying Yue Yang, they returned to the tomb.

chapters.title: Chapter 698 – Unacceptable Surrender
chapters.body:
Chapter 698 – Unacceptable Surrender

C698 - Unacceptable surrender

When Yue Yang returned to the tomb chamber, he found that it was already smashed into pieces.

It was even inappropriate to use the word ‘ruins’ to describe.

What made Yue Yang even more surprised was that the Maha Elephant of Heaven Stage level 5 defected. Inside the collapsed tomb, only the giant loli and the Earthquake Dragon were fighting. Even if his companions escaped, the near-unintelligent but loyal Earthquake Dragon would still hold its ground against the giant loli. Even if the Maha Elephant joined hands, it would only be able to flatten the Giant Lolita. Where did the Maha Elephant run to now? The Earthquake Dragon was completely at a disadvantage.

Yet, it still used its tail to wrap around her calf, rather than let her chase after the Maha Elephant.

“I’ll beat him, I’ll beat him!”

The giant loli was happily fighting and was a little surprised to find Yue Yang back. Yue Yang faintly smiled, indicating that she should continue. He brought the two War God Guard ladies and followed along the collapsing secret passage, chasing after the Maha Elephant.

If the Maha of Heaven Stage level 5 had not fled, Yue Yang had considered whether or not to accept the medium-wisdom Elephant.

Even if he didn’t need it, he could still give it to the ladies or Ye Kong and the others.

However, the Maha Elephant immediately defected and fled after Wo Gua suffering a severe injury. Especially when it abandoned the Earthquake Dragon, Yue Yang felt a chill run down his spine. Sometimes, if too smart and unloyal a warbeast cannot be controlled well, it would be a fatal disaster on the battlefield. Yue Yang now understood why he was able to send the Wo Gua flying with a single kick. The reason was because the Maha Elephant defected, causing the original injured Wo Gua to suffer a severe blow, greatly weakening it, and increasing its injuries … Level 5 and mid-tier intelligence were not bad, but no matter how strong a warbeast was, they still had to possess one condition, and that was loyalty.

Without loyalty, escaping from the battlefield was intolerable for a warbeast like this!

If Yue Yang had to choose one, he would rather choose the Earthquake Dragon who had been seriously injured while still stubbornly holding back the giant loli.

Its strength was far inferior to the Maha Elephant’s, but the Earthquake Dragon was a trustworthy warbeast. When its master encountered danger, there was no need to worry about it leaving.

Life Guard WarBeast might not always be very smart, but there was a characteristic that always reassured their masters, and that was loyalty. They would rather die than betray them! If a warbeast was not intelligent, it could be cultivated slowly; if a warbeast was not strong enough, it could also be cultivated slowly; if a warbeast was not loyal, it was a very dangerous thing.

Some warbeasts are not naturally loyal.

And the stronger they are, the less loyal they are.

Some of the warbeasts seemed loyal on the surface, but once they encountered any danger, they immediately scanned their surroundings and fled. The Maha Elephant was undoubtedly the last type. Compared to those unloyal warbeasts, it was far more terrifying and dangerous!

Yue Yang had already dispelled his desire to subdue the Maha Elephant and decided to kill this warbeast of Heaven Stage level 5.

Then took the Devine Beast blood from its body.

The reason why the Maha Elephant was so powerful was because it had the blood of Devine Beast within it. Only by forming a special physique would it be able to rise to the fifth level of the Heaven Stage.

Inside the yellow sand filled unit world, although Yue Yang had left, the battle situation hadn’t changed.

The defeat of Gu Deng and Wo Gua had taken shape and was irrevocable.

Raging Flames punched out. Gu Deng, who had lost his right arm and weapon, was no match for Raging Flames. Not to mention he had already consumed a lot of his energy and was in a weakened state. With the advantage of a special technique, Gu Deng barely managed to hold on to his power, but he managed to hold his ground under the fists of Raging Flames.

“Haa!”

Ah Man wrapped the God Binding Chains around the Black Demon’s neck and strangled him with all her might.

The Black Demon struggled with all its might, but every time it struggled, Ah Man would smash its head with her fist. Black blood flowed out of its seven orifices and its throat issued out waves of mournful cries. It was no longer as mighty as it had been when it had used its spiritual force field to attack Ah Man. Its spirit was already exhausted, its morale was low, and its strength was gradually being depleted. If not for the fear of death supporting it, urging it to struggle with all its might, it would have already collapsed under Ah Man’s fist.

Ah Man, who had the Heart of the Earth and the power of the Titan, plus supported by the five Giant Shadows, was standing on the ground and fighting. She was like a war goddess that would never tire.

At the end of the enemy’s struggle.

Ah Man stretched out her hands.

She twisted the Black Demon’s head, and with a “pa” sound, twisted its cervical vertebra.

Black Demon, who was at least twenty meters tall and was a second level of Heaven Stage, was still writhing around. It seemed like it wanted to fight … Ah Man didn’t look at it again, but just looked up at the sky and roared with excitement. Under the God Binding Chains, the Black Demon was unable to turn into smoke. After Ah Man had broken her cervical vertebra, she laid on the ground in an extremely tragic state, quietly waiting for her death.

"BOOM!

After the Black Demon, Crazy Dancing Grass also fell.

Facing an opponent like the War Angel Ika, if she hadn’t deliberately practiced the mysterious Three Postures during the battle, Crazy Dancing Grass would have died long ago.

Ika reached out her hand and made a gesture of frost, and in the moment that she froze the Crazy Dancing Grass, her other hand formed a lightning bolt that struck its top. This was the combat skill Xue Wuxia had taught her. Then Ika whirled, and Angel’s Blade slashed again, unstoppably slashing the whole plant in half, which trick Princess Sissy had taught her.

Finally, Ika dug the heart out of the roots of the Crazy dancing grass.

No one had taught her this.

It was the result of subtlety.

The person who affected her most was. of course, Yue Yang, who often killed people for treasures…

The Bovine bat had already fled more than ten kilometers away, but it could not escape the pursuit of the Bloody Queen Red. With a whip of pain, the Bovine bat fell to the ground screaming.

It was also a little cunning. It wanted to pretend that it was dead in order to sneak attack the Bloody Queen Red. It intentionally let out blood from its mouth and nose, pretending that it was on the verge of death.

How could the battle-hardened Bloody Queen Red be ambushed by him? She pretended to be fooled. As she flew closer, she threw the Dragon Slaughtering Dagger, directly piercing through the head of the Bovine bat. The Bovine bat, who had failed to devour the rice, flapped their huge wings in pain and fled back into the sky, fleeing for their lives. Without waiting for the Bloody Queen Red’s attack, the Spirit of Heaven Fire had already surrounded the bison eating bats in the center of the storm.

Thousands of fire wasps rushed into the center of the storm and nailed Bovine bat.

One by one, they self-destructed.

Bovine bat were covered in bruises in this kind of explosion.

In the end, the Spirit of Heaven Fire used the storm of thunder and lightning to directly tear the burnt pieces of flesh into pieces. Other than a faint blue magic crystal, there was almost nothing left.

What made both Ah Man and Ika surprised was that the Heaven stage Star Scorpion suddenly sneak attacked the Steel Tooth Sand Spider and forced it out of the ground.

The Steel Toothsand Spider’s strength was on par with the Star Scorpion, but it had suffered great misfortune for eighteen lifetimes. In the desert, the Star Scorpion was almost invincible, but the Star Scorpion was its natural nemesis. After being struck by the stellar scorpion’s pincers, the Steel Tooth Sand Spider frantically crawled out of the ground. It wanted to find water to drink, and only by using a large amount of water would it be able to temporarily soothe the scorpion poison.

The result was very tragic. It had just crawled out of the sand and discovered that this unit world was only sand.

Without a large amount of water, Ah Man even didn’t need to strike the Steel Tooth Sand Spider.

It crawled slowly for a while, paralyzed.

His body gradually became golden.

In the end, the entire body seemed to have been cast from gold, turning into a gold texture … Not only it, even Gu Deng, who had just let Flame hit the ground, had let the Star Scorpion hide in the sand and sneak attacked him with a needle.

“Dammit!” Without hesitation, Gu Deng used his knife to cut off the right leg of the stellar scorpion.

Not long after the right leg fell onto the sand, the blood that dripped out of it all turned into gold.

In less than ten seconds, the right leg that was severed by Gu Deng himself had turned into a golden leg, and the blood that dripped out of it flowed like liquid gold.

Raging Flame paused for a moment and then spoke to Gu Deng, “The situation has passed. You won’t have the chance to turn the tables. There’s no point in fighting like this. Surrender, I will spare your life!” Gu Deng shook his head with a bitter smile and waved his hand, “Although I’m afraid of death, surrender is impossible.” “I know too many secrets. It is impossible for me to live on. I am kind enough to accept them, but for my own master, what I want to do is not surrender to the festival, but to keep secrets!”

Raging Flame was silent for a moment.

She persuaded him again: “Even if you die, he’ll find a way to dig out your secrets. That big guy over there won’t die. You’re doing something pointless.”

Gu Deng glanced at Wo Gua who had fainted on the floor, still shaking his head, “I don’t know about others, but I have to do my part well.”

He picked up the two halves of the broken blade from the ground, stabbed himself in the chest with the other half, and stabbed himself deeply in the heart.

The other half, through the forehead.

He stabbed it into the head.

And then he fell down.

Watching the dying Gu Deng, Raging Flame slightly saluted, “Although you are our enemy, you are worthy of our admiration!” “Go well!”

The Black Demon that was still struggling on the brink of death did not choose to betray its master. Furthermore, it died with its master. Its head and body exploded with a ‘boom’ and its flesh flew everywhere. Ah Man grabbed a magic crystal wrapped in dense smoke with her hand.

Inside the tomb, the Earthquake Dragon that made the giant loli twist and break all the bones in her body did not betray her, nor did it betray her.

It let out a long whine and spat out a bloody ball of meat from its huge mouth.

After which, he exploded and died.

Compared to the two warbeasts that would rather die than betray, the Maha Treasure Elephant was able to sprint forward under Yue Yang’s attack. The broken secret passageway became its biggest obstacle in its escape. When it lost its footing and fell into a trap, it was unable to escape. Yue Yang, who was in the sky, had already raised the human-shaped sword formed by the War God Guard ‘Yao’ and was preparing to chop it down.

The Maha Treasure Elephant actually submitted and surrendered to Yue Yang.

“Sorry, although your conditions are good in all aspects, I won’t accept it.” I can’t accept a warbeast that would flee or even surrender easily in the face of death. The betrayal and abandoning of your companions just now is already intolerable. If you fight to the death, I might be able to forgive you. “You, are not what I want!” Yue Yang sighed. Under the Maha’s fearful gaze, he slashed down with his sword. This time, it was his powerful battle skill.

Even the mountain and river would miss a part under his strike!

chapters.title: Chapter 699 – Opportunity Right In Front
chapters.body:
Chapter 699 – Opportunity Right In Front

It wasn’t easy to kill a Maha Elephant of Heaven Stage level 5 who possessing special physique that was unafraid of ice and fire and who had an unfathomable amount of strength and the medium intelligence.

Even with the War God Guard ladies, Yue Yang still couldn’t easily take it down.

Little Wenli, who had not come out to complement him before, came out.

She firstly used the will of the divine beast to suppress her opponent. As the Maha Elephant feared her, she then summoned out Stone Element Medusa, Storm Mermaid, Thunderbolt Naga, and Ice Serpent Demon, letting them participate in this battle to gain more experience. The Storm Mermaid blew the horn of the storm, filling the collapsing secret passages with water, and the Maha Elephant who sank into the water lost its ability to charge and capture. During the battle in the water, the Stone Element Medusa and the others unleashed an even greater force, unceremoniously challenging the Maha Elephant who had now become trapped beast.

So what if he was a fifth level of Heaven Stage?

Falling into the water, it would only be a big bloke waiting to be killed!

The Maha Elephant could swim, of course, and it was a good swimmer, but compared to Stone Element Medusa and the Storm Mermaid, who were naturally adept at fighting in the water, it was simply incomparable. Even the Golden Tiger Shark and the Blood Python King that Stone Element Medusa summoned were much better than it.

Yue Yang slashed again and again with the Sword Qi of War God Guard ‘Yao’.

The first strike was to cut down the mountains and rivers, the second to cut down the heaven and earth, the third to cut down the rivers and mountains to change the master, the fourth to cut down the heaven and earth to reverse the situation, the fifth to cut down the gods and the ghosts and to change the world …

After saying this, he did not hide anything like he usually did in battles. Instead, he put his full strength into his attacks. Following Yue Yang’s swinging the ‘sword’, the elder Dragon Lady’s mind became more and more coordinated with his. The increasing power in strength became more and more stronger. It was only when Yue Yang felt this was a bit biased that he stopped using elder Dragon Lady as human-shaped sword and switched with that beautiful human-shaped bow of younger Dragon Lady. At this time, the Maha Elephant, its strongest weapon - the long nose, had already been cut down by the Sword Qi.

After Yue Yang used up almost all his innate energy and shot the Maha’s head to death with the Polar Ice Thunder Arrow.

The two War God Guard ladies broke through almost simultaneously.

Their bodies flashed with golden light.

Compared to the inherited power of lovebird, their bodies were more compatible, showing a more perfect state.

The War God Guard ladies, who had broken through from the Innate level 8 to level 9, turned into two rays of colorful light and floated into Yue Yang’s Grimoire World. When they woke up, they were believed that the power of their collaboration with Yue Yang would become even stronger … Yue Yang also felt a little regretful, because he was still unable to condense the three swords from their bodies.

In addition, Yue Yang had also gained a lot of insights from their first battle.

If he tried again, he would do better. He would definitely be able to use less of his Innate energy to display greater strength.

In a word, his teamwork with the two ladies hadn’t reached the most tacit understanding. If they were truly combined to one in the battle, then Yue Yang would have killed the Maha Elephant earlier!

Killing Maha elephant of Heaven Stage level 5, Little Wenli didn’t have any reaction.

She was good at everything, but her leveling-up speed was very slow. Beating a monster to death could not lead her leveling up at all. She would only improve after the final boss battle. Fortunately, Yue Yang was already used to her speed. However, Stone Element Medusa, Storm Mermaid, Thunderbolt Naga, and Ice Serpent Demon all received their upgrades. Not only them, even the Golden Tiger Shark and the Blood Python King’s family appeared with the golden light.

As for the meat of the Maha Elephant, they didn’t dare to expect any.

However, the blue blood that flowed out from it was frantically swallowed with water by Golden Tiger Shark, as if it was an incredible treasure!

“Without putting in much effort during the battle, you still dare to eat?” He didn’t have the time to refine the blood of a God Beast out of the Elephant’s body. He decided to go back first and take look at the situation so that Raging Flames wouldn’t be anxious. That simple-minded guy, she absolutely couldn’t let Gu Deng and the others cheat her.

The moment he left, Golden Tiger Shark and the family of Blood Python King picked up the blue elephant blood that was difficult to melt in the water.

After drinking the blue elephant blood, Golden Tiger Shark who had just been upgraded.

Its body was slowly transforming.

It became even larger, and a few blue lines appeared on its back. On the other side, the Blood Python King also showed the same characteristics on its head and neck. Although there was no way for him to form a special physique like the Maha Elephant, the blue blood of the elephant also contained a tiny bit of the blood of a God Beast. It was extremely useful for physiques of Golden Tiger Shark and the Blood Python King.

The giant loli was waiting for Yue Yang’s return in the rubble of the tomb chamber.

“Big brother, what is this?” With two fingers, she picked up a strange, blood-colored meatball.

“It’s an egg born from the Earthquake Dragon’s life, who gave up everything and poured all its life energy into this egg. This is not meat. There is an egg wrapped inside the meat.” He looked at the body of the Earthquake Dragon but did not use it as meat for the warbeasts as usual. Instead, he lit up the Nirvana Flames and burned all the remains of the Earthquake Dragon. After purifying, a small amount of pure energy was also gently injected into the blood-colored meat ball.

Immediately, the bloody ball seemed to have a heartbeat as it trembled slightly.

After a while, it seemed to gradually calm down.

Yue Yang looked at the giant loli and his heart stirred: “When we get back, I’ll help you ascend to Heaven Stage level 4. You almost broke through, but if you let your brother help, it’ll be very painful!”

“No, I’m not afraid of pain at all, I definitely won’t cry!” When giant loli heard this, she was overjoyed. She could not conceal her joy and burst out laughing.

Within the unit world filled with yellow sand.

Seeing Yue Yang come back, Raging Flames scratched her hair in embarrassment. “Things weren’t well done, he committed suicide.”

Afraid that he would get angry, she added, “I had already advised him, but he refused to listen.” Yue Yang purposely made an unpleasant face, pretending to be very serious, making Raging Flames even more afraid. In fact, he was secretly amused. Seeing this wild and unruly female giant’s uneasy look gave him a sense of accomplishment. The transformation had already made some progress, but he had yet to succeed. He still had to work hard!

The Bovine bats’s Magic Crystal, the Nighthawk’s Magic Crystal, the Crazy dancing grass‘Heart of Madness, and the Black Demon’s Heart of Mist were all handed over.

In order to reward everyone, Yue Yang immediately distributed the spoils of war.

The Bovine bats’s crystal was given to the Spirit of Heaven Fire, and the Nighthawk’s crystal was given to the Reaping Mantis … The Heart of Madness and the Heart of Mist, Yue Yang were not divided. The Bloody Queen Red, Ah Man and Ika were intelligent enough to refuse Yue Yang’s child-coaxing reward with a gentle smile. They knew that if what they needed the most was anything good, he would give it to them. He didn’t care about the spoils of war in front of him.

Raging flame dragged back the dying Wo Gua. Yue Yang decided to first freeze him and then find a time to save him.

One was about information. He had to extract valuable information from Wo Gua and find out the enemy’s movements and goals. The other was about the powerful warbeasts on the Wo Gua. Not to mention a Heaven Stage Level 3 Six-Armed Giant Demon, even a Heaven Stage Level 1 Earth Demonic Bear, Rock Giant, and a Quasi-Heaven Manticore were not bad. That Thunder Toad might be ugly, but it still had some uses. In any case, sooner or later, Wo Gua would become a fertilizer or food ingredient. If he didn’t squeeze out all his leftover value, that would be a waste.

If he didn’t have such a thought, Yue Yang would have already beheaded him with his sword.

“This is?” Yue Yang was a little surprised when he saw the steel tooth sand spider turn into a corpse made of gold.

“Ah, the scorpion in the field, and so did the leg of the Gu Deng.” Raging Flame explained the situation to Yue Yang. She didn’t understand why the Star Scorpion would force out the Steel Tooth Sand Spider and sneak attack Gu Deng. However, that was the case.

“Both its ability and toxicity are not bad.” Yue Yang looked at Gu Deng’s right leg, which had become a golden foot, and put both the steel tooth sand spider and the golden foot into the storage ring. Raging Flame felt embarrassed, the guy collected even a single drop of mutated blood on the ground that looked like a golden liquid. No wonder he had so many treasures, she had never seen anything that could be so crazily in collecting treasures and even a little bit of useful stuff was not spared. It was too much.

“What?” The Spirit of Heaven Fire was inquiring about Yue Yang’s intentions.

Should she force the star scorpion out of the ground?

She had no sense of right or wrong. As long as it was a hostile creature, she didn’t mind killing them all.

In the world of the Spirit of Heaven Fire, other than Yue Yang, who was his master, there were only two things in the world. One was energy that could be absorbed, the other was not …

Yue Yang waved his hand.

To subdue an intelligent creature by force is the most clumsy of means. Even if it was conquered, the result would be the same as Wo Gua conquering the star scorpion, finally allowing it to bite back at the scorpion. What Yue Yang wanted to do was better. Of course, if the conquest was effective, Yue Yang would not mind doing so. The problem was that the Star Scorpion’s current situation was a little special. It had already been forced once by Wo Gua to use brute force. If he used brute force again, it definitely wouldn’t work!

If wise, Yue Yang can negotiate with the other party.

Try to persuade sentimentally and rationally

If he didn’t successfully fool the other party, he wouldn’t count as being capable!

If it was a warbeast below middle level intelligence, then this move wouldn’t be very effective, because the other side didn’t know how to talk, nor did they have enough intelligence to think things through too complex. Yue Yang could only use a method of coaxing children, first, to take advantage of them, and then take out the thing that moved the other side to prove that he had a great future.

Star Scorpion, what did it like the most?

Putting aside Yue Yang, everyone could easily answer this question without any hesitation.

Warbeasts liked evolution the most, and this was what any battle beast liked the most. No warbeast disliked advancement, and no warbeast disliked increasing their strength!

Yue Yang drew a huge Celestial Runic Circle on the sand. After some thought, he placed the ‘Sky Scorpion Gloves’ he got from the Heavenly Scorpion Palace into the center of the Runic Circle. Then, he quietly waited for the Star Scorpion to appear.

That works?

Raging Flame had some doubts in her heart, but she didn’t dare to deny Yue Yang’s method.

One minute later, the Star Scorpion quietly emerged from the edge of the Runic Circle. Seeing that no one came to catch it, it slowly floated up in alarm. It looked at the Heavenly Scorpion Gloves within the Celestial Realm’s Runic Circle and was clearly tempted. However, it didn’t immediately crawl over. Instead, it cautiously turned its head to look at Yue Yang.

Yue Yang stood still, it did not move.

Yue Yang lifted his foot and it immediately sank into the sand. When Yue Yang stopped walking, it slowly floated up again.

After multiple attempts to confirm that Yue Yang had no intention to attack, it allowed Yue Yang to approach. However, once it was less than a hundred meters away, it kept backing up, unwilling to let him get too close.

" I won’t say any more. If you can understand my meaning, then come with me. I have a way to turn you into the world’s strongest Star Scorpion. Do you see my War God Guard?" Wasn’t a Humanoid Divine Soldier very ferocious? “I can transform you into a beast shaped divine soldier, which is also known as an earthly divine weapon!” Yue Yang was even more deceitful than the Spring Festival Gala’s Uncle Zhao. When Raging Flame heard his words, she began to doubt if he had made a mistake. Fortunately, Yue Yang didn’t use the bewitching tiredness of selling things. He still had a character. He would be straightforward and follow whatever the other party said. He wouldn’t force the other party to do anything!

Yue Yang picked up the Sky Scorpion Gloves and left with Ah Man and the rest.

That Star Scorpion had a trace of hesitation.

However, seeing that Yue Yang had gone far away, it hurriedly chased after him.

Yue Yang turned around and immediately stopped. After he had turned around to leave, he quickly chased after it… Perhaps, in its heart, it had yet to make a decision. However, at the very least, it already knew that this was a good opportunity that could not be easily missed.

chapters.title: Chapter 700 – Growth
chapters.body:
Chapter 700 – Growth

C700 - Growth

The outer perimeter of Gods’ Ruins.

Guiding Temple was actual an entrance to the Gods’ Ruins, a small garden before the ladder.

There were different kinds of runes used to record a great deal of stories here. Some were ancient, and some could not be considered complete. Some were added by later generations, but these were recorded tens of thousands of years ago, or even hundreds of thousands of years ago. As for the records from ten thousand years ago, they were very few. On the giant wall behind the collapsing statue of a god, there was a record of six thousand years ago about what Prison Emperor learned after he came here to explore. What shocked Yue Yang the most was not the words of Queen Fei Wenli that she wrote down when conquered the Heaven Stage and inherit Gods’ Ruins, but the words of a delicate rune written behind the Prison Emperor’s memory.

These runes were very familiar with Yue Yang, making him think of a person in a split-second.

The pitiful guy’s mother.

She mentioned that in order to obtain guidance from the Guiding Temple and find a way to enter Gods’ Ruins, one must use a pure body to carry the spiritual will of Wisdom God’s Envoy.

The God of Wisdom in immemorial time was a pure virtuous goddess. Anyone who wanted to obtain her God Power inheritance must be a virgin.

Even the Wisdom God’s Envoy, the inheritor of the Divine Sense, had only chosen the virgin.

Every time someone entered the temple and passed the test, there would always be a person who obtained the qualifications to inherit guidance of the Divine Sense from Wisdom God’s Envoy.

Without the guidance of Divine Sense, it would be impossible to explore the true depths of Gods’ Ruins.

That meant one didn’t have a key to enter the treasury, so he could only stare blankly.

In addition to obtaining guidance, pitiful guy’s mother also used different runes to record a lot of information inside Gods’ Ruins.

For those she thought needed to pay attention to, she would record down and remind others of the restrictions of the laws and the conditions for entering symbols. If there were still some people who could recognize a few of the Heaven Realm runes, then her record of ancient runes would seem very mysterious, and even Yue Yang would find it extremely difficult to read. If not for her knowledge of ancient rune and restrictions, he would never have been able to recognize the record left behind by pitiful guy’s mother.

Pitiful guy’s mother recorded a lot of information in the Guiding Temple.

However, if one did not understand the runes of the Heaven Realm, then it was for nothing. Even if one did know the rune of the Heaven Realm, if one did not know the ancient runes, one would only conjure up the whole thing through seeing a part of it.

“I’ll first store it, then study it with Wu Hen and Wuxia!” Yue Yang sighed. It seems that the secret of Gods’ Ruins is not something he can explore right now, because even the Prison Emperor was scared of it. Even Queen Fei Wenli, who used to possess the power of Divine Sovereign, was unable to find out the truth.

Unfortunately, pitiful guy’s mother could enter Gods’ Ruins.

This was unbelievable!

What Yue Yang felt most incredulous was, if only a virgin could obtain the inheritance of the Wisdom God’s Envoy, then wouldn’t it be a condition for pitiful guy’s mother to only enter Gods’ Ruins alone? But what makes him sick is, if she’s a virgin, where did that pitiful guy come from?

It was impossible for Yue Yang to refute such a thought.

Yue Yang had a feeling that he didn’t dare to suspect that Si Niang, who had Bing’er and Shuang’er as her children, was also like a virgin … Yue Yang’s rational sense told him it is impossible, but the problem is that perception is sometimes more accurate than rational sense. If that was true, then where did Bing’er and Shuang’er come from? Inside their bodies were extremely mysterious seals, which should be from pitiful guy’s mother. Even Yue Yang’s Insight of Heaven could not be seen through, so what exactly did that mean … Was that pitiful guy like Bing’er and Shuang’er?

What kind of secret did the seemingly mortal pitiful guy’s mother have on Si Niang?

What did she have to do with the people of the Heaven St airway and the Hundred Flowers Butterfly Valley?

Many questions confused Yue Yang.

Now that the Ancient Devil King had appeared, he had seized an extremely important body and caused many things to happen. In the future, revealing the truth would inevitably become a great threat. But Si Niang didn’t seem to care at all. Her attitude surprised Yue Yang, so could he really not care?

Si Niang didn’t care about it, and both Queen Night and Zhi Zun ignored it as well.

It seemed like they already knew the truth, but outsiders didn’t.

“What’s the matter with you?” When the female giant saw Yue Yang look at the runes, his expression seemed to be worried. She asked curiously, “What is written on it?”

“It’s fine, there are the conditions to enter inside. We don’t have the ability to explore for the time being. Let’s head back first!” Yue Yang recovered from his thoughts and immediately put aside the distracting thoughts in his heart. If he didn’t understand something, then he had to think about it first. The truth would slowly come to light as his ability improved in the future. Moreover, even if he knew the truth now, he probably wouldn’t believe it, because he hadn’t reached that level yet. For example, how did the pitiful guy’s mother enter the ruins, if even she told how to, no one could enter … The most obvious example was that the Black Hell King had found the Divine Grimoire a long time ago, but he was still unable to pass through the golden barrier.

“What about the scorpion?” Raging Flames saw the Star Scorpion following them but keeping the distance.

“Let it follow.” Yue Yang smiled, and with the help of the Bloody Queen Red and Ah Man, he copied the rune record outside the Guiding Temple. The inner palace was a place to test one’s abilities. If one didn’t meet the qualifications, then one wouldn’t be able to pass the test.

Yue Yang was not in a hurry. He hoped that his strength would rise to a higher level before he explored again.

At the very least, he had to get these predecessors’ records clear first.

With all these, they would have to put in a lot of effort to study the sickly beauty and Xue Wuxia … Of course, because there was Midnight Empress, Yue Yang could still use his predecessors as a reference, because Midnight Empress and Zhi Zunentered the Gods’ Ruins, but they couldn’t enter the inner core of the Gods’ Ruins like the pitiful guy’s mum.

After a long day, Yue Yang and Captain Raging Flame returned to Rainbow Castle in the small garden.

The sickly beauty was the happiest when it came to imprinting runes that Yue Yang had brought back. Studying the ancient history and mysterious runes was her greatest hobby.

Yue Yu couldn’t help with these profound runes, but the Master of Luo Hua City and Xue Wuxia did have a certain amount of research on them. However, since they weren’t around, the sickly beauty could only sort them out by herself.

The Star Scorpion followed him back. Out of caution, it did not take the initiative to contract with him.

Yue Yang was not in a hurry. He wanted to ignore it for a while.

The seriously wounded Wo Gua was also not busy being tortured. With Yue Yang and Little Wenliworking together, one used the ruling power that he had a slight grasp of, while the other used the Divine Beast Will Power to return the freedom back to warbeasts inside of Wo Gua’s body, which had long reached the limit of its endurance. If this is not the case, the process is difficult. However, the master, Wo Gua, was seriously injured and on the verge of death. Under the dual pressure of Yue Yang’s ruling power and Xiao Wenli’s Divine Beast Will Power, these weak warbeasts were given their freedom back and barely formed any resistance. Even the strongest six-armed Giant Demon, at the critical moment of his destruction, turned a traitor.

Wo Gua did not wake up for now. Once he woke up, he would discover that all the warbeasts were gone. He would only be left with himself, and he would cry himself to death.

At that time, it would be the best time to pry open Wo Gua’s mouth and obtain the information of the Ancient Devil King and the Heaven Realm Mercenaries.

The corpse of the Maha Treasure Elephant as well as many spoils of war, there was no time to deal with them.

Yue Yang had not been to the Southern Heaven Realm for a few days, afraid that the situation would change.

He quickly used theThree Realm Compass to return to Black Wind City.

The subordinate areas of Black Wind City had been reduced to mud. Out of a hundred subordinate towns, dozens of them were in a state of destruction. However, the main city area of Black Wind City was strangely in good condition. That was because Sky Execution and the others didn’t even think about defeating the Black Wind City. Instead, they used it as a fighting ring to fight their opponents from the Southern Heaven Realm.

In the absence of Yue Yang, many battles had broken out between the two sides. Both sides had won and lost.

Of course, these battles were all small skirmishes. There was still the agreed deadline of half a month for the true battle. At that time, not only would the Emerald Lord appear, but the Lionheart King would probably be watching from afar. If Yue Yang’s side was not strong enough, there was a high chance of him making a move. During the early days of the cross-border war, both sides had maintained a little mutual understanding. Neither side had the intention of killing the other, in order to prevent the situation from becoming uncontrollable.

Sky Execution and his men had attacked too many times and killed a Heaven Ranked Martial Saint. This did not arouse any suspicions from the Master of Black Wind City, Old Demon Wei, and Bai Song.

They believed that it was the rebel army’s doing, and they blamed it on the heaven-stage experts of the West Heaven Realm.

This was because the few heaven-step experts of the rebel army and the destitute clan that would never compromise with the black wind had secretly killed three heaven-step reinforcements sent by the other city lords. The Master of Black Wind City was furious about the actions of these rebel soldiers. However, he had no choice but to recruit them. Other than being secretive, the rebel soldiers also had good strength. The most important thing was that the Master of Black Wind City had a headache due to the cross-border battles, so he had no time to fight the rebel army.

“How are you progressing?” Yue Yang saw that there was nothing to do, so he decided to head back to study his own runes and also raise the third level heaven-stage loli to the fourth level of the heaven stage.

The big-sized loli was one of the main forces in the later official battles.

The stronger she was, the more the other party would have a headache.

Ye Kong and Fatty Hai were both severely injured, with Old Nangong watching them cultivate, there was no danger of life or death, but injuries were unavoidable.

Compared to Tong Tian Tower, the Southern Heaven Realm was no different from Tong Tian Tower. If they randomly chose a demon beast, it was possible that their lives would be in danger. Ye Kong and Fatty Hai had already experienced countless death battles and were now much more mature. Their brows were furrowed, exuding a killing intent that came back from a hundred battles.

To Yue Yang, their killing intent was not affected at all. But if it was a martial artist from Tong Tian Tower, even if they were a Quasi-Heaven Stage martial artist, they would still feel frightened just by looking at them.

“Not bad, these few days, everyone has improved to different degrees.” Ye Kong laughed, “However, the ones who reaped the biggest gains were not us, but Li Qie and Li Ge, the two brothers.” The day before yesterday, we surrounded a Gryphon King who was at rank 9 Earth Stage. Who would have thought that during the most intense battle, a Gryphon Queen would fly back, nearly killing us all. Everyone went all out, and in the end, their Guardian Knight charged forward to hug the Griffin and the Griffin Queen and self-destructed. As a result, there was a special mutation that we could not even imagine … Their Guardian Knight has become a Griffin Knight, one’s riding horse has merged with the Griffin King, and the other has merged with the Griffin Queen. Both of them had transferred to the Silver level from the original Bronze level.

“Ah, that’s a good thing!” Yue Yang clapped his hands in appreciation. He used his vision to look at the Griffin Knights summoned by the Li brothers and realized that his potential had also improved.

“Becoming a Griffin Knight is nothing special. My appearance is still ugly. After my small rhino and small river horse mutate, I will definitely become a great beauty.” Fatty Hai began to indulge himself. The Wind Breath Seabird struck him on the forehead with a wind blade, part for punishing his lust, the other to be annoyed that he had missed it.

When everyone saw this, they laughed heartily. They all felt that the Wind Breath Seabird was much more human and intelligent than before.

It was hard to say whether Fatty Hai’s Rhinoceros, Brook Horse and Golden Mammoth would transform into a human form in the future. After all, he was too smart and human, so he would definitely be able to advance into a Dacred Beast.

It was only a matter of time before it could be cultivated.

chapters.title: Chapter 701 – Ascending, Giant Loli
chapters.body:
Chapter 701 – Ascending, Giant Loli

C701 - Ascending, Giant Loli

Rainbow Castle.

The giant Loli almost never cultivated. Most of the time, she was sleeping soundly and snoring loudly. In a while she would get up and stretch her muscles. If she worked hard at cultivating every day, then there would be no place for her to do this, because even mountains would collapse. Furthermore, to be precise, although she was a giant with a height of two hundred meters, she was actual a pauper. Her mindset and personality wereonly slightly more mature than that little girl Yue Shuang. She was naturally adept at fighting.

In the battle along with Yue Yang, although she had always been Heave Stage level 3 and never changed.

It had already been improved a few times.

It was either the awakening of his strength again or the Titan War Armor on her had a better fusion with her body, or her battle skills had been comprehended.

Yue Yang saw that she was still a sliver away from being a fourth level warrior, so he decided to help her ascend to the next stage earlier so that she could have a powerful boost in the final battle after half a month.

Helping the giant Loli improve was not simple. It would be hard enough to circulate around her body with innate energy.

The body of ancient Titan was too big, not to mention the giant Loli was the heir to the ancient Titan’s Royal Bloodline. Her body was even larger. However, Yue Yang still had a way to call out the Qilin girl Bing Yin from pillar of Nirvana Flamesand let her use the magic art which Yue Yang could not tell the name to shrink giant Loli to ten times, turning her into a twenty-meter tall female giant.

“It’s so difficult for me to fall asleep, yet I have to get up and work for you. My luck is terrible!” The Qilin girl yawned adorably as she shrunk the giant Loli while urging Yue Yang to make a move.

“Can you make me bigger? How about a kilometer?” Giant Loli blinked her eyes and asked.

“In theory, I can.” Qilin girl indicated that there was such a possibility.

“Well, when I find a mountain, you will make me bigger than a mountain.” Upon hearing this, giant Loli was extremely happy.

“Huh? Why?” The Qilin girl and Yue Yang were puzzled.

“Mom said if I could grow taller than a mountain, I’d really grow up. Although I haven’t grown up yet, I really want to know what I look like when I’m taller than a mountain in the future.” If the Dwarf tribe were to hear her words, the entire race would probably break down in tears. When Yue Yang and the Qilin girl heard this, they were speechless. Two hundred meters was not enough? Could it be that the height of the ancient Titan Royal family was one kilometer?

Yue Yang exhausted all his innate energy to open meridians for giant Loli.

Moreover, they were all connected.

According to local conditions, a new type of spiral meridian was created.

In the ancient Titan’s body, there was this special revolving meridian vaguely, but it did not connect, nor did it truly form. Yue Yang boldly created it in the body of giant Loli, and the template was the Barbarian Cow Shadow Ah Man and the others’ body that Yue Yang had to modify repeatedly. Anyway, giant Loli was strong enough, so no matter what he did, nothing would happen to her.

It was actually easier to help an ancient Titan open her meridians than to help a human.

The only hard part was that he had to consume too much innate energy. Yue Yang had to drip Gods’ Dew ten times into his mouth in order to barely complete this’ great project '.

“This time, we’ll stop here. Next time, we’ll do the reverse spiral!” Yue Yang was simply too tired. Otherwise, he would have tried to see what effect there would be if the reverse spiral meridians were connected to the ancient Titan’s body. After innate energy went through her meridians, Yue Yang once again used the Flames of Nirvana to refine her body. Qilin girl Bing Yin using her miniature immortal shrinking technique to maintain the state, was extremely tired. As soon as she saw that Yue yang could stop, she quickly ran.

“Is big brother very tired?” Although the giant Loliwas eager to improve herself, she was also a little apologetic. “Brother, why don’t you take a rest. It doesn’t matter in a few days!”

“It’s nothing.” Yue Yang knew that this was going to happen in one go.

He called out the Flames of Nirvana in the form of a phoenix and shot it through the body of giant Loli.

From outside to inside, and then from inside to outside.

This repeated purification caused giant Loli to cleanse her marrow and meridians in the pain of having her body incinerated. She was completely reborn.

When Captain Raging Flames saw the giant Loligrit her teeth in pain, she could not help but feel impressed. This was because before this, Yue Yang had purified her body with the the Flames of Nirvana. Moreover, that purifying feeling was far inferior to when the fire phoenix was constantly moving through the body, burning both inside and outside … For what giant Loli was able to bear, Raging Flames did not dare to say that she would be able to endure it. Even with the ancient dragon bloodline inheritance, she would not be able to compare to the true ancient Titan.

Finally, giant Loli could not help but bend over.

But she had to endure it, she didn’t want to fall to the ground.

She put her hand on the ground.

And persevered.

The Nirvana Fire Phoenix soared into the sky and then dove down. It penetrated her body, forming a pillar of Nirvana Flames that rose up into the sky.

The giant Loli who was bathed in the pillar of Nirvana Flames stood up and roared at the sky. After a long time, her entire body was shining with a golden light. It was as if a god had descended into the world … If not for Yue Yang’s timely control over the surrounding spatial energy, Rainbow Castle would probably have been reduced to smithereens the moment she leveled up.

“That’s amazing.” After coming out of the Ancient Arena, the female guardians who had been living with the giant loli were all standing behind Yue Yang, observing. The extremely adorable Quanbeauty was even clapping her hands and cheering.

“Do you want to try it as well?” Yue Yang teased her on purpose.

“No, we are of the Healing System, so we don’t need to become very powerful.” The Quan beauty wagged her tail gently and stretched out her small hand towards Yue Yang: “Didn’t you say you would reward me with a treasure last time?”

“If you don’t say it, I forgot.” Yue Yang tossed her a monocle.

“What treasure is this?” asked the canine beauty happily.

“It’s a very powerful treasure. Its full name is the Solidified Khorium Dog Eye Monocle, and if you wear it, you’ll be able to protect your eyes from anything else. It’s a very powerful treasure, and you won’t be able to get it.” “Pay attention, you are the only one in the world who has such a unique treasure!” Student Yue Yang answered solemnly.

“…” The group of female Guardian Warriors who had lifted their curses and never returned to the Ancient Arena all fainted after hearing that.

“This is really good stuff?” The Quan beauty felt that this thing was useless, but she couldn’t bear to throw it away. A unique treasure was something that she couldn’t refuse.

“Of course, a hundred percent treasure!” Only Yue Yang would study the battle puppet’s secret technique to create such a boring thing.

"oh…"Seeing Yue Yang’s actions of coaxing children, Raging Flame lifted her arms as if she was wiping her sweat to show her speechlessness.

This was naturally influenced by Yue Yang.

In the past, she would never express herself in such a way.

The only one who had an incomparable reverence for Yue Yang was the panda girl Niu Niu.

The giant loli, who had successfully ascended to the fourth rank of Heaven stage, waited for the Flames of Nirvana to transform into a fire phoenix and return to Yue Yang’s body before happily laughing out loud.

After being happy for a while, she bent down again and impatiently asked Yue Yang to fight: "Big brother, since you said you want to beat that bastard, I will immediately beat him down. Right now, I feel like my power will explode in my body, and I won’t be afraid of any enemies in the future. Haha, big brother’s method is indeed the best. “Now, quickly find an enemy for me to fight. It’s best to find a stronger one!”

Yue Yang was sweating profusely.

Fortunately, Raging Flame had taken the initiative to accompany Yue Yang to resolve this difficult problem.

In order to prevent the Rainbow Castle from being destroyed by their fight, Yue Yang took them to the Black Wind City of the Southern Heaven Realm.

This battle would cause a great catastrophe to befall the Black Wind City of the Southern Heaven Realm.

Even Sky Execution, Dragon Emperor, and the others were stunned when they heard the news. Just how strong would the Level 4 Ancient Titan and the Level 5 Flame be when they fought? It was simply not enough to describe it as a world shattering. After they exploded with their enhanced powers, they collided with each other and created shockwaves that were unimaginably terrifying. Previously, in the tombs outside the Gods’ Ruins, there was no real power. In the Southern Heaven Realm, in an empty space, once the battle started, dozens of kilometers radius would be reduced to ruins.

The shockwave was like a hurricane, affecting even trees thirty kilometers away.

Within a ten-kilometer-long central zone, regardless of whether it was mountains, hills, rocks, trees, or everything else, the two of them were beaten into pieces.

After the impact, the crater was even deeper than the crater created by the falling meteors. The resulting earthquake terrified everyone, causing mud and dust to fly up and cover the sky.

Black Wind, Bai Song, and Old Demon Wei, who were in the middle of a secret discussion in Black Wind City, all had faces full of panic when they sensed this fight. They assumed that the experts from the Tong Tian Sect, Long Teng Sect, and Demonic Palace had arrived, and were currently at war with the unknown Heaven Ranking. This kind of head-on collision was not something that an ordinary heaven-stage cultivator could achieve.

Even Old Demon Wei of the fifth rank didn’t have such confidence.

He was not a heaven stage powerhouse at all. If he was hit by this kind of force, he would have been defeated a long time ago.

The battle continued on for three hours without stopping … Black Wind, Bai Song, Old Devil Wei and the others were restless. Of course, they didn’t know that the flame of war against the giant loli had come to an end, only to be replaced by the shadow of the giant bull, Ah Man.

Without the giant shadow, the flames would not be able to clash head on with the giant loli.

Ah Man possesses the Power of Titan and the Heart of Earth. She is a war goddess who never gets tired. As a sparring partner of a big-sized loli, she is the most qualified one.

Thus, the battle that caused Black Wind and the others to be alarmed continued on until one day and one night later, when the battle officially ended and the huge loli exhausted herself.

Waiting for Yue Yang and the others to leave.

The Master of Black Wind City, Bai Song, and Old Demon Wei impatiently came to observe the battlefield.

As soon as they saw this, their expressions all changed. Even though they had mentally prepared themselves, they never imagined that the power of this battle would be so terrifying. The Master of Black Wind City thought that if the Emerald Lord showed his face, things would turn for the better. Now that he saw the terrifying ruins left behind after the war, his heart turned cold.

“Gulp!” Old Demon Wei’s face turned ashen as he swallowed a mouthful of saliva with great difficulty.

For the first time since the war, he felt small and weak.

chapters.title: Chapter 702 – Gate Of Life And Death
chapters.body:
Chapter 702 – Gate Of Life And Death

The Gate of Life and Death.

On the tenth floor of Tong Tian Tower, in the broken path, there is a special sealed unit world called the Gate of Life and Death.

Yue Yang had heard of it from the old man Nangong a long time ago, as well as from Xue Wuxia and Princess Qian Qian. This special sealed space was said to be a trial point created by the powerful experts of the ancient era from the cell world. According to the rules of the ancient era, only the Tong Tian Tower’s martial artists who were able to stay there for an hour were qualified to enter the Heaven Realm. Of course, this was a custom. Because of the great war six thousand years ago, the space channel to the Heaven Realm had collapsed. The Heaven Realm and Tong Tian Tower had already lost direct contact and gradually faded away.

Practicing inside the Gate of Life and Death had nothing to do with one’s level or strength.

More to do with spirit and will.

It was said that one was as strong as the Prison Emperor wouldn’t be able to stay there for a full day.

Scarlet Emperor, Black Hell King and the others had lasted for no more than an hour inside there. Others like Shun Tian, the Black Prince, and Thousand Demons Sect Leader only lasted for up to five minutes in record.

“This is an illusory and real world. If one can’t keep his heart, then he won’t be able to stay inside for even a minute. The Gate of Life and Death has a saying, taking one step forward is equivalent to surpassing oneself.” Queen Night asked Yue Yang followed her to the Gate of Life and Death in the tenth floor of Tong Tian Tower to gain some experience, “Little fellow, although your improvement is not bad and your cultivation speed is very fast, didn’t you realize that your domain strength has not achieved the effect of true domain strength yet? Come, after experiencing the Gate of Life and Death, I believe that you will possess a new and true ‘domain’.”

“True domain?” When Yue Yang heard this, his heart slightly moved.

The Flames of Nirvana, the Wheel of Destruction, the Wheel of Eternity, Star Explosion, Black Hole Swallow…

Yue Yang had many unique domain powers. Some of these domain powers could be completely controlled, while others could not yet display their full power. Some were uncontrollable, passive existences. Most importantly, most of the other people’s domain strength was in a relatively large area. It was in the shape of a semicircle or a sphere, with some sort of effect within the area.

The power of his domain was different, the forms different.

Furthermore, some of them could change at will, such as the Flames of Nirvana, simply according to Yue Yang’s will.

The domain of other people is immutable, or the change is also within a certain limit. Once the master moves out of the range of the domain, the effect of the domain will disappear.

Only Yue Yang’s domain was so peculiar. At first, he thought it’s because he could not fully master it. Now that he thought about it a bit more, he felt that his domain strength was a bit abnormal. If he didn’t completely master it, then that was one of the reasons. A true and complete understanding of it, is believed as one of the reasons as well. If the Flames of Nirvana, the Wheel of Destruction, and the Wheel of Eternity were not Yue Yang’s genuine domain power, then what was his domain power?

“Your situation is a little special and you possess many domains but let me put it this way. Right now, the various domains do not belong to you. It is just a by-product of your special physique. Other people do not have this. These make you ignore your own domain. If you haven’t already formed the primary domain before completely mastering Sovereign’s heart and ruling power, it might have an impact on your future advancement and battles. So, after thinking a bit, I feel that I should remind you first to take your time and focus on comprehending this main domain. With this, the ruling power which you have to control in the future will also have the best foundation for growth.” The words of the Night Queen made Yue Yang feel enlightened. It was as if a window in his heart had suddenly opened.

“Thinking about it, it really is like that …” Yue Yang was overjoyed.

“Wuxia and Qian Qian, they have a good harvest in the Gate of Life and Death. Now, Yi Nan and Bing’er are also working hard at cultivating.” Queen Night brought Yue Yang to the Gate of Life and Death in the tenth floor of Tong Tian Tower, explaining to him all sorts of trials and tribulations regarding the Gate of Life and Death.

The teleportation entrance to the Gate of Life and Death was really a door.

This door was incomparably huge.

The gatepost on one side was dark, and a demon of the trial carried the huge stone rim heavily.

On the other side of the door, there were two cherubs whose eyebrows were lowered, as if they were silently moving forward. The two cherubs easily supported the huge stone door’s edge, preventing the stone from pressing onto the shoulders of the female angel wearing a laurel crown.

At the top of the door, a huge dragon poked its head out and opened its mouth to spit dragon breath.

Beneath its mouth, huge words were written in Heaven Realm runes: Gate of Life and Death.

After passing through the golden vortex of energy, Yue Yang and his companions, Raging Flames, Drunken Cat, and the others were transported to the top of a stone altar.

The eternal golden portal on the altar was the exit. There were six steps leading down. That vast void was the true gate of life and death.

“Taking one step forward is equivalent to surpassing oneself.” Queen Night’s melodious voice rang out as she asked, "Which of you will go first? Remember, it’s all an illusion, but if you think it’s real, then it’s real. "

“I’ll go first!”

Raging Flames was rather anxious. She took big strides towards the steps ahead of Yue Yang and headed towards the endless Gate of Life and Death.

Let alone a fake one, even if it were true, she believed that her strength at the fifth level of Heaven Stage could withstand any kind of test. This was only the basic standard that a martial artist of Tong Tian Tower had to submit forentering the Heaven Realm. There was no reason that she wouldn’t be able to do so.

The secretly vigilant Raging Flames took a step forward, stepping into the mysterious world that had nothing in it but could carry everything.

When her right foot descended and her left leg was still stuck on the stairs, there was a figure in the space in front of her, flashing in an unfathomable manner. There was a red-haired middle-aged martial artist of Heaven Stage level 1 who was bathed in blood and ran over. When he saw RagingFlames, he immediately stretched out his hand and cried out, “Daughter, save me …” Raging Flames’ eyes instantly became round as her entire body trembled. Her father, it was actual her father!

Two figures flashed behind his father. In front of Raging Flames, they swung their swords and axes, slashing his father to death.

“No!”

Raging Flames was in a state of chaos as her anger exploded.

She was unable to watch her respected father being killed. All the words that the Queen Night had said before had completely collapsed at this moment. How could such a realistic scene be false? This was definite his father! It was precisely because of herindecision that her father was killed on the spot by the powerful enemy. Raging Flames’ regret and anger exploded with the terrifying power of martial artist in Heaven Stage level 5. With a punch, shecharged towards the two powerful opponents who had killed her father.

The two powerful opponents were sent flying on the spot.

The clown, however, flashed behind Raging Flames.

Without any time to dodge, Raging Flames’ back of head was smashed by the clown’s fast leg. Just when Raging Flames was suppressing his sneak attack, she reached out to grab the Clown and was about to break his bones, the Lionheart King’s fist, which was faster than light, smashed into Raging Flames’ face, easily knocking her down.

Captain Raging Flames, who had fallen to the ground in agony, fell on the edge of his father’s body.

She wanted to reach out and pick up her father’s head from the pool of blood, but the clown stomped down on the head …

“No!” Raging Flame struggled to stand up, erupting with all her might, preparing to perish together with the other party. Even if she died here, he could not allow the clown who desecrated her father’s corpse to continue living. Just as she pounced towards the clown, she felt a pain behind her back. The headless corpse had actually landed a slash on her body. This was impossible. How could her father attack him? Furthermore, he was clearly dead. Even his head was decapitated, and the clown stepped on it to shatter it.

“Are you looking for this?” The headless corpse suddenly raised a bloody eye-opened head. The mouth of the head spoke strangely.

“Impossible!”

Raging Flames’ mind was on the verge of collapse as she suddenly felt a burst of pulling force.

When she was dragged back to the altar steps by the pulling force, she realized that Yue Yang had reached out to pull her back.

When she retracted her right leg, the clown, the Lionheart King, her father’s corpse and the two assailants all vanished without a trace, as though they had never existed. However, when Raging Flames touched her mouth, she realized that she had been beaten to the point of vomiting blood by the Lionheart King. It was a fact. Even the slash from her father’s body had a bloody wound on her back.

Her body was actually injured by the illusion!

The only difference was that compared to the illusions just now, the injuries were a bit lighter.

“You have forgotten everything I have said, and mistakenly believe that your mental weakness is a fact, and the illusion becomes true. You must deny all of this in order to pass through it.” Midnight Empress said.

“Yes.” At this time, Raging Flames no longer dared to look down on Tong Tian Tower’s martial artists’ smelting trial.

Especially when she saw the timer in the hand of the Drunken Cat Sister, she felt even more ashamed.

She couldn’t hold on for more than a minute while the criteria is to hold on for an hour. Although she had the power of a fifth rank Heaven stage, her mental defenses were too weak. In the face of such a mental weakness, her mind couldn’t even withstand a single blow.

Yue Yang smiled at her.

Actually, on the first floor of Tong Tian Tower, there were two other palaces that had similar tests.

The Gemini Palace and the Virgo Palace, these two palaces were not things an ordinary person could live with. The Gemini Palace is the limit of the soul that challenges the self; the Virgo Palace is more terrifying, and even the most secret weakness in the heart can be fully revealed, and pointed to the heart. If Yue Yang didn’t have the help of XueWuxia and the others, it would be difficult for him to break out of the most difficult Virgo Palace in history.

The only one who had passed through the zodiac sign was Yue Yang. Stepping into this Gate of Life and Death, the feeling he had in his heart was completely different from the feeling Raging Flame had in her heart.

He stepped on air.

Countless powerful enemies appeared. Before the Purple-Gold Marquis, the later Shun Tian

, the black prince, the Thousand Demons Sect Leader, the Black Hell King, the Thousand Demons King, the clown, the Lionheart King, the scarlet emperor, and even the Ancient Devil King … No matter what kind of attack they made, Yue Yang turned a blind eye to it. When these people forcibly tore Ye Kong, Fatty Hai, Xue Tan Lang, and the others into shreds and devoured them, Yue Yang also had a smile on his face, completely unmoved by their actions.

Yue Bing and Yue Shuang ran towards Yue Yang, chasing after countless bad guys.

They wailed for their brother to save their lives, just like how flames had seen her father let the enemy hunt them down.

Yue Yang’s face finally changed and he stretched out his hand.

Raging Flame cursed. This was an illusion. As long as his heart was moved, he would be like herself just now, trapped in an illusion.

“My sister can’t be as weak as you are …” Before Yue Yang could finish his words, Yue Bing and Yue Shuang suddenly became giants. They were as huge as a giant loli. With just a few kicks, they trampled on the bad guys chasing them.

“He can actually control illusions?” Raging Flames was dumbstruck again. Wasn’t this fellow’s willpower too terrifying?

“I hate you, brother!” Yue Shuang, who had become a giant, suddenly trembled. She stretched her feet and stomped down on Yue Yang. If this stomp landed on Yue Yang, he would at least be severely injured if he didn’t die. Raging Flames clenched her fists tightly. She was no fool, the onlookers could see that the illusion regained control of the giant Yue Shuang and continued to attack Yue Yang when his will changed its target.

“Can you step harder?” Phantom, does not exist. " Yue Yang laughed. When that big foot stomped down, his body was completely unharmed, and that huge illusion turned into nothingness.

All the phantasmagoria vanished and a road appeared in the distance.

However, Yue Yang didn’t walk up. Instead, he casually walked towards the sky, and randomly walked backwards.

Sometimes, he would even take a few steps back on purpose … When the road disappeared and another black door appeared, Yue Yang didn’t even look at it and instead walked towards Raging flames.

The strange thing was, after a dozen steps, another altar appeared.

On top of the altar stood Xue Wuxia and Princess Qian Qian, waving to him.

Raging Flames almost loudly reminded them again to not fall for their trap. However, Yue Yang ran over and hugged them.

“In the Gate of Life and Death, the distance from the Gate of Life to the Gate of Death can be infinitely far, or it can only be a single step. If you can comprehend this mystery like Yue Yang, and walk to the altar opposite of him, then, you can truly be considered to have transcended yourself.” The voice of the Midnight Empress rang in the ears of the startled Raging Flames, "In the Gate of Life and Death, the distance from the Gate of Life to the Gate of Death can be infinitely far, or it can only be a single step. Taking one step forward is equivalent to surpassing oneself, you should slowly experience it! “The Gate of Life is merely the beginning of an expert. To be able to meditate in the Gate of Death, that is the true power …”

“Yes.” Raging Flames was sincerely convinced. Tong Tian Tower’s martial artists weren’t simple at all.

On the surface, she could tell that this Midnight Empress’s level was inferior to her.

However, in a real battle, Raging Flames had a feeling that she would be unable to fight back and allow Midnight Empress to easily defeat her.

Raging Flames looked at the eagerly waiting Drunken Cat Sister and breathed in deeply. Closing her eyes, she extended her foot and stomped heavily on the empty space outside. The clown reappeared, and Flames fought back the sense of mistake in their hearts, desperately telling herself that this was only a mirage, not a real one.

However, the clown grinned viciously.

He flew up with his long legs and kicked Flames, screaming arrogantly, “Idiot, so what if I betrayed you back then?” I killed so many people back then, what can you do to me! Look at your despicable appearance, you wouldn’t dare to retaliate even if I were to beat you up. You call yourself a criminal with enmity, you are simply the biggest trash of the Southern Heaven Realm! “Go to hell, trash like you don’t have the qualifications to live on!”

The clown consecutively kicked a few dozen legs, causing Raging flames, which were struggling to stand firm, to continuously retreat.

Finally, Raging Flames retreated up the steps and the clown disappeared.

Raging Flames stretched out her hand to touch the footprints left by the clown’s kick. She spat out a mouthful of blood and muttered to himself, “This is indeed a very abnormal trial. However, I will not admit defeat!”
