Even though this woman wasn’t very strong, but how could she be an ordinary person as she was about to become a sage stage panda?

The most important thing was that these human were not simple. Even the weakest girl could easily kill a large group of demonic cows and Fire Hyenas. If he were to contract her as his master, it would not be a bad.

No matter what, he couldn’t become that Hui Tai Lang’s contracted warbeast. That would be too dangerous!

Judging from the other party’s intelligence, he definitely wouldn’t have the chance to display it.

It was a wolf that had fused with the Dark Saint Armor and a Sacred stage Demon Sickle. Furthermore, it was a God Beast. Why would it need him to fight for it?

When the Golden Flaming Lion saw the strange wolf summoning the Grimoir, it trembled in fear. He hurriedly crawled over to the tall woman and wailed, begging her to hurry up and contract with it so that the strange wolf wouldn’t take the initiative … As long as the other party didn’t kill his entire family, serving this noble human while continuing the generation, it seemed pretty good … As for the wolf that seemed to be plotting its downfall, He would never place its wife and two young children under its claws!

“Mom, you can contract it. When I grow up, I will definitely protect mom. But Niu Niu is still young, so right now, I can only use this ugly big lion.” The little panda girl’s words made the Golden Flaming Lion’s face turn red. How could he be such an ugly lion?

However, he really couldn’t compare to her. Right now, the little panda was a Dacred Beast. He didn’t even say a word to her, he was simply too far off from her!

Seeing that its future master was still hesitating, the Golden Flaming Lion quickly made his smartest move.

He called over the sleeping cubs and placed them at the feet of their future owners.

He crawled on the ground again.

It was like the surrender of the entire family.

“Well, if that’s what everyone wants.” When the tall woman summoned the Grimoire, the Golden Flaming Lion was so moved that tears flowed down its cheeks. Finally, it would not land in the hands of the wolf. Fortunately, its master was still a human and not a strange wolf.

chapters.title: Chapter 709 - Man Proposes, But God Disposes
chapters.body:
Chapter 709 - Man Proposes, But God Disposes

C709: Man proposes, but God disposes

Lion King Valley.

The Wild Bull Thief Guild was on their way here.

In the Emerald Territory, the Wild Bull Thief Guild was a notorious bandit group. Their leader’s original name was already unknown, and everyone called him by his nickname, ‘Wild Bull’.

The name of the bandit group was also named because of him. Originally, they had registered their real name in the Mercenary Guild as the Gold Digger, but because they had committed too many crimes, the mercenary group had been reclassified as the bandit group renamed Wild Bull Thief Guild.

Captain Wild Bull, who was at the peak of the second level of the Heaven Stage, was one of the secret weapons of the Emerald Lord that could neutralize the city lords. Because of the support from the people behind him, the Captain Wild Bull was not afraid of wanted posters at all. He led a group of vile and crazed men, brazenly dominating the Emerald Territory and slaughtering and robbing everywhere. City Lords, if they do not submit to the Emerald Lord, the territory they rule will be attacked and trampled upon by the Wild Bull Thief Guild.

The Emerald Lord had successfully rebelled, with over a hundred city lords supporting him loyally, while only ten of them were loyal.

The thirty city lords merely supported him on the surface.

If these 30 city lords were considered to show due respect for Emerald Lord’s feeling, admitting his rule, then the other 50 city lords were his sore point.

The lords had been neutral, neither supportive nor opposed.

In addition to paying a small amount of tax each year, they also secretly resisted the authority of the Emerald Lord. They refused the officials sent by the Emerald Lord, and some even secretly supported the rebel lords in the remote and dangerous areas, continuing to challenge the Emerald Lord.

The Wild Bull Thief Guild was formed from these 50 neutral city lords.

After decades of killing and looting, some progress has finally been made.

There were more than ten city lords who were unable to bear this sort of harassment, and they officially submitted to the Emerald Lord, recognizing him as a lord with a legal status.

Right now, as the most loyal ally of the Emerald Lord, the Master of Black Wind City suddenly had a fire in his backyard. He accidentally clashed with the three great sects of Western Realm and a cross-border war broke out. To ensure that the common good would not suffer any losses, this vicious Wild Bull Thief Guild immediately had been gathered back from afar by the Emerald Lord, preparing to attack the third private army and start a war with the experts of Western Realm …

“Guild Leader, why do we need to detour around the Lion King Valley?” As an assistant of the Wild Bull for many years, Niu Gen only possessed the strength of Earth Stage Level 5. He had always maintained his habit of asking when he didn’t know what was going on, always using his own stupidity to show off his Guild Leader’s intelligence.

“You really are a fool. Captain has his own plans. Why are you asking? Is this also something that a mere Team Leader like you can be concerned about?” The Heaven Stage expert who had just been promoted to the vice leader position, Fei Huang, used the prestige of a high-level member to scold the old man, Niu Gen. In the eyes of the locust, Niu Gen who was Earth Stage Level 5 was nothing more than a flatterer with a scum strength. He relied on the Captain Wild Bull’s hometown identity, as well as his old official qualification and flattery when he was creating a group. If it were another bandit group, a villain like Niu Gen would have been eliminated long ago, how could he still be a division leader?

“I dare not. Vice-Captain, please calm your anger.” Niu Gen quickly apologized in a very sincere manner.

“Forget it, time is tight anyway. Wandering around the Lion King Valley does indeed confuse the brothers. It makes sense for Niu Gen to ask about it.” Hua Ban who joined the group with the Fei Huang felt that it was not proper to offend their old official. Although they did not have the strength, they were still old and were fellow townsmen of Captain Wild Bull.

“Brothers, don’t worry.” The Captain Wild Bull, who was on a Golden Chariot pulled by two golden bull kings of quasi-Heaven Stage, displayed the dignity of a superior person with every move he made. At the same time, he displayed his tolerance towards brothers. If there was someone who didn’t know him, they would have thought that this middle-aged man with an extraordinary and gentle temperament was a city lord, or perhaps even a renowned person of the region. Who would know that he was an extremely vicious demon that would cause others to talk about him viciously? Only those who knew the secret would know that he was the one who captured and sold one-tenth of the slaves in the Emerald Territory. The number of slaves was no less than a million.

Even if the Wild Bull who had killed at least ten million people, was only at the peak of the second level of Heaven Stage.

However, his bounty was even higher than the Master of Black Wind City’s bounty of 220 million with strength of Heaven Stage level 3.

In the Emerald Territory, for the Mercenary Guild of each city, Wild Bull was ranked fourth among the ten wanted criminals. His bounty was 318 million, which meant that he was the strongest criminal at the same level.

On the surface, he was a man of honor, with a magnetic voice, a graceful manner, and a mature disposition that could move some women who did not know the truth. Of course, the vast majorities of women who were attracted to him, instead of becoming his slave, became the delicacies on his dining table. In the eyes of Captain Wild Bull, pure virgin blood and secret women’s buttocks and breasts were unparalleled delicacies in the world.

Of course, very few people knew about this hobby, including Fei Huang and Hua Ban, who were in the important position after just joining the Wild Bull Thief Guild.

Captain Wild Bull liked to pause when he spoke. First, he wanted everyone to focus more, and second, he wanted everyone to clap in time.

He handled affairs with great leadership and art.

“Why did we detour to this Lion King Valley? There are three reasons.” Wild Bull paused slightly. All people were attracted by his words, and a look of attentive listening appeared on their faces. He nodded in satisfaction, and then explained at a moderate pace, “First, Lion King Valley is located not too far away from Black Wind City. It is very likely that it is the temporary residence of a powerhouse from the Western Realm. If we come here, we have the intention of exploring their true location. If not, then we can narrow down the search once more, cutting out this important base.”

“So that’s how it is…” The old official, Niu Gen, showed an expression of enlightenment.

“Second, if the enemy is not here, we can secretly occupy the Lion King Valley as a temporary base.” Captain Wild Bull explained the second reason. As a bandit group, even if they secretly joined the battle and the other city lords knew about it, they wouldn’t be welcomed. As a notorious Wild Bull Thief Guild, it was impossible for them to live in Black Wind City no matter what. Thus, the Lion King Valley as a stronghold was a good place to stay.

“Good, it’s definitely good!” Niu Gen excitedly extended his thumb.

“The Lion King Valley is a good place. This place is indeed safe, and it’s secretive enough.” More than a dozen of the squad leaders were whispering to each other, praising the Guild Leader for his shrewdness.

“However, the Lion King Valley is ruled by a group of fire lions. Although all the lionesses are under the Quasi-Heaven Stage, the Lion King is a Heaven Stage. If we want to forcibly occupy this place, it will be very difficult for us to cause any trouble.” The vice regiment commander Fei Huang didn’t mean that he was afraid of the Heaven stage Old Lion, but that there might be an accident.

If the Lion King Valley allowed the powerhouses of the Western Heaven Realm to take over the stronghold, then the Wild Bull Thief Guild would arrive in a grandiose manner. That would be the same as sending themselves to their deaths!

Other than the Guild Leader and the two Deputy Team Leaders, the rest of the members, such as Niu Gen, would definitely die without a single one remaining.

It didn’t matter if the essence of Niu Gen died, but if the Wild Bull Thief Guild were wiped out, that would be a heavy loss. Without soldiers and generals under his command, how could he fight against the experts of the Western Heaven realm? Even if they won, no one would carry their spoils of war! For Fei Huang, who had just joined the regiment and was promoted to vice leader, he did not wish to see the entire regiment wiped out.

The reason why he joined the Wild Bull Thief Guild was not because of the bad reputation of the Wild Bull Thief Guild.

It was the Wild Bull Thief Guild that were large enough and large enough.

Wild Bull Thief Guild gathered all kinds of berserk gangsters, numbering more than 50,000. There were almost all sorts of people, and they had plundered for many years. Their wealth was simply incomparable to that of a country. That’s why Fei Huang and Hua Ban took refuge in the Guild.

Although they were still not a match for the 2 level Heaven stage Wild Bull, there were two people in total, Fei Huang and Hua Ban.

As long as he broke through to the 2 level of Heaven realm, he would soon be able to overthrow the Wild Bull.

If the Wild Bull Thief Guild were gone, wouldn’t Fei Huang and Hua Ban be restored back to their former two bachelors?

“Sirs, don’t worry.” The Wild Bull smiled, he himself lifted the silver pot, filled his golden cup on the table with a glass of wine, handed it to Fei Huang, and then looked him straight in the eye, very sincerely, nodding gently as Fei Huang drank. After Fei Huang thanked him for his drink, he poured another cup of wine for Hua Ban, and then drank three cups of the golden cup to show that he enjoyed his wealth with his two brothers. The Wild Bull stood up and explained in a gentle voice to his brothers, “This place is far away from Black Wind City. I will do my utmost to make an enemy with my own hands and never allow a brother to harm us. Everyone, stay here and focus on your future affairs.”

“Clap clap clap!” Niu Gen took the lead and applauded enthusiastically.

When he heard that the Company Leader would take action, he was a Heaven Stage Martial Saint. With the help of two Deputy Company Leaders, capturing the Flaming Lion King was naturally not a difficult task.

And so, they all sprinted forward with full vigor.

Everyone wanted to show their meritorious service in front of the Guild Leader.

After the members of the party had dispersed, the Wild Bull indicated for the two vice-captains to sit beside him, saying with a smile, “In fact, ever since the plan to come here, I have been asked about the Lion King Valley. A few years ago, the Lion King Valley had a Golden Flaming Lion that fought with the former Fire Lion King. Furthermore, it injured the lion king and drove him out of the valley. When I learned of this news, a few days ago, I ordered the two lions to be put out of the valley and let them meet the wandering lion king. As I thought, with the help of the two Quasi-Heaven stage Mighty Flaming Lions, the Flaming Lion King decided to reclaim the throne … “Right now, they are most likely already in a deadlock. We only need to head there and we will be able to reap the benefits. So what’s the risk?”

Only then did Fei Huang and Hua Ban understand that what they had said before was nonsense.

This Wild Bull Guild Leader was not a simple person after all.

If the experts of the Western Heaven realm really occupied this place, would he bring his subordinates here to die? It turned out that he had already planned this and had long prepared to reveal his Guild Leader’s might to personally take on the Heavenly Stage Flame Lion King.

The two of them were awed by the Captain Wild Bull’s arrangement.

Facing such a person, wanting to plunder this bandit group was a bit difficult. No wonder the bounty on the bounty on the Wild Bull was 318 million. Until now, no one had been able to touch a single hair on his head. Fei Haung and Hua Ban both praised that this was a brilliant plan. They praised the Captain Wild Bull’s brilliance and then slightly expressed their loyalty. After hearing the Wild Bull nod his head, they secretly let out a sigh of relief.

They didn’t see that when the Captain Wild Bull was the most satisfied with his smile, his narrowed eyes flashed with a light, like the fangs of a venomous snake.

No one could see the light in his eyes, and no one could read his mind.

Only those who had been with the Captain Wild Bull for the longest period of time knew of this.

All the heaven stage experts who wanted to join the Wild Bull Thief Guild, and all the vice-captains of the Wild Bull Thief Guild, would all die by coincidence in every battle. Either they were unable to rescue them in time, or the vice-captains would reveal them, or they would encounter factors that were beyond their control … In short, for the time being, there was no vice-leader who could successfully live past two years.

As for the outside world’s guesses about the Wild Bull Thief Guild’s wealth, it doubled every year.

Every year, it would attract a Heaven Stage expert to join them.

But without exception, noone was the last to live.

Only all useless trash that were useless. Not the more intelligent and powerful vice-captains of the Heaven stage!

Here they arrived at the Lion King Valley.

Outside the valley were the footprints of the Fire Lion King and the other two lions.

At this moment, the Captain Wild Bull stood up from the Golden Chariot and expressed to the members that he would personally go to investigate the enemy’s intelligence. If there was a Western Heaven realm elite, when they released fireworks, everyone would temporarily retreat upon seeing the signal. If there were no experts from the Western Heaven Realm, kill the Fire Lion King, take over the Lion King Valley, and turn this place into a temporary stronghold for the Wild Bull Thief Guild.

The two vice-captains Fei Huang and Hua Ban also asked the Captain Wild Bull if he was willing to join hands to kill the Flaming Lion King.

If it wasn’t for the fear of alerting the powerhouses of the Western Heaven realm, Niu Gen and his team would have shouted long live greetings to the Captain Wild Bull and sent him off with the warmest applause …

On the high cliffs, there was a group of people that no one could see.

He was watching all of this.

“I was just looking for a Heaven stage to test your domain, but now someone has delivered himself to me.” I’ll leave the leader to you and the rest to everyone, let’s have a good fight! “I can’t believe it, these two lions were deliberately placed here by this guy. With such a cunning servant, what kind of person would the master behind him, the Emerald Lord, be?” Holding the book of the truth in her hands, Xue Wuxia ended her speech with a slight muttering to herself.

“I didn’t know before, but soon, he will become a dead man.” Yue Yang who had comprehended the Domain Power from the Gate of Life and Death was extremely confident.

“Meow!” Hui Tai Lang glared, warning the Golden Flaming Lion not to show off for contribution. He needed to have the resolve to be its lackey.

“…” The Golden Flaming Lion almost had tears in its eyes.

Was this guy a wolf or a man? Why was he so jealous?

chapters.title: Chapter 710 - Illusion, Fantasy
chapters.body:
Chapter 710 - Illusion, Fantasy

C710: Illusion, Fantasy

The Captain Wild Bull saw the lion herd’s destruction to both side.

Of course, he also discovered traces of humans fighting. In almost the blink of an eye, he, Fei Huang and Hua Ban had made the most correct reactions.

Stealth.

From the cliff wall, the three of them found a special cave that did not belong to nature.

This should be a man-made tunnel … The Captain Wild Bull and Fei Huang were first stunned, then they cautiously held their breath, using their minds to sense the abnormality in their surroundings. Someone must have been there, and more than one. Did this place really turn the powerhouses of the Western Heaven Realm into a secret stronghold? Or was it a treasure trove of some thief guild.

After robberies, many thief guilds could not sell their goods immediately.

This was especially so for those especially reputable treasures. Once they made a move, they would be discovered, tracked down, and placed a bounty on them.

In order to ensure the maximum benefit of the loot, the thief guild would usually look for a secret cave or small island and bury the best treasure until they had an agreement with the black market, or until they found a buyer, they would then dig out the treasure.

Not to mentions others.

Even Wild Bull did the same.

Go around with the loot? This is not showing off your wealth, this is brain-dead!

“Is Master Barton really going to leave everything here? The Lion King Valley is not safe here, and it’s not far from Black Wind City.” The Captain Wild Bull saw two humans walking out from the tunnel. They weren’t very powerful. One of them was a man of Earth Stage Level 7 while the other was a woman of Earth Stage Level 6. The woman seemed to have a keen intuition towards the outside world. She kept looking around, and Captain Wild Bull hurriedly closed his eyes to prevent her from sensing him.

“Even if I say you’re stupid, you still won’t admit it. What does it mean to put your life on the line before you die? What was the most dangerous place to be safe? This was! Who would have thought that the Lion King Valley would become the place where Master Barton keeps his possessions?” However, the handsome young man was unaware of the surroundings.

“Although that’s the saying, I still feel that something is amiss here.” The woman who was carrying the giant bronze sword kept looking for something with her eyes.

“Don’t be so paranoid! Let’s not even mention the Golden Flaming Lion escaping, even if the Fire Lion King and the male fire lion were killed in battle, they wouldn’t be able to survive the blows of the Master of Black Wind City. The City Lord is personally overseeing the situation!” The young man didn’t care at all.

“Let’s hurry up and leave. If the badly injured Golden Flaming Lion returns, that would be terrible.” The woman held onto the man’s hand and retreated back into the cave.

After a long time, there were no longer any shadows.

The Captain Wild Bull felt his breath after it was dissipating much a while.

It was as light as a leaf drifting with the wind. The man-made cave passage was not that deep. At the end of the tunnel, a temporary teleportation formation had been set up. Between the walls of the passage, there were a few other conspicuous marks of passages, which were the secondary passages and the true treasure trove. These places were all sealed by special runes, and there were stone doors on the outside as well, making them look like rock walls. If it wasn’t specially marked, it would be difficult to see any treasure trove excavated inside.

Seeing this, the Captain Wild Bull sneered in his heart.

It had been quite a while since Master of Black Wind City and Barton had wanted to get rid of the Emerald Lord’s support.

Although they were loyal on the surface, everyone had their own selfish motives. Wild Bull often received secret reports saying that the Master of Black Wind City had some underhanded tricks up his sleeves … It now seamed sure enough that the items that Barton had taken away were only a cover up on the surface and the real items were stored here.

From the secret excavation of the cave, Black Wind and Barton had already made plans.

If Black Wind hadn’t suddenly clashed with the three great sects, the Western Heaven Realm, Long Teng Sect and the Heavenly Demon Sect, he wouldn’t have come to the Lion King Valley, and he wouldn’t have used this as a base. If he did not come to the Lion King Valley, how could he know that the real wealth of Black Wind and his lackey, Barton, was stored here? It was really ‘I broke through all iron and found nothing, I didn’t have to put in effort to get them all’!

The portal shimmered.

Captain Wild Bull, quickly out of the cave, and then urgently signal Fei Huang and Hua Ban, do not make a sound.

After a while, it was still the two youngsters from before. Seeing their unfamiliar faces, Wild Bull knew that Black Wind and Barton had done many small movements behind Emerald Lord’s back that he did not know about and nurtured many new confidants.

“Perhaps the Golden Flaming Lion is still alive, I don’t want to investigate. I always feel that something is wrong here, that something is very dangerous.” The female swords-woman held the young man’s hand. She seemed to have received an order to investigate the Lion King Valley, but was unwilling to carry it out. Her innate intuition made the Wild Bull shiver. If she were to report this to the Master of Black Wind City and Barton, it would definitely arouse their suspicions.

“It’s fine if you don’t want to patrol. In any case, this is a desolate mountain range, and no one would have never come here.” The handsome man and young woman were supposed to be a pair of lovers, comforting each other with good words.

They came out of the hole and looked around.

It was easy for Wild Bull, Fei Huang and Hua Ban to kill them, but they didn’t want to reveal their tracks. They held their breath and hid in the grass.

Seeing that nothing was out of the ordinary, the young couple carried the lion corpses into the cave and arranged the entrance to the cliff slightly. They first blocked the entrance with rocks, then stacked the entrance with vines to conceal it. When they were done, they felt that they were in perfect shape. They smiled at each other and took out the golden scroll. In an instant, they teleported away.

Upon discovering such a big secret, Captain Wild Bull was overjoyed.

How much money had the Master of Black Wind City looted over the years?

That was uncountable!

No matter what the cross-border battle with the Western Heaven realm would be like, as long as they could get their hands on the Master of Black Wind City’s belongings, they would not suffer any losses in this business.

What made the Captain Wild Bull the most excited was that the Master of Black Wind City was just a mantis stalking a cicada who did not know that he was the oriole stalking behind, and the location of the great treasure had already been discovered by him. Whether the master won the cross-border war or not, he would be a pauper. But the Captain would sit on the mountain and watch the tigers fight, he would become the biggest fisherman!

“Brother Fei Huang and Brother Hua Ban, you two immediately order your brothers to enter the valley and secretly station themselves there. After done, head to Black Wind City and meet up with me. The place where we stand is declared to be the Goat Horn Canyon. Other than the Emerald Lord, no one else knows of our passage through the Lion King Valley. ” Even if the Captain Wild Bull didn’t say anything, both Fei Huang and Hua Ban understood what was going on. They were incredibly excited about this kind of treasure. Although there was no need to dig out all the treasures that the Master of Black Wind City had meticulously collected, but the truth was that this windfall had already been sent into the Wild Bull Thief Guild ’ pockets, becoming a possession in their hands.

“Yes, Captain.” The two quickly acknowledged the order and quickly left the valley, letting the bandit group quiet down. They secretly entered the valley, but of course, the matter of the treasure was not disclosed.

“Give this ring to the lord, tell him we found the rabbit den.” The Captain Wild Bull wrote a letter on the spot and summoned another ‘Red Claw Snow Pigeon’.

He first kept the letter in his ring, then he sealed it with a secret technique.

Then, put the ring on the feet of the Red Claw Snow Pigeon.

He raised his hand and threw it towards the sky.

“Gu gu gu gu.” The Red Claw Snow Pigeon soared into the sky.

In the blink of an eye, it vanished.

The Captain Wild Bull could not help but feel a little proud of himself.

He thought to himself, “This time, it is another great achievement. The Master of Black Wind City has already fattened by himself. If I don’t slaughter it now, it will be difficult for me to do so.” The Master of Black Wind City had a close relationship with the clown, Long Xiang, and Rachel, and he had the heart to take refuge in the Lion Prince. The Emerald Lord had been worried that he would not be able to get the egg, so he had never cooked this lackey. Now that he had found the Master of Black Wind City’s treasure trove, how could he still be alive?

The cross-border war in the Western Heaven realm was caused by the Master of Black Wind City. It was just right for him to use this as an excuse to get rid of the Master of Black Wind City.

On the one hand, he was in charge of the goods; on the other hand, he was in charge of power. On the other hand, he was the one who could quell the anger of the powerful warriors of the Western Heaven realm.

From a distance, he saw Fei Huang and Hua Ban led into the valley. In the Captain Wild Bull’s eyes, there flashed a trace of a sneer. His smile was full of murderous intent, like a venomous snake’s tooth.

He crushed the crystal in his hand and made the appearance of teleporting away to Black Wind City.

A doppelganger that was conjured from a special type of warbeast entered the portal, while the real body disappeared into the darkness.

After arranging the members of the bandit group to build a secret base here, Fei Huang and Hua Ban flew towards Black Wind City. In order to make the time difference between them and the Captain Wild Bull, they did not immediately use the Teleportation Crystal. Instead, they chose to fly a long distance.

In addition to their agreement with the Captain Wild Bull, they also harbored a bit of selfishness.

“Are we really going to Black Wind City just like that?” Fei Huang grunted with emotion, “I dare to say, once we get to Black Wind City, Wild Bull will find fault with us and attack the Master of Black Wind City.” Once the two sides are at loggerheads, we can’t help but be caught in the crossfire. We fought to the bitter end, but he and the Emerald Lord benefited the most. Maybe they will end our lives in the hands of Black Wind City for the best possible benefits … “How many Heaven Ranked powerhouses died in the Wild Bull Thief Guild ? All of them are vice captains, but the Bison lives well, it’s hard to not be suspicious!”

“Let’s just wait and see!” “If it really is the Black Wind’s treasure trove, excavating all of it wouldn’t be an easy task. It would be even more difficult for me to take them all with me.” “If this is the Bison’s probe, then we’ll enter the cave and get the treasures and fall for it.”

“It doesn’t seem like a test, does it?” “The Wild Bull’s expression is very happy!” Startled, the Fei Huang halted.

“Wild Bull, it’s impossible to guess what’s in his heart just by looking at the surface. Who would have thought that he would send two male fire lions to the Lion King Valley?” “Of course, it might not necessarily be a probe. Perhaps it might really be a coincidence. It’s also possible that Black Wind has really kept the treasure here.” Hua Ban felt that he and Fei Huang were not ambitious on the surface. Captain Wild Bull shouldn’t have tried to probe them like this. If this was just a test, then everything that he had just done was unnecessary!

“Eh …”Fei Huang immediately waved his hand to stop Hua Ban words.

Because he saw a shadow ahead of him.

Very like Wild Bull.

Unlike the shadows seen by Fei Huang and Hua Ban, the shadows seen by bison were those of two young men.

The couple that had left the valley earlier had somehow returned to the outskirts of the Lion King Valley. The appearance of the two people confused the Wild Bull and made it uneasy. If the two of them were to return to the Lion King Valley and saw tens of thousands of bandits camping in the valley, the plan they had made would definitely fail.

Why did the young couple return to Lion King Valley?

Had they not carefully scanned their surroundings and been scolded by Barton? Had they come back to check again? Wild Bull was getting anxious. What should he do to stop them?

chapters.title: Chapter 711 - Despair, Real Illusions
chapters.body:
Chapter 711 - Despair, Real Illusions

C711: Despair, Real Illusions

Perhaps, he could use the swordswoman’s fear.

The Captain Wild Bull thought of a plan.

He hurriedly retreated and summoned another Flaming Lion King of Heaven Stage. If he got too close, it was highly likely that the opponent would see through him, with realizing that this was a warbeast contracted by a human. However, it was very far away and only released its aura. It was very difficult to tell whether it was a wild magical beast or a contracted warbeast.

With its Heaven Stage strength, it should not be a problem for the Flaming Lion King to scare away that young couple.

As expected by the Captain Wild Bull, the moment the Flaming Lion King appeared, before he could raise his head and roar, the sharp swordswoman sensed it.

“Something’s wrong. A powerful magical beast has appeared here. It’s a Heaven Stage and King Stage.” The swordswoman took the young man’s hand.

“Roar!” The Flaming Lion King roared, shaking the world.

“Too terrifying …”

The pair of lovers were so terrified that they immediately crushed the teleportation stone and fled without a trace.

Before Wild Bull could be happy, he noticed that there was someone behind him. At first, he thought it was Fei Huang and Hua Ban. However, a sense of danger welled up from the bottom of his heart. He did not turn around, but a cold light flashed in his eyes as he grunted, “Master of Black Wind City, is that you?”

He slowly turned his head around to discover that the Master of Black Wind City was suppressing his rage and was standing behind him.

Captain Wild Bull sighed inwardly at the appearance of the Master of Black Wind City. He had been too careless!

How could the Master of Black Wind City leave so easily when he had spent all his efforts and collected all the loot that he had accumulated over the years in the Lion King Valley? With a suspicious mind, he would have to check over and over to make sure that there were no problems before he could feel at ease. Perhaps, Black Wind had already been on his guard ever since he sent out the two lions.

Wrong, he was all wrong!

If he could do it all over again, he would definite pretend that he didn’t know anything.

It was a pity that life could not be repeated … Looking at Black Wind’s eyes that were filled with boundless killing intent, the Wild Bull knew that today’s matter was not going to end peacefully.

“If you really think that you can defeat me at the second level of Heaven stage, then you’re wrong.” Captain Wild Bull sneered. If he hadn’t hidden his strength and unique skill, he would have been killed by the bounty hunters long ago. How could he still live happily until now?

“Wild Bull, I won’t deny one thing. You can become the only loyal dog of the Emerald Lord, and you have unique skills. However, if you think that I will let you go, then you are wrong.” Actually, I had already discovered your trick a long time ago. From the very start, there were already some tricks up your sleeves, and I was waiting for you to fall for them.” Black Wind waved his hand, and Heaven Stage experts like Sect Leader of Bai Song, Qing Song, Hong Song, Pang Man, and Jin Feng emerged from the darkness in a line. Each time a person appeared, Wild Bull’s eyebrows jumped. Six were experts of Heaven Stage, two of which were even higher than him. Six against one, this battle would be the toughest he had ever fought in his life!

“Sect Leader of Bai Song clan, and Mister Pang Man, are you two really going to surround and kill me?” Captain Wild Bull suddenly laughed and calmly asked.

“In fact, we are just stating the truth. We don’t have the right to interfere with the grudge between the Master of Black Wind City and you.” Indeed, the doyish Sect Leader did not stand on the Black Wind’s side.

However, even a blind person could see it.

If Wild Bull was defeated, they would not mind slashing him while he was under the water.

Pang Man had the same attitude. Wild Bull was man of the Emerald Lord. Before he was defeated, neither he nor Bai Song were willing to offend the Emerald Lord.

The Master of Black Wind City had summoned his strongest warbeast, ‘Black Hurricane’, who was at the second level of Heaven Stage. In order to restrain Wild Bull, he had even summoned a sand worm. Later on, the most loyal subordinate of Black Wind, General Jin Feng, also summoned a Gold Leopard that had just stepped to the Heaven Stage. General Jin Feng and Captain Wild Bull were not on the same level, but he could control the Wild Bull’s ‘Flaming Lion King ‘.

Seeing this, not only did the Wild Bull’s expression not change drastically, he even started to laugh out loud in disagreement.

Even though the Black Wind had the help of General Jin Feng, how could he not be assisted?

Sure enough, Fei Huang and Hua Ban sensed the change in their auras and quickly flew over.

Seeing the situation, their complexions changed, but seeing how calm the Captain Wild Bull was, they immediately stood behind him and summoned a group of Quasi-Heaven Stage Calamity Locust and a long-tailed leopard that was similar in strength to the Golden Leopard.

“Hah, come out and let your enemies tremble!” Captain Wild Bull summoned a Demon Bull King and a Bull-head Warrior with Golden Belt, both of which are Heaven Stage level 2. As the Black Wind’s expression grew more and more unsightly, Captain Wild Bull summoned a Lightning Beast in Heaven Stage. In the end, Wild Bull took out a high-grade Saint Stage treasure, the Forbidden Sphere Ball, and swept his gaze over Sect Leader of Bai Song and Pang Man.

The Forbidden Sphere Ball was able to deprive all flying warbeasts in the space field of their flying ability within one-kilometer radius. The time allotted was 10 minutes.

What would happen if the elemental warbeast Black Hurricane lost its ability to fly?

What would the result be if the Master of Black Wind City lost his ability to fly?

The expressions of Bai Song, Pang Man, and the others instantly changed.

Captain Wild Bull laughed.

He liked to enjoy the pleasure of playing with his enemies … Although his level wasn’t that high, there were at least four contracted warbeasts of Heaven Stage and above. Let alone Bai Song and the others, even if they attacked, the Captain would still have a way to escape.

“Go to hell!” The Master of Black Wind City was extremely furious. When the warbeast Black Hurricane landed, he immediately rushed forward with the intention of forcefully killing the Captain Wild Bull.

“You’re right, you’re going to die!” General Jin Feng’s fist suddenly landed heavily on the back of the Master of Black Wind City.

Black Wind spat out a mouthful of blood and a stunned expression on his face.

He couldn’t believe that General Jin Feng had done this.

Captain Wild Bull laughed out loud, enjoying the great pleasure. He pointed at Black Wind and happily said, “What a fool. Jin Feng is one of my people, he is the nail buried by your side by the Emerald Lord. You are on the verge of death, and you still don’t know about it?”

Bai Song and Pang Man immediately looked at each other and nodded slightly.

Then, together, they formed a semicircle around Black Wind.

All the warbeasts rushed forward and easily surrounded the Master of Black Wind City… Captain Wild Bull stood on the head of the dying Master of Black Wind City. He bent his body and stared at Black Wind’s painful eyes. He felt great satisfaction in his heart, “Black Wind, do you have any last words?” Emerald Lord has long thought of killing a lackey like you, how could you think that you are being secretive! Say, what do you want to say before you die? Want to repent? “Unfortunately, it’s too late!”

“Wild Bull, don’t forget, you are also a pitiful lackey!” Black wind closed his eyes in pain.

“BOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOMMM! Hearing this, the Wild Bull’s face sank and angrily stomped Black wind’s head to pieces. “You think I’m you?” “You will never know who I am!”

“Isn’t he just a man for me to play with?” I’ve been getting a little sick of you lately. ” Suddenly, an elegant voice sounded from behind the Wild Bull, just like a noble who was sick of delicacies. Captain Wild Bull was stunned for a moment before turning around to look at the silhouette behind him. His entire body trembled as he asked in disbelief, “What did you say?” “Is that true?”

“I need more fresh dolls. I can’t just love one for the rest of my life. You’ve already made me sick of it.” The tall figure behind him ferociously punched the Captain Wild Bull in the heart and said with incomparable ruthlessness, “You’re just a dog I raised. Now that Black Wind is dead, you can also die now!”

“Pu!”

The Captain Wild Bull suffered a physical and mental blow, causing him to spit out blood.

He fell to the ground in pain.

Looking at the black wind that had lost its head, he suddenly felt a sense of sadness. How similar was he to the black wind?

However, the Emerald Lord who he had betrayed even more thoroughly actually dared to say such words. The impact of his words was even more painful than the Life-Grabbing Fist.

After giving so much, all he got was’ you are only a dog I have ‘?

Before the crowd gathered around, the Wild bull made an extremely secretive gesture with his left hand.

Then the Wild Bull was easily dismembered, but he did not die.

The soul lives in a rock beneath the earth.

No one knew, not even the Emerald Lord, that the Wild Bull had a kind of ‘Rock Man’ stunt. Once the Emerald Lord left here, he would launch a shocking revenge, and with everything he knew, he would leak it out… The Wild Bull vowed to use all its strength to take revenge on the Emerald Lord.

Not yet, of course.

In order to avoid the probing of the suspicious Emerald Lord, he had to be in a false death state. Moreover, his soul had just been sent to the rock, so he needed time to adapt to it.

After half a year, when he recovers from his feigned death, it will be the time of misfortune for the Emerald Lord.

Before his consciousness fell into a false death state, the Wild Bull could still hear the Emerald Lord instructing General Jin Feng to get a substitute for the Master of Black Wind City. As for the Wild Bull Thief Guild, should directly destroyed, making a good reputation before the cross-border war. The last sentence, the bison that was sleeping in the rock, heard the Emerald Lord mock, “Useless dog, no matter how good of a technique you are, how can you be compared to the chrysanthemum toy boy that I found …”

With a destructive vengeance and hatred, the Captain Wild Bull fell into a state of false death and stopped thinking.

In the eyes of the outside world, he was completely dead.

That was because in this state of false death, one’s physical body would truly die. Those warbeasts that had not betrayed them would all die as well. In short, no one would have thought that after the death of his physical body, he would still be able to rebirth in the state of a Cliff Man!

The Wild Bull, in a false death state, did not see it.

When Yue Yang had put away the Creation Domain, when Xue Wuxia had put away her spirit domain, there were no other battles around. The Emerald Lord, Master of Black Wind City, General Jin Feng, Sect Leader Bai Song, or Pang Man, none of them existed here. His body, which had lost its soul, lay quietly on the ground. His body was not torn apart, but his consciousness and soul were sleeping in a rock in the underground cave.

Hui Tai Lang dug the rock out of the soil with his two paws, chanted it, and then put it in front of Yue Yang.

Then he made a V sign to the Golden Flaming Lion.

This was a very arrogant gesture. Of course, he had learned it from his master.

In this entire world, there was only one watchdog that could make such a gesture. This was the place that Hui Tai Lang was the most proud of!

All the warbeasts who had betrayed the bison, whether they were the Bull-head Warrior with Golden Belt who has simple minds and well-developed limbs, or the lightning beasts with crackling electric arcs all over their body, none of them understood what was going on right now.

Why did all of the Heaven stage experts disappear in the blink of an eye?

And there was only a group of humans?

On the other side, there were two men with ashen faces, Fei Huang and Hua Ban.

Only now did they realize that everything was an illusion, a true illusion. There had never been a battle, there had never been a Master of Black Wind City, nor had there been an Emerald Lord, nor had there been any betrayal. The only real thing was that the Wild Bull was indeed dead. He did not split his body into pieces, but he was definitely not going to live, because his body no longer had any consciousness or soul!

“This is very boring. I think it’s better to just chop him down!” Princess Qian Qian drew her giant bronze sword and pointed at Fei Huang and Hua Ban. “Pick any one of them, so you won’t always say I’m the strongest when I chop.”

“Roar!” The first to pounce was the Golden Flaming Lion.

It recognized the Raging Flame Lion King. Back then, it was this Raging Flame Lion that captured it and imprisoned the Captain Wild Bull in a cage and sold it to the battle arena. Fortunately, the battle arena was in an uproar and took the opportunity to escape, otherwise it would have died long ago. Now, the Blazing Lion King was like a dog that had lost its home. How could he not take advantage of this opportunity to beat up a dog that had fallen into the water?

chapters.title: Chapter 712 - Who Is The Nemesis?
chapters.body:
Chapter 712 - Who Is The Nemesis?

C712: Who is the nemesis?

If it was said that the Golden Flaming Lion and the Flaming Lion King had only been tied for the time being.

Then the Lightning Beast was depressed because it had met a Divine Beast that looked like ordinary Bronze level 3 but was actual pretending to be a pig to eat the tiger. The gray wolf intentionally showed off its might in front of the newly recruited little brother, Golden Flaming Lion, letting it know that even if it was a warbeast of Heaven Stage, it was still its little brother. The Lightning Beast had the strength to challenge the Demon Bull King or the Bull-head Warrior with Golden Belt. How could it not be depressed when it ran off to fight against the weakest Lightning Beast?

Lightning Eradication!

The Lightning Beast was most proficient in Lightning Eradication!

However, this move was useless against the gray wolf. Even if it didn’t have the Darkness Holy Armor of Sacred Stage, it wouldn’t be afraid of the electric current.

With the ability to liberate the liquid essence of silver, an electric attribute energy was almost equivalent to a supplement to it.

Seeing the opponent condense all the electricity into a ball and swallow it in one gulp, the original silver-white face of Lightning Beast became even paler! The gray wolf’s tail wrapped around the Sacred level Darkness Demon Sickle as it slashed out ‘A Chop of Mountains and Rivers’. Although it was not as powerful as Yue Yang’s, the magic sickle that had fused with the Darkness Holy Sword was not easy to bear. With every swing, there would be a clear wound on the Lightning Beast’s steel-like body, and purple and blue blood would flow out …

In addition to ‘A Chop of Mountains and Rivers’, the gray wolf was also proficient in Great Totem Pole Battle Technique.

Fatty Hai and the others had been training together a lot, but Fatty Hai’s’ Hippo Meteor Punch ‘was not as exquisite as it was!

Clap clap clap clap!

The more the gray wolf fought, the happier it became. It held down the Lightning Beast and gave it a good beating on its left and right ears.

At the end of the fight, the Lightning Beast did not attack the heart in anger, but rather suffered heavy injuries. It immediately fainted, its eyes rolled back, and its four limbs went limp. Its belly faced the sky as it lay on the ground.

It summoned out the grimoire and took out a golden cup and watch that it had forcibly taken from Fatty Hai, then read the time. It was two minutes fifty-eight seconds. Before three minutes passed, it had already beaten down a heaven-step Lightning Beast. Greywolf was too proud of itself and immediately took out its notebook and pen. It drew a Glyph of the Lightning Beast, dipped it in its blood, and stamped the book with its paw, indicating that it had successfully defeated the opponent.

This method was accidentally suggested by Fatty Hai after a round of drinking.

In the end, the gray wolf was unable to persevere.

Fatty Hai felt a great deal of pressure when he saw the densely packed records on gray wolf’s book.

The fight between the Golden Flaming Lion and the Flaming Lion was bustling, and for a time, neither side was on par with the other.

It looked like.

Without an hour or two, the outcome of the battle was unlikely to be decided.

In the battle with Demon Bull King, even if the Master of Luo Hua City didn’t summon the Nirvana Sunflower, just the Aurora and the near-perfect Snow Fox Lady, she would still beat the opponent to roar again and again, turning it into a target for beatings. Snow Fox Lady waved both her hands, countless flowers were scattered in her hands, wonderful as a fairy dispersing flower.

Of course, the power of these attacks wasn’t the soft petals of flowers, but the fragrance of flowers.

The enraged Demon Bull King couldn’t resist falling asleep under the fragrance of the sleeping dragon formed from the Sleeping Flower and the Saliva of the Dream Dragon.

Its power, its anger, and its robust physique could not be effective against the resistance of sleep. If necessary, the Master of Luo Hua City could use her hands to blind it at any time or use the Nirvana Sunflower to cut off its bull-neck.

But she didn’t.

The Master of Luo Hua City had only used the Aurora to wake the Demon Bull King up again and again. Then, she had Snow Fox Lady hypnotize it back into sleep, causing it to fall into a state of lucidity, pain, anger, sleep, and lucidity … Within the endless circle, not only him, even the Wild Bull Thief Guild in Lion King Valley had fallen asleep thanks to the fragrance of the sleeping dragon. They fell to the ground in a large area.

The Bill-head Warrior with Golden Belt was a creature that was famous for its warlike nature.

When they fought, no matter what opponent they faced, even if it was a Heaven Realm great Dragon, they would not fear it.

Their brains were also full of muscles. In this world, there was nothing could satisfy their bloodthirsty hearts more than fighting. Regardless of how the situation developed, they roared like thunder as they charged towards Yue Yang’s group.

Just as the fist was about to hit Yue Yang, it realized that its body had stopped moving and could no longer move forward.

It was a bit sluggish from the start, but after a moment of surprise, it turned its head around.

He was furious when he saw a female barbarian cow who was pulling her arm away with a chain. In front of the Bull-head race, what race would dare to challenge their wrist strength? It was one thing for a beast like the Ancient Giant Dragon or the Ancient Titan, but the female barbarian cow behind him was half the size of him, but she dared to compete with him, a warrior with a golden belt?

“AH!”

The Bull-hear Warrior with Golden Belt unleashed a tremendous amount of force. Both of his feet dug deep into the ground, and the veins on his thick arms bulged like earthworms.

Under such tremendous force, even a mammoth could fall to the ground with a thud.

However, it was foolish not to know that the female barbarian cow behind it was a terrifying war goddess with the power of Titan and the Heart of the Earth. As long as her legs stood on the ground, no one of any race would be able to defeat her.

Amidst the incredulous and shocked expression, the Bull-head Warrior with Golden Belt realized that he was being dragged into this fight step by step.

He had used all his strength, but the opponent’s power was unstoppable.

The God Binding Chains rattled as the electric current flashed.

The Bull-head Warrior with Golden Belt staggered a few times. He tried to stand up straight, trying to use his strength to fight back, but he was doomed to failure. Unless he could pull up the whole earth, He could not lift Ah Man, who was one with the earth. The Bull-head Warrior with Golden Belt was enraged. Its eyes turned blood-red due to its anger. He brandished its gigantic ox-headed axe, preparing to slay the Barbarian Cow that had brought shame to its heart … However, the Ox Head Axe had yet to be chopped down. Before the Hui Tai Lang could absorb the Collapsing Cloud Thunder Hammer, the Holy Weapon that the Black Hell King had meticulously collected for thousands of years appeared in Ah Man’s hand.

A hammer hammered down, hitting the huge head of the Bull-head Warrior with Golden Belt.

After being ambushed, even the giant loli, who was from the ancient Titan clan, had been struck by the Collapsing Cloud Thunder Hammer. The might of the strike was not something that the Bull-head Warrior, who only had a heart to defend against, could withstand.

The Bull-head Warrior immediately fell to the ground.

His eyes rolled.

Foaming at the mouth.

Ah Man stepped on the huge ox-head axe first, then grabbed the golden belt with her bare hands and swung it like a baseball bat.

Normally, Hui TaiLang and Yue Yang had already cooperated many times before, so he immediately ran out.

It talked about the Bull-head Warrior who was still unconscious. It threw him high into the air, and when the enemy fell down, it used the Dark Magic Sickle to hit him hard, sweeping the Bull-head Warrior towards the posture like a baseball.

BOOOMMM!

Ah Man imitated Yue Yang’s usual attacking posture and burst forth with her greatest power. The instant the Bull-head Warrior fell down, a Cloud Breaking Lightning Hammer hit the enemy’s head, knocking the Tauren Warrior a thousand meters away. Like a cannonball, the hammer smashed into a rock, almost causing the mountain to collapse. Captain Raging Flames was both envious and surprised. This … this move was too ruthless, wasn’t it?

She estimated that the second level heaven stage Bull-head Warrior would be crippled if he didn’t die!

However, this move that was used to trample the enemy was truly very dashing.

If she and Ah man cooperated, the results would be better … Captain Raging Flames felt an itch in her heart. She was imagining herself standing in front of Ah man. When Ah man struck the Bull-head Warrior with her staff and sent him flying with a swing of her staff, that feeling was simply too refreshing!

“Good ball!” Yue Yang gave her a thumbs up, praising her.

“Meow!” Hui Tai Lang said he had a tacit understanding and deserved to be praised.

On the other side of the battlefield, Fei Huang, which used to feel extremely humiliated and infuriated, was now getting more and more alarmed.

Never in his wildest dreams would he have imagined that the person who had come to challenge him was actually the weakest one among the group of opponents. She was merely an 2 level Earth Stage girl, yet she was actually going to fight against a Heaven Stage powerhouse like him? Fei Huang felt extremely humiliated. He was the arrogant heaven-step that would rather be beaten to death than let others look down on him. If the Master of Black Wind City were to take action and defeat him, Fei Huang would feel slightly better …

Now, he found himself facing a human girl who was only at the second level of the Earth Stage.

You want to challenge me with such strength?

He suspected that with just one breath of air, his opponent would be blown away by the wind!

What made Fei Huang feel the most speechless was that the little girl was only a martial artist who was adept at planting. Did the other party not know that his battle beast, the ‘Calamity Locust’, was the nemesis of plant warbeast?

Fei Huang believed that he would only need ten seconds, no, three seconds, maybe even one second, to kill this little girl on the spot. The two giant tree men looked very powerful, but in front of the Calamity Locust, no matter what type of plant type warbeast it was, they would be able to finish it all! Was there a battle beast that was more reputable than the Calamity Locust? Maybe, but I haven’t seen the locust yet!

“Eat, eat them all.” With a wave of his hand, Fei Huang ordered millions of Calamity Locust to swarm up and devour the Titan Ancient Tree.

“Swing!” Yue Bing’s face was serious. In order to fight this kind of foe, she had to pay two hundred percent of her concentration. She absolutely couldn’t let the enemy catch a single flaw.

Millions of Calamity Locust covered the sky and covered the earth. Each and every one of them was faster than lightning as they rolled down like dark clouds.

Although there were a few who died on the ground after being hit by the arms of the Titan Ancient Tree.

However, even more Calamity Locust were piling up on the two Titan Ancient Trees.

Dense.

The two Titan Ancient Trees looked like two locusts, crawling on top of the Titan trees, opening their teeth and biting down on the tree with all their might. Not to mention the two Titan Ancient Trees, even if it was a forest, they could eat it clean within a short period of time. The most terrifying thing was that apart from having a Damage steel, front teeth, the plague locust could also secrete a kind of acid and plague that could soften all living things. There was no skin in the world that could resist its gnawing.

He had won!

Fei Huang didn’t even need to look to know that he had won.

Not to mention a naturally-restrained plant warbeast, even if it was any other warbeast, it would only be a pile of bones in front of the countless number of locusts.

Defeating such an opponent was not something worth being happy about. On the contrary, it was a form of humiliation …

Fei Huang felt itself being looked down upon by the enemy, and was extremely angry.

However, very quickly, his fury was extinguished as if someone had poured a basin of cold water over his head.

Astonishment took the place of astonishment.

Unbelievable surprise.

All the locusts that had eaten the branches and leaves on top of the Titan ancient tree fell down with a thud, like a rain of locusts. They, who could digest all living things, suddenly died. They had the acid to digest iron and steel, and no matter if they resisted the poison or not, all of these locusts who ate the leaves died horribly.

However, the Calamity Locust, which was attached to the tree trunk and gnawed on the tree bark, discovered that the plague, which could make all living creatures’ skin fragile, was ineffective against the tree bark.

Their tough skin made them use all of their strength, but they weren’t able to bite down on even a small piece of it.

chapters.title: Chapter 713
chapters.body:
Chapter 713

C713: All’s fair in war, stab him in the back

“Intense poison? What a fierce poison!” Fei Huang screamed out and he knew that although his calamity locust was not immortal, but he also knew how powerful their resistance was. Even if they ate the poisonous skeletons or the poisonous demonic flowers, the locust would still be uninjured completely, and his body would not have any abnormal reactions. Even if the entire locust was soaked in the poison, it would only drown, not die from the poison.

Now, they only ate a small piece of leaf and died on the spot. What sort of concept was this?

This was equal to the Flaming Lion King being burned to death! It was unbelievable.

Fei Huang raised his fist.

A warbeast might be very powerful, but its master was too weak. With just a wave of his fist, this little girl would die.

It would be impossible for them to defeat him with just the two giant tree men and the Green Light Tree Demoness!

“It’s over!” Lightning Beast was beaten up, as well as the Bull-head Warrior. And Calamity Locust was unable to do anything to the tree man. Fei Huang’s companion Hua Ban allowed the other little girl, who could use her psychic power to condense petals and had a spirit mirror, to entangle him. If Fei Huang couldn’t win, his entire army would be wiped out. He landed outside the battlefield. There was a woman with a giant bronze sword on her back, standing beside the heroic swordsman. There was also a woman wielding a dragon slaying spear, as well as a little panda girl.

He flew quickly and appeared in front of Yue Bing.

With the power of a Heaven Stage Martial Technique, he punched towards her face.

Fei Huang didn’t show any mercy at all. Under the watchful eyes of so many enemies, he only wanted to quickly finish the battle and leave this place.

It was only the first move to complete that he had killed this girl who specialized in planting. The second one he had killed that girls who carried a sword on her back and held a spear. They were probably even more troublesome, but Fei Huang was confident in its speed and strength. Even without the help of Calamity Locust, he was still a heaven-stage expert, and with his ability to transform and form his body, no one could easily kill him unless they were an expert of Heaven Stage level 3 or above.

“Rumble …” The punch missed its target and a huge crater was formed on the ground due to the domineering boxing aura.

“Huh?” Fei Huang noticed that the little girl was nowhere to be seen. What he hit just now was only an afterimage left behind by her.

“I won’t lose to you!” A firm voice came from behind Fei Huang. He knew that it was definite that resolute little human girl.

Brave, but too little experience.

Just by speaking those words, her figure was already exposed. It was enough to make her die without a burial place!

Fei Huang sneered in his heart. Without turning around, he threw a punch towards the back. The terrifying power of a Heaven Stage Martial Technique that could destroy the heavens and the earth was unleashed. When Fei Huang thought that the girl was dead, it was certain that her body would shatter under its fist. But he then realized that his fist had got contact with a hard object that was as hard as a copper wall or an iron wall.

The rebounding force made him feel a little painful. Although his bones were fine, his skin was already cracked from the impact.

Blood.

Drops of blood fell to the ground.

Only then did Fei Huang realize that behind him had unknowingly transformed into a giant tree.

That wasn’t the most shocking thing to him. The grass covered in green blood rapidly withered, and the blood that dripped down to the ground turned dark green.

Even though he was a Heaven Stage warrior, Fei Huang felt a wave of dizziness … Intense poison. The venom of Blood Sealing Throat! Fei Huang became anxious. From his storage ring, he produced a bottle of golden Poison Dispelling Pill. This was a poison repelling pill that was refined by a master alchemist in the Heaven Realm using demonic beast cores, magic flower juice and other materials. It was worth one hundred thousand gold coins, a type of extremely expensive pill that a Heaven Stage expert must cherish.

With a flip of his neck, Fei Huang swallowed the three Poison Dispelling Pills.

He crushed another and smeared it on the back of his right hand.

With his experience, that was a deadly poison that could cause a powerhouse of Heaven Stage to die in less than a minute. A single Poison Dispelling Pill could also be neutralized in an invisible manner.

For safety’s sake, this was the first time Fei Huang swallowed three Poison Dispelling Pills. If it wasn’t for the fact that he was unable to withstand the intense poison, he wouldn’t have slapped three hundred thousand gold coins into his mouth.

It was indeed worthy of being a masterpiece of the Alchemy Master. Fei Huang immediately felt refreshed.

The wounds on the back of his hand that had been smeared with the powder of Poison Dispelling Pills also quickly turned red.

That was close!

Seeing that the Poison Dispelling Pill was effective in curing the poison, Fei Huang ignored the pain in his heart and secretly cried out for luck. Fortunately, he had spent millions of gold to purchase this bottle of pills, otherwise, he would have been defeated by the human girl of Earth Stage level 2. The poison from these two giant trees was too terrifying! When Fei Huang saw the little girl in his opposite staring at him with her big eyes, a feeling proud was raised in his heart. Even though the little girl had two fierce poison trees, she was still too weak.

Fei Huang raised his hand, and a mass of plague clouds formed from Calamity Locusts flew towards Yue Bing.

At the same time, he threw out an invisible and colorless hidden fist.

Being hit by this hidden punch.

The opponent’s body would definite explode and die in incomparable pain!

An expert of Heaven Stage was not something that a little girl of Earth Stage level 2 could provoke. With the strength of her entire body, it wasn’t even enough for one punch of an expert of Heaven Stage!

“Pu!”

While the Calamity Locusts filled the sky, Fei Huang that had thrown out its hidden fist suddenly spat out a mouthful of pale-green blood before returning to its original state due to the dizziness caused by the poison. What surprised him the most was that the strange human girl leaped into the air. It was as if she could see the hidden fist, stepping on it, borrowing the force of the leap to arrive at the face in the blink of an eye.

How did she do it?

There was no time for Fei Huang to find the answer to this riddle. He found his hand raised, limp and weak.

As for the opponent, her speed was multiplied under the effects of the Green Light Tree Demoness.

Eighteen legs in a row.

Her legs had hit the ground, and he had been beaten so hard that he couldn’t even find his way north…

Fei Huang staggered back a few steps and looked at his hand in fear. His hand had turned dark green. No, his entire body had turned green.

Didn’t he get rid of the poison just now? A Poison Dispelling Pill worthy even 100,000 gold coins was unable to cure? While Fei Huang was confused, he hurriedly took out the bottle and swallowed the remaining six pills like eating beans. After the pills entered his body, the liquids entered his stomach and cleared his mind. However, the green under the skin quickly became thicker after a slight decrease.

Looking at his pair of dark green hands, Fei Huang pointed at Yue Bing and cried out, “It’s not those two trees, it’s you! Are you the one that’s doing the job? Your innate talent is poison?”

“Mr. Fei, it’s not that my poison is strong, it’s that your poison resistance is too weak!” Yue Bing saw the look of shock on the other party’s face and shook her head embarrassedly. She felt that it was a little unfair, so she added, “This kind of poison will double as you fight.” Ah, if you don’t want to die, just lie down and wait for my brother to come and you’ll surrender to him. “Unfortunately, I thought that you would be able to fight properly, but I didn’t expect that your poison resistance is too weak.”

“…” Fei Huang felt extremely humiliated. As a heaven stage expert, he was actually looked down upon and pitied by a 2 level Earth Stage girl.

He was so angry he almost killed himself.

But suicidal people are really cowardly.

Fei Huang gnashed his teeth. In the end, he laid on the ground and assumed a position that he considered to be shameful in order to preserve his life.

He knew that if he was truly strong, it would be impossible for the young lady to defeat him. The problem was that her poison talent was too terrifying. If he accidentally broke her skin, he would become a ‘poison man’. If he had been cautious and used a guerrilla strategy just now, defeating this little girl probably wouldn’t have been that difficult. He had been too careless today.

Looking at Yue Bing’s departing back, Fei Huang wanted to slap himself a few times.

An 2 level Earth Stage human girl had left after winning. A super powerful first level heaven stage expert was lying on the ground like a turtle that had turned over. What was this?

Hua Ban were much more cautious than Fei Huang.

But the enemy he found more difficult to deal with. This human woman, who was riding a Silver Horned Flying Horse with two Phantom Butterfly Demons and a Spirit Mirror, actually had a powerful psychic power. In addition to raising a huge spiritual energy field, she also condensed her psychic power into petals. Facing such an enemy, the long-tailed leopard became a tragedy. Although its strength was strong, it was enough to crumble by the two butterfly hallucinations.

The pollen paralysis coupled with the torment from his mental nightmare almost drove the long-tailed leopard crazy.

It turned into a beam of golden light and shot towards Yi Nan like an aurora.

However, in front of the spirit mirror.

The long-tailed leopard pounced like an arrow, turning into a concealed weapon to attack its master.

He had no choice but to order the long-tailed leopard to retreat from the battlefield and save Fei Huang that had fallen from poison. It didn’t matter if he could defeat the enemy now, or find out what was going on. Right now, the only thing Hua Ban wanted to do the most was to run for her life.

As long as he could escape with his life, he would pay any price.

“Let me do it!” Drunken Cat Sister rushed in front of Princess Qian Qian, together with the little panda Niu Niu, to greet the dusty long-tailed leopard.

“How boring. When can I have a good fight?” Princess Qian Qian stretched her body and watched as Yue Yang’s eyes lit up. “Princess, it’s almost time. After we finish this guy, we will impersonate the Captain Wild Bull and get rid of the Master of Black Wind City so that the Lionheart King and the Emerald Lord kill each other.”

“Shouldn’t it be half a month later?” Princess Qian Qian was stunned.

“There’s no need to be deceitful. How can we fight fair and square? That’s not something a smart person should do!” Yue Yang smiled. Captain Raging Flames felt that this guy’s nickname should be Disdain. His real name was Shameless. Was there anyone as wicked as him?

He had clearly decided to fight half a month later, but he actually made a move in advance to launch a sneak attack.

Captain Raging Flames couldn’t imagine what the expressions of the Emerald Lord and the Lionheart King would be like after waiting half a month for Yue Yang to play with them. However, she believed that this was probably Yue Yang’s plan. Tong Tian Tower’s strength was not enough, so Yue Yang couldn’t possibly use Sky Execution to fight against the powerhouses of the South Heaven Realm. Moreover, this would easily reveal his true secret.

If the clown returned, or if he discovered that there were no the three major forces in the Western Heaven Realm, Tong Tian Sect, Long Teng Sect and the Demonic Palace, the other party would definitely become suspicious.

It was possible that the Lionheart King and other king level Heavenly stage would join in.

To lay down traps and slaughter, to obtain the secrets of Tong Tian Tower.

It could be said that this was the best time for Yue Yang to launch a sneak attack.

The problem was, this brat had openly made an agreement with the other party, and tore up the agreement within a few days. He stabbed the Master of Black Wind City who was unsuspecting, and in the name of the Emerald Lord’s subordinate Wild Bull, this was too shameless in terms of morals! But forget it, Yue Yang never had such a thing! Flames shook her head helplessly.

“Ah, Flames?” At first, he didn’t pay attention to the spots, but Flames followed Yue Yang and approached. Moreover, she had already shed her Concealed Cove, so her unique appearance and fiery hair made even a blind person recognize her as the female giant. Hua Ban looked at Flames and despaired. This woman is a slightly famous female giant of the South Heaven Realm. With the strength of a Tier 5 Heaven Stage and the inheritance of a dragon, to the leader of a Heaven Ranked Thief, she is simply a disaster … What, what the heck are you fighting for? Hua Ban screamed at the top of his lungs, “I surrender! Captain Raging Flames! I’m Hua Ban! We worked together in Golden Rain City, do you remember? Please allow me and Fei Huang to surrender to you! ”

“It’s useless to ask me. The real boss is this guy.” Raging Flames pointed at Yue Yang, indicating that she would listen to him.

“It can’t be?” Hua Ban was dumbfounded. How could such a stubborn female giant be tamed by others? Had he heard wrongly? What sort of background did this guy have to be able to order the uncontrollable Raging Flames who even made a king level expert like the Lionheart King to sigh?

chapters.title: Chapter 714 - The Miser’S Treasure
chapters.body:
Chapter 714 - The Miser’S Treasure

C714: The Miser’s Treasure

Yue Yang’s attitude towards prisoners was pretty good.

Although he acquiesced in gray wolf’s flogging Hua Ban and Fei Huang without exception, he did not at least build a camp to flay people.

Being beaten into a pig’s head, Hua Ban and Fei Huang were only gritting their teeth to endure the humiliation. They felt that they still had a bright future ahead of them and did not want to die here for nothing. Resisting was nonsense. Not only that, but if it was just Captain Raging Flames, she could instantly kill the two of them in a second, not to mention the young man who could make Captain Raging Flames obey … When the opponent wore the special shape of the twin mask, Hua Ban and Fei Huang immediately understood who got them planted.

The masked guy who was able to fight Old Demon Wei, the madman who looked for his teeth all over the ground, was the most mysterious expert of the three great sects, the Western Heaven Realm, Long Teng Sect, and Demonic Sect. Defeated by him, Hua Ban and Fei Huang had nothing to say.

As for the Captain Wild Bull, no need to guess, he was set up by this masked guy.

“When I eat meat, I don’t mind other people drinking some soup.” Yue Yang faced the two pig heads Hua Ban and Fei Huang and warned, “The Wild Bull Thief Guild will continue to be led by you. I don’t care what you do, but you must leave the Emerald Territory. You can pick out all the people from the Wild Bull faction, I want to make use of them. In the end, I will only say this once. Remember who gave you this bowl of rice to eat. Do not play any tricks secretly, or else you can have two choices, to be flower fertilizer or to be food for dog.”

“…” Hua Ban and Fei Huang looked at gray wolf, shivered, and nodded quickly.

“Roar, roar!”

The battle between the Golden Flaming Lion and the Flaming Lion King had reached its climax.

When the two lions of equal strength clashed, it was difficult to determine who was the strongest. The Golden Flaming Lion had stronger defenses and a smarter mind.

However, the Flaming Lion King was a little higher in level. Furthermore, as a king, its aura and might were increased. Most importantly, it had captured the Golden Flaming Lion before, so it was much more confident in its abilities in battle.

If not for the Captain Wild Bull having already become a ‘rock’ and the Flaming Lion King having lost its powerful support, the Golden Flaming Lion would have found it hard to defeat such a powerful enemy in such a short period of time. Following the Lightning Beast’s fainting, the defeat of the Bull-head Warrior with Golden Belt, and the Demon Bull King’s unconsciousness, as well as the surrender of two Heaven Stage warriors Hua Ban and Fei Huang, the Flaming Lion King’s confidence gradually got vanished and its morale greatly decreased.

The two lions fought with all their might, unable to be separated.

An hour passed, two hours, and the two of them had yet to decide the victor.

Yue Yang was not in the mood to wait for the war to end, so he returned to the Grimoire World to rest.

By the time Yue Yang had finished resting, the Golden Flaming Lion had already won. It stood proudly on top of the enemy’s corpse, bathed in blood, roaring towards the sky, full of vigor.

Hua Ban and Fei Huang had also officially taken over the Wild Bull Thief Guild and had bound more than a hundred of their fellow townsmen, old subordinates, and personal guards who belong to the Will Bull to the outside of Lion King’s Valley, awaiting Yue Yang’s trial.

“Actually, the reason I asked you to come here is for a very simple matter.” Yue Yang teased, “Captain Wild Bull was besieged by Black Wind, Bai Song, Pang Man, Jin Feng, and Old Demon Wei last night. He died unluckily. His soul left his body and turned into a ‘rock’. I believe some of you who know him best will know that he had the ability to escape. As his good friend, I decided to stand forward without any hesitation to avenge him and fight against the treacherous Master of Black Wind City and his alliance. ”

“Cough.” When Fei Huang heard this, he almost choked to death on its saliva.

“I wonder what kind of services you want me to help you with?” Niu Gen, this ass-kissing person, stood up and asked respectfully while bowing.

“It is hard to say when Wild Bull will wake up from the rock. Even if he does, he won’t be able to immediately recover to his original state. During this period of his hibernation, the affairs of the guild would be handled by the Fei Huang and Hua Ban. You are the old people in the guild, and you are also the most trusted subordinates of the Captain, so the two vice-captains Fei Huang and Hua Ban will naturally not treat you unfairly. In view of your outstanding contributions for the guild in the future, the two captains have decided to divide the ten percent of the items evenly to you. After obtaining the money, if you’re willing to continue contributing to the team, of course, it’s better. If you want to go back and be a comfortable rich family, no one will stop you.” Yue Yang said that the policy is very open-minded, if one knew how to stand his line, then it was easy to deal with.

“The Master of Black Wind and Captain Wild Bull have been good friends for many years. This time, Captain Wild Bull has brought us here to support the Master of Black Wind City. How could he be ungrateful? How could he lead people to attack our Captain! It’s easy for you to kill us, trying to trick us into revealing the location of our Captain’s secret collection. Don’t even think about it.” One of the Wild Bull’s super loyal subordinates, a personal guard, cursed loudly.

“I don’t want to explain!” Yue Yang shook his head.

“Howl!” gray wolf rushed forward.

“Even if I die, I won’t reveal the secret treasure trove …” The guy thought gray wolf was going to eat him.

Gray wolf waved his claws, breaking the chains on his body and releasing the guy.

Yue Yang waved his hand at him, “Go. If you don’t believe me, you can ask the Master of Black Wind City or ask anyone in secret. At that time, I believe you will understand the truth.”

That fellow felt a little dizzy. Was he really going to let him go?

It can’t be?

So easy?

In fact, it was not only him. Those who Gray wolf broke the bound black iron chains for all looked at each other in dismay, not daring to believe this result.

No one dared to leave. They were afraid that Yue Yang would go back on his words and kill him.

Only the bravest personal guard captain showed his heroic spirit on the surface. He was the first one to step out of the group and look at Fei Huang and Hua Ban faces. He felt that they didn’t have any killing intent. After seeing him disappear for a long time, no one dared to follow him until Yue Yang said: “You guys can all disperse. I want to kill you guys. I don’t need to wait for now, I can make my move at any time.” Regardless of whether you believe me or not, the truth is the truth. The me that you don’t know is the Wild Bull’s good friend, and the Bull Ally Black Wind that you know is the enemy that besieged him. ”

Seeing that Yue Yang, Fei Huang and Hua Ban did not even try to stop them, these people became anxious like a spark.

All of them fled rapidly in all directions.

Several looked back to see if there were any enemies behind them.

However, Yue Yang had no reaction.

The people who had left safely left the valley. After running for hundreds of kilometers, they finally let out a sigh of relief … So the other party was really letting him go!

Strange, why would he be so kind as to let me leave? Could it be that he really was a good friend of the Captain Wild Bull, and Black Wind was the one who killed the Captain Wild Bull?
