When the explosive power reached its limit, the two [Black Bullets] formed two small black holes that constantly rotated around each other, devouring all the energy and fragments of Navagraha Queen’s body. Someone else would never have survived, but Navagraha Queen used her [Innate] skill [Shifting Spirit] to escape from her broken body with ninety percent of her energy intact. She then integrated her energy into the golden image of her that was just overhead.

“Light!”

That was the moment Zhi Zun had been waiting for. As soon as Navagraha Queen’s spirit merged with her golden image, Zhi Zun flashed through the air, arms outstretched. “[Light of Destruction]!”

Like rays of the sun, a massive amount of destructive light shone throughout the heavens. These light rays consisted of tens of thousands of arrows, blades, spears, and swords. These dyed the heavens and the earth in a single color, the color of destruction!

Hundreds of miles away, Si Hai, the warriors from the Navagraha tribe, Queen Night, Xue Wuxia, and Princess Qian Qian, could feel the power of Zhi Zun’s [Light of Destruction]. The [Light of Destruction] caused their eyes so much pain that none of them could continue fighting.

When the old warrior, Si Hai, who had mastered the Sovereign’s Will and was suppressing Queen Night, saw Zhi Zun’s [Light of Destruction], his countenance changed dramatically.

“Does Tong Tian Tower still have such a powerful warrior? It seems I’m just a frog glancing at the sky from the bottom of a well!”[1] Si Hai muttered. Suddenly, he could no longer use the Sovereign’s Will.

Scarlet Emperor, Ancient Demon King, and Navagraha King felt that they were exactly like monkeys placed over a campfire to be roasted. As Zhi Zun’s [Light of Destruction] fell on them, they felt extreme pain but there was no place for them to take shelter. They all realized that the light of Navagraha King’s [Sun] was like that of a single candle when compared to Zhi Zun’s [Light of Destruction]. Zhi Zun’s [Light of Destruction] was like the midday radiance of summer sunshine.

Even using the exceptional Guardian Divine Shield, Scarlet Emperor still cried out in pain. Against Zhi Zun’s [Light of Destruction], even his divine shield couldn’t hold out. Despite his best efforts, a plume of blue smoke rose from his body. For the first time in his life, he had a horrible feeling that if he was pierced by Zhi Zun’s [Light of Destruction], it would kill him.

Not far away from him, Ancient Demon King didn’t try to flee to the sanctuary of the blood-red altar. On the contrary, Ancient Demon King rushed over and gasped Navagraha King tightly, preventing him from dodging, then tried to forcibly take Navagraha King with him into the sky.

“Are you insane‽” Navagraha King thought that Ancient Demon King was trying to destroy both of them. He was scared to death.

“Dong Yao, let’s die together!” Ancient Demon King utterly hated the traitors, Navagraha Queen and Navagraha King, who had betrayed their alliance. If Navagraha Queen hadn’t ordered to kill Ye Xiao, Zi Guang, Yue Su, and Bei before him, they could have parted peaceably. However, right now, Ancient Demon King’s only thought was to kill Navagraha King, even at the cost of his own life.

Due to Ancient Demon King’s actions, Navagraha King couldn’t escape to the base of the blood-red altar to reduce the pain caused by Zhi Zun’s [Light of Destruction] like Scarlet Emperor did. Instead, he was being tightly held by Ancient Demon King and rushed into the sky. The pain was excruciating, as he was ravaged by Zhi Zun’s [Light of Destruction].

Under the bombardment of Zhi Zun’s [Light of Destruction] the flames on the immense image of the Head of Luo Hou, that filled the entire sky and could devour the heavens and the earth, were gradually extinguished until there were no more.

Fortunately, Zhi Zun’s [Light of Destruction] didn’t last very long, otherwise, it would have been extremely dangerous for everyone. During this time, Navagraha King managed to escape from the grip of Ancient Demon King. He quickly fled to the sanctuary of the blood-red altar. Since his eyes hadn’t recovered yet, he had to depend on his hearing and other senses to get there.

After adjusting his status, Yue Yang gave a weird order, “Ika, summon Wishing Little Angel and have it execute its control skill [Roar]!” Yue Yang’s order confused his enemies. The strange order confused everyone at present, [Roar]?

“Da Da Da!”[2] The three beautiful, bright sounds echoed throughout the White River Valley.

Damn!

The sound of her voice didn’t carry any sort of offensive power, but when Navagraha King heard it, he sensed that the power of all his enemies was gradually increasing. Then, he finally figured it out. Her voice was a [Innate] control skill used for support.

When Navagraha King wanted to rush over and kill the Wishing Little Angel, another wave of destruction fell from the sky. It was more powerful and lasted longer than the previous one!

Still in a frenzy, Ancient Demon King stretched out a giant hand and grabbed hold of Navagraha King. His ferocious face had a sly smile: “Navagraha King, do enjoy this journey of death. Ye Xiao and Zi Guang are waiting for us!”

Navagraha King didn’t struggle to break free. In fact, he knew that there was nothing he could do that would allow him to escape. He had watched as the [Eternal Wheel] Domain of Power under Yue Yang’s feet extended until it had fixed him in place, like an insect fossilized in amber.

Yue Yang had kept his [Eternal Wheel] Domain of Power active until the third wave of Zhi Zun’s [Light of Destruction] had ended. When he finally withdrew it, Navagraha King plummeted through the sky until he fell onto the blood-red altar, with serious wounds all over his body.

After an unknown amount of time, Navagraha King regained his sight. What he saw in the sky was the broken golden image of Navagraha Queen. It looked awful. Her lower body had been completely destroyed. The upper body was covered with cracks that looked like cobwebs. The left arm was missing two fingers, and the head and shoulders had pieces broken off of them. Only her right hand, that had been holding the Head of Luo Hou, was still intact.

Navagraha Queen wasn’t dead! When she had been at her weakest, and Zhi Zun had released her [Light of Destruction], three times, after the naive Yue Yang, the Qilin girl, Bing Yin, and the Wishing Little Angel had used some of their [Innate] skills, she had survived!

Sure enough, it wasn’t going to be easy to defeat Navagraha Queen from Heaven Realm. Both Yue Yang and Zhi Zun thought, even if Navagraha Queen hadn’t been killed during the fight, she would lose the combat force, but it was beyond all their expectations that Navagraha Queen would be able to continue to fight and still have the Head of Luo Hou in her hand.

“Little girl, have you used up all of your trump cards?” Navagraha Queen’s bitter voice shocked everyone within White River Valley, “Since I’m not dead yet, you’re the ones who will die!”

The Head of Luo Hou, which had just had its flames extinguished by Zhi Zun’s [Light of Destruction], was once more covered in black flames.

While it couldn’t fully withstand the power of Zhi Zun’s [Light of Destruction], the Head of Luo Hou had been the source of the demon Luo’s power. Over the past 100,000 years, countless generations of Navagraha Kings poured their power into it. Therefore, even the three giants of the Western Heaven Realm couldn’t destroy it without much effort, let alone three waves of [Light of Destruction].

Want to destroy it? Don’t even think about it. The Head of Luo Hou had long been a demonic weapon comparable to a holy artifact, but without any self-awareness, so it needed an owner to direct it. As long as Navagraha Queen hadn’t been defeated, the power of the Head of Luo Hou would never weaken. So, unless Zhi Zun could continue to execute her [Light of Destruction] skill, nothing would be able to stop the Head of Luo Hou.

Jiang Ying still hadn’t fully absorbed the divine power she had inherited from the Dragon God Sovereign, so the possibility of her destroying the Head of Luo Hou was close to zero. As for the Qilin girl, Bing Yin, she hated the demonic head. She wanted to destroy it with all of her heart, but her strength just wasn’t sufficient to do so. After all, she wasn’t the kind of girl that was good at that sort of thing.

“Both of you, scram!” At first, Yue Yang had intended to kill the heavily wounded Ancient Demon King and Scarlet Emperor, but after he thought it over again, he realized that the only ones that would benefit from their fight would be Navagraha Queen and Navagraha King. Even though Ancient Demon King and Scarlet Emperor were potential future disasters they were not as dangerous as Navagraha King and Navagraha Queen. It would be a pain in the ass for him if he let these two guys go, but it was better than letting Navagraha Queen and Navagraha King escape. If Navagraha Queen and Navagraha King managed to survive, it would definitely be a catastrophe for Tong Tian Tower.

Yueyang hated the fact that there wasn’t enough time to do everything he wanted to do. However, it was best for everyone to let Ancient Demon King and Scarlet Emperor leave. “Don’t let me see either one of you ever again!”

Scarlet Emperor was ecstatic. He swore, “I’ll never return to Tong Tian Tower again!” He had thought that Yue Yang would take advantage of the opportunity to throw stones at them because they had fallen down a well,[3] so he had been prepared to fight to the death with Yue Yang.

*** ***

[1]. A frog glancing at the sky from the bottom of a well.

This is a combination of two current titles for this story. Both titles are Chinese idioms.

“The frog at the bottom of the well” and “Glancing at the sky from the bottom of the well”.

Chinese Idiom: 井底之蛙 jǐng dǐ zhī wā > The frog at the bottom of the well.

Meaning: A person whose knowledge is so limited that he or she has no idea about anything aside from the world of their own experience.

[What a person lacks.]

Chinese Idiom: 坐井觀天 zuò jǐng guān tiān > Glancing at the sky from the bottom of the well.

Meaning: A person who can’t see the truth or refuses to see the truth.

[How a person acts.]

FYI > Neither of these are the title given to this by the author, the philosopher Chuang-tzu. He didn’t give this story a title. Also, the common interpretation of ‘in a well’ is incorrect. The word 井 meant ‘trap’ back when he wrote this story. Back then, it was known as “Trapped bottom the frog”. Over time this turned into “The frog at the bottom of the well”.

The original story > 子獨不聞夫埳井之鼃乎？謂東海之鱉曰：『吾樂與！出跳梁乎井幹之上，入休乎缺甃之崖；赴水則接腋持頤，蹶泥則沒足滅跗；還虷蟹與科斗，莫吾能若也。且夫擅一壑之水，而跨跱埳井之樂，此亦至矣，夫子奚不時來入觀乎！』東海之鱉左足未入，而右膝已縶矣。於是逡巡而卻，告之海曰：『夫千里之遠，不足以舉其大；千仞之高，不足以極其深。禹之時十年九潦，而水弗為加益；湯之時八年七旱，而崖不為加損。夫不為頃久推移，不以多少進退者，此亦東海之大樂也。』於是埳井之鼃聞之，適適然驚，規規然自失也。[back]

[2]. (Phonetic sound) 哒 dā > a sound made to get a horse to move forward; the clatter of a horse’s hoofs.

English equivalents:

A sound made to get a horse to move forward >

‘click’ (clicking sound made using your tongue).

Years ago, people used to say ‘giddy-up’.

The clatter of a horse’s hoofs >

Walking = ‘clip-clop, clip-clop’, the sequence of beats is left-hind left-fore, a brief pause and right-hind, right-fore; each hoof creating its own sound in sequence.

You can listen to the sound here > https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=vCbOsTdICMI

Trotting = ‘clip-clop-clip-clop’ we could be describing the sound of a horse at trot, when the left hind and right fore hit the ground in unison, followed by the right hind and left fore hitting in unison with equal spaces between all the sounds.

Cantering (or a 3 beat lope) = ‘clip-clop-clip…clip-clop-clip…’

Galloping = ‘clip-clippity-clip’

The information above is part of the answer given by Linda Braddy, Former Horse Trainer, Instructor, Equine Professional, here > https://www.quora.com/What-sounds-do-horse-hooves-make [back]

[3]. (Chinese Idiom) 投井下石 tóu jǐng xià shí > to throw stones at (somebody) who has fallen down a well.

Meaning: To hit a person when their down. [back]

*** ***

chapters.title: Chapter 750.2 - Yue Yang, Rampage (Part 2)
chapters.body:
Chapter 750.2 - Yue Yang, Rampage (Part 2)

Chapter 750 – Yue Yang, Rampage (Part 2)

By DDGod inLong Live Summons! 0

Proofreader: Erudite_Birdy

Editor: DDGod

“Is this my destiny?” Ancient Demon King muttered. Instead of leaving the blood-red altar like Scarlet Emperor did, he dashed towards Navagraha King.

Navagraha King glanced at Navagraha Queen, then suddenly jumped up from the blood-red altar to chase after Scarlet Emperor, “Navagraha Queen, Great Ancestral Grandmother of the Navagraha Tribe, Empress of Heaven Realm, allow me, Dong Yao, the honor of killing Scarlet Emperor to prevent him from revealing our secrets!” His knew that he was in danger of dying if he stayed where he was, so he used the excuse of wanting to kill Scarlet Emperor in order to be able to leave the area of the blood-red altar. No matter who his opponent was: Zhi Zun; Yue Yang; that little Serpent Demon, Xiao Wen Li; the Qilin girl, Bing Yin; the Hornless Dragon, Jiang Ying; the War Goddess Guard Sisters, Yao and Yu; Battle Angel, Ika; or the Golden Crown Thorny Flower Queen, Duo Duo, all of them were exceptional warriors. None of them were warriors that he could afford to trifle with.

Ancient Demon King desperately pursued Navagraha King. As soon as he could, he attacked Navagraha King without reservation hoping to kill him.

However, rather than fighting, Navagraha King ignored Ancient Demon King’s attack. Instead, he chose to dash tens of thousands of meters away, committed to going after Scarlet Emperor in order to silence him. Close behind him, Ancient Demon King was continuing to give chase. He could hear him swearing to kill him.

The golden statue of the Empress Dowager didn’t try to stop Navagraha King. She just gave a cold grunt, “That’s a good way to stop you from sitting on your hands.” She looked down from the sky, “Do you have any last words? Then, speak!”

Yue Yang acted as if he hadn’t heard Navagraha Queen’s words. Instead, Yue Yang turned towards his Golden Crown Thorny Flower Queen, Duo Duo, and Battle Angel, Ika, and told them, “Kill Navagraha King, Dong Yao! Make sure he doesn’t survive!”

The Qilin girl, Bing Yin looked at the old masters Zu and Wu. She watched as they climbed back up from the ground to stand beside the golden statue of Navagraha Queen, rather than chase Duo Duo and Ika. Bing Yin’s brow became slightly furrowed as she thought, “Navagraha King is very powerful, Scarlet Emperor is intent on escaping, Ancient Demon King is seriously injured and can’t exert his full power, so it’s unlikely that Duo Duo and Ika will be able to kill Navagraha King just by themselves… I know, I’ll go talk it over with Jiang Ying! But, I need to be careful not to get too wild!”

“Don’t worry, I can do it.” Yue Yang assured them. Then, he stretched out one of his arms until he was able to take hold of one of Zhi Zun’s jade-like hands. At the same time, he gave her some of his innate energy to replenish hers, due to her having excessively consumed her own. He put his other hand on top of the little loli Serpent Demon, Xiao Wen Li’s head and softly rubbed it. The little loli’s face was as pale as paper due to her overuse of energy, and out of one corner of her mouth there was still a tiny trickle of blood coming out. She didn’t make a sound as Yue Yang rubbed her head.

Except for Zhi Zun, Xiao Wen Li was the mainstay of power in a fight. Since she had constantly been fighting against the golden image of Navagraha Queen. Now that she had used up almost all of her energy, she was utterly exhausted. This left Yue Yang feeling guilty. “If only I was a little stronger, my cute little loli wouldn’t have had to fight like that!”

“Show me what you can do! Prove to me that you can do it!” Taunted Navagraha Queen. Next, she urged the Head of Luo Hou to release its demonic energy. Quickly, another jet black head, ablaze with raging demon flames appeared in the sky over White River Valley again. Then, it opened its enormous, sinister, cavern-like mouth that could devour the heavens and the earth.

“Don’t piss me off! When I go berserk even my people will be frightened!” Yue Yang slowly closed his eyes, instantly, his Qi erupted. It was tens of millions of times stronger than before. When he opened his eyes, his qi force was strong enough to destroy the heavens and the earth. It turned into a beam of light that shot up into the sky. He felt like it could penetrate the nine hexagrams, pass through the heavens and the earth, and destroy any existence that tried to obstruct its path.

After Navagraha Queen watched as Yue Yang’s eyes turned blood red and saw that his gaze had become completely irrational, she felt a fear of death that had not existed for nearly 10,000 years. Emerging from her heart was a fear of death that Navagraha Queen hadn’t felt since she faced Empress Fei Wen Li, 10,000 years in the past.

“What kind of power is that?” Navagraha Queen was completely confused. She couldn’t understand why, when this kid went out of control, he had become infinitely stronger. Now, he seemed so calm. How could his anger suddenly disappear? Could it be… my death threat is no longer something he’s worried about?

Before she could figure out the answer to these questions, Yue Yang acted. He stretched out his arms, which was now more terrifying than Jiang Ying’s powerful dragon claws, and directly struck the golden image of Navagraha Queen and the Head of Luo Hou from the sky. He pounded what was left of the golden image with both fists, while his feet were stomping like mad on the 100,000-year-old demonic weapon, the Head of Luo Hou.

No force could truly harm the Head of Luo Hou but its skin and hair were gradually smashed into powder under Yue Yang’s nonstop assault. Eventually, the flaming head’s appearance changed from a jet-black head into a chalk-white skull.

In a similar way, the golden image of Navagraha Queen couldn’t be hurt by brute force. Still, it was shattered into tiny gold splinters under the ferocity of Yue Yang’s attack, causing the sky to be splashed with countless gold fragments with every punch Yue Yang landed.

Realizing that she was in danger of dying, Navagraha Queen used her [Innate] skill, [Shifting Spirit]. “Give me your exceptional body. It now belongs to me! Submit!”

Navagraha Queen’s skill, [Shifting Spirit], allowed her to take over a living being’s form by wresting their soul from their body, dispersing their power, depleting their strength, and destroying their consciousness and spirit. Her chosen target was Zhi Zun. However, when she saw the irrational state that Yue Yang was in, she could tell that he had no way to defend his spirit. She was also impressed by how much more powerful he was. This the perfect time for her to use [Shifting Spirit] on him.

She also took into consideration the fact that Zhi Zun’s will was far stronger than Yue Yang’s. Depending on Zhi Zun’s level of mastery over the relevant skills, trying to take over Zhi Zun might just end up endangering her!

“No one’s invincible!” shouted, Zhi Zun. When the old masters, Zu and Wu, came to Navagraha Queen’s rescue, she extended her left index finger and blew them more than 10,000 meters away. At the same time, her right hand flipped a page of her grimoire. Immediately, the golden image, which was so badly broken that its shape was barely recognizable, was instantly obliterated by Zhi Zun’s skillful manipulation of the Power of Law. Had Navagraha Queen’s spirit been at a lower level, Zhi Zun would have managed to seckill her as well.

Navagraha Queen was scared to death. Darn! She had to hurry now. She rushed toward Yue Yang, ready to seize his body and use [Shifting Spirit] before her spirit was dispersed. She was desperate to regenerate her soul.

As the Head of Luo Hou was being stomped on by Yue Yang, it began emitting a seemingly endless sea of black flames of demonic energy. These quickly coalesced into another illusionary image of the Head of Luo Hou. Once formed, it immediately launched an attack on Yue Yang in order to give Navagraha Queen a chance to slip inside of Yue Yang’s body and overwhelm his spirit.

“Aargh!” Yue Yang completely gave himself over to his rage. Normally he was extremely calm and hard to anger. However, when he became angry and stopped trying to regain his normally calm state he would go berserk, becoming violently enraged. The consequences of this were terrifying due to the fact that when he lost control of his anger, he would merge with the Powers of Law controlled by his Card of Fate.[1] Under the influence of his Card of Fate – [World], he formed an illusionary dark-gold giant. It was hard to determine how tall the mountainous image of the dark-gold giant was. But, the Head of Luo Hou, that occupied the heavens and the earth and could devour anything, didn’t even reach as far as the knees of the dark-gold giant.

An instant later, Zhi Zun and Xiao Wen Li suddenly felt supported as a golden image formed behind each of them. Moreover, all of the energy they had exhausted was immediately restored.

Instinctively, the dark-gold giant lifted one of his feet and stomped on the image created by the Head of Luo Hou, that was composed of pure energy and manifestly shattered it. Even the physical skull of Luo Hou which had existed for more than ten of thousands of years was patently crushed by the golden giant as it lay on top of the blood-red altar.

Hundreds of miles away, all the warriors of the Navagraha tribe couldn’t bring themselves to look up into the sky. All of them could sense the existence of the dark-gold giant and be terrified of it. Currently, fifty kilometers away, Navagraha King was bogged down by Scarlet Emperor and Ancient Demon King. Originally, he had been able to withstand their attacks for a long time, but now that the dark-gold giant had appeared, it put a huge amount of pressure on him. It was like tens of thousands of mountains were pressing down on his back.

However, it was Duo Duo and Ika that were given the greatest support. Ika immediately slashed at Navagraha King with her Angel’s Blades, leaving a thousand-meter trench in the ground, and knocking him toward Duo Duo. As soon as he arrived, the image of the dark-gold giant, behind Duo Duo, swatted Navagraha King to the ground, like an annoying fly.

At this point, none of Yue Yang’s enemies could look directly at the image of the dark-gold giant, who was literally standing in the sky. They could only lower their gaze, to stare at their toes. This was the Power of Law that Yue Yang gained from his Card of Fate – [Fate]—the power to irreversibly control fate!

[1]. Yue Yang’s Card of Fate is seemingly a mutation that joined the three cards below into one. This mutated card has been named ‘Sky Wolf’ because the name given to a Sky Demon comes from the title of the Card of Fate they drew.

[World]

The one who picks this card gains the ability of creation. They are able to create all things in the world. Only the success rate varies by level.

[Fate]

The one who picks this card gains the power to irreversibly control fate. They are freed from all the effects and affects of fate.

[Sky Wolf]

Represents the Destruction of the world. It’s related to the legend in which a World Destroying Demon Wolf swallows the world. The one who picks this card obtains the power of destruction. If attacked, even the strongest innate would be destroyed forever. Additionally, their spirit will be unable to survive.

*** ***

chapters.title: Chapter 751.1 - Whose Power Is This? (Part 1)
chapters.body:
Chapter 751.1 - Whose Power Is This? (Part 1)

Chapter 751 – Whose Power Is This? (Part 1)

By DDGod inLong Live Summons! 1

Proofreader: Erudite_Birdy

Editor: DDGod

None of the people present could figure out how long the dark-gold giant wreaked havoc in the sky, until at last, it finally disappeared. Then, Scarlet Emperor and Ancient Demon King, who had been unable to raise their heads to look directly at that dark-gold giant, began to recover now that the horrible pressure had completely vanished.

Scarlet Emperor couldn’t stop himself from shivering before muttering, “It’s too terrible. I’ll never go back to Tong Tian Tower.” After finishing those words, he escaped at top speed like a prisoner who has just been freed. With his trembling right hand, he pulled out a white teleportation crystal and crushed it. Then, he dashed through a silver portal door as soon as it appeared. However, before leaving, he glanced back at the place where that dark-gold giant had just disappeared, his eyes still glittering with extreme fear.

Ancient Demon King didn’t choose to escape. In front of him, Navagraha King was being besieged by Duo Duo and Ika whose power had been enhanced by Yue Yang’s dark-gold giant. Behind these two was the Hornless Dragon, Jiang Ying, and the Qilin Girl, Bing Yin. A bitter hatred flashed in his eyes, “You killed my subordinates, I’ll slaughter your entire Navagraha tribe!”

Filled with indignation and hatred, Ancient Demon King didn’t join the group intent on killing Navagraha King. Instead, he dashed to the entrance of White River Valley and prepared to exterminate every single warrior of the Navagraha tribe. He knew that Navagraha King wouldn’t be able to survive the fight against those four girls, especially when the Qilin girl of the Eastern Immortal Tribe was included in the mix. Judging from the effect of the dark-gold giant, he thought that Navagraha Queen wouldn’t survive its fatal attack either. So, out of all of the warriors from the Navagraha tribe, that only left Si Hai, You Jin, Li Pan, and a few miscellaneous subordinates.

If Navagraha Queen hadn’t killed Ye Xiao, Zi Guang, and Bei, then Ancient Demon King wouldn’t be undertaking such an extremely cruel retaliatory action. When his most loyal subordinate, Ye Xiao had to explode himself to delay Navagraha Queen, Ancient Demon King had gnashed his teeth and his hatred seemed to know no bounds. Even though he knew he wouldn’t survive if he chose to stay in White River Valley for a long time, as that would infuriate Yue Yang and Zhi Zun, he wasn’t going to let those Navagraha warriors escape.

He would kill them! An eye for an eye, and a tooth for a tooth! This was the motivation that drove him to put off escaping and focus on killing them all!

Under pressure from the foot of Yue Yang’s dark-gold giant, the blood-red altar had cracked. An indentation of the dark-gold giant’s big toe was clearly visible on the blood-red altar. Fortunately, the female statue and its base had been within in the gap between the big toe and the second toe, so they remained undamaged.

Now, Yue Yang lay on the blood-red altar, but he wasn’t conscious. Due to his anger causing his energy to explode, and going on a rampage, he was completely unconscious. After this outburst, where Yue Yang had fiercely fought with his enemies, his body had automatically fallen asleep, allowing his body to begin to recover.

As for the indecent little fellow, whose clothes had been crushed to pieces, Zhi Zun turned her head away as she took out a cloak from her storage ring and draped it over him, to cover his nakedness while he was sleeping.

Zhi Zun thought that the battle had come to an end, but what was beyond her expectations was that Zu and Wu, who had transformed into wisps of black smoke, were now floating out from the remains of the Head of Luo Hou.

They were still alive! This proved that Navagraha Queen hadn’t died yet. How could the supreme power of the dark-gold giant have been unable to kill Navagraha Queen? Zhi Zun was truly shocked. No matter how powerful Navagraha Queen was, how was she able to compete with the power of the dark-gold giant’s law? However, after reflecting for a few seconds, Zhi Zun realized that Navagraha Queen must have depended on yet another treasure to survive. It must have been a piece of equipment that was as least as powerful as the Head of Luo Hou or even greater than it. She knew, just as Zu and Wu had hidden within the Head of Luo Hou, Navagraha Queen must have hidden herself somewhere else.

The old masters, Zu and Wu, were dying. As soon as they took form, they tore open their chests using their sharp claws. Enduring the pain, they shed their blood onto the ground, then they drew a strange array of runes using that blood.

Zhi Zun’s expression turned cold. She was worried that Navagraha Queen would launch a sneak attack on Yue Yang, so she stayed by his side.

“Shiiiiing!” Using her Humanoid Divine Soldier, Zhi Zun slashed at the old masters, Zu and Wu. Zhi Zun was able to do so as she had regained some of her energy when the dark-gold giant took over for her. As her sword Qi burst into the night, carrying with it Zhi Zun’s Supreme Will and the horrible destructive power of destruction, the sword Qi split the heavens in half!

While the old masters, Zu and Wu, were strong enough, they were dying. So, when confronted by the power of Zhi Zun’s slash, it was absolutely impossible for them to block it. Still, they managed to raise their canes to resist. “Puff, puff.” Spurting blood, both of their heads fell to the ground.

Eh? Where was Navagraha Queen? Why didn’t she appear when the old masters, Zu and Wu, were about to be killed by her?

Zhi Zun used her spiritual energy to search through the ruins of the White River Valley, trying to find the cunning, fox-like Navagraha Queen, who was doing her best to prolong her life. After scanning the entire valley, three times, except for the fragments of the Head of Luo Hou and a small amount of demonic energy, there was nothing else that seemed abnormal. No matter how hard she tried, she couldn’t locate a fourth person near the blood-red altar. She could only detect Yue Yang, Xiao Wen Li, and herself.

The old masters, Zu and Wu, had just been beheaded, but Navagraha Queen was certain to still be alive. Where could she be hiding? Had she taken the opportunity to escape? No! Navagraha Queen wouldn’t choose to escape after her spirit had been so seriously wounded by Yue Yang’s dark-gold giant. Even if she was dying, she would desperately fight back, like a cornered wild beast. As the supreme heart turned these matters over within her heart, she came to an answer, but she needed to find Navagraha Queen to confirm the reasoning of her heart.

All of a sudden, Zhi Zun’s body shook slightly and raised her head. Looking up, she saw a tiny, white speck high above in the sky. It looked like a lone star, with no special surface features. Nonetheless, in the blink of an eye, Zhi Zun’s expression turned pale with fright.

A few seconds later, the star had gotten much closer. After a few more seconds, it had transformed from an insignificant, dim star into a noticeably bright star. Then, it took on the appearance of a first-magnitude star, one that would be obvious even when gazing at a clear summer night sky. What does all of this mean? The star was falling at high-speed, moreover, its size was monstrous. If this star dropped on them, it wouldn’t be just White River Valley that was destroyed. The entire fifth floor of Heaven Stairway, possibly all of Heaven Stairway, would be obliterated.

It was such a huge meteor, and at the lowest estimate, its diameter was longer than the length of the White River Valley. It was impossible for her to crush it by her alone. There was a choice- bring Yue Yang to Queen Night then escape here together, or try her best to stop the disaster.

“It was you who forced me to do so. You must die with me! Even the Navagraha tribe was extinct, I will not let you live! Now that I can’t live, you can’t live! I can’t get the treasure inside the Gods’ Ruins treasure, then you don’t want to inherit it! Let us die under the meteor!”

A malicious resentment sprang up in Zhi Zun’s mind. Zhi Zun turned back and found a monster’s body in the high sky.

There was no head above its neck, only a black body covered with ugly scales. It had four hands and a snake tail. The guess of Zhi Zun was proved that Navagraha Queen had used the Head of Luo Hou to attract the dark-gold giant’s attention, then she had hidden inside Luo Hou’s body and attempted to escape. However, she made a mistake – not only the Head of Luo Hou but its body was destroyed by the dark-gold giant.

~~~

Actually, there are still many places to improve, but there is no enough time to do so. Then I’ll change it later.

chapters.title: Chapter 751.2 - Whose Power Is This? (Part 2)
chapters.body:
Chapter 751.2 - Whose Power Is This? (Part 2)

Chapter 751 – Whose Power Is This? (Part 2)

After Luo Hou’s body fell onto the blood-red altar, it gradually disintegrated. It was absolutely impossible for it to survive after it had been attacked by the dark-gold giant using the Power of Law from Yue Yang’s Card of Fate – [Sky Wolf].

As Navagraha Queen’s soul slipped out of the disintegrating body of Lou Hou, she glared at Zhi Zun, who was ready to release her [Light of Destruction], with a ferocious expression. It’s so horrible, “I’m dying, so I won’t allow any of you to survive. Do you know why I hid inside my ancestor Luo Hou’s body? Do you know why I chose to withstand your attacks in the vault of heaven? It’s because I exhausted all of my energy, so I had to offer Luo Hou’s body as a sacrifice in order to summon that shooting star. No matter who it is, anyone who is more powerful than me has to die! That arrogant serpent demon, Fei Wen Li, was just an [Innate] Elder, Heaven-Rank, Level One when she set foot in Heaven Realm. I watched her become stronger as she rose through the ranks. So, why did I have to grovel at her feet? That fool, Prison Emperor, shouldn’t have refused my proposal to marry my descendant, and unite with my Navagraha tribe. Then we could have shared the treasures inside Gods’ Ruins. And you, who can’t even enter Heaven Realm, why do you treat me with such disrespect when I’m a queen of that realm? I’ve never lost to anyone. If you want to kill me, you must pay with your life!”

After listening to Navagraha Queen’s rant, Zhi Zun didn’t release her [Light of Destruction]. She just stared coldly at her, then she spoke in a frosty tone, “Are you finished?”

Zhi Zun’s summoning grimoire emerged. As it floated in front of her, she stretched out an arm, preparing to turn a page. She was determined to destroy Navagraha Queen’s spirit. She didn’t bother to raise her head, to look at Navagraha Queen, when she whispered, “Trash like you should have been cleaned up a long time ago. Now, I understand a little bit more about why our ancestors wanted the heirs of Tong Tian Tower to take out the trash! Since Yue Yang hasn’t yet awakened, I’ll be the one responsible for cleanup duty!”

Navagraha Queen’s spirit hurried toward Zhi Zun. Currently, she was desperate to possess Zhi Zun’s body. She intended to get it by using her innate skill [Shifting Soul].

As one of Zhi Zun’s jade-like hands gracefully flipped over a page of her grimoire, she shouted, “Obliterate!”

Immediately Navagraha Queen’s spirit shrank until it was so small that Zhi Zun was able to easily grasp it in the palm of one hand. Just like crushing an eggshell, Zhi Zun used her Power of Law to crush Navagraha Queen’s spirit—her spirit was instantly destroyed!

As Navagraha Queen’s spirit vanished into nothingness, she didn’t scream. She didn’t even release a plaintive wail! Navagraha Queen had finally been killed by Zhi Zun. Simultaneously, the bodies of the old masters, Zu and Wu, exploded, turning into wisps of black smoke that quickly dispersed.

Then, a grimoire, that had just reached the level of Holy-Rank, exploded in the void, releasing an immeasurable amount of energy between the heavens and the earth. Using her Supreme Will, Zhi Zun was able to fuse this energy with her Diamond Grimoire. Eventually, these two grimoires fully combined, glowing with a seemingly endless holy light. Navagraha Queen’s grimoire had completely disappeared. Only Zhi Zun’s grimoire could still be seen, floating in the air—it had evolved into a peerless Holy Grimoire!

Tens of thousands of brilliant lights coalesced, flowing around Zhi Zun. Then, they turned into a golden pillar of light that shot straight up into the sky. Almost immediately thereafter, her skills and level suddenly increased. It had been a very long time since she had advanced. However, now that she had finally achieved this goal, she didn’t smile.

Meanwhile, in the sky overhead, the shooting star, that Navagraha Queen had sacrificed the last of her energy and Luo Hou’s body to summon, had expanded to the size of the full moon. The light from it was so bright that the ground shone like silver. The massive shooting star was about to obliterate the fifth floor of Heaven’s Stairway. Even with Zhi Zun’s newly raised strength, it was still impossible for her to prevent the shooting star from falling—because its size was just too monstrous!

Should she wake up Yue Yang and urge him to use his dark-gold giant and his Card of Fate – [Fate], that would allow him to control fate? Zhi Zun turned around and looked at Yue Yang, who had risen to become an [Innate] Elder, Earth-Rank, Level 10 while asleep. She wondered, “If I wake him up, will he be able to release that amount of power again? If he does try to do so, will it harm him, possibly damaging his potential?” After thinking this over, Zhi Zun decided against waking him up.

“Forget it. It was fortunate they were all still alive!” When Zhi Zun was about to pick up Yue Yang and carry him to where Queen Night was located, so they could escape from the Heaven Stairway together, she heard a trembling cry. It was a very natural, nature-like sound that was incomparable to any other creature. She couldn’t resist it, even when she used her Sovereign Will.

Yue Yang’s [Nirvana Flame Pillar] shot high into the sky. It was a hundred times higher than Yue Yang’s usual [Nirvana Flame Pillar]. Countless Fire Phoenixes, formed from Nirvana fire, flew so beautifully that it looked like they were dancing around the pillar.

Zhi Zun gazed up at the sky. Above the dancing phoenixes, she could see a wonderful being spreading out a pair of amazing wings. Then a crack, like a black hole, appeared in the sky. The shooting star, which was about to obliterate the entire fifth floor of Heaven Stairway, was swiftly sucked into the black hole and disappeared.

Even Zhi Zun couldn’t help but sigh deeply. The event had been beyond spectacular. That kind of power could so easily shake the heavens and dominate the earth. Would she ever be able to achieve this level of power?

“Wait! Something’s not right!” Zhi Zun suddenly realized that the surface of the shooting star had been covered with a massive number of sword cuts before it was sucked into the black hole. This meant that the shooting star had been cut into small pieces, then scattered in such a way that they would all be sucked into the black hole! In all of White River Valley, only Zhi Zun had the skills necessary to perceive this. She was greatly shocked by this discovery. How had the massive shooting star, which she couldn’t stop from falling, been cut into pieces with a sword—in complete silence‽

Who has power like this? Perhaps, only deities that exist in legends have the ability to accomplish this!

Zhi Zun stared at the shooting star as it disappeared into the black hole, bit by bit. Except for her, no one knew that without the black hole, the monstrous shooting star, which seemed like it would destroy everything, would have broken apart.

As for all the people on the ground, they would have an opportunity to watch a spectacular meteor shower. All of the pieces would burn up before they reached the ground, so nothing would be damaged, and no one would be killed!

Eventually the [Nirvana Flame Pillar] faded away, returning to Yue Yang’s body, as if it had never existed. Zhi Zun wasn’t able to calm down for a long time. She stared at Yue Yang, trying to find an answer, but her effort was all in vain. After a while, Zhi Zun’s face showed a trace of a smile, “Maybe even you don’t know what kind of guardian you have. I thought it was the Qilin girl, but it turns out, it was far beyond what I had imagined. I have to say, you’re a really lucky little guy. Queen Night was right about you. You really are the heir of Tong Tian Tower, the one chosen by fate. Will the glory of our ancestors be restored? I’m really looking forward to that!”

At the entrance to White River Valley, Queen Night gazed up at the sky. When the monstrous shooting star began to fall, everyone stopped fighting. Then, in a blink of an eye, a black hole had appeared and sucked up the monstrous shooting star. The battle situation changed so quickly that everyone experienced both grief and joy, at almost the same time.

With the stars of the entire galaxy overhead, in a naturally beautiful voice, she spoke to the dying old man, Si Hai. “Do you still want to fight? Elder Si Hai, it was you who broke your ancestor’s promise. Please, forgive me when I use my Power of Law. The next attack will decide our fates!”

“If I lose, can I atone for my crimes by committing suicide? If I do this, can you leave some seedlings, so my tribe can survive? Let You Jin take some of them away, okay?” begged the old man as he slowly knelt down. He already knew that he had been falling behind Night Empress, not because she was stronger than him, but because she used her battles to improve her fighting skills. When the main fight ended, their fight would end too.

Si Hai knew that he had lost his confidence and will. He knew that he could not escape, that he could only yield to his fate. All he could do was beg Queen Night for a promise that would give his Navagraha tribe a way to survive. More than anything else, he wanted to make sure that his entire tribe wouldn’t be destroyed! However, this wasn’t meant to be.

A furious high-level warrior, with a heart overflowing with pain, arrived. It was Ancient Demon King. He burned with a fire that could turn the world to ash. He spoke in a voice that roared like thunder. “Si Hai, You Jin, Li Pan, all of you. Today, I will take all of your lives, in return for Navagraha Queen murdering my subordinates. If I don’t kill all of you, I swear I’ll no longer be a demon!”

chapters.title: Chapter 752.1 - Silver Core, Galactic Explosion] (Part 1)
chapters.body:
Chapter 752.1 - Silver Core, Galactic Explosion] (Part 1)

Chapter 752 – [Silver Core, Galactic Explosion] (Part 1)

By DDGod inLong Live Summons! 0

Proofreader: Erudite_Birdy

Editor: DDGod

Due to the arrival of Ancient Demon King, all the warriors of the Navagraha tribe, as well as Xue Wuxia, and Princess Qian Qian were on high alert.

Blazing Flame was fighting against Li Pan when she was recalled by Xue Wu Xia. Not far away from Xue Wuxia, Bloody Queen, Red, and Barbarian Cow Shadow, Ah Man, left their respective opponents to stand at Xue Wu Xia’s side. Spirit of Sky Fire and Reaper Mantis were still helping Princess Qian Qian pursue the seriously wounded Funeral Mourner, You Jin. However, as soon as Ancient Demon King arrived, they immediately switched over to protect Princess Qian Qian as she withdrew. Only the two girls, Yi Nan and Yue Bing, insisted on finishing off the warrior of the Navagraha tribe, who had been poisoned and was close to death.

Rather than withdraw, Hui Tai Lang raised his head and howled at the sky, then sped up his group’s attacks against their opponents. Star Scorpion and Tao Tie Blade were powerful aids to him. With the help of both of them, Hui Tai Lang had succeeded in killing three of their opponents. Now, just in front of them was the fourth, and the last one.

“DIE!” screamed Ancient Demon King. The two warriors of the Navagraha tribe, who had been seriously wounded by the Bloody Queen, Red and the Barbarian Cow Shadow, Ah Man, didn’t even have time to think about escaping. It was beyond doubt, Ancient Demon King was the Grim Reaper, come to take their souls.

When facing Navagraha Queen and Yue Yang, he had been defeated. Additionally, he hadn’t been able to rescue his subordinates; Ye Xiao, Zi Guang, and Bei. However, even though he was seriously wounded, he was almost invincible when it came to killing the members of the Navagraha tribe.

This being so, before Si Hai, You Jin or Li Pan could arrive to rescue the warriors, Ancient Demon King rushed behind one of them. When that warrior turned around to face him, he shoved one of his hands against that warrior’s horror-stricken face. That unlucky warrior, who had already been so badly beaten that he was covered in blood, couldn’t withstand Ancient Demon King’s attack. He instantly dropped to the ground, dead, seckilled by Ancient Demon King.

Meanwhile, Si Hai was the quickest to arrive, as he ran all the way at full tilt. Ancient Demon King completely ignored him, choosing instead to take care of the other warrior.

He raised his right hand, pointed at the other warrior, then shot him in the face using [Ancient Demon Finger]. Somehow he managed to survive! Sadly, he only managed to get about ten meters away before Ancient Demon King caught him, then tossed him into his ancient war beast, Soul Crystal Bone Meal. The cost for this was having to take a punch from Si Hai. However, Ancient Demon King knew, unlike Yue Yang, it was utterly impossible for those Navagraha tribe warriors to escape once he was tossed inside Soul Crystal Bone Meal. In moments, he had been ground into bonemeal.

“Run!” The mind of Si Hai fell into chaos, there wasn’t a speck of calm to be found. The aura of Navagraha Queen had almost vanished. He surmised that Yue Yang and Zhi Zun had found a way to kill her. It wouldn’t take them long to finish off Navagraha Queen. One more strike could do it!

In the aftermath of this epic disaster; whether it was the dazzling [Light of Destruction], the dark-gold giant who was affecting everything by using the powers of Yue Yang’s Card of Fate, or the falling star that would have destroyed the entire White River Valley, all sorts of consequences had begun to appear. These were causing the Navagraha tribe’s tactical situation to become a truly tragic one. In particular, the failure of Navagraha Queen’s battle plan to use the falling star to destroy their most powerful enemies was directly responsible for the failure of their overall battle plan. It didn’t matter who destroyed her trump card, for the Navagraha tribe, it was bad news!

“I won’t leave!” Li Pan flatly stated. He preferred to die in battle rather than capitulate to despair. “General Si Hai, we’ll cover you! Go!” yelled the Funeral Mourner, You Jin. He was a hundred times more logical than Li Pan. He didn’t know if he could escape, but he knew that even if he did escape, the Navagraha tribe would inevitably decline. This was evident because he was not powerful enough to save, then revitalize the tribe, but Si Hai was different. Compared to Navagraha Queen and Navagraha King, his power was just a tiny bit less. If Si Hai could survive, the Navagraha tribe still had a chance to rise again.

“None of you will walk away! The fifth floor of Heaven Stairway will be the burial plot for your entire Navagraha tribe!” shouted Ancient Demon King. Ignoring the attacks by Si Hai, Li Pan, and You Jin, he summoned [Burial by Ten Thousand Mammoths]. A moment later, it was as if 10,000 mammoths were stomping on the heads of the Navagraha tribe’s warriors, all at the same time! It was a horrifically painful attack. Immediately thereafter, Ancient Demon King utilized his [Hell Prison] Domain of Power, then summoned his Guardian Spirit Beast, Ju. This combination quickly turned the entrance of White River Valley into a living Hell.

Countless fiery, Ju, stone giants emerged from the magma and besieged the Navagraha tribe. During his previous fight against Yue Yang, he hadn’t been able to release his skill [Countless Demons Descend to Earth] because Yue Yang was too agile. Ancient Demon King easily controlled all of the fiery, Ju, stone giants, manipulating them until they had encircled the Navagraha tribe.

Throughout, he had been very careful to avoid attacking Xue Wuxia and Princess Qian Qian. The reason he did so wasn’t that he was afraid of Yue Yang, but because he was concerned that Xue Wuxia would use her [Spirit Domain] Domain of Power to distract the warriors of the Navagraha tribe, possibly causing them to ignore the fight. Princess Qian Qian stood aside holding the Prison Emperor’s Divine Sword, in this way all the warriors of the Navagraha tribe were in danger of dying at all times.

Ancient Demon King had done his best to put the Navagraha tribe in the most perilous situation possible. He had passed the point where he was concerned about being exposed to the same attack. He didn’t care about the cost he would have to pay, as long as he killed them all.

Si Hai, Li Pan, and You Jin were scared to death by [Countless Demons Descend to Earth]. ALL of the remaining warriors of the Navagraha tribe were surrounded by thousands of fiery, Ju, stone giants! Currently, there were still enough of them that the stone giants couldn’t kill all of them at once, but if this disaster couldn’t be turned around post-haste, all of them were destined to die.

“General Si Hai, you must leave! Go!” beseeched You Jin, as he knelt down on the ground.

“Die!” Li Pan ignored You Jin’s pleas, choosing instead to fight with Ancient Demon King. He wanted to perish together with him.

“You Jin, you know, I can’t run away! When you return, present the most beautiful girl of our tribe clan to Chang Hui, and order the rest of our tribe to become his subordinates.”

Chang Hui was the person Si Hai hated most, but for the tribe to survive, Si Hai actually had to lower his head to his worst enemy. Ironically, the most beautiful girl in their tribe was General Si Hai’s granddaughter. Unfortunately, she was a girl who was so proud that she had refused to become Navagraha King’s consort. Now, her life would change drastically. Si Hai had to give her to his archenemy, Chang Hui.

The Funeral Mourner, You Jin, had to contain his grief and anger as he kowtowed to General Si Hai. As General Si Hai desperately tried to block the enraged Ancient Demon King from slaughtering his warriors, You Jin roared out his pain and anguish, as he broke through Xue Wuxia’s [Spirit Domain] Domain of Power, and avoided Princess Qian Qian’s [Azure Dragon Saint Force] Domain of Power. By running at top speed, he finally managed to escape from the battlefield. Bearing with him the heavy responsibility given to him by General Si Hai. He would have to endure the humiliation of abandoning his fellow warriors in order to carry out the important task entrusted to him. While they were fighting to the death—he must escape and live!

Be that as it may, even if Queen Night didn’t stop him, could he still manage to escape from the fifth floor of Heaven Stairway?

chapters.title: Chapter 752.2 - Silver Core, Galactic Explosion] (Part 2)
chapters.body:
Chapter 752.2 - Silver Core, Galactic Explosion] (Part 2)

Chapter 752 – [Silver Core, Galactic Explosion] (Part 2)

By DDGod inLong Live Summons! 0

Proofreader: Erudite_Birdy

Editor: DDGod

A man, with wounds all over his body, suddenly appeared in front of the Funeral Mourner, You Jin. He stretched out his right arm until he could press his hand against You Jin’s face. Immediately, a devastating force erupted from Sky Execution’s hand, knocking You Jin backward. You Jin fell to the ground just in front of Si Hai’s feet. Despite his countless wounds and his clothes being completely soaked with his blood, the man’s posture and attitude showed off his immense arrogance. He acted as if his wounds were someone else’s problem.

His right hand flickered with bolts of purple lightning. As he stood within Princess Qian Qian’s [Azure Dragon Saint Force] Domain of Power, his power was explosively increased. He snorted at the Funeral Mourner, You Jin, then arrogantly said, “Did you ever think that I would manage to survive a fight with dozens of your Navagraha Tribe warriors? I’m Sky Execution! I’m still alive! Now, come at me, and let me see the skills of your Navagraha Tribe warriors!”

You Jin stared at Sky Execution with a look of astonishment. Of the Navagraha Tribe warriors that had been secretly sent to the Demonic Palace on Falling Cangue Mountain, more than five of them were at Heaven-Rank, Level 3. They even had a Heaven-Rank, Level 5, sadistic torturer, Bai Zhe, who had been personally picked by Li Pan. How could these high-level, Heaven-Rank, Navagraha warriors fail in their mission to crush the Demonic Palace? According to the intelligence, his tribe had gathered, of those in the Demonic Palace, only one had reached Heaven-Rank, their great leader, Sky Execution! How could the Heaven-Rank, Level 5, warrior Bai Zhe, be unable to kill THAT person? What went wrong? This sort of thing just can’t happen. It must be a mistake!

“Sky Mystery, Sky Extreme, elderly Sky Prefect, the five great elders of the Underworld Tribe, and two top elders from the Eastern Goblin Tribe, were all killed by me, Sky Execution. Now, I’ll hold the rest of your Navagraha Tribe to account! As long as I, Luo Jia Shan, am alive, this fight will never end!”

To one side of Sky Execution, there was a man covered in wounds, the Dragon Emperor of the Eastern Goblin Tribe. His sonorous voice roared with fury at the members of the Navagraha Tribe.

Standing on the other side of Sky Execution, the Emperor of the Underworld Tribe was currently too weak to support himself, as his arm had been cut off. Even though his blue blood was dripping on the ground, his murderous aura was no less than that of the Dragon Emperor. All three of these warriors were prepared to die, as long as they died together with their enemies.

During the recent fight against the Demonic Palace, it would’ve been impossible to win by depending solely on their physical strength. Without their predecessors, who had fearlessly sacrificed themselves in order to kill a large number of the Navagraha Tribe warriors, they would have lost. The judgment of the Navagraha Tribe as to their strength had been correct. However, they’d forgotten to take their fighting spirit into consideration. Thousands of the Demonic Palace, the Eastern Goblin Tribe, and the Underworld Tribe’s warriors had made the ultimate sacrifice. They had chosen to self-destruct, creating a mountain of enemy corpses. It could be said that they had buried their enemies together with their own bodies. At last, even their most elderly warriors, who had been in seclusion, came out and sacrificed themselves. This turned the tide of the battle, allowing them to win.

“If I don’t kill all of you, I swear, I’ll no longer be a human!” Sky Execution made the same oath that Ancient Demon King had made.

After Phoenix Fairy Beauty emerged from Xue Wu Xia’s Grimoire World and confirmed the sad news, she cried out in pain, feeling the deepest of sorrows. “Great-grandpa, Second-grandpa, Third-grandpa, why have you all passed away? The last time we spoke, I promised that I would give each of you a Holy-Rank war beast. I haven’t done that yet. So why have you gone away?” Her heart was so deeply saddened—she burst into tears—inconsolably!

Si Hai sighed as he stared at Queen Night, who had now raised her strength to the limit. In the face of such a situation, where the Navagraha Tribe was going to be completely exterminated. He thought about trying to reverse that outcome, but instead of doing so, he only let out a long sigh. Worse, he knew the reason for their upcoming demise was their own greed.

If it wasn’t for the sake of cleaning up all the forces inside Tong Tian Tower, they would have dominated what remained of Gods’ Ruins. If it weren’t for the fact that they had determined that they would be the final victors, if they hadn’t been sure that they would win the war, they wouldn’t have rushed to kill Ye Xiao, Zi Guang, and the others, in order to force Ancient Demon King to fight them. If they hadn’t misjudged the warriors of Tong Tian Tower’s spirit of sacrifice, if they hadn’t seriously underestimated the power of Zhi Zun and Yue Yang, the Navagraha Tribe wouldn’t have fallen into such dreadful circumstances that their entire clan was going to die.

However, they had no one to blame but themselves. The Navagraha Tribe would pay for their greed and arrogance, even if they were all destined to perish. If Sky Execution, and the other two high-level warriors, hadn’t complicated matters, Yue Yang’s team might have refrained from fighting. After all, they had to defend against the possibility of Ancient Demon King would launch a sneak attack. However, when the Sky Execution, the Dragon Emperor, and the Emperor of the Underworld Tribe had arrived, ready to fight, the Navagraha Tribe’s destiny was set in stone—they would be utterly annihilated!

Queen Night was going to shoot! She was completely enraged!! Si Hai looked up and let out a long sigh, “Hell! This will be the last battle of my life!” Can I really defeat the greatest warrior of Tong Tian Tower, even if we fight one on one? It looks like this attack will decide my fate!

Enough power to cause the sea to turn upside down erupted from Si Hai’s body. Not only that, Si Hai was desperately over drafting his spiritual power. He wasn’t doing this to defeat Queen Night. He was killing himself in order to take her with him when he died! Suddenly, a single thought possessed him. It was the only thought he could think. “The strongest innate fighter in Tong Tian Tower, the leader of the human innate alliance, the mistress of Tong Tian Tower, I’m sure I can triumph over her—just this once!”

“[Silver Core, Galactic Explosion]!” Night Empress released a Divine Equipment-grade, beautiful, silver core, that had suddenly appeared in her hand. She was able to launch her attack a moment before Si Hai hit her with his.

At the same time, Si Hai sensed that this was a Power of Law that the Night Empress had never used before.

“[Starry Sky Domain] Domain of Power” Night Empress clasped the silver core between her jade-white hands, as tens of thousands of stars, gathered at the speed of light, converging into the silver core. The silver core had formed into a stunningly beautiful and splendid orb.

One star after another, unaffected by Si Hai defenses, was passing directly through his body. Less than a second later, Si Hai’s body had been stuck by the edge of the silver core. He’d turned into a monster, riddled with countless holes.

Queen Night’s jade-like hands gently held the silver core, then the destructive power of [Starry Sky Domain] Domain of Power burst out in an instant. The tens of thousands of stars that had gathered together instantly exploded. Space itself was completely shattered. Si Hai’s power was completely overwhelmed by the power of Queen Night’s [Silver Core, Galactic Explosion]. The shattered space gave birth to a twisted black hole, which sucked Si Hai’s shredded spirit inside, sealing it for eternity.

All of this happened because Si Hai stopped defending his spirit, so it was completely annihilated before the black hole disappeared. As if his spirit had been freed of all its burdens, Si Hai’s spirit shone brightly enough to illuminate the black hole. Then it disappeared forever—consigned to oblivion!

*** *** ***

chapters.title: Chapter 753 - I Sympathize With You! I Pity You!
chapters.body:
Chapter 753 - I Sympathize With You! I Pity You!

Chapter 753 – I Sympathize with You! I Pity You!

By DDGod inLong Live Summons! 0

Proofreader: Erudite_Birdy

Editor: DDGod

Outside the Rainbow Castle.

“How can you still get up?” Shun Tian couldn’t bear it anymore. He crazily shouted, “Why are you still alive?”

He couldn’t remember how many times he had knocked Fatty Hai down. One thousand times? Ten thousand times?

But he just wouldn’t die!

If someone else were in his shoes, he would’ve been killed more than a hundred times.

Shun Tian hadn’t known that a person could go beyond the limits of life and death by relying on their willpower. Besides, rubbish like Fatty Hai always behaved like a total coward. Where did his willpower come from? What kind of power could have sustained Fatty Hai for so long? How could this piece of trash, who he could kill with a single blow, manage to survive this long?

No matter what tricks, skills, or treasures he used to fight Fatty Hai. He refused to die!

Shun Tian had never doubted his own strength before, but now his confidence had been shaken.

After Fatty Hai lost his ability to maintain his transformation state, that of an ugly beast, and regained his human form; his ribs and legs had been broken, his right arm had been twisted until it broke, four fingers on his left hand had been twisted off, leaving only his thumb intact. However, this broken man was still trying to support himself using that thumb, insisting on trying to sit up.

Blood covered the ground. It was inconceivable that a person could still be alive after losing so much blood. How could this strange creature, sitting in front of him, spitting out blood, mouthful after mouthful, be so calm? It was as if he had been born a blood vomiting beast.

Wind Breath Seabird flew down from the sky, landing next to Fatty Hai. Utilizing [Warm Sea Heavenly Wind],[1] it once again overdrew its spiritual energy, so it could infuse it into Fatty Hai’s body. This small amount of aid was the most it could do to help him recover. Fatty Hai was almost dead, as most of his spiritual energy had bled out. His face was so swollen that even his eyes couldn’t be seen. However, under the unbelieving gaze of Shun Tian, by utilizing the tiny bit of energy supplied by his Wind Breath Seabird, with difficulty, Fatty Hai was able to stand up again.

Once he had accomplished that, Fatty Hai raised his left hand, the one that only had an intact thumb, spat out a mouthful of blood, then beckoned to Shun Tian, “Come on, hit me again. I know I can’t defeat you, but I can tire you out until you die of exhaustion!”

Shun Tian’s face darkened with anger, but at the same time, he also felt regret. If Shun Tian could do it all over again, he would never choose Fatty Hai as his opponent. Even if he didn’t have any other options, he couldn’t bring himself to despise the wretched fatty.

Most importantly, back when he had a chance to seckill the fatso, he never should have given him an opportunity to take a swing at him. During their entire fight, Fatty Hai had only managed to hit him once. Nevertheless, when Fatty Hai had used his [Full Moon Rhinoceros] skill, that one punch had broken his strong right fist.

In addition, that blow had punched straight through the chest of his Guardian Spirit Beast, Emperor, who rushed over to protect Shun Tian. If Emperor hadn’t taken that blow in his place, he would have died!

From then on, Shun Tian was bereft of his strongest attack. No matter how badly he hurt Fatty Hai, that tough guy would stand up again. What made him even angrier was that he couldn’t hit that crafty Wind Breath Seabird after his right fist had been smashed by Fatty Hai.

Fatty Hai’s clever Wind Breath Seabird had become the key to the entire battle. Every time Shun Tian knocked Fatty Hai down, that devoted bird would make use of its skill [Warm Sea Heavenly Wind], to transfer a tiny bit of its energy to him, to keep him on his feet. If Shun Tian could do it all over again, he would have killed that damnable, but incredibly intelligent, Wind Breath Seabird first!

There were times when Shun Tian felt that Fatty Hai’s Wind Breath Seabird was smarter than a person. There were no tricks or traps that could fool it. Nor was there a way to shoot it down.

Worst of all, Shun Tian was now afraid to get too close to Fatty Hai. He could no longer continue to use his previous style of attacks. Now, he would have to rely on his innate skill [Five Transformations Power] to fight.

After Fatty Hai had reverted from his ugly beast transformation, he had given up on defending himself. Due to that, he had been overwhelmed so greatly by Shun Tian that his belly was bulging out so much, he looked like a bloated toad. However, he had been storing up a massive amount of energy. He was like an active volcano that could erupt at any time.

Shun Tian knew what Fatty Hai was thinking of doing. That damn Fatty Hai wanted to blow himself up. That odious toad actually wanted to die together with him. As long as he kept his distance he would be fine but it would be extremely dangerous for him if he got too close.

Not to mention that this damnable fatty, who had only one partially usable arm left, was still able to use his appalling attack skill [Full Moon Rhinoceros].

“Why? What benefits did Yue Yang promise you, so you would fight for him to this extent? With your current strength, it wouldn’t be a problem for you to set up your own sect, and become one of the top ten Rankers in Tong Tian Tower. Because of you, the Hai family can rise to the top. They can become one of the four major families in the Soaring Dragon Continent, without having to rely on the Yue family in any way. Your family could even surpass them.

Yue Yang is definitely dead. Why do you insist on following him so loyally? You know, Fatty Hai, people like you need to be smart. Why would you do such a foolish thing?” Shun Tian asked with a puzzled expression, as he stroked his broken fist with his left hand, trying to ignore the pain.

“Haha!” Fatty Hai stayed still until he had heard it all. Then, he suddenly burst into laughter. He laughed so hard that blood began to flow from all five sense organs on his head[2], and his splintered ribs pierced outward until jagged white bone spikes were sticking out of his skin.

After a long time, he was slowly able to calm down. With a demeanor that was so composed that it surprised Shun Tian, he replied, “Do you think I’m stupid now? Shun Tian, you’re right! You are absolutely right! Even so, why haven’t you realized that I’m a fool? Hahaha!” Fatty Hai started to laugh wildly again. This time he laughed until tears were running down his face.

Gradually, his crying turned into laughter, then back to crying again.

He smiled for a while.

He cried for a while.

Finally, he started to sob loudly. Once again, tears poured out of the narrow slits that were all one could see of his swollen eyes. Rivers of tears ran down his tear-stained cheeks, washing away the blood.

“Shun Tian, if you had come to me a few years ago and said, Fatty Hai, you have a bright future, you could become one of the top ten Rankers in Tong Tian Tower, I would’ve appreciated it. But you didn’t. And, it wasn’t just you. Nobody in the entire Soaring Dragon Continent, or Tong Tian Tower, thought I was promising. In their eyes, I was a piece of shit. You guys never even bothered to take a look at me.”

“In all of Tong Tian Tower, only Yue Yang bothered to pay attention to a worthless person like me. Only he didn’t mind becoming friends with a loser like me! Is that something you would do? Shun Tian, this is the major difference between you and Yue Yang!”

“You’ll never be like Yue Yang. You’ll never rise to reach his level. To be honest, Shun Tian, you can’t hold a candle to Yue Yang. You could never fill Yue Yang’s shoes! You’re even more worthless than I am!”

“Shun Tian, there is no difference between you and a common person. To put it bluntly, you’re as blind as a bat. You’ve never taken the time to really get to know me. The one who really knows me best is Yue Yang, the one you want me to betray. To tell the truth, without Yue Yang, I would never have become the great boss, Fatty Hai. The same thing applies to Ye Kong and the others. Without him, Ye Kong, Li Qie, and Li Ge would have starved to death or died under the sharp claws of a beast. During their lifetimes, they would never have been able to raise their heads up or climb to the top. So, I’m going to live like a loser, living in the shadow of someone else all my life, until one day, like a pig, I’ll be used as a stepping stone, then slaughtered.”

“It was Yue Yang. He’s the one who made me what I am today. Do you understand?”

“Maybe what you’re trying to say is that Yue Yang developed our potential, but now that he’s about to be killed, I need to make a clean break with him, learn to be independent, then find a way to live a comfortable life that I can enjoy. Yes, you’re right. In reality, it’s necessary for me to do this. Of course, smart people need to be able to view the situation clearly, then go with the flow! Unfortunately, you’ve got it completely wrong. I’m a fatso who’s greedy, and afraid of death, but I’m not the kind of person that’s ungrateful. As you know, there is a saying, An honorable will readily die a loyal death for those who know his true worth!”[3]

“Without Yue Yang, how could my life be worth living? Without him, I’m just worthless mud. Not just the past, but now, and even the future. With Yue Yang, I, Fatty Hai, am the indomitable young hero of Tong Tian Tower, the pride of my parents and teachers, and a strong opponent that you can’t defeat. I’m a warrior that you can only try to persuade to surrender.”

“Shun Tian, compared to me, you’re practically perfect. You’re worthy of my admiration. I envy you! Nevertheless, do you know why you can’t be promoted to [Innate] Supreme-Rank? Compared to a warrior with Supreme Will, you’re just a pathetic worm. It’s not that you’re not talented enough, it’s not that you haven’t worked hard enough, it’s that your willpower has already reached its apex in this life. You’ll always be the frog of the bottom of the well![4] Even if I can’t win, even if I can’t see, I know you’re saying delusional things about Yue Yang. You’re an idiot. I can’t afford to be an idiot!”

“I’m fat, and I’m not as good as you. However, I’m stronger than you, because I believe in miracles. I believe I can create miracles. In fact, I’ve already done so. I’m weaker than you but, right now, you can’t beat me. That’s a miracle!”

“So, I’m more convinced than ever that Yue Yang who’s tens of thousands of times better than me can create a miracle. I’m not joking around. That guy has never done things the normal way. Everything he creates is incredible, the best in this world! Shun Tian, incompetent people like you can’t do anything but gaze at him with envy. Do you really think that your allies can kill him?”

“Shun Tian, do you know what I wanted to say to you when you were acting high-and-mighty? I sympathize with you! I pity you!” Fatty Hai said suddenly, with a serious expression, “You’re just a worthless ant. In Yue Yang’s life, even in my life as a fatty, you’re nothing more than a fucking, smart-ass flea. That’s not good enough to make a strong ranker want to kill you. Do you really think you’re going to be the victor?”

While listening to this, Shun Tian’s mouth twitched, from time to time. He wanted to dispute what the fatty had said, but he couldn’t find a suitable retort. His mouth opened and closed several times, but he was unable to speak a single word. When he tried to forcefully relieve the pressure on his chest, he soon noticed that there was a sweet taste in his throat. A moment later he spat out a mouthful of blood!

Fatty Hai’s face was swollen like an over-fermented bun, but it also shone with strength.

Shun Tian’s mind was in turmoil. He hadn’t lost the battle, but in terms of enduring adversity and strategy, it was clear to him that he had been utterly defeated. Even if he killed that annoying fatty, he wouldn’t be able to overcome the psychological trauma of this battle, even if he tried for the rest of his life.

Was he really only able to be an overweening frog at the bottom of a well?

Pfft!

Once he thought of this, a large amount of blood burst out of his mouth, like a fountain, spouting high-up in the sky.

*********

[1]. TN: [Warm Sea Heavenly Wind] – This skill creates healing energy that comes from the heart, full of love and care, that can help to heal the recipient. Think of it as being like a warm sea that has created a heavenly wind that caresses your skin, making you feel wonderful. [back]

[2]. 五官 wǔguān: The five sense organs; nose (smell), eyes (sight), lips (touch), tongue (taste), ears (sound). [back]

[3]. Chinese Saying: 士为悦己者死 shì wèi zhī jǐ zhě sǐ

Meaning: An honorable man will readily die a loyal death for those who know his true worth.

This saying comes from “Historical Records”, and was recorded in “Warring States Policy”. It’s called “The Story of the Man, What the Confident Did In the End” [back]

Image of the text in these two books > https://pic2.zhimg.com/80/v2-bc56468be7f974daa6e7a983900f8f28_hd.jpg

[4]. Chinese idiom: 井底之蛙 jǐng dǐ zhī wā = Trapped bottom the frog.

Meaning = A person whose knowledge is so limited that he or she has no idea about anything aside from the world of their own experience.

[What that person lacks.]

This title was added to the story as time passed. Originally, the author, philosopher Chuang-tzu, didn’t give the fable a title.

In fact, the common interpretation of a frog in a well is incorrect. The word 井 meant ‘trap’ back then.

Currently, this title has evolved into, The Frog of the Bottom of the Well.[back]

*** *** ***

chapters.title: Chapter 754.1 - The Dead, The Mad, Desperate Eye Contact (Part 1)
chapters.body:
Chapter 754.1 - The Dead, The Mad, Desperate Eye Contact (Part 1)

Chapter 754 – The Dead, The Mad, Desperate Eye Contact (Part 1)

By DDGod inLong Live Summons! 0

Proofreader: Erudite_Birdy

Editor: DDGod

The Hope Town where mercenaries used to rest had already disappeared, even the ruins had been destroyed.

The broken monument, lying upside down on the mountainside, was the only thing left that carried the mark of Hope Town. Ye Kong came out from the mud like a monkey and panted for a long time. After a while, he calmed down and shouted hoarsely ”Prince, are you dead? Prince?”

It took a long time when a weak voice in the mud answered” Not yet. I’m here. But if you don’t dig me out, I will soon suffocate to death!”

Hearing this, Ye Kong jumped to his feet and frantically dug the mound under him.

After digging for a long moment, he finally dug up a muddy figure, but he could not recognize it as the neat and handsome Tian Luo Prince.

“Cough!” Thousand Goblins Sect Leader struck his chest and coughed softly on a rock.

There was a big hole in Thousand Goblins Sect Leader’s lung and it was the masterpiece of Ye Kong. An hour ago, when Thousand Goblins Sect Leader hit Ye Kong in the heart, Ye Kong hit him back. To avoid attack to the heart, he dodged and his lung then got hurt. After the fight, Ye Kong’s heart stopped and Tian Luo Prince couldn’t recover even after a long time of rescue. Everybody thought Ye Kong was dead but he was as tough as a cockroach. After being caught in the rain for a while, he came back to life.

Black Prince, who wanted to perforate Ye Kong’s brain with a finger, failed and only gashed deep finger marks from forehead to cheek on his face, which nearly destroyed Ye Kong’s right eyeball.

Coincidentally, Ye Kong pulled out a piece of Black Prince’s gut. He didn’t know what it was and being afraid that Black Prince would take it back and recover, Ye Kong didn’t hesitate to put the gut into his mouth and eat it.

Even Black Prince got mad and beat him hard, but all Ye Kong could spit was only blood and stomach acid but not the gut.

Thousand Goblins Sect Leader coughed and Black Prince clutched his stomach.

Thousand Goblins Sect Leader, who had been floating in the sky, now was no longer able to fly and was forced to land on a rock. Of course, even now, he still insisted to stand higher than Ye Kong and Tian Luo Prince. Black Prince was also unable to remain invisible. To maintain his mystery, Black Prince covered himself with an invisibility cloak. Ye Kong and Tian Luo Prince saw a black creature standing in the shadows wearing an oversize and ragged cloak with blood all over it. If they hadn’t in life and death, Ye Kong and Tian Luo Prince would give some money to Black Prince since he really looked like a beggar in his costume.

“Hang on a little longer, they’ve already arrived the very limit.” Thousand Goblins Sect Leader consoled Black Prince.

In fact, he had already said it for a hundred times. He was sick to hear it himself but he could do nothing else.

The reality was that Ye Kong and Tian Luo Prince were a hundred times more difficult to deal with than Thousand Goblins Sect Leader and Black Prince had expected.

Thousand Goblins Sect Leader and Black Prince were in great anxiety. Shun Tian, the one who could seckill Fatty Hai, didn’t arrive and Marquis of Zi Jin still hadn’t defeated Xue Tan Lang. What’s worst, masters from the Senate in the Guang Ming Continent in full force, especially the Great Elder who lead tens of subordinates, still lose to the young girl Liu Ye! If the Elder arrived now, Thousand Goblins Sect Leader and Black Prince would definitely hang him. With such strong strength and support, the Great Elder still couldn’t defeat the girl. How could he label himself as the top in the Senate?

The forces that were the least to lose still didn’t come back. Thousand Goblins Sect Leader and Black Prince were very frustrated. How could they dominate the Tong Tian Tower even failed to handle such small things? Not to mention to rival the strong from the Demonic Palace, the Eastern Goblin Tribe, the Underworld Clan, and the Demon Clan. Was the Elder just kidding? No wonder the loser, Black Prison Emperor, was pessimistic towards Guang Ming Continent after the death of Sky Emperor. Whatever kind of battlefield and whoever would come were better than the situation now.

Thousand Goblins Sect Leader and Black Prince almost doubted that Shun Tian, Marquis of Zi Jin and the Great Elder were all killed by Yue Yang. Or else why they hadn’t come and helped? It was reasonable that Xue Tan Lang was a really tough guy to defeat. But Fatty Hai was just rubbish. Why Shun Tian didn’t seckill him? And what made them mad was that the Great Elder actually cannot handle the girl Liu Ye!

“Do you have more Martial Spirit Pills? Just give me one.” Ye Kong reached to Tian Luo Prince with a muddy hand.

“Go Away!” Tian Luo Prince flew into a rage. Ye Kong had eaten his share an hour ago, which nearly killed him. How dare Ye Kong to ask for more? The Martial Spirit Pill was made by Yue Yang and each one could only get a few. Tian Luo Prince valued them and saved the pills down but Ye Kong ate it all with no one left.

Tian Luo Prince licked his lips and found his throat very dry, so he opened his mouth to catch the drizzle from the sky, and then introduced to Ye Kong” The rain doesn’t seem to be poisonous. Take a sip!” When Ye Kong heard this, he found that the rain was not as green as before, and he opened his mouth like a toad. He drank two mouthfuls of rainwater and provoked Black Prince” Hey, your poisons are just useless and cannot last for a long time. Last time I met a venomous lizard in the Heaven and inhaled toxic smoke. You know what? After three days I smelt it again, it was still giddy!”

Black Pince ignored him. He decided not to attack until Shun Tian and others came to his aid. Ye Kong would fight hard as if his life was worthless.
